### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/delayed_rocksdb/RocksDbService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.delayed_rocksdb;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.rocksdb.*;

@Slf4j
public class RocksDbService {
    private final RocksDB rocksDB;

    public RocksDbService(String path) {
        RocksDB.loadLibrary();
        Options options = new Options();
        options.setCreateIfMissing(true)
                .setLevelCompactionDynamicLevelBytes(true)
                .setKeepLogFileNum(10)
                .setLogFileTimeToRoll(3600);

        try {
            this.rocksDB = RocksDB.open(options, path);
        } catch (RocksDBException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    public void put(String key, String value) throws RocksDBException {
        rocksDB.put(key.getBytes(), value.getBytes());
    }

    public String get(String key) throws RocksDBException {
        byte[] value = rocksDB.get(key.getBytes());
        return value != null ? new String(value) : null;
    }

    public void delete(String key) throws RocksDBException {
        rocksDB.delete(key.getBytes());
    }

    public boolean contains(String key) throws RocksDBException {
        byte[] value = rocksDB.get(key.getBytes());
        return value != null;
    }

    public void close() {
        if (rocksDB != null) {
            rocksDB.close();
        }
    }

    public void compact() throws RocksDBException {
        log.info("start rocksdb compact");
        rocksDB.compactRange();
        log.info("end rocksdb compact");
    }

    public RocksIterator iterator() {
        return rocksDB.newIterator();
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/delayed_rocksdb/RocksDbService.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/disruptor/DisruptorHelper.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.disruptor;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;

import com.lmax.disruptor.*;
import com.lmax.disruptor.dsl.Disruptor;
import com.lmax.disruptor.dsl.ProducerType;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/4
 */
@Slf4j
public class DisruptorHelper {

    private final Disruptor<KafkaEvent> disruptor;

    public DisruptorHelper(ProcessorConfig processorConfig, KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler, int parallel) {
        // 指定事件工厂KafkaEventFactory
        // 指定 ring buffer字节大小, 必须是2的N次方
        // 指定 DisruptorThreadFactory线程工厂
        // 单线程模式，性能更好
        // 等待策略，YieldingWaitStrategy：消费者线程自旋等待；BlockingWaitStrategy：阻塞等待；SleepingWaitStrategy:睡眠等待
        this.disruptor = new Disruptor<>(new KafkaEventFactory(), processorConfig.getDisruptorBufferSize(),
                new DisruptorThreadFactory(processorConfig.getProcessorName()), 1 == parallel ? ProducerType.SINGLE : ProducerType.MULTI, new BlockingWaitStrategy());
        // 设置异常统一处理器
        disruptor.setDefaultExceptionHandler(new KafkaExceptionHandler());

        // 设置事件业务处理器---多个消费者
        KafkaEventHandler[] handlers = new KafkaEventHandler[processorConfig.getDisruptorConsumerNum()];
        for (int i=1; i <= processorConfig.getDisruptorConsumerNum(); i++){
            handlers[i-1] = new KafkaEventHandler(i, kafkaMessageHandler);
        }

        disruptor.handleEventsWithWorkerPool(handlers);
        //单个消费者使用disruptor.handleEventsWith()
    }

    public void start() {
        //启动disruptor线程
        disruptor.start();
    }

    public void stop() {
        //停止disruptor线程
        log.info("shutdown, wait disruptor ring buffer data consumer");
        try {
            this.disruptor.shutdown(5L, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        } catch (TimeoutException e) {
            log.error("shutdown disruptor timeout");
        }
        log.info("shutdown disruptor success");
    }

    public void putRingBuffer(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record){
        KafkaEventProducer.onData(this.disruptor, record);
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/disruptor/DisruptorHelper.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/disruptor/KafkaEventHandler.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.disruptor;

import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import com.lmax.disruptor.EventHandler;
import com.lmax.disruptor.WorkHandler;
import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.Setter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

/**
 * Disruptor消费者
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/4
 */
@Slf4j
@Getter
@Setter
public class KafkaEventHandler implements WorkHandler<KafkaEvent>,EventHandler<KafkaEvent> {

    private String consumerId;

    private final KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler;

    public KafkaEventHandler(Integer consumerId, KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler) {
        this.consumerId = "disruptor_handler_"+consumerId;
        this.kafkaMessageHandler = kafkaMessageHandler;
    }

    @Override
    public void onEvent(KafkaEvent kafkaEvent, long sequence, boolean endOfBatch) throws Exception {
        // 处理事件
        ConsumerRecord<String, String> message = kafkaEvent.getMessage();
        log.debug("{} 消费消息, topic:{}, partition:{}, offset:{}", consumerId, message.topic(), message.partition(), message.offset());
        this.kafkaMessageHandler.handlerMessage(message);
    }


    @Override
    public void onEvent(KafkaEvent kafkaEvent) throws Exception {
        // 处理事件
        ConsumerRecord<String, String> message = kafkaEvent.getMessage();
        log.debug("{} 消费消息, topic:{}, partition:{}, offset:{}", consumerId, message.topic(), message.partition(), message.offset());
        this.kafkaMessageHandler.handlerMessage(message);
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/disruptor/KafkaEventProducer.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.disruptor;

import com.lmax.disruptor.EventTranslatorOneArg;
import com.lmax.disruptor.RingBuffer;
import com.lmax.disruptor.dsl.Disruptor;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

/**
 * Disruptor生产者
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/4
 */
public class KafkaEventProducer {

    private static final EventTranslatorOneArg<KafkaEvent, ConsumerRecord<String, String>> translator = (event, sequence, record) -> event.setMessage(record);

    public static void onData(Disruptor<KafkaEvent> disruptor, ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) {
        RingBuffer<KafkaEvent> ringBuffer = disruptor.getRingBuffer();
        ringBuffer.publishEvent(translator, record);
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/disruptor/KafkaExceptionHandler.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.disruptor;

import com.lmax.disruptor.ExceptionHandler;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

/**
 * Disruptor消费异常处理
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/5
 */
@Slf4j
public class KafkaExceptionHandler implements ExceptionHandler<KafkaEvent> {

    @Override
    public void handleEventException(Throwable ex, long sequence, KafkaEvent event) {
        log.error("disruptor process kafka message error", ex);
        //异常退出
        System.exit(1);
    }

    @Override
    public void handleOnStartException(Throwable ex) {
        log.error("disruptor start error", ex);
    }

    @Override
    public void handleOnShutdownException(Throwable ex) {
        log.error("disruptor shutdown error", ex);
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaAdminClient.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.AdminClient;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.ListConsumerGroupOffsetsOptions;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.OffsetSpec;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerConfig;
import org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class KafkaAdminClient {
    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;
    private final AdminClient adminClient;

    public KafkaAdminClient(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.adminClient = initAdminClient();

    }

    private AdminClient initAdminClient() {
        Properties props = new Properties();
        props.setProperty(ConsumerConfig.BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getBootstrap());
        props.setProperty(ConsumerConfig.CLIENT_ID_CONFIG, "feature-async-admin-client-" + processorConfig.getTaskName()+"-"+ processorConfig.getProcessorName());
        return AdminClient.create(props);
    }

    /**
     * 获取topic的所有分区
     */
    public Collection<TopicPartition> getTopicPartition() throws Exception {
        Collection<String> topics = Collections.singletonList(this.processorConfig.getTopic());
        Collection<TopicPartition> partitions =
                adminClient.describeTopics(topics).all().get().values().stream()
                        .flatMap(t -> t.partitions().stream().map(p -> new TopicPartition(t.name(), p.partition())))
                        .collect(Collectors.toSet());
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(partitions)) {
            log.error("no topic found on the kafka server,topic:{}", topics);
            System.exit(1);
        }
        return partitions;
    }

    /**
     * 获取消费分区对应的线程号
     */
    public int getParallelOwner(TopicPartition tp, int parallel) {
        int startIndex = ((tp.topic().hashCode() * 31) & 0x7FFFFFFF) % parallel;
        return (startIndex + tp.partition()) % parallel;
    }

    /**
     * 获取分区开始offset
     */
    public Map<TopicPartition, Long> getPartitionStartOffset(Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions) throws Exception {
        Boolean startFromConfig = this.processorConfig.getStartFromConfig();
        Boolean startOffsetFromMysql = this.processorConfig.getStartOffsetFromMysql();
        // 默认从数据库保存的offset消费,如果从配置文件启动,则以配置文件指定的方式进行消费
        KafkaStartupModeEnum startMode = KafkaStartupModeEnum.MYSQL_OFFSETS;
        if (startFromConfig) {
            startMode = KafkaStartupModeEnum.getKafkaStartupModeEnum(this.processorConfig.getStartMode());
        }
        if (startMode == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException("start mode is null ,please check config");
        }
        Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionOffsetMap;
        switch (startMode) {
            case EARLIEST:
                partitionOffsetMap = this.listOffsets(topicPartitions, OffsetSpec.earliest());
                break;
            case LATEST:
                partitionOffsetMap = this.listOffsets(topicPartitions, OffsetSpec.latest());
                break;
            case TIMESTAMP:
                String seekByTimestamp = this.processorConfig.getSeekOffsetBy();
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(seekByTimestamp == null || seekByTimestamp.length() != 13 && System.currentTimeMillis() < Long.parseLong(seekByTimestamp),
                        this.processorConfig.getTopic() + "'s seek timestamp special error");
                long timestamp = Long.parseLong(this.processorConfig.getSeekOffsetBy());
                partitionOffsetMap = this.listOffsets(topicPartitions, OffsetSpec.forTimestamp(timestamp));
                break;
            case SPECIFIC_OFFSETS:
                String seekByOffset = this.processorConfig.getSeekOffsetBy();
                JSONObject jsonObject = null;
                try {
                    jsonObject = JSON.parseObject(seekByOffset);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName() + "'s Kafka consumer startup mode offset's config special error!");
                    log.error(e.toString());
                    System.exit(1);
                }
                partitionOffsetMap = new HashMap<>();
                for (TopicPartition topicPartition : topicPartitions) {
                    Long offset = jsonObject.getLong(topicPartition.toString());
                    partitionOffsetMap.put(topicPartition, offset);
                }
                break;
            case MYSQL_OFFSETS:
                partitionOffsetMap = new HashMap<>();
                for (TopicPartition topicPartition : topicPartitions) {
                    String bootstrap = processorConfig.getBootstrap();
                    String topic = processorConfig.getTopic();
                    String groupId = processorConfig.getGroupId();
                    int partition = topicPartition.partition();
                    KafkaOffsetInfo offsetInfo = KafkaOffsetMgr.getOffsetInfo(bootstrap, topic, groupId, partition);
                    if (offsetInfo != null) {
                        Long offset = offsetInfo.getOffset();
                        partitionOffsetMap.put(topicPartition, offset);
                        log.info("offset from mysql, topicPartition:{},offset:{}", topicPartition, offset);
                    }
                }
                break;
            case KAFKA_OFFSETS:
            default:
                partitionOffsetMap = this.listConsumerGroupOffsets(topicPartitions);
                break;
        }
        log.info("find offset,startup mode:{}, start offset:{}", startMode.getStartupMode(), partitionOffsetMap);
        for (Map.Entry<TopicPartition, Long> entry : partitionOffsetMap.entrySet()) {
            TopicPartition topicPartition = entry.getKey();
            Long offset = entry.getValue();
            if (offset == null || offset < 0) {
                log.error("unable to find offset by {}, please check the configuration,topic partition:{},offset:{},", startMode.getStartupMode(), topicPartition, offset);
                System.exit(1);
            }
        }
        return partitionOffsetMap;
    }

    /**
     * 获取kafka服务器记录的offset
     */
    private Map<TopicPartition, Long> listConsumerGroupOffsets(Collection<TopicPartition> partitions)
            throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {
        ListConsumerGroupOffsetsOptions options =
                new ListConsumerGroupOffsetsOptions().topicPartitions(new ArrayList<>(partitions));
        return adminClient
                .listConsumerGroupOffsets(this.processorConfig.getGroupId(), options)
                .partitionsToOffsetAndMetadata()
                .thenApply(
                        result -> {
                            Map<TopicPartition, Long> offsets = new HashMap<>();
                            result.forEach(
                                    (tp, oam) -> {
                                        if (oam != null) {
                                            offsets.put(tp, oam.offset());
                                        }
                                    });
                            return offsets;
                        })
                .get();
    }

    private Map<TopicPartition, Long> listOffsets(Collection<TopicPartition> partitions, OffsetSpec offsetSpec) throws Exception {
        Map<TopicPartition, OffsetSpec> topicPartitionOffsets = partitions.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(partition -> partition, __ -> offsetSpec));
        return adminClient
                .listOffsets(topicPartitionOffsets)
                .all()
                .thenApply(
                        result -> {
                            Map<TopicPartition, Long> offsets = new HashMap<>();
                            result.forEach(
                                    (tp, offsetsResultInfo) -> {
                                        if (offsetsResultInfo != null) {
                                            offsets.put(tp, offsetsResultInfo.offset());
                                        }
                                    });
                            return offsets;
                        })
                .get();
    }

    public void shutdown() {
        if (this.adminClient != null) {
            adminClient.close();
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaAdminClient.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaAssignConsumer.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.KafkaConsumer;

import java.util.Properties;

import static org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerConfig.*;

@Slf4j
public class KafkaAssignConsumer {
    private static final Integer MAX_POLL_MILLS = 3600000;

    private final KafkaConsumer<String, String> consumer;
    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;

    public KafkaAssignConsumer(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        String groupId = processorConfig.getGroupId();
        String topic = processorConfig.getTopic();
        CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(groupId == null || groupId.length() == 0 || topic == null || topic.length() == 0, "group_id or topics is null");
        Properties props = new Properties();
        props.put(BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getBootstrap());
        props.put(GROUP_ID_CONFIG, groupId);
        props.put(AUTO_OFFSET_RESET_CONFIG, KafkaStartupModeEnum.LATEST.getStartupMode());
        props.put(ENABLE_AUTO_COMMIT_CONFIG, "false");
//        props.put(AUTO_COMMIT_INTERVAL_MS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getKafkaAutoCommitMs() == null ? "1000" : processorConfig.getKafkaAutoCommitMs());
        props.put(SESSION_TIMEOUT_MS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getKafkaSessionTimeoutMs() == null ? "600000" : processorConfig.getKafkaSessionTimeoutMs());
        props.put(REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS_CONFIG, "600000");
        props.put(KEY_DESERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer");
        props.put(VALUE_DESERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer");
        props.put(MAX_POLL_RECORDS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getBatchSize() == null ? 1000 : processorConfig.getBatchSize());
        if (processorConfig.getKafkaPartitionMaxBytes() != null) {
            //分区最大拉取数据，默认1M
            props.put(MAX_PARTITION_FETCH_BYTES_CONFIG, processorConfig.getKafkaPartitionMaxBytes());
        }
        if (processorConfig.getKafkaMinBytes() != null) {
            props.put(FETCH_MIN_BYTES_CONFIG, processorConfig.getKafkaMinBytes());
        }
        if (processorConfig.getKafkaMaxWaitMs() != null) {
            //当kafka数据不满足fetch.min.bytes拉取等待时间
            props.put(FETCH_MAX_WAIT_MS_CONFIG, processorConfig.getKafkaMaxWaitMs());
        }
        props.put(MAX_POLL_INTERVAL_MS_CONFIG, MAX_POLL_MILLS);

        this.consumer = new KafkaConsumer<>(props);
        log.info(consumer.groupMetadata().toString());
    }

    public KafkaConsumer<String, String> getConsumerClient() {
        return this.consumer;
    }

    public ProcessorConfig getProcessorConfig() {
        return processorConfig;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaAssignConsumer.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaConsumerCallable.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecords;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.KafkaConsumer;
import org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition;
import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.WakeupException;

import java.time.Duration;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.Callable;

@Slf4j
public class KafkaConsumerCallable implements Callable<Integer> {

    private final Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions;
    private final Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionStartOffsetMap;
    private final KafkaAssignConsumer kafkaAssignConsumer;
    private final KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler;

    private static final Counter kafkaConsumerCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("kafka_consumer_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc kafka consumer process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    public KafkaConsumerCallable(ProcessorConfig processorConfig, KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler, Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions, Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionStartOffsetMap) {
        this.kafkaAssignConsumer = new KafkaAssignConsumer(processorConfig);
        this.kafkaMessageHandler = kafkaMessageHandler;
        this.topicPartitions = topicPartitions;
        this.partitionStartOffsetMap = partitionStartOffsetMap;
    }

    @Override
    public Integer call() {
        KafkaConsumer<String, String> consumer = kafkaAssignConsumer.getConsumerClient();
        log.info("thread consume topic partitions:{},partitions offset:{}", topicPartitions, partitionStartOffsetMap);
        consumer.assign(topicPartitions);
        for (Map.Entry<TopicPartition, Long> entry : partitionStartOffsetMap.entrySet()) {
            TopicPartition topicPartition = entry.getKey();
            Long offset = entry.getValue();
            consumer.seek(topicPartition, offset);
        }
        log.info("consumer meta:{}", consumer.groupMetadata());

        while (true) {
            try {
                ConsumerRecords<String, String> records = consumer.poll(Duration.ofMillis(100));
                kafkaMessageHandler.handlerMessages(records);
                //offset提交
                consumer.commitSync();
                //监控上报
                kafkaConsumerCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(Thread.currentThread().getName())).inc();
            } catch (WakeupException wakeupException) {
                log.info("thread was done, has closed kafka consumer");
                consumer.close();
                break;
            } catch (Throwable e) {
                consumer.close();
                System.exit(1);
            }
        }
        log.info(Thread.currentThread().getName() + "线程结束消费，程序开始退出");
        return 1;
    }

    public void shutdown() {
        //让主线程中消费者在下次poll的时候抛出WakeupException，优雅关闭kafka consumer
        kafkaAssignConsumer.getConsumerClient().wakeup();
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaConsumerCallable.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaHandlerModeEnum.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Getter;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2022/10/8
 */
@Getter
@AllArgsConstructor
public enum KafkaHandlerModeEnum {

    /**
     * 正常消息处理
     */
    NORMAL(0),

    /**
     * disruptor队列处理
     */
    DISRUPTOR(1),

    /**
     * 普通队列处理
     */
    WORK_QUEUE(2)

    ;
    private Integer handlerMode;

    public static KafkaHandlerModeEnum getKafkaStartupModeEnum(Integer mode){
        if(mode == null){
            return null;
        }
        KafkaHandlerModeEnum[] values = values();
        for (KafkaHandlerModeEnum value : values) {
            if (value.getHandlerMode().equals(mode)) {
                return value;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaMessageHandler.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.k2m.K2M;
import com.akulaku.core.disruptor.DisruptorHelper;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.batch.Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ReflectionUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.TimeUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.work_queue.WorkQueueHelper;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.KafkaService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.task.impl.kafka.KafkaSourceMetaDataTask;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.MoreExecutors;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecords;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/4
 */
@Slf4j
public class KafkaMessageHandler {

    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;

    private final DataProcessor dataProcessor;

    private final Class<?> topicClazz;

    /**
     * 当前消费模式，参考KafkaHandlerModeEnum
     */
    private KafkaHandlerModeEnum currentMode = KafkaHandlerModeEnum.NORMAL;


    private ScheduledExecutorService offsetScheduledExecutorService;

    private final Map<Integer, ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long>> partitionOffsetMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    public KafkaMessageHandler(ProcessorConfig processorConfig, DataProcessor dataProcessor, Class<?> topicClazz) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.dataProcessor = dataProcessor;
        this.topicClazz = topicClazz;
        if ((this.dataProcessor instanceof KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor)
                && processorConfig.getDisruptorSwitch()) {
            currentMode = KafkaHandlerModeEnum.DISRUPTOR;
        }

        if ((this.dataProcessor instanceof KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor)
                && processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch()) {
            currentMode = KafkaHandlerModeEnum.WORK_QUEUE;
            this.offsetScheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(r -> new Thread(r, "offset-thread"));
            // 启动offset定时提交线程
            this.startOffsetExecutor();
        }
    }

    public void handlerMessages(ConsumerRecords<String, String> records) throws Exception {
        int count = records.count();
        if (count > 0) {
            if (processorConfig.getIsBatchConsumer()) {
                //消息转换
                List<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> recordList = new ArrayList<>();
                records.forEach(recordList::add);
                //批量消费
                this.procMsgs(recordList);
                //收集元数据
                if (this.processorConfig.getCollectMetaSwitch()) {
                    this.collectKafkaSourceMetaKaData(recordList.get(recordList.size() - 1));
                }
                //保存offset
                this.saveKafkaOffsets(recordList);
            } else {
                for (ConsumerRecord<String, String> record : records) {
                    switch (currentMode) {
                        case NORMAL:
                            this.handlerMessage(record);
                            break;
                        case DISRUPTOR:
                            KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor processor = (KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor) this.dataProcessor;
                            DisruptorHelper disruptorHelper = processor.getDisruptorHelper();
                            disruptorHelper.putRingBuffer(record);
                            break;
                        case WORK_QUEUE:
                            processor = (KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor) this.dataProcessor;
                            WorkQueueHelper workQueueHelper = processor.getQueueHelper();
                            workQueueHelper.putQueue(record);
                            break;
                        default:
                            break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public void handlerMessage(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) throws Exception {
        try {
            //单条消费
            this.procMsg(record);
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            log.error("kafka_data:{},offset:{},partition:{},topic:{},reason:{}",
                    record.value(), record.offset(), record.partition(), record.topic(), "process message error", e);
            throw e;
        }
        //收集元数据
        if (this.processorConfig.getCollectMetaSwitch()) {
            this.collectKafkaSourceMetaKaData(record);
        }
        //保存offset,Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor自己保存offset
        if (!(this.dataProcessor instanceof Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor)) {
            this.saveKafkaOffset(record);
        }
    }

    public void procMsg(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) throws Exception {
        String data = record.value();
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSON.parseObject(data);
        Object obj = jsonObject;
        if (dataProcessor.isConvertMsgToBean()) {
            if (jsonObject != null) {
                try {
                    obj = JSON.parseObject(data, topicClazz);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(String.format("exception message:%s,input data:%s", e.getMessage(), jsonObject), e);
                    return;
                }
            }
        }
        CalcContextData calcContextData = new CalcContextData();
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, obj);
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD, record);
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG, processorConfig);
        long startTime = TimeUtils.nowMillisTime();
        boolean result = this.dataProcessor.process(calcContextData);
        long cost = TimeUtils.costMillis(startTime);
        //增加日志开关
        if (processorConfig.getLogSwitch()) {
            Object reason;
            if ((this.dataProcessor instanceof FeaturesProcessorV1)) {
                reason = calcContextData.getData("process_result");
            } else {
                reason = result ? "data processing completed" : "data filtered";
            }
          /*  K2M k2m = processorConfig.getK2m();
            if (k2m != null) {
                log.info("offset:{},partition:{},topic:{},spend_time:{},reason:{}",
                        record.offset(), record.partition(), processorConfig.getTopic(), cost, reason
                );
            } else {*/
                log.info("kafka_data:{},offset:{},partition:{},topic:{},spend_time:{},reason:{}",
                        data, record.offset(), record.partition(), processorConfig.getTopic(), cost, reason
                );
//            }
        }
    }

    private void procMsgs(List<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> records) throws Exception {
        CalcContextData calcContextData = new CalcContextData();
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD, records);
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG, processorConfig);
        StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
        try {
            this.dataProcessor.process(calcContextData);
            //增加日志开关
            if (processorConfig.getLogSwitch()) {
                log.info("topic:{}, data size:{}, spend_time:{}, reason: data processing completed", records.get(0).topic(), records.size(), watch.getTime());
            }
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            log.error("process batch message error", e);
            throw e;
        } finally {
            watch.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * kafka消息元数据采集
     */
    private void collectKafkaSourceMetaKaData(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) {
        String msg = record.value();
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(msg)) {
            return;
        }
        String taskName = processorConfig.getTaskName();
        String groupId = processorConfig.getGroupId();
        String maintainer = processorConfig.getMaintain();
        String description = processorConfig.getDescription();
        Class<?> eventClazz = processorConfig.getTopicClazz();
        String topic = processorConfig.getTopic();
        String bootstrapService = processorConfig.getBootstrap();
        KafkaSourceMetaDataTask task = new KafkaSourceMetaDataTask(new TaskInfo(taskName, groupId, maintainer, description), topic, bootstrapService, msg, eventClazz);
        KafkaService.addMetaDataTask(task);
    }


    private void saveKafkaOffsets(List<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> recordList) {
        //提取这一批数据，每个分区最大的记录
        Map<Integer, Optional<ConsumerRecord<String, String>>> currentOffset = recordList.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(ConsumerRecord::partition, Collectors.maxBy(Comparator.comparingLong(ConsumerRecord::offset))));
        for (Map.Entry<Integer, Optional<ConsumerRecord<String, String>>> entry : currentOffset.entrySet()) {
            if (entry != null) {
                Integer partition = entry.getKey();
                Optional<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> value = entry.getValue();
                if (value.isPresent()) {
                    long offset = value.get().offset();
                    log.info(String.format("%s 保存 Kafka ：%s - %s, GroupID: %s, offset: %d 信息到MySql", Thread.currentThread().getName(), processorConfig.getTopic(), partition, processorConfig.getGroupId(), offset));
                    KafkaOffsetMgr.saveOffset(processorConfig.getBootstrap(), processorConfig.getTopic(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), entry.getKey(), offset);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 队列模式:定时提交offset,其它模式:每500条提交一次
     */
    private void saveKafkaOffset(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) {
        if (this.processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch()) {
            // 队列模式,将offset保存到内存里,由定时线程定时提交连续递增的最大offset
            partitionOffsetMap.computeIfAbsent(record.partition(), p -> new ConcurrentSkipListSet<>()).add(record.offset());
        } else {
            if (record.offset() > 0 && record.offset() % KafkaOffsetMgr.INTERVAL == 0) {
                log.info(String.format("%s 保存 Kafka ：%s - %s, GroupID: %s, offset: %d 信息到MySql"
                        , Thread.currentThread().getName(), processorConfig.getTopic()
                        , record.partition(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), record.offset()
                ));
                KafkaOffsetMgr.saveOffset(processorConfig.getBootstrap(), processorConfig.getTopic(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), record.partition(), record.offset());
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 定时提交连续递增最大的offset
     */
    private void startOffsetExecutor() {
        offsetScheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
            if (!partitionOffsetMap.isEmpty()) {
                for (Map.Entry<Integer, ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long>> entry : partitionOffsetMap.entrySet()) {
                    Integer partition = entry.getKey();
                    ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long> offsets = entry.getValue();
                    Long offset = CommonUtils.findMaxConsecutive(offsets);
                    if (offset != null) {
                        log.info("save offset,topic:{},partition:{},offset:{}", processorConfig.getTopic(), partition, offset);
                        KafkaOffsetMgr.saveOffset(processorConfig.getBootstrap(), processorConfig.getTopic(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), partition, offset);
                        CommonUtils.removeConsecutive(offsets, offset);
                    }
                }
            }
        }, 1, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }

    /**
     * 关闭offset定时提交线程池
     */
    public void stopOffsetExecutor() {
        if (offsetScheduledExecutorService != null && !offsetScheduledExecutorService.isShutdown()) {
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(offsetScheduledExecutorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
    }
}

```

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;

@Data
@AllArgsConstructor
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)
public class KafkaOffsetInfo {
    private String cluster;
    private String topic;
    private String groupId;
    private Integer partition;

    @EqualsAndHashCode.Exclude
    private Long offset;

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaOffsetMgr.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

@Slf4j
public class KafkaOffsetMgr {
    private static final Map<KafkaOffsetInfo, KafkaOffsetInfo> kafkaOffsetInfos = new HashMap<>();
    public static final int INTERVAL = 500;
    public static String dataBaseName;

    static {
        try {
            String checkTableSql = "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'dimrtfeaturedb' AND table_name = 'r_kafka_partition_offset'";
            Object value = DbService.queryOneValue(Constants.METADATADB, checkTableSql, null, "table_name", null);
            dataBaseName = value != null ? "dimrtfeaturedb" : "taskinfodb";
            String sql = String.format("select cluster_name,topic_name,group_id,`partition`,`offset`,create_time,update_time from %s.r_kafka_partition_offset", dataBaseName);

            List<Map<String, Object>> lstResult = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, null, null);
            lstResult.forEach(m -> {
                String clusterName = (String) m.get("cluster_name");
                String topicName = (String) m.get("topic_name");
                String groupId = (String) m.get("group_id");
                Integer partition = (Integer) m.get("partition");
                Long offset = (Long) m.get("offset");

                KafkaOffsetInfo kafkaOffsetInfo = new KafkaOffsetInfo(clusterName, topicName, groupId, partition, offset);

                kafkaOffsetInfos.put(kafkaOffsetInfo, kafkaOffsetInfo);
            });
        } catch (SQLException ex) {
            log.error("query kafka offset info error, error info: {}", ex.toString());
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }

    public static KafkaOffsetInfo getOffsetInfo(String clusterName, String topic, String groupId, Integer partition) {
        KafkaOffsetInfo ret = kafkaOffsetInfos.get(new KafkaOffsetInfo(clusterName.trim(), topic.trim(), groupId.trim(), partition, 0L));
        log.info("get offset from mysql,result:{}",  ret);
        return ret;
    }

    public static void saveOffset(String clusterName, String topic, String groupId, Integer partition, Long offset) {
        KafkaOffsetInfo kafkaOffsetInfo = new KafkaOffsetInfo(clusterName.trim(), topic.trim(), groupId.trim(), partition, offset);
        kafkaOffsetInfos.put(kafkaOffsetInfo, kafkaOffsetInfo);

        String sql = String.format("insert into %s.r_kafka_partition_offset(cluster_name,topic_name,group_id,`partition`,`offset`,create_time,update_time)\n" +
                "values(?,?,?,?,?,?,?)\n" +
                "on duplicate key update `offset`=values(`offset`),\n" +
                "update_time=values(update_time)", dataBaseName);

        Long ts = System.currentTimeMillis();
        List<SqlParam> lstSqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(clusterName.trim(), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(topic.trim(), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(groupId.trim(), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(partition, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(offset, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(ts, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
        lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(ts, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));

        try {
            DbService.insertDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, lstSqlParams, null);
        } catch (SQLException ex) {
            log.error("save offset error, error info: {}", ex.toString());
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaOffsetMgr.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaProducerClient.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.CommonsCfg;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.JdbcCfg;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.producer.*;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Properties;

@Slf4j
public class KafkaProducerClient {
    private final Producer<String, String> producer;
    private final String bootstrapServer;

    public KafkaProducerClient(String bootstrapServer) {
        this.bootstrapServer = bootstrapServer;
        Properties props = new Properties();
        props.put(ProducerConfig.BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, bootstrapServer);
        //发送消息到broker后的确认值，默认1，主节点确认即可
        props.put(ProducerConfig.ACKS_CONFIG, "1");
        //重试次数， 默认0
        props.put(ProducerConfig.RETRIES_CONFIG, 3);
        //重试时间间隔，默认100ms
        props.put(ProducerConfig.RETRY_BACKOFF_MS_CONFIG, 1000);
        //单条数据的最大字节数，默认1MB
        props.put(ProducerConfig.MAX_REQUEST_SIZE_CONFIG, 1*1024*1024);

        //批量发送最小字节数，默认16KB
        props.put(ProducerConfig.BATCH_SIZE_CONFIG, 16384);
        //批量发送两次发送最大时间间隔
        props.put(ProducerConfig.LINGER_MS_CONFIG, 100);
        //缓存消息大小,默认32MB,多个KafkaProducerClient时注意JVM
        props.put(ProducerConfig.BUFFER_MEMORY_CONFIG, 33554432);
        props.put(ProducerConfig.KEY_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer");
        props.put(ProducerConfig.VALUE_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer");
        this.producer = new org.apache.kafka.clients.producer.KafkaProducer<>(props);
    }

    /**
     * 带参数构造方法
     * @param bootstrapServer Kafka Bootstrap Server
     * @param configMap 配置参数Map 基础配置{"acks":"1","retries":3,"retry.backoff.ms":1000,"max.request.size":5242880, "batch.size":16384,"linger.ms":0,"buffer.memory":33554432}
     */
    public KafkaProducerClient(String bootstrapServer, Map<String, Object> configMap) {
        this.bootstrapServer = bootstrapServer;
        configMap.put(ProducerConfig.BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, bootstrapServer);
        //默认使用字符编码
        configMap.putIfAbsent(ProducerConfig.KEY_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer");
        configMap.putIfAbsent(ProducerConfig.VALUE_SERIALIZER_CLASS_CONFIG, "org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer");
        this.producer = new KafkaProducer<>(configMap);
    }

    /**
     * 异步发送消息
     * @param topic
     * @param data
     */
    public void sendData(String topic, String data) {
        Callback callback = (metadata, exception) -> {
            if (exception != null) {
                String error = String.format("send msg to kafka error,topic:%s,msg:%s", topic, data);
                log.error(error, exception);
                throw new RuntimeException();
            } else {
                log.debug("send msg to kafka successfully,topic:{},msg:{}", topic, data);
            }
        };
        this.producer.send(new ProducerRecord<>(topic, data), callback);
    }

    /**
     * 异步发送消息
     * @param topic
     * @param data
     */
    public void sendData(String topic, String key, String data) {
        Callback callback = (metadata, exception) -> {
            if (exception != null) {
                String error = String.format("send msg to kafka error,topic:%s,msg:%s", topic, data);
                log.error(error, exception);
                throw new RuntimeException();
            } else {
                log.debug("send msg to kafka successfully,topic:{},msg:{}", topic, data);
            }
        };
        this.producer.send(new ProducerRecord<>(topic, key, data), callback);
    }

    /**
     * 异步发送消息（指定partition）
     * @param topic
     * @param partition
     * @param key
     * @param data
     */
    public void sendData(String topic, Integer partition, String key, String data) {
        Callback callback = (metadata, exception) -> {
            if (exception != null) {
                String error = String.format("send msg to kafka error,topic:%s,msg:%s", topic, data);
                log.error(error, exception);
                throw new RuntimeException();
            } else {
                log.debug("send msg to kafka successfully,topic:{},msg:{}", topic, data);
            }
        };
        this.producer.send(new ProducerRecord<>(topic, partition, key, data), callback);
    }

    public String getBootstrapServer() {
        return bootstrapServer;
    }

    public Producer<String, String> getProducer() {
        return producer;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaProducerClient.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaProducerService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;


@Slf4j
public class KafkaProducerService {
    private static final Map<String, KafkaProducerClient> kafkaProducerClientMap = new HashMap<>();
    private static final ReentrantLock lock = new ReentrantLock();

    public static void sendData(String cluster, String topic, String data) throws Exception{
        getKafkaProducerClient(cluster).sendData(topic, data);
    }

    public static void sendData(String cluster, String topic, String key, String data) throws Exception{
        getKafkaProducerClient(cluster).sendData(topic, key, data);
    }

    public static void sendData(String cluster, String topic, Integer partition, String key, String data) throws Exception{
        getKafkaProducerClient(cluster).sendData(topic, partition, key, data);
    }

    public static KafkaProducerClient getKafkaProducerClient(String cluster) throws Exception{
        String kafkaCluster = changeKafkaCluster(cluster);
        KafkaProducerClient client = kafkaProducerClientMap.get(kafkaCluster);
        if (client == null) {
            lock.lock();
            try {
                client = kafkaProducerClientMap.get(kafkaCluster);
                if (client != null) {
                    return client;
                }
                // 查询kafka集群表，根据集群名称获取机器名称和端号
                String sql = String.format("select host, port, producer_config from taskinfodb.t_kafka_info where cluster_name = '%s'", kafkaCluster);
                List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, null, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                    Map<String, Object> result = results.get(0);
                    String host = result.get("host").toString();
                    Integer port = Integer.parseInt(result.get("port").toString());
                    String bootstrapServer = String.format("%s:%d", host, port);
                    String producerConfigJson = (String) result.getOrDefault("producer_config", null);
                    if(StringUtils.isEmpty(producerConfigJson)){
                        client = new KafkaProducerClient(bootstrapServer);
                    } else {
                        JSONObject producerConfig = JSONObject.parseObject(producerConfigJson);
                        client = new KafkaProducerClient(bootstrapServer, producerConfig);
                    }
                    kafkaProducerClientMap.put(kafkaCluster, client);
                } else {
                    throw new Exception(String.format("no kafka configuration with cluster name '%s' was found in taskinfodb.t_kafka_info table", kafkaCluster));
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("get kafka producer client error", e);
                throw new Exception(e);
            } finally {
                lock.unlock();
            }
        }
        return client;
    }

    private static String changeKafkaCluster(String cluster) {
        if (DbService.isPreProductEnv) {
            return Constant.PRE_PRODUCT_KAFKA;
        } else {
            return cluster;
        }
    }

    public static void closeService(){
        log.info("close kafka connect, session size:{}", kafkaProducerClientMap.size());
        if (!kafkaProducerClientMap.isEmpty()) {
            for (KafkaProducerClient producerClient : kafkaProducerClientMap.values()) {
                if (producerClient != null && producerClient.getProducer() != null) {
                    producerClient.getProducer().close();
                }
            }
            kafkaProducerClientMap.clear();
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
//        CommonsCfg commons = YamlParser.parse(CommonsCfg.class, Constant.DATA_SOURCE_CFG_YAML_FILE);
//        JdbcCfg metadataDB = YamlParser.parse(JdbcCfg.class, Constant.META_DATA_DB_CFG_YAML_FILE);
//        DbService.initDbPool(commons, metadataDB);
//        try {
//            KafkaProducerService.getKafkaProducerClient("risk-common-kafka.aku");
//        } catch (Exception e) {
//            e.printStackTrace();
//        }
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/kafka/KafkaStartupModeEnum.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.kafka;

import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Getter;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2022/10/8
 */
@Getter
@AllArgsConstructor
public enum KafkaStartupModeEnum {

    /**
     * 指定消费最开始的数据
     */
    EARLIEST("earliest"),

    /**
     * 指定消费最开始的数据
     */
    LATEST("latest"),

    /**
     * 指定消费timestamp的数据
     */
    TIMESTAMP("timestamp"),

    /**
     * 指定消费offset的数据
     */
    SPECIFIC_OFFSETS("specific_offsets"),

    /**
     * 从kafka服务器保存消费者组的offset消费
     */
    KAFKA_OFFSETS("kafka_offsets"),

    /**
     * 从数据库保存的offset消费
     */
    MYSQL_OFFSETS("mysql_offsets");


    private String startupMode;

    public static KafkaStartupModeEnum getKafkaStartupModeEnum(String startupMode){
        if(startupMode == null || "".equals(startupMode)){
            return null;
        }
        KafkaStartupModeEnum[] values = values();
        for(int i=0; i< values.length; i++){
            if(values[i].getStartupMode().equalsIgnoreCase(startupMode)){
                return values[i];
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/nebula/NebulaService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.nebula;

import com.akulaku.core.redis.RedissonService;
import com.akulaku.core.util.LogUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.NebulaPoolConfig;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.SessionPool;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.SessionPoolConfig;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.data.HostAddress;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.data.Node;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.data.ResultSet;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.data.ValueWrapper;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.net.NebulaPool;
import com.vesoft.nebula.client.graph.net.Session;
import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;
import org.redisson.api.RLock;

import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2022-03-24.
 */

@Slf4j
@Getter
public class NebulaService {

    private static final Map<String, SessionPool> sessionMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    private static volatile NebulaService nebulaService = null;

    private static final ReentrantLock lock = new ReentrantLock();

    public static NebulaService getInstance() {
        if (nebulaService == null) {
            synchronized (NebulaService.class) {
                if (nebulaService == null) {
                    nebulaService = new NebulaService();
                }
            }
        }
        return nebulaService;
    }

    private NebulaService() {

    }

    private SessionPool getNebulaSessionPool(String catalog) {
        SessionPool sessionPool = sessionMap.get(catalog);
        if (sessionPool != null) {
            return sessionPool;
        }
        try {
            lock.lock();
            sessionPool = sessionMap.get(catalog);
            if (sessionPool == null){
                log.info("initial {} nebula session pool", catalog);
                String getNeo4jInfoSql = String.format("SELECT catalog, env_type, urls, username, password, space FROM taskinfodb.t_nebula_info where catalog = '%s'", catalog);

                List<Map<String, Object>> result = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, getNeo4jInfoSql, null, null);
                if (result == null || result.size() == 0) {
                    throw new Exception("nebula catalod:" + catalog + "is not exists，please config！");
                }
                for (Map<String, Object> map : result) {
                    String urlStr = (String) map.get("urls");
                    String username = (String) map.get("username");
                    String password = CryptoUtil.decode((String) map.get("password"));
                    String spaceName = (String) map.get("space");

                    List<HostAddress> addresses = Arrays.stream(urlStr.split(",")).map(url -> {
                        String[] words = url.split(":");
                        return new HostAddress(words[0], Integer.parseInt(words[1]));
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());

                    SessionPoolConfig sessionPoolConfig = new SessionPoolConfig(addresses, spaceName, username, password);
                    sessionPoolConfig.setMinSessionSize(10).setMaxSessionSize(100).setRetryConnectTimes(3)
                            .setWaitTime(100)
                            .setRetryTimes(3)
                            .setIntervalTime(100);
                    sessionPool = new SessionPool(sessionPoolConfig);
                    sessionMap.put(catalog, sessionPool);
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("initial {} nebula session pool error", catalog, e);
            System.exit(1);
        } finally {
            lock.unlock();
        }
        return sessionPool;
    }

    public static void closeService() {
        log.info("close nebula connect, session size:{}", sessionMap.size());
        if (!sessionMap.isEmpty()) {
            for (SessionPool nebulaSessionPool : sessionMap.values()) {
                nebulaSessionPool.close();
            }
            sessionMap.clear();
        }
    }

    private List<Map<String, Object>> baseExecute(SessionPool session, String ngql) throws Exception{
        List<Map<String, Object>> list = new ArrayList<>();
        ResultSet result;
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            if (count >= 5) {
                log.error("retry upon 5 times, nebula_ngql:{}", ngql);
                throw new Exception("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
            }
            try {
                StopWatch stopWatch = StopWatch.createStarted();
                result = session.execute(ngql);
                stopWatch.stop();
                if (result != null && result.isSucceeded()){
                    if(stopWatch.getTime() > 50){
                        log.info("ngql:{} execute success, spend time:{}", ngql, stopWatch.getTime());
                    }
                    break;
                } else {
                    JSONObject failedMsg = new JSONObject();
                    failedMsg.put("nebula_ngql", ngql);
                    failedMsg.put("exec_code", result != null ? result.getErrorCode() : 0);
                    failedMsg.put("exec_msg",  result != null ? result.getErrorMessage() : "system error");
                    throw new Exception(failedMsg.toJSONString());
                }
            } catch (Exception e){
                log.error("nebula execute ngql:{} error", ngql, e);
                count ++;
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
            }
        }
        List<String> keys = result.keys();
        for(int i = 0; i < result.rowsSize(); i++){
            ResultSet.Record record = result.rowValues(i);
            Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            for(int j=0; j<keys.size(); j++){
                map.put(keys.get(j), getValue(record.values().get(j)));
            }
            list.add(map);
        }
        return list;
    }

    /**
     * 执行ngql
     * @param nebulaCatalog nebula实例
     * @param ngql
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public List<Map<String, Object>> execute(String nebulaCatalog, String ngql) throws Exception{
        if(ngql == null || "".equals(ngql)){
            return null;
        }
        SessionPool session = getNebulaSessionPool(nebulaCatalog);
        if(session == null){
            throw new Exception("nebula execute session can not be null");
        }
        List<Map<String, Object>> result = this.baseExecute(session, ngql);
        if (isContainReturnValue(ngql)) {
            return result;
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * 执行ngql,自动加锁
     * @param nebulaCatalog nebula实例
     * @param redisCatalog redis实例
     * @param ngql
     * @param lockKey
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public List<Map<String, Object>> execute(String nebulaCatalog, String redisCatalog, String ngql, String lockKey) throws Exception{
        if(ngql == null || "".equals(ngql)){
            return null;
        }
        SessionPool session = getNebulaSessionPool(nebulaCatalog);
        if(session == null){
            throw new Exception("nebula execute session can not be null");
        }
        if(lockKey == null || "".equals(lockKey)){
            return this.execute(nebulaCatalog, ngql);
        } else {
            RLock redisLock = null;
            List<Map<String, Object>> result;
            try {
                redisLock = RedissonService.lock(redisCatalog, lockKey);
                result = this.baseExecute(session, ngql);
            } finally {
                //是锁定状态和是当前执行线程的锁,则解锁
                if (redisLock != null) {
                    if (redisLock.isLocked() && redisLock.isHeldByCurrentThread()) {
                        redisLock.unlock();
                    }
                }
            }
            if (isContainReturnValue(ngql)) {
                return result;
            }
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * 批量执行ngql，自动加锁
     * @param nebulaCatalog
     * @param redisCatalog
     * @param ngqlMap eg:{"ngql1":"redis_lock_key1"}
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public List<Map<String, Object>> execute(String nebulaCatalog, String redisCatalog, Map<String, String> ngqlMap) throws Exception{
        List<Map<String, Object>> resultList = new ArrayList<>();
        if(ngqlMap == null || ngqlMap.size() <= 0){
            return null;
        }
        SessionPool session = getNebulaSessionPool(nebulaCatalog);
        if(session == null){
            throw new Exception("nebula execute session can not be null");
        }
        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : ngqlMap.entrySet()){
            List<Map<String, Object>> result = this.execute(nebulaCatalog, redisCatalog, entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
            if(result != null && result.size() > 0){
                resultList.addAll(result);
            }
        }
        return resultList;
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        NebulaPool pool = new NebulaPool();
        Session session = null;
        try {
            NebulaPoolConfig nebulaPoolConfig = new NebulaPoolConfig();
            nebulaPoolConfig.setMinConnSize(1).setMaxConnSize(10).setTimeout(30000).setWaitTime(3600000);
            List<HostAddress> addresses = Collections.singletonList(new HostAddress("192.168.6.136", 9669));
            boolean initResult = pool.init(addresses, nebulaPoolConfig);
            if (!initResult) {
                log.error("pool init failed.");
                return;
            }
            List<Map<String, Object>> list = new ArrayList<>();
            int count = 0;
            while (true) {
                ResultSet resultSet;
                try {
                    session = pool.getSession("root", "nebula", false);
                    session.execute("use feature_graph");
                    resultSet = session.execute("FETCH PROP ON phone '085748083698' YIELD 'UAB06' IN SPLIT(properties(vertex).`tags`,',') AS isExist, properties(vertex).`tags` AS oldTags;");
                } catch (Exception e){
                    if (count >= 3) {
                        log.error("retry upon 3 times, please check error log");
                        throw e;
                    }
                    log.error("nebula execute ngql error, error message：{}", LogUtils.getExceptionDetailString(e));
                    try {
                        TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                    } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                        log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                    }
                    count ++;
                    continue;
                }
                if (resultSet != null && resultSet.isSucceeded()) {
                    List<String> keys = resultSet.keys();
                    for(int i = 0; i < resultSet.rowsSize(); i++){
                        ResultSet.Record record = resultSet.rowValues(i);
                        Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
                        for (String key : keys) {
                            map.put(key, getValue(record.values().get(0)));
                        }
                        list.add(map);
                    }
                    System.out.println(JSONObject.toJSON(list));
                    return;
                } else {
                    throw new Exception(resultSet != null ? resultSet.getErrorMessage() : "system error");
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        } finally {
            if (session != null){
                session.release();
            }
            pool.close();
        }
    }

    private static Object getValue (ValueWrapper value) throws UnsupportedEncodingException {
        if (value.isLong()) {
            return value.asLong();
        }
        if (value.isBoolean()) {
            return value.asBoolean();
        }
        if (value.isDouble()) {
            return value.asDouble();
        }
        if (value.isString()) {
            return value.asString();
        }
        if (value.isTime()) {
            return value.asTime();
        }
        if (value.isDate()) {
            return value.asDate();
        }
        if (value.isDateTime()) {
            return value.asDateTime();
        }
        if (value.isVertex()) {
            Node node = value.asNode();
            Map<String, Object> result = new HashMap<>();
            if(node != null){
                for(String tag : node.tagNames()){
                    Map<String, ValueWrapper> properties = node.properties(tag);
                    for (Map.Entry<String, ValueWrapper> entry : properties.entrySet()) {
                        result.put(entry.getKey(), getValue(entry.getValue()));
                    }
                }
            }
            return result;
        }
        if (value.isEdge()) {
            return value.asRelationship();
        }
        if (value.isPath()) {
            return value.asPath();
        }
        if (value.isList()) {
            return value.asList();
        }
        if (value.isSet()) {
            return value.asSet();
        }
        if (value.isMap()) {
            return value.asMap();
        }
        return null;
    }

    private static Boolean isContainReturnValue(String ngql){
        return ngql.toLowerCase().contains("return") || ngql.toLowerCase().contains("yield");
    }

    private static Boolean isQuery(String ngql){
        return ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("match") || ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("optional match") ||
                ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("lookup") || ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("go") ||
                ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("fetch") || ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("show") ||
                ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("find path") || ngql.toLowerCase().startsWith("get subgraph");
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j/Neo4jServiceV1.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.neo4j;

import com.akulaku.core.util.LogUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.StringUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.neo4j.driver.*;
import org.neo4j.kernel.DeadlockDetectedException;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;


@Slf4j
@Getter
public class Neo4jServiceV1 {

    private static final Map<String, Neo4jClient> clientMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    private static final Map<String, Session> sessionMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    private static final ReentrantLock lock = new ReentrantLock();

    private static Neo4jClient getNeo4jClient(String catalog) {
        Neo4jClient neo4jClient = clientMap.get(catalog);
        if (neo4jClient != null) {
            return neo4jClient;
        }
        try {
            lock.lock();
            neo4jClient = clientMap.get(catalog);
            if (neo4jClient == null) {
                log.info("initial {} Neo4j connect", catalog);
                String getNeo4jInfoSql = String.format("SELECT catalog,env_type,url,username,password FROM taskinfodb.t_neo4j_info where catalog = '%s'", catalog);
                List<Map<String, Object>> result = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, getNeo4jInfoSql, null, null);
                if (result == null || result.size() == 0) {
                    throw new Exception("图库实例:" + catalog + "元数据不存在，请配置！");
                }
                for (Map<String, Object> map : result) {
                    String password = CryptoUtil.decode((String) map.get("password"));
                    String url = (String) map.get("url");
                    Driver driver = GraphDatabase.driver(url, AuthTokens.basic((String) map.get("username"), password));
                    String ip = StringUtils.getIp(url);
                    neo4jClient = new Neo4jClient(driver, (Integer) map.get("env_type"), ip);
                    clientMap.put(catalog, neo4jClient);
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("初始化Neo4j连接失败，错误信息：" + LogUtils.getExceptionDetailString(e));
            System.exit(1);
        } finally {
            lock.unlock();
        }
        return neo4jClient;
    }

    public static void closeService() {
        log.info("close neo4j connect");
        if (!sessionMap.isEmpty()) {
            for (Session session : sessionMap.values()) {
                if (session != null && session.isOpen()) {
                    session.close();
                }
            }
            sessionMap.clear();
        }
        if (!clientMap.isEmpty()) {
            for (Neo4jClient neo4jClient : clientMap.values()) {
                Driver driver = neo4jClient.getDriver();
                if (driver != null) {
                    driver.close();
                }
            }
            clientMap.clear();
        }
    }


    public static Session getSession(String catalog) {
        //一个线程一个Session
        String sessionKey = catalog + Thread.currentThread().getName();
        Session session = sessionMap.get(sessionKey);
        if (session == null || !session.isOpen()) {
            Neo4jClient neo4jClient = getNeo4jClient(catalog);
            Driver driver = neo4jClient.getDriver();
            session = driver.session();
            sessionMap.put(sessionKey, session);
        }
        return session;
    }

    public static List<List<Map<String, Object>>> read(String catalog, String cypher) {
        List<List<Map<String, Object>>> allResultList = new ArrayList<>();
        allResultList.add(read(catalog, cypher, null));
        return allResultList;
    }

    public static List<List<Map<String, Object>>> read(String catalog, List<String> cyphers) {
        List<List<Map<String, Object>>> allResultList = new ArrayList<>();
        for(String cypher : cyphers){
            allResultList.add(read(catalog, cypher, null));
        }
        return allResultList;
    }

    public static List<List<Map<String, Object>>> read(String catalog, Map<String, Value> cypherMap) {
        List<List<Map<String, Object>>> allResultList = new ArrayList<>();
        for(Map.Entry<String, Value> entry : cypherMap.entrySet()){
            allResultList.add(read(catalog, entry.getKey(), entry.getValue()));
        }
        return allResultList;
    }

    public static List<Map<String, Object>> read(String catalog, String cypher, Value parameters) {
        Session session = getSession(catalog);
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            try {
                Result result = session.run(cypher, parameters);
                List<Map<String, Object>> resultList = new ArrayList<>();
                while (result.hasNext()) {
                    Record record = result.next();
                    resultList.add(record.asMap());
                }
                return resultList;
            } catch (DeadlockDetectedException e) {
                log.error("run cypher concurrent conflict, run after 5 seconds in 5 times");
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
                if (count > 5) {
                    log.error("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
                    throw e;
                }
                count++;
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 单条插入,带参数，使用单独插入场景，频繁关闭事务，性能慢
     * @param catalog
     * @param cypher
     * @param parameters
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static void write(String catalog, String cypher, Value parameters) throws Exception {
        Session session = getSession(catalog);
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            try (Transaction transaction = session.beginTransaction()) {
                transaction.run(cypher, parameters);
                transaction.commit();
                return;
            } catch (DeadlockDetectedException e) {
                log.error("run cypher concurrent conflict, run after 5 seconds in 5 times");
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
                if (count > 5) {
                    log.error("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
                    throw e;
                }
                count++;
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 单条插入,不带参数，使用单独插入场景，频繁关闭事务，性能慢
     * @param catalog
     * @param cypher
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static void write(String catalog, String cypher) throws Exception {
        write(catalog, cypher, null);
    }

    /**
     * 批量插入，不带参数
     * @param catalog
     * @param cyphers
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static void write(String catalog, List<String> cyphers) throws Exception {
        Session session = getSession(catalog);
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            try (Transaction transaction = session.beginTransaction()) {
                for (String cypher : cyphers) {
                    transaction.run(cypher);
                }
                transaction.commit();
                return;
            } catch (DeadlockDetectedException e) {
                log.error("run cypher concurrent conflict, run after 5 seconds in 5 times");
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
                if (count > 5) {
                    log.error("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
                    throw e;
                }
                count++;
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 批量插入，带参数
     * @param catalog
     * @param cypherMap
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static void write(String catalog, LinkedHashMap<String, Value> cypherMap) throws Exception {
        Session session = getSession(catalog);
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            try (Transaction transaction = session.beginTransaction()) {
                for (Map.Entry<String, Value> cypher : cypherMap.entrySet()) {
                    transaction.run(cypher.getKey(), cypher.getValue());
                }
                transaction.commit();
                return;
            } catch (DeadlockDetectedException e) {
                log.error("run cypher concurrent conflict, run after 5 seconds in 5 times");
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
                if (count > 5) {
                    log.error("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
                    throw e;
                }
                count++;
            }
        }
    }

    public static List<List<Map<String, Object>>> upsert(String catalog, String... cyphers) throws Exception {
        Session session = getSession(catalog);
        int count = 0;
        while (true) {
            try (Transaction transaction = session.beginTransaction()) {
                List<List<Map<String, Object>>> allResultList = new ArrayList<>();
                for (String cypher : cyphers) {
                    List<Map<String, Object>> resultList = new ArrayList<>();
                    Result result = transaction.run(cypher);
                    while (result.hasNext()) {
                        Record record = result.next();
                        resultList.add(record.asMap());
                    }
                    allResultList.add(resultList);
                }
                transaction.commit();
                return allResultList;
            } catch (DeadlockDetectedException e) {
                log.error("run cypher concurrent conflict, run after 5 seconds in 5 times");
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(5);
                } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                    log.error("Thread is interrupted, retry again");
                }
                if (count > 5) {
                    log.error("retry upon 5 times, please check error log");
                    throw e;
                }
                count++;
            }
        }
    }

    public static String getServerIp(String catalog) {
        Neo4jClient neo4jClient = clientMap.get(catalog);
        return neo4jClient.getIp();
    }
}

```

```java
package com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/12/8
 */
public class Neo4jMonitorAlertThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    private final String processorName;

    public Neo4jMonitorAlertThreadFactory(String processorName) {
        this.processorName = processorName;
    }

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, String.format("%s-alter-thread-%d", processorName, index.get()));
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j_monitor/Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor;

import lombok.Data;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;

import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.Delayed;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2022-01-11.
 */
@Data
public class Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem implements Delayed,Serializable {

    private static final long serialVersionUID = -9070655431126037653L;
    private static final long DEFAULT_DELAY_TIME = 1000;

    private List<String> checkCyphers;

    private String checkCatalog;

    /**
     * 下次生效时间
     */
    private long activeTime;

    public Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem(List<String> checkCyphers, String checkCatalog) {
        this.checkCyphers = checkCyphers;
        this.checkCatalog = checkCatalog;
        this.activeTime = System.currentTimeMillis() + DEFAULT_DELAY_TIME;
    }

    public Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem(List<String> checkCyphers, String checkCatalog, long delayMillisecond) {
        this.checkCyphers = checkCyphers;
        this.checkCatalog = checkCatalog;
        this.activeTime = System.currentTimeMillis() + delayMillisecond;
    }

    @Override
    public long getDelay(@NotNull TimeUnit unit) {
        long diffTime = activeTime  - System.currentTimeMillis();
        return unit.convert(diffTime, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);

    }

    @Override
    public int compareTo(@NotNull Delayed o) {
        return (int) (this.activeTime - ((Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem) o).getActiveTime());
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j_monitor/Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem.java**
