### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j_monitor/Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j.Neo4jServiceV1;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.DelayQueue;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/12/8
 */
@Slf4j
public class Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer implements Runnable{

    private final DelayQueue<Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem> delayQueue;

    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;

    /**
     * 每个线程的标识
     */
    private boolean isShutdown = false;

    /**
     * 错误次数缓存
     */
    private Map<String, Double> errorCntMap;

    /**
     * 计数器
     */
    private AtomicInteger batchCnt;

    public Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer(DelayQueue<Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem> delayQueue, ProcessorConfig processorConfig, Map<String, Double> errorCntMap, AtomicInteger batchCnt) {
        this.delayQueue = delayQueue;
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.errorCntMap = errorCntMap;
        this.batchCnt = batchCnt;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        while (!isShutdown) {
            try {
                Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem neo4jMonitor = delayQueue.take();
                List<String> checkCyphers = neo4jMonitor.getCheckCyphers();
                for (String checkCypher : checkCyphers) {
                    String catalog = neo4jMonitor.getCheckCatalog();
                    //每条数据，要延后2s再去查数据库
                    List<Map<String, Object>> result = Neo4jServiceV1.read(catalog, checkCypher, null);
                    if (result.isEmpty() || !(boolean) result.get(0).getOrDefault("result", false)) {
                        errorCntMap.put(catalog, errorCntMap.getOrDefault(catalog, 0.0) + 1);
                        log.error("任务：{}写入数据库:{}的语句:{}，检查不存在", this.getClass().getName(), catalog, checkCypher);
                        break;
                    } else {
                        log.info("任务：{}写入数据库成功, 数量：{}", this.getClass().getName(), batchCnt.get());
                    }
                }
                batchCnt.incrementAndGet();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error(String.format("taskName=%s, topic=%s, 延迟队列消费异常", processorConfig.getTaskName(), processorConfig.getTopic()), e);
            }
        }
    }

    public void stop() {
        isShutdown = true;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j_monitor/Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer.java**

package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;

/**
 * @author zhangmoon
 * @date 2021-06-30 18:06
 * @description
 */
public abstract class DataProcessor {

    protected ProcessorConfig processorConfig;

    protected DataProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
    }

    /**
     * 离线特征计算
     */
    public void beforeStart() {

    }

    public abstract void start();

    public abstract void stop();

    public abstract boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception;

    /**
     * 是否将kafka消息反序列为kafka bean实例
     *
     * @return 默认为true, 可继承重写
     */
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return true;
    }

    public ProcessorConfig getProcessorConfig() {
        return processorConfig;
    }
}

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/FeaturesCacheProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.*;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.*;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.common.FeatureLogicEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;

import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheBuilder;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheLoader;
import com.google.common.cache.LoadingCache;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;

/**
 * 特征最值计算 Processor
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class FeaturesCacheProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor  implements Processor {

    private final List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList;
    /**
     * 特征查询sql缓存
     */
    private final List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList;
    /**
     * 特征维度缓存
     */
    private final List<String> domainKafkaNames;
    /**
     * 特征insert sql缓存
     */
    private final FeatureInsertSql featureInsertSql;

    private final Map<String, Set<String>> sqlUseFieldMap;
    private final Map<String, Map<String, String>> sqlWhereEqMap;
    private final Map<String, Map<String, String>> sqlWhereNotEqMap;
    private final Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> sqlWhereInMap;
    private final Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> sqlWhereNotInMap;

    /**
     * 特征最大时间缓存
     */
    private final LoadingCache<String, Long> featureLoadingCache;

    protected FeaturesCacheProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        /**
         * 特征信息缓存
         */
        this.featureInfoList = this.defineFeature();
        this.domainKafkaNames = this.analysisFeatureDomainKafkaNames(featureInfoList);
        this.featureQuerySqlList = this.analysisFeature(featureInfoList);
        this.featureInsertSql = this.analysisFeatureInsertSql(featureInfoList, this.taskInfo);
        this.sqlUseFieldMap = this.analysisSqlField(this.featureQuerySqlList, this.taskInfo);
        this.sqlWhereEqMap = this.analysisSqlWhereEq(this.featureQuerySqlList);
        this.sqlWhereNotEqMap = this.analysisSqlWhereNotEq(this.featureQuerySqlList);
        this.sqlWhereInMap = this.analysisSqlWhereIn(this.featureQuerySqlList);
        this.sqlWhereNotInMap = this.analysisSqlWhereNotIn(this.featureQuerySqlList);
        this.recordFeature(featureInfoList, this.taskInfo);
        this.featureLoadingCache = getLoadingCache();
        this.logSqlInfo();
    }

    public LoadingCache<String, Long> getLoadingCache(){
        return CacheBuilder.newBuilder()
                //设置并发级别，并发级别是指可以同时写缓存的线程数
                .concurrencyLevel(Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors())
                //设置缓存容器的初始容量
                .initialCapacity(1000)
                //设置缓存最大容量，超过之后就会按照LRU最近虽少使用算法来移除缓存项
                .maximumSize(100000)
                .expireAfterWrite(6, TimeUnit.HOURS)
                //设置要统计缓存的命中率
                .recordStats()
                //设置缓存的移除通知
                .removalListener(notification -> log.info("remove cache key:{},reason：{}", notification.getKey(), notification.getCause()))
                //build方法中可以指定CacheLoader，在缓存不存在时通过CacheLoader的实现自动加载缓存
                .build(this.getCacheLoader());
    }

    /**
     * 定义特征
     */
    public abstract List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature();

    /**
     * 定义特征计算逻辑和最值字段
     * @return
     */
    public abstract Map<String, String> getFeatureReference();

    /**
     * 定义缓存逻辑
     * @return
     */
    public abstract CacheLoader<String, Long> getCacheLoader();

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FuncProcessCalNode(this::beforeFilterProcess, CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS, taskInfo));
        this.calcNodes.add(new FilterCalNode(this::filter, CALC_NODE_NAME_FILTER, taskInfo));
        this.calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(this::delay, CALC_NODE_NAME_CONSUMER_DELAY, taskInfo));
        this.calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(this::featureCalc, CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_CALC, taskInfo));
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    @Override
    public String generateInsertSql(FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo, List<String> insertFields) {
        Sink featureSinkTable = featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable();
        List<FeatureDomain> featureDomains = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains();
        List<String> featureDomainDbNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insertFields.add("feat_update_time");
        List<String> duplicateUpdateFields = new ArrayList<>(insertFields);
        for(String domainDbName : featureDomainDbNames){
            duplicateUpdateFields.remove(domainDbName);
        }

        String sinkTableName = featureSinkTable.getSchema() + "." + featureSinkTable.getTable();
        String sinkCatalog = DbService.changeCatalog(featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable().getCatalog());
        List<String> sinkTableMetaFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(sinkCatalog, sinkTableName);
        if (sinkTableMetaFields.contains("feat_create_time")) {
            insertFields.add("feat_create_time");
        }
        return SqlUtils.generateInsertSql(sinkTableName, insertFields, duplicateUpdateFields, this.duplicateUpdateCondition());
    }

    /**
     *  更新条件（默认返回null,可重写）
     * @return
     */
    public String duplicateUpdateCondition(){
        return null;
    }


    /**
     * 过滤前,对消息进行处理,如增加或修改消息里的字段
     * @param calcContextData
     * @return
     */
    public JSONObject beforeFilterProcess(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
    }

    /**
     * 消息是否处理过滤,当默认过滤规则不满足要求,可以被重写按新的规则进行过滤
     * @param calcContextData
     * @return
     */
    public Boolean filter(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        EventTypeEnum eventTypeEnum = EventTypeEnum.getEvenType(eventType);
        String databaseName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("databaseName");
        String tableName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("tableName");
        String fullTableName = databaseName + "." + tableName;
        Map<String, String> whereEqFieldValueMap = this.sqlWhereEqMap
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, String> whereNotEqFieldValueMap = this.sqlWhereNotEqMap
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, List<String>> whereInFieldValueMap = this.sqlWhereInMap
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, List<String>> whereNotInFieldValueMap = this.sqlWhereNotInMap
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        switch (eventTypeEnum){
            case UPDATE:
                return updateFilter(domainKafkaNames, this.sqlUseFieldMap.get(fullTableName), whereEqFieldValueMap, whereNotEqFieldValueMap, whereInFieldValueMap, whereNotInFieldValueMap, beforeData, rowData);
            case INSERT:
            case DELETE:
                JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? beforeData : rowData;
                return insertAndDeleteFilter(domainKafkaNames, whereEqFieldValueMap, whereNotEqFieldValueMap, whereInFieldValueMap, whereNotInFieldValueMap, data);
            default:
                break;
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * 特征计算
     * @param calcContextData
     */
    public void featureCalc(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS, JSONObject.class);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        EventTypeEnum eventTypeEnum = EventTypeEnum.getEvenType(eventType);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        Set<String> dataSet = new HashSet<>();

        Map<String, String> featureReference = this.getFeatureReference();
        String referenceField = featureReference.get(Processor.FEATURE_KAFKA_FIELD);
        switch (eventTypeEnum){
            case DELETE:
                String cacheKey = getLoadingCacheKey(beforeData);
                Long featureCacheTime = getTimeFromCache(cacheKey);
                if(beforeData.get(referenceField).equals(featureCacheTime)){
                    //如果删除的数据是缓存的值，则移除缓存，让程序重新查询计算
                    this.featureLoadingCache.invalidate(cacheKey);
                }
                dataSet.add("beforeData");
                break;
            case INSERT:
                dataSet.add("rowData");
                break;
            case UPDATE:
                //更新事件,处理维度变更逻辑
                boolean resultBeforeData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, beforeData);
                boolean resultRowData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, rowData);
                // 1.rowData里的维度没有空值,则添加rowData
                if (!resultRowData) {
                    dataSet.add("rowData");
                }
                // 2.beforeData里的维度没有空值且维度值有变更,则添加beforeData
                if (!resultBeforeData) {
                    for (String domainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
                        String rowValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(domainKafkaName));
                        String beforeValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(domainKafkaName));
                        if (!StrUtil.equals(beforeValue, rowValue)) {
                            dataSet.add("beforeData");
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                break;
            default:
                throw new RuntimeException(String.format("The change type %s is not supported", eventType));
        }
        String catalog = featureInsertSql.getCatalog();
        String insertSql = featureInsertSql.getSql();
        String referenceLogic = featureReference.get(FeatureLogicEnum.FEATURE_LOGIC);
        try {
            for (String dataKey : dataSet) {
                //处理的数据
                JSONObject dataObj = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(dataKey);
                String cacheKey = getLoadingCacheKey(dataObj);
                Long featureCacheTime = getTimeFromCache(cacheKey);
                Long featureTimeField = dataObj.getLong(referenceField);
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                for (String featureDomainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(dataObj.get(featureDomainKafkaName), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                }
                featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
                    Object result = dataObj.get(featureInfo.getFeatureLogic());
                    Object value = result == null ? featureInfo.getFeatureDefaultValue() : result;
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                });

                if (featureCacheTime == null) {
                    //缓存没有值，插入数据
                    DbService.insertDb(catalog, insertSql, sqlParams, null);
                } else {
                    FeatureLogicEnum featureLogic = FeatureLogicEnum.getFeatureLogic(referenceLogic);
                    switch (featureLogic){
                        case MAX:
                            if(featureCacheTime <= featureTimeField){
                                // 缓存有记录, 与缓存时间进行对比,大等于特征值,则插入数据库
                                DbService.insertDb(catalog, insertSql, sqlParams, null);
                            }
                            break;
                        case MIN:
                            if(featureCacheTime >= featureTimeField) {
                                // 缓存有记录, 与缓存时间进行对比,小等于特征值,则插入数据库
                                DbService.insertDb(catalog, insertSql, sqlParams, null);
                            }
                            break;
                        default:
                            throw new RuntimeException(String.format("The feature logic type %s is not supported", referenceLogic));
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }

    private String getLoadingCacheKey(JSONObject dataObj){
        List<String> domainValues = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String featureDomainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames){
            Object domainValue = dataObj.get(featureDomainKafkaName);
            if(domainValue != null){
                domainValues.add(JSONObject.toJSONString(domainValue));
            }
        }
        if(domainValues.size() > 0){
            return String.join("-", domainValues);
        }
        return "";
    }

    private Long getTimeFromCache(String cacheKey){
        if(StrUtil.isEmpty(cacheKey)){
            throw new RuntimeException("cache key cannot be null");
        }
        Long maxTime= null;
        try {
            maxTime = this.featureLoadingCache.get(cacheKey);
        } catch (CacheLoader.InvalidCacheLoadException e) {
            // CacheLoader不支持返回空值,会抛出异常,为此捕捉异常
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("get cacheKey:{} from cache error", cacheKey, e);
            throw new RuntimeException("get time from cache error");
        }
        return maxTime;
    }

    /**
     * 输出日志
     */
    private void logSqlInfo() {
        this.featureQuerySqlList.forEach(featureQuerySql ->
                log.info("processor:{},\n params:{},\n query sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), featureQuerySql.getParams(), featureQuerySql.getSql())
        );

        log.info("processor:{},\n domain:{},\n insert sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), featureInsertSql.getDomains(), featureInsertSql.getSql());


        log.info("processor:{},sqlUseFieldMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.sqlUseFieldMap);
        log.info("processor:{},sqlWhereEqMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.sqlWhereEqMap);
        log.info("processor:{},sqlWhereNotEqMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.sqlWhereNotEqMap);
        log.info("processor:{},sqlWhereInMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.sqlWhereInMap);
        log.info("processor:{},sqlWhereNotInMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.sqlWhereNotInMap);
    }

}
```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/FeaturesCacheProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/FeaturesProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.ListUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ObjectUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInsertSql;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureQuerySql;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.ST;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;

@Deprecated
@Slf4j
public abstract class FeaturesProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {

    protected static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process";
    protected static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";
    protected static final String CONSUMER_DELAY_NODE_NAME = "delay";
    protected static final String CONSUMER_FEATURE_CALC_NODE_NAME = "feature_calc";
    private static final int DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE = 50;

    private final List<FeatureInfo> featureInfoList;
    private Map<String, List<FeatureInfo>> caliberFeatureInfoListMap;
    private final Map<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final Map<String, FeatureInsertSql> caliberDomainInsertSqlMap = new HashMap<>();
    private Map<String, Set<String>> selectSqlTableFieldMap = null;
    private Map<String, Map<String, String>> selectSqlWhereEqExpressTableFieldValueMap = null;
    private final Map<String, List<String>> tableFieldsMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final Set<String> domainKafkaNames = new HashSet<>();


    private static final String INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL = "INSERT INTO taskinfodb.t_async_task_meta_info" +
            "(feature_name,feature_domains,feature_sql,query_table_fields,query_db_server,insert_db_server,insert_table_name,task_name,maintainer,status_code,create_time, update_time) " +
            "values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,1,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)  " +
            "on duplicate key update  " +
            "feature_sql=values(feature_sql), " +
            "query_table_fields=values(query_table_fields), " +
            "query_db_server=values(query_db_server), " +
            "task_name=values(task_name), " +
            "maintainer=values(maintainer), " +
            "status_code=values(status_code), " +
            "update_time=values(update_time)";


    protected FeaturesProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.featureInfoList = this.defineFeature();
        this.initSql();
        this.writeFeatureDefineToDb();
    }

    /**
     * 特征分组大小,默认值50,可被重写
     */
    protected int defineFeatureGroupSize() {
        return DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE;
    }

    /**
     * 定义特征
     */
    protected abstract List<FeatureInfo> defineFeature();

    /**
     * 从特征定义初始化查询sql,插入sql及使用到的字段
     */
    private void initSql() {
        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap = featureInfoList.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(FeatureInfo::getFeatureCaliber));
        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.forEach((caliber, featureInfoList) -> {
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = new ArrayList<>();
            List<FeatureDomain> featureDomains = featureInfoList.get(0).getFeatureDomains();
            List<String> featureDomainDbNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            List<String> featureDomainKafkaNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getKafkaName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            domainKafkaNames.addAll(featureDomainKafkaNames);
            String featureCatalog = featureInfoList.get(0).getFeatureCatalog();
            List<String> insertFields = new ArrayList<>(featureDomainDbNames);
            List<String> featureLogics = featureInfoList.stream().map(featureInfo -> {
                String featureName = featureInfo.getFeatureName();
                String featureLogic = featureInfo.getFeatureLogic();
                insertFields.add(featureName);
                return String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());

            int featureGroupSize = defineFeatureGroupSize();
            if (featureLogics.size() > featureGroupSize) {
                List<List<String>> groupFeatureLogics = ListUtil.split(featureLogics, featureGroupSize);
                List<FeatureQuerySql> list = groupFeatureLogics.stream().map(logics -> {
                    String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", logics);
                    ST st = new ST(caliber);
                    st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
                    String sql = st.render();
                    List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
                    return new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureCatalog);
                }).collect(Collectors.toList());
                featureQuerySqlList.addAll(list);
            } else {
                String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", featureLogics);
                ST st = new ST(caliber);
                st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
                String sql = st.render();
                List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
                FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureCatalog);
                featureQuerySqlList.add(featureQuerySql);
            }
            this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.put(caliber, featureQuerySqlList);
            Sink sink = processorConfig.getFeatureCal().getSink();
            String sinkCatalog = sink.getCatalog();
            String sinkTableName = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
            sinkCatalog = DbService.changeCatalog(sinkCatalog);
            List<String> sinkTableMetaFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(sinkCatalog, sinkTableName);
            if (sinkTableMetaFields.contains("feat_create_time")) {
                insertFields.add("feat_create_time");
            }
            insertFields.add("feat_update_time");
            String insertSql = SqlUtils.generateInsertSql(insertFields, sinkTableName, true);
            FeatureInsertSql domainFeatureInsertSql = new FeatureInsertSql(featureDomains, insertSql, sinkCatalog);
            // 对插入语句进行元数据采集
            String replaceSql = StrUtil.replace(insertSql, "?", "'****'");
            try {
                DbService.collectMetaData(sinkCatalog, replaceSql, taskInfo);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            this.caliberDomainInsertSqlMap.put(caliber, domainFeatureInsertSql);
        });
        this.selectSqlTableFieldMap = this.getSelectSqlFields();
        this.selectSqlWhereEqExpressTableFieldValueMap = this.getSelectWhereEqFieldValueMap();
        this.logSqlInfo();
    }

    /**
     * 获取查询sql涉及到的字段,返回Map<表名,Set<字段名>>
     */
    private Map<String, Set<String>> getSelectSqlFields() {
        Map<String, Set<String>> result = new HashMap<>();
        Collection<List<FeatureQuerySql>> domainQuerySqlListCollection = this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.values();
        for (List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList : domainQuerySqlListCollection) {
            List<Map<String, Set<String>>> tableSelectFieldMapList = featureQuerySqlList.stream().map(featureQuerySql -> {
                try {
                    String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                    String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                    // 对查询语句进行元数据采集
                    DbService.collectMetaData(catalog, sql, taskInfo);
                    return DbService.getSelectSqlFields(catalog, sql);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            for (Map<String, Set<String>> tableSelectFieldMap : tableSelectFieldMapList) {
                for (Map.Entry<String, Set<String>> entry : tableSelectFieldMap.entrySet()) {
                    String tableName = entry.getKey();
                    Set<String> fields = entry.getValue();
                    if (!tableFieldsMap.containsKey(tableName)) {
                        String catalog = featureQuerySqlList.get(0).getCatalog();
                        List<String> tableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, tableName);
                        tableFieldsMap.put(tableName, tableFields);
                    }
                    result.compute(tableName, (key, value) -> {
                        List<String> tableFields = tableFieldsMap.get(tableName);
                        if (value == null) {
                            value = new HashSet<>();
                        }
                        for (String field : fields) {
                            if (tableFields.contains(field)) {
                                value.add(field);
                            }
                        }
                        return value;
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 获取查询sql where条件中等于表达式的字段及值,返回Map<表名,Map<字段名, 字段值>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, String>> getSelectWhereEqFieldValueMap() {
        Map<String, Map<String, String>> result = new HashMap<>();
        int size = this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.size();
        if (size == 1) {
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> entry : this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
                FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = entry.getValue().get(0);
                String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                try {
                    result = DbService.getSelectSqlWhereEqExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 过滤前,对消息进行处理,如增加或修改消息里的字段
     */
    public JSONObject beforeFilterProcess(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
    }


    /**
     * 消息是否处理过滤,当默认过滤规则不满足要求,可以被重写按新的规则进行过滤
     */
    public Boolean filter(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? beforeData : rowData;
        String databaseName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("databaseName");
        String tableName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("tableName");
        String fullTableName = databaseName + "." + tableName;
        Map<String, String> whereFieldValueMap = this.selectSqlWhereEqExpressTableFieldValueMap.getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());

        // kafka维度字段值如果为空,则过滤掉
        for (String domainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
            Object domainValue = data.get(domainKafkaName);
            if (ObjectUtil.isEmpty(domainValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName()) || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName())) {
            // 对于新增和删除,判断sql where等号表达式字段值和kafka字段值是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String whereField = entry.getKey();
                String whereValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(whereField));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(msgFiledValue, whereValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        } else {
            // 对于更新,判断sql where等号表达式中对应的字段值和kafka更新前,更新后字段值和是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String whereField = entry.getKey();
                String whereValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(whereField));
                String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(whereField));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(msgBeforeDataFiledValue, whereValue) && !StrUtil.equals(msgRowDataFiledValue, whereValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 对于更新,判断sql涉及到的所有字段值在kafka更新前后是否一样,如果都一样则过滤
            Set<String> fields = this.selectSqlTableFieldMap.get(fullTableName);
            for (String field : fields) {
                String rowValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(field));
                String beforeValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(field));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(beforeValue, rowValue)) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            return true;
        }
    }

    /**
     * 特征计算
     */
    public void featureCalc(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        String msgData = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName()) ? "beforeData" : "rowData";
        // 特征并行查询
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberDomainSqlListEntry : this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberDomainSqlListEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberDomainSqlListEntry.getValue();
            Map<String, Object> featureResultMap = new HashMap<>();
            List<Map<String, Object>> featureResultMapList = featureQuerySqlList.stream().parallel().map(featureQuerySql -> {
                try {
                    List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = new ArrayList<>();
                    List<String> params = featureQuerySql.getParams();
                    for (String param : params) {
                        Object value = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(msgData).get(param);
                        SqlParam sqlParam = new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object);
                        lstSqlParam.add(sqlParam);
                    }
                    String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                    String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                    sql = SqlUtils.replaceParams(sql, "?");
                    // 在分析查询语句时进行了元数据的采集,此处不需要再进行元数据采集,所以taskinfo参数为空
                    List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(catalog, sql, lstSqlParam, null);
                    if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                        return results.get(0);
                    } else {
                        return new HashMap<String, Object>();
                    }
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            for (Map<String, Object> map : featureResultMapList) {
                featureResultMap.putAll(map);
            }
            // 特征结果入库
            List<FeatureInfo> featureInfoList = this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.get(caliber);
            FeatureInsertSql domainFeatureInsertSql = this.caliberDomainInsertSqlMap.get(caliber);
            List<String> featureDomainKafkaNames = domainFeatureInsertSql.getDomains().stream().map(FeatureDomain::getKafkaName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String catalog = domainFeatureInsertSql.getCatalog();
            String insertSql = domainFeatureInsertSql.getSql();
            List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for (String featureDomainKafkaName : featureDomainKafkaNames) {
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(msgData).get(featureDomainKafkaName), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            }
            featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
                Object result = featureResultMap.get(featureInfo.getFeatureName());
                Object value = result == null ? featureInfo.getFeatureDefaultValue() : result;
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            });
            try {
                // 在分析插入语句时进行了元数据的采集,此处不需要再进行元数据采集,所以taskinfo参数为空
                DbService.insertDb(catalog, insertSql, sqlParams, null);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
    }

    private void logSqlInfo() {
        this.caliberDomainQuerySqlListMap.forEach((caliber, domainQuerySqlList) ->
                domainQuerySqlList.forEach(featureQuerySql ->
                        log.info("processor:{},caliber:{},\n params:{},\n query sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), caliber, featureQuerySql.getParams(), featureQuerySql.getSql())
                ));

        this.caliberDomainInsertSqlMap.forEach((caliber, featureInsertSql) ->
                log.info("processor:{},\n caliber:{},\n domain:{},\n insert sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), caliber, featureInsertSql.getDomains(), featureInsertSql.getSql())
        );

        log.info("processor:{},selectSqlTableFieldMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.selectSqlTableFieldMap);
        log.info("processor:{},selectSqlWhereEqExpressTableFieldValueMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.selectSqlWhereEqExpressTableFieldValueMap);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.
                addCalcNode(this::beforeFilterProcess, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addFilterNode(this::filter, FILTER_NODE_NAME)
                .addConsumerNode(this::delay, CONSUMER_DELAY_NODE_NAME)
                .addConsumerNode(this::featureCalc, CONSUMER_FEATURE_CALC_NODE_NAME);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    public JSONObject getDataByEventType(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        return StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName()) ? beforeData : rowData;
    }

    public void writeFeatureDefineToDb() {
        Sink sink = processorConfig.getFeatureCal().getSink();
        String sinkCatalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String sinkTableName = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        Object sinkDbServer;
        try {
            Map<String, Object> cons = DbService.getCons(sinkCatalog);
            sinkDbServer = cons.get("host");
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.forEach((caliber, featureInfoList) -> {
            List<List<SqlParam>> sqlParamsList = new ArrayList<>();
            featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
                String featureName = featureInfo.getFeatureName();
                String featureLogic = featureInfo.getFeatureLogic();
                String featureCaliber = featureInfo.getFeatureCaliber();
                String featureCatalog = featureInfo.getFeatureCatalog();
                List<String> featureDomainList = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains().stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
                String featureDomains = StrUtil.join(",", featureDomainList);
                String logic = String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
                ST st = new ST(featureCaliber);
                st.add("features", logic);
                String featureSql = st.render();
                String queryTableFields;
                Object queryDbServer;
                try {
                    Map<String, Set<String>> tableFieldsMap = DbService.getSelectSqlFields(featureCatalog, featureSql);
                    queryTableFields = JSON.toJSONString(tableFieldsMap);
                    Map<String, Object> cons = DbService.getCons(featureCatalog);
                    queryDbServer = cons.get("host");
                } catch (SQLException e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }

                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureDomains, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureSql, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryTableFields, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkTableName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getTaskName(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getMaintainer(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParamsList.add(sqlParams);
            });
            try {
                DbService.insertDbBatch(Constant.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL, sqlParamsList, null);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        });
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/FeaturesProcessorV1.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.ListUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ObjectUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.*;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.*;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ReflectionUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.ST;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;

@Slf4j
public abstract class FeaturesProcessorV1 extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    protected static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process";
    protected static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";
    protected static final String CONSUMER_DELAY_NODE_NAME = "delay";
    protected static final String CONSUMER_FEATURE_CALC_NODE_NAME = "feature_calc";
    private static final int DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE = 50;
    private final List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList;
    private Map<String, List<FeatureInfoV1>> caliberFeatureInfoListMap;
    protected final Map<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final Map<String, FeatureInsertSql> caliberFeatureInsertSqlMap = new HashMap<>();
    private Map<String, Map<String, Set<String>>> caliberSqlUseFieldMap = null;
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> caliberSqlWhereEqMap = null;
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> caliberSqlWhereNotEqMap = null;
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> caliberSqlWhereInMap = null;
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> caliberSqlWhereNotInMap = null;
    private final Map<String, List<String>> tableFieldsMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final Map<String, List<String>> caliberDomainKafkaNamesMap = new HashMap<>();
    protected final Map<String, List<CalcNode>> caliberCalcNodeListMap = new HashMap<>();
    private static final String INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL = "INSERT INTO taskinfodb.t_async_task_meta_info" +
            "(feature_name,feature_domains,feature_sql,query_table_fields,query_db_server,insert_db_server,insert_table_name,task_name,maintainer,status_code,create_time, update_time) " +
            "values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,1,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)  " +
            "on duplicate key update  " +
            "feature_sql=values(feature_sql), " +
            "query_table_fields=values(query_table_fields), " +
            "query_db_server=values(query_db_server), " +
            "task_name=values(task_name), " +
            "maintainer=values(maintainer), " +
            "status_code=values(status_code), " +
            "update_time=values(update_time)";


    protected FeaturesProcessorV1(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.featureInfoList = this.defineFeature();
        this.analysisFeature();
        this.recordFeature();
    }

    /**
     * 特征分组大小,默认值50,可被重写
     */
    protected int defineFeatureGroupSize() {
        return DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE;
    }

    /**
     * 定义特征
     */
    protected abstract List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature();

    /**
     * 分析特征
     */
    private void analysisFeature() {
        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap = featureInfoList.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(FeatureInfoV1::getFeatureCaliber));
        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.forEach((caliber, featureInfoList) -> {
            // 维度字段
            FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo = featureInfoList.get(0);
            List<FeatureDomain> featureDomains = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains();
            List<String> featureDomainDbNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            List<String> featureDomainKafkaNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getKafkaName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.caliberDomainKafkaNamesMap.put(caliber, featureDomainKafkaNames);

            // 查询字段
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = new ArrayList<>();
            String featureQueryCatalog = featureInfo.getFeatureQueryCatalog();
            List<String> featureLogics = featureInfoList.stream().map(item -> {
                String featureName = item.getFeatureName();
                String featureLogic = item.getFeatureLogic();
                return String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            int featureGroupSize = defineFeatureGroupSize();
            if (featureLogics.size() > featureGroupSize) {
                List<List<String>> groupFeatureLogics = ListUtil.split(featureLogics, featureGroupSize);
                List<FeatureQuerySql> list = groupFeatureLogics.stream().map(logics -> {
                    String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", logics);
                    ST st = new ST(caliber);
                    st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
                    String sql = st.render();
                    List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
                    return new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureQueryCatalog);
                }).collect(Collectors.toList());
                featureQuerySqlList.addAll(list);
            } else {
                String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", featureLogics);
                ST st = new ST(caliber);
                st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
                String sql = st.render();
                List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
                FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureQueryCatalog);
                featureQuerySqlList.add(featureQuerySql);
            }
            this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.put(caliber, featureQuerySqlList);

            //插入字段
            List<String> insertFields = new ArrayList<>(featureDomainDbNames);
            insertFields.addAll(featureInfoList.stream().map(FeatureInfoV1::getFeatureName).collect(Collectors.toList()));

            String insertSql = generateInsertSql(featureInfo, insertFields);
            String sinkCatalog = DbService.changeCatalog(featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable().getCatalog());
            FeatureInsertSql domainFeatureInsertSql = new FeatureInsertSql(featureDomains, insertSql, sinkCatalog);
            // 对插入语句进行元数据采集
            String replaceSql = StrUtil.replace(insertSql, "?", "'****'");
            try {
                DbService.collectMetaData(sinkCatalog, replaceSql, taskInfo);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            this.caliberFeatureInsertSqlMap.put(caliber, domainFeatureInsertSql);
        });
        this.caliberSqlUseFieldMap = this.analysisSqlField();
        this.caliberSqlWhereEqMap = this.analysisSqlWhereEq();
        this.caliberSqlWhereNotEqMap = this.analysisSqlWhereNotEq();
        this.caliberSqlWhereInMap = this.analysisSqlWhereIn();
        this.caliberSqlWhereNotInMap = this.analysisSqlWhereNotIn();
        this.logSqlInfo();
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql涉及到的字段,返回值:Map<口径,Map<表名,Set<字段名>>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, Set<String>>> analysisSqlField() {
        Map<String, Map<String, Set<String>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberEntry : this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberEntry.getValue();
            Map<String, Set<String>> tableSelectFiledMap = new HashMap<>();
            List<Map<String, Set<String>>> tableSelectFieldMapList = featureQuerySqlList.stream().map(featureQuerySql -> {
                try {
                    String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                    String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                    // 对查询语句进行元数据采集
                    DbService.collectMetaData(catalog, sql, taskInfo);
                    return DbService.getSelectSqlFields(catalog, sql);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            for (Map<String, Set<String>> tableSelectFieldMap : tableSelectFieldMapList) {
                for (Map.Entry<String, Set<String>> entry : tableSelectFieldMap.entrySet()) {
                    String tableName = entry.getKey();
                    Set<String> fields = entry.getValue();
                    if (!tableFieldsMap.containsKey(tableName)) {
                        String catalog = featureQuerySqlList.get(0).getCatalog();
                        List<String> tableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, tableName);
                        tableFieldsMap.put(tableName, tableFields);
                    }
                    tableSelectFiledMap.compute(tableName, (key, value) -> {
                        List<String> tableFields = tableFieldsMap.get(tableName);
                        if (value == null) {
                            value = new HashSet<>();
                        }
                        for (String field : fields) {
                            if (tableFields.contains(field)) {
                                value.add(field);
                            }
                        }
                        return value;
                    });
                }
            }
            result.put(caliber, tableSelectFiledMap);
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中等于表达式的字段及值,返回值:Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, 字段值>>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> analysisSqlWhereEq() {
        Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberEntry : this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberEntry.getValue();
            FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
            String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
            String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
            try {
                Map<String, Map<String, String>> value = DbService.getSelectSqlWhereEqExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
                result.put(caliber, value);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("analysis sql where eq error", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中不等于表达式的字段及值,返回值:Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, 字段值>>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> analysisSqlWhereNotEq() {
        Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, String>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberEntry : this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberEntry.getValue();
            FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
            String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
            String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
            try {
                Map<String, Map<String, String>> value = DbService.getSelectSqlWhereNotEqExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
                result.put(caliber, value);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("analysis sql where eq error", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中in表达式的字段及值,返回值:Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, List<字段值>>>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> analysisSqlWhereIn() {
        Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberEntry : this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberEntry.getValue();
            FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
            String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
            String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
            try {
                Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> value = DbService.getSelectSqlWhereInExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
                result.put(caliber, value);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("analysis sql where in error", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中not in表达式的字段及值,返回值:Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, List<字段值>>>>
     */
    private Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> analysisSqlWhereNotIn() {
        Map<String, Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> caliberEntry : this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = caliberEntry.getKey();
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = caliberEntry.getValue();
            FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
            String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
            String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
            try {
                Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> value = DbService.getSelectSqlWhereNotInExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
                result.put(caliber, value);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("analysis sql where not in error", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql逻辑，可重写
     */
    public String generateInsertSql(FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo, List<String> insertFields) {
        if (featureInfo == null) {
            return "";
        }
        Sink featureSinkTable = featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable();
        String sinkTableName = featureSinkTable.getSchema() + "." + featureSinkTable.getTable();
        String sinkCatalog = DbService.changeCatalog(featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable().getCatalog());
        List<String> sinkTableMetaFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(sinkCatalog, sinkTableName);
        if (sinkTableMetaFields.contains("feat_create_time")) {
            insertFields.add("feat_create_time");
        }
        insertFields.add("feat_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateInsertSql(insertFields, sinkTableName, true);
    }

    /**
     * 过滤前,对消息进行处理,如增加或修改消息里的字段
     */
    public JSONObject beforeFilterProcess(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
    }


    /**
     * 消息是否处理过滤,当默认过滤规则不满足要求,可以被重写按新的规则进行过滤
     */
    public Boolean filter(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        String caliber = calcContextData.getData("caliber", String.class);
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? beforeData : rowData;
        String databaseName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("databaseName");
        String tableName = kafkaMsgJson.getString("tableName");
        String fullTableName = databaseName + "." + tableName;
        Map<String, String> whereEqFieldValueMap = this.caliberSqlWhereEqMap
                .get(caliber)
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, String> whereNotEqFieldValueMap = this.caliberSqlWhereNotEqMap
                .get(caliber)
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, List<String>> whereInFieldValueMap = this.caliberSqlWhereInMap
                .get(caliber)
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());
        Map<String, List<String>> whereNotInFieldValueMap = this.caliberSqlWhereNotInMap
                .get(caliber)
                .getOrDefault(fullTableName, new HashMap<>());


        // kafka维度字段空值过滤
        List<String> domainKafkaNames = caliberDomainKafkaNamesMap.get(caliber);
        String msgData = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? "beforeData" : "rowData";
        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName()) || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName())) {
            // 新增和删除,如果维度有空值,则过滤
            boolean result = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(msgData));
            if (result) {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            // 更新,如果beforeData和rowData的维度都有空值,则过滤
            boolean resultBeforeData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, beforeData);
            boolean resultRowData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, rowData);
            if (resultBeforeData && resultRowData) {
                return true;
            }
        }


        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName()) || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName())) {
            // 新增和删除的过滤规则:
            // 1.判断sql where等号表达式字段值和kafka字段值是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(msgFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }

            // 2.判断sql where不等号表达式字段值和kafka字段值是否一样,如果一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereNotEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (StrUtil.equals(msgFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }

            // 3.判断sql where in表达式字段值列表是否包含了kafka字段值,如果不包含则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (!sqlFieldValue.contains(msgFiledValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 4.判断sql where not in表达式字段值列表是否包含了kafka字段值,如果包含则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereNotInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (sqlFieldValue.contains(msgFiledValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        } else {
            // 更新的过滤规则:
            // 1 判断sql where等号表达式中对应的字段值和kafka更新前,更新后字段值是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
                String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(msgBeforeDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue) && !StrUtil.equals(msgRowDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 2 判断sql where不等号表达式中对应的字段值和kafka更新前,更新后字段值是否一样,如果一样则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereNotEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
                String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (StrUtil.equals(msgBeforeDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue) && StrUtil.equals(msgRowDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 3 判断sql where in表达式字段值列表是否包含kafka更新前,更新后字段值,如果不包含则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
                String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (!sqlFieldValue.contains(msgBeforeDataFiledValue) && !sqlFieldValue.contains(msgRowDataFiledValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 4 判断sql where not in表达式字段值列表是否包含kafka更新前,更新后字段值,如果包含则过滤掉
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereNotInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
                String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
                List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
                String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
                String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
                if (sqlFieldValue.contains(msgBeforeDataFiledValue) && sqlFieldValue.contains(msgRowDataFiledValue)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            // 4 判断sql涉及到的所有字段值在kafka更新前后是否一样,如果都一样则过滤掉
            Set<String> fields = this.caliberSqlUseFieldMap.get(caliber).get(fullTableName);
            for (String field : fields) {
                String rowValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(field));
                String beforeValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(field));
                if (!StrUtil.equals(beforeValue, rowValue)) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            return true;
        }
    }

    /**
     * 特征计算
     */
    public void featureCalc(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        String caliber = calcContextData.getData("caliber", String.class);
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        Set<String> dataSet = new HashSet<>();
        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName())) {
            dataSet.add("beforeData");
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName())) {
            dataSet.add("rowData");
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.UPDATE.getName())) {
            //更新事件,处理维度变更逻辑
            List<String> domainKafkaNames = caliberDomainKafkaNamesMap.get(caliber);
            JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
            JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
            boolean resultBeforeData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, beforeData);
            boolean resultRowData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, rowData);
            // 1.rowData里的维度没有空值,则添加rowData
            if (!resultRowData) {
                dataSet.add("rowData");
            }
            // 2.beforeData里的维度没有空值且维度值有变更,则添加beforeData
            if (!resultBeforeData) {
                for (String domainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
                    String rowValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(domainKafkaName));
                    String beforeValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(domainKafkaName));
                    if (!StrUtil.equals(beforeValue, rowValue)) {
                        dataSet.add("beforeData");
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        } else {
            log.error("The change type {} is not supported", eventType);
            return;
        }
        for (String data : dataSet) {
            // 特征并行查询
            List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList = this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.get(caliber);
            Map<String, Object> featureResultMap = new HashMap<>();
            List<Map<String, Object>> featureResultMapList = featureQuerySqlList.stream().parallel().map(featureQuerySql -> {
                try {
                    List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = new ArrayList<>();
                    List<String> params = featureQuerySql.getParams();
                    for (String param : params) {
                        Object value = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(data).get(param);
                        SqlParam sqlParam = new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object);
                        lstSqlParam.add(sqlParam);
                    }
                    String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                    String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                    sql = SqlUtils.replaceParams(sql, "?");
                    // 在分析查询语句时进行了元数据的采集,此处不需要再进行元数据采集,所以taskinfo参数为空
                    List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(catalog, sql, lstSqlParam, null);
                    log.info("sql:{},lstSqlParam:{},results:{}", sql, lstSqlParam, results);
                    if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                        return results.get(0);
                    } else {
                        return new HashMap<String, Object>();
                    }
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            for (Map<String, Object> map : featureResultMapList) {
                featureResultMap.putAll(map);
            }
            // 特征结果入库
            List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList = this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.get(caliber);
            FeatureInsertSql domainFeatureInsertSql = this.caliberFeatureInsertSqlMap.get(caliber);
            List<String> featureDomainKafkaNames = domainFeatureInsertSql.getDomains().stream().map(FeatureDomain::getKafkaName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String catalog = domainFeatureInsertSql.getCatalog();
            String insertSql = domainFeatureInsertSql.getSql();
            List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for (String featureDomainKafkaName : featureDomainKafkaNames) {
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(data).get(featureDomainKafkaName), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            }
            featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
                Object result = featureResultMap.get(featureInfo.getFeatureName());
                Object value = result == null ? featureInfo.getFeatureDefaultValue() : result;
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            });
            try {
                // 在分析插入语句时进行了元数据的采集,此处不需要再进行元数据采集,所以taskinfo参数为空
                DbService.insertDb(catalog, insertSql, sqlParams, null);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
    }

    private void logSqlInfo() {
        this.caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.forEach((caliber, domainQuerySqlList) ->
                domainQuerySqlList.forEach(featureQuerySql ->
                        log.info("processor:{},caliber:{},\n params:{},\n query sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), caliber, featureQuerySql.getParams(), featureQuerySql.getSql())
                ));

        this.caliberFeatureInsertSqlMap.forEach((caliber, featureInsertSql) ->
                log.info("processor:{},\n caliber:{},\n domain:{},\n insert sql:{} \n", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), caliber, featureInsertSql.getDomains(), featureInsertSql.getSql())
        );

        log.info("processor:{},caliberSqlUseFieldMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.caliberSqlUseFieldMap);
        log.info("processor:{},caliberSqlWhereEqMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.caliberSqlWhereEqMap);
        log.info("processor:{},caliberSqlWhereNotEqMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.caliberSqlWhereNotEqMap);
        log.info("processor:{},caliberSqlWhereInMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.caliberSqlWhereInMap);
        log.info("processor:{},caliberSqlWhereNotInMap:{}", this.getClass().getSimpleName(), this.caliberSqlWhereNotInMap);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<FeatureQuerySql>> entry : caliberFeatureQuerySqlListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = entry.getKey();
            List<CalcNode> calcNodes = new ArrayList<>();
            calcNodes.add(new FuncProcessCalNode(this::beforeFilterProcess, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, taskInfo));
            calcNodes.add(new FilterCalNode(this::filter, FILTER_NODE_NAME, taskInfo));
            calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(this::delay, CONSUMER_DELAY_NODE_NAME, taskInfo));
            calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(this::featureCalc, CONSUMER_FEATURE_CALC_NODE_NAME, taskInfo));
            caliberCalcNodeListMap.put(caliber, calcNodes);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    public JSONObject getDataByEventType(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        return StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName()) ? beforeData : rowData;
    }

    public void recordFeature() {
        this.caliberFeatureInfoListMap.forEach((caliber, featureInfoList) -> {
            List<List<SqlParam>> sqlParamsList = new ArrayList<>();
            featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
                String featureName = featureInfo.getFeatureName();
                String featureLogic = featureInfo.getFeatureLogic();
                String featureCaliber = featureInfo.getFeatureCaliber();
                String featureCatalog = featureInfo.getFeatureQueryCatalog();
                Sink sink = featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable();
                String sinkCatalog = sink.getCatalog();
                String sinkTableName = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
                List<String> featureDomainList = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains().stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
                String featureDomains = StrUtil.join(",", featureDomainList);
                String logic = String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
                ST st = new ST(featureCaliber);
                st.add("features", logic);
                String featureSql = st.render();
                String queryTableFields;
                Object queryDbServer;
                Object sinkDbServer;
                try {
                    Map<String, Set<String>> tableFieldsMap = DbService.getSelectSqlFields(featureCatalog, featureSql);
                    queryTableFields = JSON.toJSONString(tableFieldsMap);
                    Map<String, Object> cons = DbService.getCons(featureCatalog);
                    queryDbServer = cons.get("host");
                    cons = DbService.getCons(sinkCatalog);
                    sinkDbServer = cons.get("host");
                } catch (SQLException e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }

                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureDomains, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureSql, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryTableFields, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkTableName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getTaskName(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getMaintainer(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                sqlParamsList.add(sqlParams);
            });
            try {
                DbService.insertDbBatch(Constant.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL, sqlParamsList, null);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        });
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        ArrayList<CaliberResult> result = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<CalcNode>> entry : caliberCalcNodeListMap.entrySet()) {
            String caliber = entry.getKey();
            List<CalcNode> calcNodes = entry.getValue();
            ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(data, "caliber", caliber);
            String processResult = "data processing completed";
            for (CalcNode calcNode : calcNodes) {
                if (calcNode instanceof FilterCalNode) {
                    if (((FilterCalNode) calcNode).isPass(data)) {
                        processResult = "data filtered";
                        break;
                    }
                } else {
                    try {
                        calcNode.process(data);
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        //是否加入释放锁节点
                        String releaseLockNode = data.getData(Constant.PROCESSOR_RELEASE_LOCK_NODE, String.class);
                        if (releaseLockNode != null && !"".equals(releaseLockNode)) {
                            for (CalcNode node : calcNodes) {
                                if (releaseLockNode.equals(node.getCalcName())) {
                                    node.process(data);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        throw e;
                    }
                }
            }
            result.add(new CaliberResult(caliber, processResult));
        }
        ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(data, "process_result", result);
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * 检查维度是否为空
     */
    private boolean checkDomainIsEmpty(List<String> domainKafkaNames, JSONObject data) {
        for (String domainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
            Object domainValue = data.get(domainKafkaName);
            if (ObjectUtil.isEmpty(domainValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}
```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/FeaturesProcessorV1.java**
