### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/Kafka2MysqlProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.k2m.K2M;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.AkuKmsUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.expression.ExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.standard.SpelExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.support.StandardEvaluationContext;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class Kafka2MysqlProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    public static final String CALC_NODE_NAME = "kafka_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "after_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";

    protected final K2M k2mConfig;
    private final String insertSql;
    /**
     * 表字段
     */
    private final List<String> tableFields;
    /**
     * 更新字段
     */
    protected final List<String> duplicateUpdateFields;

    /**
     * 解密字段
     */
    protected List<String> decryptFields = null;

    protected AkuKmsUtil akuKmsUtil = null;


    /**
     * 主键列表
     */
    protected List<String> primaryKeys;


    /**
     * 删除sql
     */
    protected String deleteSql;


    protected Kafka2MysqlProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        k2mConfig = processorConfig.getK2m();
        Source source = k2mConfig.getSource();
        String kafka2MySqlFields = source.getKafka2MySqlFields();
        String kafkaDataClass = source.getKafkaDataClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafka2MySqlFields)) {
            tableFields = Arrays.stream(kafka2MySqlFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String duplicateFields = source.getKafka2MySqlDuplicateUpdateFields();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafkaDataClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(source.getKafkaDataClass());
            tableFields = fieldMap.get("fields");
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insertSql:{}", insertSql);
        String decryptFieldsStr = source.getDecryptFields();
        String kmsConnName = source.getKmsConnName();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(decryptFieldsStr)) {
            this.decryptFields = Arrays.stream(decryptFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.akuKmsUtil = new AkuKmsUtil(kmsConnName);
        }
        String primaryKeyFields = source.getPrimaryKeyFields();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(primaryKeyFields)) {
            this.primaryKeys = Arrays.stream(primaryKeyFields.split(",")).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.deleteSql = this.generateDeleteSql();
        }
    }


    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        // 计算参数列表
        List<String> parameters = tableFields.stream().map(field -> CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME + "." + field).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Source source = k2mConfig.getSource();
        String kafkaDataField = source.getKafkaDataField();


        String[] fields = kafkaDataField == null ? new String[0] : kafkaDataField.split("\\.");
        this.addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
                    if (this.primaryKeys != null && StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName())) {
                        this.delete(kafkaMsgJson);
                        return null;
                    }
                    JSONObject targetObject = calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                        if (targetObject == null) {
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    return targetObject;
                }, CALC_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return beforeProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addFilterNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return this.isFilter(jsonObject);
                }, FILTER_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return afterProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addSql(k2mConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), "insert", parameters, insertSql);
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<String> insertTableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, table);
        List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getTableFields());
        List<String> duplicateUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.duplicateUpdateFields);
        if (!insertTableFields.contains("feat_create_time") || !insertTableFields.contains("feat_update_time")) {
            log.error("The target table needs to define feat_create_time and feat_update_time fields");
            System.exit(1);
        }
        tableColumns.add("feat_create_time");
        tableColumns.add("feat_update_time");
        duplicateUpdateColumns.add("feat_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateInsertSql(table, tableColumns, duplicateUpdateColumns, this.duplicateUpdateCondition());
    }


    /**
     * ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE更新字段条件，默认为values()
     */
    public String duplicateUpdateCondition() {
        return null;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(this.decryptFields)) {
            for (String field : this.decryptFields) {
                String value = jsonObject.getString(field);
                if (StrUtil.isNotBlank(value)) {
                    try {
                        String decrypt = this.akuKmsUtil.decrypt(value);
                        jsonObject.put(field, decrypt);
                    } catch (Throwable e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException("decrypt error", e);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子后调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject afterProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 默认过滤方法
     */
    public boolean isFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        if (jsonObject == null || jsonObject.keySet().isEmpty()) {
            return true;
        }

        String kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression = k2mConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataFieldConditionExpression();
        if (kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression != null) {
            ExpressionParser expressionParser = new SpelExpressionParser();
            StandardEvaluationContext evaluationContext = new StandardEvaluationContext();
            evaluationContext.setVariable("msg", jsonObject);
            Boolean expressionResult = expressionParser.parseExpression(kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression).getValue(evaluationContext, Boolean.class);
            log.info("kafka data field condition expression:{},execute result:{}", kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression, expressionResult);
            if (expressionResult == null) {
                return false;
            } else {
                return !expressionResult;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }

    public List<String> getTableFields() {
        return tableFields;
    }

    public K2M getK2mConfig() {
        return k2mConfig;
    }

    public void delete(JSONObject kafkaMsgJson) {
        Source source = this.k2mConfig.getSource();
        String kafkaDeleteDataField = source.getKafkaDeleteDataField();
        Sink sink = this.k2mConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String primaryKey : this.primaryKeys) {
            Object value = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject(kafkaDeleteDataField).get(primaryKey);
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
        }
        try {
            DbService.deleteDb(catalog, deleteSql, sqlParams, taskInfo);
            log.info("delete successfully,delete sqlParams:{}", sqlParams);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateDeleteSql() {
        String sql = "delete from %s where %s";
        Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        String where = this.primaryKeys.stream().map(x -> String.format("%s=?", x)).collect(Collectors.joining(" and "));
        return String.format(sql, table, where);
    }


}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaConsumerThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class KafkaConsumerThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();
    private final String processorName;

    public KafkaConsumerThreadFactory(String processorName) {
        this.processorName = processorName;
    }

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, String.format("%s-thread-%d", processorName, index.get()));
    }
}


```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaSourceBatchProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaAdminClient;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaConsumerCallable;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import com.akulaku.core.util.TopicBeanUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.FutureTask;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2022-07-14 10:33
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class KafkaSourceBatchProcessor extends DataProcessor {

    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;
    protected ExecutorService executorService;
    protected final List<KafkaConsumerCallable> consumers = new ArrayList<>();
    protected final KafkaAdminClient kafkaAdminClient;

    protected KafkaSourceBatchProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(processorConfig.getTaskName(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), processorConfig.getMaintain(), processorConfig.getDescription());
        Boolean workQueueSwitch = processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch();
        if (workQueueSwitch) {
            this.processorConfig.setStartOffsetFromMysql(true);
        }

        this.kafkaAdminClient = new KafkaAdminClient(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        Integer parallel = processorConfig.getParallel();
        //消息处理逻辑
        KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler = new KafkaMessageHandler(this.processorConfig, this, TopicBeanUtils.getTopicBeanByName(processorConfig.getTopic()));
        Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions;
        try {
            topicPartitions = this.kafkaAdminClient.getTopicPartition();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        if (parallel > topicPartitions.size()) {
            log.error("parallel is greater than topic partition size,parallel:{},topic partition size:{}", parallel, topicPartitions.size());
            System.exit(1);
        }

        Map<Integer, Collection<TopicPartition>> parallelOwnerMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (TopicPartition tp : topicPartitions) {
            int parallelOwner = this.kafkaAdminClient.getParallelOwner(tp, parallel);
            if (!parallelOwnerMap.containsKey(parallelOwner)) {
                parallelOwnerMap.put(parallelOwner, new ArrayList<>());
            }
            parallelOwnerMap.get(parallelOwner).add(tp);
        }
        executorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(parallel, new KafkaConsumerThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        for (int i = 0; i < parallel; i++) {
            Collection<TopicPartition> pTopicPartitions = parallelOwnerMap.get(i);
            Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionStartOffset;
            try {
                partitionStartOffset = this.kafkaAdminClient.getPartitionStartOffset(pTopicPartitions);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            KafkaConsumerCallable kafkaConsumerCallable = new KafkaConsumerCallable(this.processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler, pTopicPartitions, partitionStartOffset);
            consumers.add(kafkaConsumerCallable);
            this.executorService.execute(new FutureTask<>(kafkaConsumerCallable));
        }
    }

    @Override
    public final void stop() {
        log.info("shut down ");
        for (KafkaConsumerCallable consumer : consumers) {
            consumer.shutdown();
        }
        if (executorService != null && !executorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            executorService.shutdown();
            try {
                //等待5秒如果线程池没有关闭，强制关闭
                executorService.awaitTermination(5000, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                executorService.shutdownNow();
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaSourceBatchProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.*;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.delayed_queue.DataProcessorDelayedItem;
import com.akulaku.core.delayed_queue.DelayedQueueHelper;
import com.akulaku.core.delayed_rocksdb.DelayedRocksDbHelper;
import com.akulaku.core.delayed_rocksdb.RocksDbKafkaRecord;
import com.akulaku.core.disruptor.DisruptorHelper;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaAdminClient;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaConsumerCallable;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ReflectionUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.TimeUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.TopicBeanUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.work_queue.WorkQueueHelper;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.*;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;
import org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition;
import org.apache.kafka.common.header.Header;
import org.apache.kafka.common.header.Headers;

import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.function.Consumer;
import java.util.function.Function;
import java.util.function.Predicate;

/**
 * @author zhangmoon
 * @date 2021-06-30 19:33
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor extends DataProcessor {

    protected final List<CalcNode> calcNodes;

    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;

    protected ExecutorService executorService;
    protected final List<KafkaConsumerCallable> consumers = new ArrayList<>();
    protected DelayedQueueHelper delayedQueueHelper = null;
    protected DisruptorHelper disruptorHelper = null;
    protected WorkQueueHelper workQueueHelper = null;
    protected DelayedRocksDbHelper delayedRocksDbHelper = null;
    protected OfflineDataProcessor offlineDataProcessor = null;
    protected final KafkaAdminClient kafkaAdminClient;

    protected KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.calcNodes = new ArrayList<>();
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(processorConfig.getTaskName(), processorConfig.getGroupId(), processorConfig.getMaintain(), processorConfig.getDescription());
        Boolean workQueueSwitch = processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch();
        if (workQueueSwitch) {
            this.processorConfig.setStartOffsetFromMysql(true);
        }
        this.kafkaAdminClient = new KafkaAdminClient(processorConfig);
    }

    /**
     * 实时消费启动前进行离线数据特征计算
     */
    @Override
    public void beforeStart() {
        offlineDataProcessor = new OfflineDataProcessor(processorConfig);
        offlineDataProcessor.process();
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        Integer parallel = processorConfig.getParallel();
        this.organizeCalcNodes();

        //消息处理逻辑
        KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler = new KafkaMessageHandler(this.processorConfig, this, TopicBeanUtils.getTopicBeanByName(processorConfig.getTopic()));

        //判断是否开启延时队列处理
        if (processorConfig.getDelaySwitch()) {
            delayedQueueHelper = new DelayedQueueHelper(processorConfig);
            delayedQueueHelper.start();
        }

        // 判断是否开启延时rocksdb处理
        if (processorConfig.getDelayRocksDbSwitch()) {
            delayedRocksDbHelper = new DelayedRocksDbHelper(processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler);
            delayedRocksDbHelper.start();
        }

        //判断是否开启Disruptor并发消费
        if (processorConfig.getDisruptorSwitch()) {
            disruptorHelper = new DisruptorHelper(processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler, parallel);
            disruptorHelper.start();
        }

        if (processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch()) {
            workQueueHelper = new WorkQueueHelper(processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler);
            workQueueHelper.start();
        }

        Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions;
        try {
            topicPartitions = this.kafkaAdminClient.getTopicPartition();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        if (parallel > topicPartitions.size()) {
            log.error("parallel is greater than topic partition size,parallel:{},topic partition size:{}", parallel, topicPartitions.size());
            System.exit(1);
        }

        Map<Integer, Collection<TopicPartition>> parallelOwnerMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (TopicPartition tp : topicPartitions) {
            int parallelOwner = this.kafkaAdminClient.getParallelOwner(tp, parallel);
            if (!parallelOwnerMap.containsKey(parallelOwner)) {
                parallelOwnerMap.put(parallelOwner, new ArrayList<>());
            }
            parallelOwnerMap.get(parallelOwner).add(tp);
        }

        executorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(parallel, new KafkaConsumerThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        //Guava线程池
        ListeningExecutorService gPool = MoreExecutors.listeningDecorator(executorService);

        for (int i = 0; i < parallel; i++) {
            Collection<TopicPartition> pTopicPartitions = parallelOwnerMap.get(i);
            Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionStartOffset;
            try {
                partitionStartOffset = this.kafkaAdminClient.getPartitionStartOffset(pTopicPartitions);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }

            KafkaConsumerCallable kafkaConsumerCallable = new KafkaConsumerCallable(this.processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler, pTopicPartitions, partitionStartOffset);
            consumers.add(kafkaConsumerCallable);
            // executorService.execute(new FutureTask<>(kafkaConsumerCallable));
            //kafka消费线程成功失败回调处理
            ListenableFuture<Integer> listenableFuture = gPool.submit(kafkaConsumerCallable);
            Futures.addCallback(listenableFuture, new FutureCallback<Integer>() {
                @Override
                public void onSuccess(Integer result) {
                    log.error("kafka consumer task exit");
                    System.exit(1);
                }

                @Override
                public void onFailure(Throwable t) {
                    log.error("kafka consumer task failed!", t);
                    System.exit(1);
                }
            }, gPool);
        }
        this.kafkaAdminClient.shutdown();
    }

    @Override
    public void stop() {
        log.info("shutdown");
        for (KafkaConsumerCallable consumer : consumers) {
            consumer.shutdown();
        }
        if (executorService != null && !executorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(executorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }

        if (delayedQueueHelper != null) {
            delayedQueueHelper.stop();
        }

        if (delayedRocksDbHelper != null) {
            delayedRocksDbHelper.stop();
        }

        if (disruptorHelper != null) {
            disruptorHelper.stop();
        }

        if (workQueueHelper != null) {
            workQueueHelper.stop();
        }

        if (offlineDataProcessor != null) {
            offlineDataProcessor.shutdown();
        }

        if (kafkaAdminClient != null) {
            this.kafkaAdminClient.shutdown();
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        for (CalcNode calcNode : calcNodes) {
            if (calcNode instanceof FilterCalNode) {
                if (((FilterCalNode) calcNode).isPass(data)) {
                    return false;
                }
            } else {
                try {
                    calcNode.process(data);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    //是否加入释放锁节点
                    String releaseLockNode = data.getData(Constant.PROCESSOR_RELEASE_LOCK_NODE, String.class);
                    if (releaseLockNode != null && !"".equals(releaseLockNode)) {
                        for (CalcNode node : calcNodes) {
                            if (releaseLockNode.equals(node.getCalcName())) {
                                node.process(data);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    throw e;
                }
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * 添加SQL类算子
     *
     * @param catalog            执行的数据库实例名称
     * @param calcName           算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @param useAheadResultList 使用到之前算子结果的字段名称集合，支持嵌套字段，但字段名称必须与保持结果字段一致，如 "kafka_source_name.rowData.afiUid"
     * @param sql                该算子需要执行的函数，需符合 JDBC 规范
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addSql(String catalog, String calcName, List<String> useAheadResultList, String sql) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SqlCalcNode(catalog, calcName, useAheadResultList, taskInfo, sql));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加函数类算子
     *
     * @param func     转换函数，返回的结果会存入数据上下文，以便后续算子使用
     * @param calcName 算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addCalcNode(Function<CalcContextData, Object> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FuncProcessCalNode(func, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加过滤算子
     *
     * @param func     过滤函数，返回结果为true时过滤本条数据处理
     * @param calcName 该算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addFilterNode(Predicate<CalcContextData> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FilterCalNode(func, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j查询算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addQueryNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new QueryNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j插入操作算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addSinkNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Nebula操作算子，支持查询和插入
     *
     * @param nebulaCatalog Nebula实例名称
     * @param calcName      算子名称
     * @param resultName    前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     * @return
     */
    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addNebulaNode(String nebulaCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new NebulaCalNode(nebulaCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Nebula Redis加锁操作算子
     *
     * @param nebulaCatalog
     * @param redisCatalog
     * @param calcName
     * @param resultName
     * @return
     */
    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addNebulaRedisLockNode(String nebulaCatalog, String redisCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new NebulaCalNode(nebulaCatalog, redisCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加消费算子
     *
     * @param consumer 消费函数
     * @param calcName 该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addConsumerNode(Consumer<CalcContextData> consumer, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(consumer, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加发送kafka算子
     *
     * @param clusterName kafka集群名称
     * @param topicName   发送topic名称
     * @param dataName    数据在上下文中key的名称
     * @param calcName    该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor addSinkKafkaNode(String clusterName, String topicName, String dataName, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkKafkaCalNode(clusterName, topicName, dataName, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 加入延时队列
     *
     * @param contextData
     */
    public void addDelayedQueueNode(CalcContextData contextData) {
        Integer retryCount = contextData.getData(Constant.PROCESSOR_RETRY_COUNT, Integer.class);
        if (retryCount == null) {
            retryCount = 0;
        }
        ++retryCount;
        if (retryCount > processorConfig.getMaxRetryNum()) {
            log.warn("add delayed_queue node over max retry times, taskName={}, topic={}, message={}",
                    processorConfig.getTaskName(), processorConfig.getTopic(), JSONObject.toJSONString(contextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME)));
            return;
        }
        try {
            ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(contextData, Constant.PROCESSOR_RETRY_COUNT, retryCount);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("set processor retry count error", e);
        }
        this.delayedQueueHelper.putDelayQueue(new DataProcessorDelayedItem(this, contextData, processorConfig.getDelayMillisecond()));
    }

    public void addDelayedNode(CalcContextData contextData) {
        if (processorConfig.getDelaySwitch()) {
            // 延迟队列
            addDelayedQueueNode(contextData);
        } else if (processorConfig.getDelayRocksDbSwitch()) {
            // 延迟rocksdb
            addDelayedRocksDbNode(contextData);
        } else {
            throw new RuntimeException("please config delay switch in config file");
        }

    }

    public void addDelayedRocksDbNode(CalcContextData contextData) {
        ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = (ConsumerRecord<String, String>) contextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD);
        Headers headers = record.headers();
        long rocksdbUpdateCnt = 0L;
        long rocksdbCreateTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Iterable<Header> rocksdbUpdateCntHeaders = headers.headers("rocksdb_update_cnt");
        if (rocksdbUpdateCntHeaders != null && rocksdbUpdateCntHeaders.iterator().hasNext()) {
            byte[] value = rocksdbUpdateCntHeaders.iterator().next().value();
            rocksdbUpdateCnt = ByteBuffer.wrap(value).getLong() + 1;
        }

        Iterable<Header> rocksdbCreateTimeHeaders = headers.headers("rocksdb_create_time");
        if (rocksdbCreateTimeHeaders != null && rocksdbCreateTimeHeaders.iterator().hasNext()) {
            byte[] value = rocksdbCreateTimeHeaders.iterator().next().value();
            rocksdbCreateTime = ByteBuffer.wrap(value).getLong();
        }

        RocksDbKafkaRecord rocksDbKafkaRecord = new RocksDbKafkaRecord(
                record.topic(),
                record.partition(),
                record.offset(),
                record.timestamp(),
                record.timestampType(),
                record.serializedKeySize(),
                record.serializedValueSize(),
                record.key(),
                record.value(),
                rocksdbCreateTime,
                rocksdbUpdateCnt
        );
        this.delayedRocksDbHelper.putDelayRocksDb(rocksDbKafkaRecord);
    }


    public abstract void organizeCalcNodes();

    public void delay(CalcContextData data) {
        // 延迟
        ProcessorConfig processorConfig = (ProcessorConfig) data.getData(Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG);
        if (processorConfig.getLatencySwitch()) {
            Long latencyMillisecond = processorConfig.getLatencyMillisecond();
            long time = TimeUtils.nowMillisTime();
            ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = (ConsumerRecord<String, String>) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD);
            long timestamp = record.timestamp();
            long minusValue = time - timestamp;
            if (minusValue < latencyMillisecond) {
                try {
                    TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.sleep(latencyMillisecond - minusValue);
                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public DisruptorHelper getDisruptorHelper() {
        return disruptorHelper;
    }

    public WorkQueueHelper getQueueHelper() {
        return workQueueHelper;
    }

    public TaskInfo getTaskInfo() {
        return taskInfo;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaSourceNeo4jMonitorProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.AlertMessage;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.AlertMessageContent;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.AlertMessageType;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.MaintainerMap;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaAdminClient;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaConsumerCallable;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor.Neo4jMonitorAlertThreadFactory;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor.Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor.Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j_monitor.Neo4jMonitorQueueThreadFactory;
import com.akulaku.core.util.*;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.MoreExecutors;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.*;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

/**
 * 图库任务监控Processor
 * Created by zhuhan on 2022-01-11.
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class KafkaSourceNeo4jMonitorProcessor extends DataProcessor {

    private final AtomicBoolean needCheck = new AtomicBoolean(false);

    /**
     * kafka消费线程池
     */
    private ExecutorService executorService;

    /**
     * kafka消费线程
     */
    private final List<KafkaConsumerCallable> consumers = new ArrayList<>();
    ;

    /**
     * 延迟消费线程池
     */
    private ExecutorService delayExecutorService;

    /**
     * 延迟消费线程池
     */
    private ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService;

    /**
     * 延迟消费线程
     */
    private static final List<Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer> delayQueueConsumers = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * 延迟队列
     */
    private DelayQueue<Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem> delayQueue = new DelayQueue<>();

    /**
     * 错误次数缓存
     */
    private Map<String, Double> errorCntMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    /**
     * 计数器
     */
    private AtomicInteger batchCnt = new AtomicInteger(0);

    protected final KafkaAdminClient kafkaAdminClient;


    protected KafkaSourceNeo4jMonitorProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        Boolean workQueueSwitch = processorConfig.getWorkQueueSwitch();
        if (workQueueSwitch) {
            this.processorConfig.setStartOffsetFromMysql(true);
        }
        this.kafkaAdminClient = new KafkaAdminClient(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        ProcessorConfigUtils.dealConfig(processorConfig);
        //间隔一段时间发送对数结果对数, 默认10分钟执行一次
        scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(2, new Neo4jMonitorAlertThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        scheduledExecutorService.schedule(this::sendAlert, processorConfig.getLatencyMillisecond() == null ? 10000 : processorConfig.getLatencyMillisecond(), TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
        if (processorConfig.getDelaySwitch()) {
            scheduledExecutorService.schedule(() -> needCheck.set(true), processorConfig.getLatencyMillisecond() == null ? 10000 : processorConfig.getLatencyMillisecond(), TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
        } else {
            //全部数据对数
            delayExecutorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(1, new Neo4jMonitorQueueThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
            Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer monitorQueueConsumer = new Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer(delayQueue, processorConfig, errorCntMap, batchCnt);
            delayQueueConsumers.add(monitorQueueConsumer);
            delayExecutorService.execute(monitorQueueConsumer);
        }
        Integer parallel = processorConfig.getParallel();
        //消息处理逻辑
        KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler = new KafkaMessageHandler(this.processorConfig, this, TopicBeanUtils.getTopicBeanByName(processorConfig.getTopic()));
        Collection<TopicPartition> topicPartitions;
        try {
            topicPartitions = this.kafkaAdminClient.getTopicPartition();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        if (parallel > topicPartitions.size()) {
            log.error("parallel is greater than topic partition size,parallel:{},topic partition size:{}", parallel, topicPartitions.size());
            System.exit(1);
        }

        Map<Integer, Collection<TopicPartition>> parallelOwnerMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (TopicPartition tp : topicPartitions) {
            int parallelOwner = this.kafkaAdminClient.getParallelOwner(tp, parallel);
            if (!parallelOwnerMap.containsKey(parallelOwner)) {
                parallelOwnerMap.put(parallelOwner, new ArrayList<>());
            }
            parallelOwnerMap.get(parallelOwner).add(tp);
        }

        executorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(parallel, new KafkaConsumerThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        for (int i = 0; i < parallel; i++) {
            Collection<TopicPartition> pTopicPartitions = parallelOwnerMap.get(i);
            Map<TopicPartition, Long> partitionStartOffset;
            try {
                partitionStartOffset = this.kafkaAdminClient.getPartitionStartOffset(pTopicPartitions);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            KafkaConsumerCallable kafkaConsumerCallable = new KafkaConsumerCallable(this.processorConfig, kafkaMessageHandler, pTopicPartitions, partitionStartOffset);
            consumers.add(kafkaConsumerCallable);
            executorService.execute(new FutureTask<>(kafkaConsumerCallable));
        }
        //启动一个线程去告警

    }

    @Override
    public void stop() {
        log.info("shut down, kafka comsumer");
        for (KafkaConsumerCallable consumer : consumers) {
            consumer.shutdown();
        }
        if (scheduledExecutorService != null && !scheduledExecutorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(scheduledExecutorService, 5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
        if (executorService != null && !executorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(delayExecutorService, 5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
        log.info("shutdown, wait delay queue data consumer");
        //如果延迟队列存在数据，等待数据处理完再关闭
        while (true) {
            if (delayQueue.size() <= 0) {
                break;
            }
        }
        for (Neo4jMonitorQueueConsumer consumer : delayQueueConsumers) {
            consumer.stop();
        }
        if (delayExecutorService != null && !delayExecutorService.isShutdown()) {
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(delayExecutorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        Object kafkaData = data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
        if (this.processorConfig.getLatencySwitch()) {
            if (!needCheck.get()) {
                return false;
            }
            createCheckEvent(kafkaData);
        } else {
            createCheckEvent(kafkaData);
        }
        return true;
    }

    private void sendAlert() {
        if (this.batchCnt.get() >= 1000) {
            log.info("{}发送检查报告", DateUtils.getCurrentDateTime());
            for (Map.Entry<String, Double> entry : errorCntMap.entrySet()) {
                String catalog = entry.getKey();
                Double errorCnt = entry.getValue();
                if (errorCnt / this.batchCnt.get() > 0) {
                    String reason = String.format("监控到%s任务图库:%s写入失败，总数量：%d, 异常数量：%s", processorConfig.getTaskName(), catalog, this.batchCnt.get(), errorCnt);
                    String maintain = processorConfig.getMaintain();
                    String account = MaintainerMap.map.get(maintain.trim());
                    AlertMessage alertMessage = new AlertMessage(AlertMessageType.TEXT, new AlertMessageContent(reason, new String[]{account}, null));
                    CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                        try {
                            HttpUtils.doPostJson(Constant.WEBHOOK_URL, null, JSONObject.toJSONString(alertMessage));
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            log.error("发送告警通知异常", e);
                            System.exit(1);
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
            errorCntMap.clear();
            this.batchCnt.set(0);
        }
    }

    public abstract void createCheckEvent(Object data) throws Exception;

    public void putDelayQueue(Neo4jMonitorDelayedItem item) {
        delayQueue.put(item);
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/KafkaSourceNeo4jMonitorProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/OfflineDataProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.io.FileUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ObjectUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.DbInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.command.killer.ProcessTree;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.offline.OfflineInitialize;
import com.akulaku.core.config.offline.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.offline.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CollectionUtils6;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.DataBaseType;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TableMetaData;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.task.impl.db.DbMetaDataTaskHandler;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.SystemUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;
import org.ini4j.Wini;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.ST;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;


@Data
@Slf4j
public class OfflineDataProcessor {
    public static final String SEA_TUNNEL_SH = "/data/app/apache-seatunnel/bin/seatunnel.sh";
    public static final String PRESTO_CLI_JAR = "/data/app/presto/presto-cli-0.277-executable.jar";
    private ProcessorConfig processorConfig;
    private Process prestoProcess;
    private Process seaTunnelProcess;


    public OfflineDataProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
    }

    public void process() {
        if (!processorConfig.getOfflineInit()) {
            return;
        }
        String taskName = processorConfig.getTaskName();
        List<OfflineInitialize> OfflineInitializes = processorConfig.getOfflineInitializes();
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(OfflineInitializes)) {
            OfflineInitializes.forEach(OfflineInitialize -> {
                        try {
                            Boolean isRun = OfflineInitialize.getIsRun();
                            if (!isRun) {
                                return;
                            }
                            log.info("offline initialization start");
                            Source source = OfflineInitialize.getSource();
                            String sourceCatalogConn = source.getCatalog();
                            String sourceSqlFile = source.getSqlFile();
                            String sourceTable = source.getTable();
                            boolean isReadPartition = source.getIsReadPartition();
                            String partitionField = source.getPartitionField();
                            String readPartitions = source.getReadPartitions();
                            String sourceSqlFilePath = TaskScanner.getSqlFilePath(taskName, sourceSqlFile);

                            Sink sink = OfflineInitialize.getSink();
                            String sinkCatalogConn = sink.getCatalog();
                            String sinkSchema = sink.getSchema();
                            String sinkTable = sink.getTable();

                            FileUtil.mkdir(Constant.TASK_TMP_PATH);
                            String logsInitPath = Constant.APP_LOG_PATH + File.separator + "logs_init";
                            FileUtil.mkdir(logsInitPath);

                            //执行离线sql文件
                            this.doDataQuery(sourceSqlFile, sourceSqlFilePath, sourceCatalogConn, logsInitPath);

                            // 检查源表行数
                            this.checkSourceTable(sourceTable, sourceCatalogConn);

                            // 获取hive源表字段
                            List<String> sourceTableFields = this.getSourceTableFields(sourceTable, sourceCatalogConn, isReadPartition, partitionField);

                            log.info("source table:{},fields:{}", sourceTable, sourceTableFields);

                            if (CommonUtils.IS_PRE_ENV) {
                                sinkCatalogConn = DbService.FEATURE_PRE_PRODUCT_DB;
                            }

                            String sinkSchemaTable = sinkSchema + "." + sinkTable;

                            // 检查目标表是否存在
                            this.checkSinkTable(sinkSchema, sinkTable, sinkCatalogConn, sinkSchemaTable);

                            // 检查源表字段是否都在目标表字段里
                            this.checkTableField(sinkCatalogConn, sinkSchemaTable, sourceTableFields, sourceTable, sinkTable);

                            // 构建SeaTunnel配置文件
                            String tableName = source.getTable().replaceAll("\\.", "_");
                            String seaTunnelConf = this.buildSeaTunnelConf(source, sourceTableFields, sinkSchemaTable, sinkCatalogConn, sink, tableName);

                            if (SystemUtils.IS_OS_WINDOWS) {
                                log.error("windows operating system does not support seatunnel");
                                System.exit(1);
                            }
                            //执行SeaTunnel进行数据同步
                            this.dataSync(isReadPartition, readPartitions, sourceTable, partitionField, sourceCatalogConn, logsInitPath, tableName, seaTunnelConf);
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                            System.exit(1);
                        }
                    }
            );
        }
    }

    private void dataSync(boolean isReadPartition, String readPartitions, String sourceTable, String partitionField, String sourceCatalogConn, String logsInitPath, String tableName, String seaTunnelConf) throws Exception {
        if (isReadPartition) {
            // 按分区同步,获取所有的分区值
            List<String> partitions = null;
            if (readPartitions == null) {
                String queryTable = this.replaceLastDot(sourceTable) + "$partitions\"";
                String s = String.format("select %s FROM %s order by %s asc", partitionField, queryTable, partitionField);
                List<Map<String, Object>> partitionsResult = DbService.queryDb(sourceCatalogConn, s, null, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(partitionsResult) && !partitionsResult.isEmpty()) {
                    partitions = partitionsResult.stream().map(item -> item.get(partitionField).toString()).collect(Collectors.toList());
                }
            } else {
                partitions = Arrays.asList(readPartitions.split(","));
            }
            assert partitions != null;
            for (String partition : partitions) {
                String seaTunnelLogFile = logsInitPath + File.separator + "seatunnel_" + tableName + "_" + partition + ".log";
                String seaTunnelCmd = String.format("%s --config %s -i dt=%s >>%s 2>&1", SEA_TUNNEL_SH, seaTunnelConf, partition, seaTunnelLogFile);
                String seaTunnelScript = Constant.TASK_TMP_PATH + File.separator + "seatunnel_" + tableName + "_" + partition + ".sh";
                this.doDataSync(seaTunnelCmd, seaTunnelScript, seaTunnelLogFile);
            }
        } else {
            String seaTunnelScript = Constant.TASK_TMP_PATH + File.separator + "seatunnel_" + tableName + ".sh";
            String seaTunnelLogFile = logsInitPath + File.separator + "seatunnel_" + tableName + ".log";
            String seaTunnelCmd = String.format("%s --config %s >%s 2>&1", SEA_TUNNEL_SH, seaTunnelConf, seaTunnelLogFile);
            this.doDataSync(seaTunnelCmd, seaTunnelScript, seaTunnelLogFile);
        }
    }

    private String buildSeaTunnelConf(Source source, List<String> sourceTableFields, String sinkSchemaTable, String sinkCatalogConn, Sink sink, String tableName) throws IOException, SQLException {
        Map<String, Object> param = new HashMap<>();
        boolean isUpsertMode = true;
        String syncMode = sink.getSyncMode();
        if (ObjectUtil.isNotEmpty(syncMode)) {
            isUpsertMode = StringUtils.equalsIgnoreCase(syncMode, "upsert");
        }
        String sourceTable = source.getTable();
        String hiveTableName = sourceTable.substring(sourceTable.indexOf(".") + 1);
        String sinkSql = SqlUtils.generateInsertSqlForOffline(sourceTableFields, sinkSchemaTable, isUpsertMode);
        log.info("sink sql:{}", sinkSql);
        param.put("sink_sql", sinkSql);
        param.put("parallelism", source.getParallelism());
        param.put("rows_per_second", source.getRowsPerSecond());
        param.put("table_name", hiveTableName);
        if (source.getIsReadPartition()) {
            param.put("partition_field", source.getPartitionField());
            param.put("source_fields", String.join(",", sourceTableFields));
        }

        Wini envWini = new Wini(new File(Constant.ENV_FILE));
        String site = source.getSite();
        String sitePath = "hdfs_site_path";
        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("asi", site) || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("afi", site) || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("pid", site)) {
            String locationType = source.getLocationType();
            sitePath = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("oss", locationType) ? "hdfs_site_oss_path" : sitePath;
        }
        String metastoreUri = envWini.get("seatunnel", "metastore_uri");
        String hdfsSitePath = envWini.get("seatunnel", sitePath);
        param.put("metastore_uri", metastoreUri);
        param.put("hdfs_site_path", hdfsSitePath);

        DbInfo sinkDbInfo = SqlUtils.queryDbInfo(sinkCatalogConn, DataBaseType.MYSQL);
        if (sinkDbInfo == null) {
            log.error("sink db info is null");
            System.exit(1);
        }
        String host = sinkDbInfo.getHost();
        String port = sinkDbInfo.getPort();
        String user = sinkDbInfo.getUser();
        String password = sinkDbInfo.getPassword();
        param.put("server", String.format("%s:%s", host, port));
        param.put("user", user);
        param.put("password", password);
        param.put("batch_size", sink.getBatchSize());
        String stgFile = source.getIsReadPartition() ? Constant.HIVE2MYSQL_BY_PARTITION_STG_FILE : Constant.HIVE2MYSQL_STG_FILE;
        String stg = FileUtil.readUtf8String(stgFile);
        ST st = new ST(stg);
        st.add("param", param);
        String render = st.render();
        String seaTunnelConf = Constant.TASK_TMP_PATH + File.separator + "seatunnel_" + tableName + ".conf";
        FileUtil.writeUtf8String(render, seaTunnelConf);
        return seaTunnelConf;
    }

    private List<String> getSourceTableFields(String sourceTable, String sourceCatalogConn, boolean isReadPartition, String partitionField) throws SQLException {
        String sourceTableFieldsSql = "describe " + sourceTable;
        List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(sourceCatalogConn, sourceTableFieldsSql, null, null);
        return results.stream().filter(item -> {
            String column = item.get("Column").toString();
            return !isReadPartition || !StrUtil.equals(column.trim(), partitionField);
        }).map(item -> item.get("Column").toString()).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }


    /**
     * 检查源表行数
     */
    private void checkSourceTable(String sourceTable, String sourceCatalogConn) throws SQLException {
        String sql = "select count(*) as count from " + sourceTable;
        Object count = DbService.queryOneValue(sourceCatalogConn, sql, null, "count", null);
        long sourceTableCount = Long.parseLong(count.toString());
        if (sourceTableCount == 0L) {
            log.error("source result table:{} has no data,please check sql!", sourceTable);
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }

    // 检查源表字段是否都在目标表字段里
    private void checkTableField(String sinkCatalogConn, String sinkSchemaTable, List<String> sourceTableFields, String sourceTable, String sinkTable) {
        // 获取mysql目标表字段
        DbMetaDataTaskHandler handler = new DbMetaDataTaskHandler();
        TableMetaData tableMetaData = handler.getTableMetaData(sinkCatalogConn, sinkSchemaTable);
        List<String> sinkTableFields = tableMetaData.getFields().stream().map(field -> field.getName().toLowerCase()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        log.info("sink table:{},fields:{}", sinkSchemaTable, sinkTableFields);
        boolean ok = CollectionUtils.containsAll(sinkTableFields, sourceTableFields);
        if (!ok) {
            log.error("source table fields not in sink table fields,please check!");
            log.error("source table {} fields {} not in sink table {} fields,please check!", sourceTable, CollectionUtils6.diff(sourceTableFields, sinkTableFields), sinkTable);
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }

    private void checkSinkTable(String sinkSchema, String sinkTable, String sinkCatalogConn, String sinkSchemaTable) throws SQLException {
        String sql;
        sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = ? and TABLE_NAME = ?";
        List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = Arrays.asList(
                new SqlParam(sinkSchema, SqlParam.DataType.STRING),
                new SqlParam(sinkTable, SqlParam.DataType.STRING)
        );
        Object result = DbService.queryOneValue(sinkCatalogConn, sql, lstSqlParam, "count", null);
        long resultCount = Long.parseLong(result.toString());
        if (resultCount == 0) {
            log.error("sink table:{} does not exist", sinkSchemaTable);
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 调用presto,执行sql进行初始化,生成表
     */
    private void doDataQuery(String sourceSqlFile, String sourceSqlFilePath, String sourceCatalogConn, String logsInitPath) throws IOException, InterruptedException {
        if (sourceSqlFile != null && sourceSqlFilePath != null && FileUtil.exist(sourceSqlFilePath)) {
            // 获取presto配置信息
            DbInfo prestoDbInfo = SqlUtils.queryDbInfo(sourceCatalogConn, DataBaseType.PRESTO);
            if (prestoDbInfo == null) {
                log.error("query {}, result db info is null!", sourceCatalogConn);
                System.exit(1);
            }
            // 执行离线sql文件
            String sqlFileName = sourceSqlFile.replaceAll("\\.", "_");
            String prestoLogFile = logsInitPath + File.separator + "presto_" + sqlFileName + ".log";
            String prestoCliCmd = "export PRESTO_PASSWORD='%s' && java -jar %s --server https://%s:%s --user %s --password --catalog hive --schema dwd --file %s >%s 2>&1";
            prestoCliCmd = String.format(prestoCliCmd, prestoDbInfo.getPassword(), PRESTO_CLI_JAR, prestoDbInfo.getHost(), prestoDbInfo.getPort(), prestoDbInfo.getUser(), sourceSqlFilePath, prestoLogFile);
            String prestoScriptFilePath = Constant.TASK_TMP_PATH + File.separator + "presto_" + sqlFileName + ".sh";
            String prestoScriptContent = "#!/bin/bash\n" + prestoCliCmd;
            FileUtil.writeUtf8String(prestoScriptContent, new File(prestoScriptFilePath));
            // 执行命令
            log.info("start execute presto command:{},具体日志文件:{}", prestoCliCmd, prestoLogFile);
            StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
            ProcessBuilder pb = new ProcessBuilder("sh", prestoScriptFilePath);
            prestoProcess = pb.start();
            int exitCode = prestoProcess.waitFor();
            watch.stop();
            if (exitCode != 0) {
                log.error("execute presto failed,command:{},exit code:{},具体日志文件:{}", prestoCliCmd, exitCode, prestoLogFile);
                System.exit(1);
            } else {
                log.info("execute presto success,command:{},cost time:{} seconds,具体日志文件:{}", prestoCliCmd, watch.getTime(TimeUnit.SECONDS), prestoLogFile);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Hive表存储类型获取,hdfs或者oss,hive版本为1.1.0需要降驱动,暂不使用
     */
    private String getHiveTableLocationType(String hiveCatalog, String hiveTableName) throws SQLException {
        String locationSql = "DESCRIBE FORMATTED " + hiveTableName;
        List<Map<String, Object>> locationResults = DbService.queryDb(hiveCatalog, locationSql, null, null);
        log.info("describe formatted result:{}", locationResults);
        Optional<String> locationPath = locationResults.stream().filter(item -> StrUtil.equals(item.get("col_name").toString().trim(), "Location:")).map(item -> item.get("data_type").toString()).findFirst();
        String location = locationPath.orElse(null);
        if (location == null) {
            log.error("table location is null");
            System.exit(1);
        }
        return location.startsWith("hdfs") ? "hdfs" : "oss";
    }

    /**
     * 调用seatunnel执行数据同步
     */
    private void doDataSync(String seaTunnelCmd, String seaTunnelScriptFile, String seaTunnelLogFile) throws Exception {
        String seaTunnelScriptContent = "#!/bin/bash\n" + seaTunnelCmd;
        FileUtil.writeUtf8String(seaTunnelScriptContent, new File(seaTunnelScriptFile));
        // 执行命令
        log.info("start execute command:{},具体日志文件:{}", seaTunnelCmd, seaTunnelLogFile);
        StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
        ProcessBuilder pb = new ProcessBuilder("sh", seaTunnelScriptFile);
        seaTunnelProcess = pb.start();
        int exitCode = seaTunnelProcess.waitFor();
        watch.stop();
        if (exitCode != 0) {
            log.error("execute failed,command:{},exit code:{},具体日志文件:{}", seaTunnelCmd, exitCode, seaTunnelLogFile);
            System.exit(1);
        } else {
            log.info("execute success,command:{},cost time:{} seconds,具体日志文件:{}", seaTunnelCmd, watch.getTime(TimeUnit.SECONDS), seaTunnelLogFile);
        }
    }

    public void shutdown() {
        if (prestoProcess != null) {
            if (prestoProcess.isAlive()) {
                log.info("presto process destroy");
                try {
                    ProcessTree.OSProcess osProcess = ProcessTree.get().get(prestoProcess);
                    osProcess.killRecursively();
                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                }
            }
        }
        if (seaTunnelProcess != null) {
            if (seaTunnelProcess.isAlive()) {
                log.info("seatunnel process destroy");
                try {
                    ProcessTree.OSProcess osProcess = ProcessTree.get().get(seaTunnelProcess);
                    osProcess.killRecursively();
                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public String replaceLastDot(String input) {
        int lastIndex = input.lastIndexOf(".");
        if (lastIndex == -1) {
            throw new RuntimeException("no . character");
        }
        return input.substring(0, lastIndex) + ".\"" + input.substring(lastIndex + 1);
    }
}

```
