### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/Processor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.ListUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ObjectUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInsertSql;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureQuerySql;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.ST;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/10/20
 */
public interface Processor {

    String CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS = "before_filter_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_FILTER = "filter_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS = "before_filter_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_CONSUMER_DELAY = "delay_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_DATA_QUERY = "feature_query_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_CALC = "feature_calc_process";
    String CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_SINK = "feature_sink_process";

    String FEATURE_CALIBER = "feature_caliber";
    String FEATURE_KAFKA_FIELD = "feature_kafka_field";
    int DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE = 50;

    String INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL = "INSERT INTO taskinfodb.t_async_task_meta_info" +
            "(feature_name,feature_domains,feature_sql,query_table_fields,query_db_server,insert_db_server,insert_table_name,task_name,maintainer,status_code,create_time, update_time) " +
            "values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,1,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)  " +
            "on duplicate key update  " +
            "feature_sql=values(feature_sql), " +
            "query_table_fields=values(query_table_fields), " +
            "query_db_server=values(query_db_server), " +
            "task_name=values(task_name), " +
            "maintainer=values(maintainer), " +
            "status_code=values(status_code), " +
            "update_time=values(update_time)";

    /**
     * 特征分组大小,默认值50,可被重写
     */
    default int defineFeatureGroupSize() {
        return DEFAULT_FEATURE_GROUP_SIZE;
    }

    default List<String> analysisFeatureDomainKafkaNames(List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList){
        // 维度字段
        FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo = featureInfoList.get(0);
        List<FeatureDomain> featureDomains = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains();
        return featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getKafkaName).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    /**
     * 分析特征查询语句
     * @param featureInfoList
     * @return
     */
    default List<FeatureQuerySql> analysisFeature(List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList) {
        List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqls = new ArrayList<>();
        // 查询字段
        FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo = featureInfoList.get(0);
        String featureCaliber = featureInfo.getFeatureCaliber();
        String featureQueryCatalog = featureInfo.getFeatureQueryCatalog();
        List<String> featureLogics = featureInfoList.stream().map(item -> {
            String featureName = item.getFeatureName();
            String featureLogic = item.getFeatureLogic();
            return String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        int featureGroupSize = defineFeatureGroupSize();
        if (featureLogics.size() > featureGroupSize) {
            List<List<String>> groupFeatureLogics = ListUtil.split(featureLogics, featureGroupSize);
            List<FeatureQuerySql> list = groupFeatureLogics.stream().map(logics -> {
                String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", logics);
                ST st = new ST(featureCaliber);
                st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
                String sql = st.render();
                List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
                return new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureQueryCatalog);
            }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            featureQuerySqls.addAll(list);
        } else {
            String featureLogicsStr = String.join(",\n", featureLogics);
            ST st = new ST(featureCaliber);
            st.add("features", featureLogicsStr);
            String sql = st.render();
            List<String> sqlParams = SqlUtils.getSqlParams(sql);
            FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = new FeatureQuerySql(sqlParams, sql, featureQueryCatalog);
            featureQuerySqls.add(featureQuerySql);
        }
        return featureQuerySqls;
    }

    /**
     * 插入语句分析
     * @param featureInfoList
     * @param taskInfo
     * @return
     */
    default FeatureInsertSql analysisFeatureInsertSql(List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList, TaskInfo taskInfo){
        FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo = featureInfoList.get(0);
        List<FeatureDomain> featureDomains = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains();
        List<String> featureDomainDbNames = featureDomains.stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
        //插入字段
        List<String> insertFields = new ArrayList<>(featureDomainDbNames);
        insertFields.addAll(featureInfoList.stream().map(FeatureInfoV1::getFeatureName).collect(Collectors.toList()));

        String insertSql = generateInsertSql(featureInfo, insertFields);
        String sinkCatalog = DbService.changeCatalog(featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable().getCatalog());
        FeatureInsertSql featureInsertSql = new FeatureInsertSql(featureDomains, insertSql, sinkCatalog);
        // 对插入语句进行元数据采集
        String replaceSql = StrUtil.replace(insertSql, "?", "'****'");
        try {
            DbService.collectMetaData(sinkCatalog, replaceSql, taskInfo);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        return featureInsertSql;
    }


    /**
     * 分析sql涉及到的字段
     * @param featureQuerySqlList
     * @param taskInfo
     * @return Map<口径,Map<表名,Set<字段名>>>
     */
    default Map<String, Set<String>> analysisSqlField(List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList, TaskInfo taskInfo) {
        Map<String, List<String>> tableFieldsMap = new HashMap<>();
        Map<String, Map<String, Set<String>>> result = new HashMap<>();
        Map<String, Set<String>> tableSelectFiledMap = new HashMap<>();
        List<Map<String, Set<String>>> tableSelectFieldMapList = featureQuerySqlList.stream().map(featureQuerySql -> {
            try {
                String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
                String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
                // 对查询语句进行元数据采集
                DbService.collectMetaData(catalog, sql, taskInfo);
                return DbService.getSelectSqlFields(catalog, sql);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        for (Map<String, Set<String>> tableSelectFieldMap : tableSelectFieldMapList) {
            for (Map.Entry<String, Set<String>> entry : tableSelectFieldMap.entrySet()) {
                String tableName = entry.getKey();
                Set<String> fields = entry.getValue();
                if (!tableFieldsMap.containsKey(tableName)) {
                    String catalog = featureQuerySqlList.get(0).getCatalog();
                    List<String> tableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, tableName);
                    tableFieldsMap.put(tableName, tableFields);
                }
                tableSelectFiledMap.compute(tableName, (key, value) -> {
                    List<String> tableFields = tableFieldsMap.get(tableName);
                    if (value == null) {
                        value = new HashSet<>();
                    }
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        if (tableFields.contains(field)) {
                            value.add(field);
                        }
                    }
                    return value;
                });
            }
        }
        return tableSelectFiledMap;
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中等于表达式的字段及值
     * @param featureQuerySqlList
     * @return Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, 字段值>>>
     */
    default Map<String, Map<String, String>> analysisSqlWhereEq(List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList) {
        FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
        String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
        String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
        try {
            return DbService.getSelectSqlWhereEqExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中不等于表达式的字段及值
     * @param featureQuerySqlList
     * @return Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, 字段值>>>
     */
    default Map<String, Map<String, String>> analysisSqlWhereNotEq(List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList) {
        FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
        String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
        String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
        try {
            return DbService.getSelectSqlWhereNotEqExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中in表达式的字段及值
     * @param featureQuerySqlList
     * @return Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, List<字段值>>>>
     */
    default Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> analysisSqlWhereIn(List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList) {
        FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
        String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
        String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
        try {
            return DbService.getSelectSqlWhereInExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 分析sql where条件中not in表达式的字段及值
     * @param featureQuerySqlList
     * @return Map<口径,Map<表名,Map<字段名, List<字段值>>>>
     */
    default Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>> analysisSqlWhereNotIn(List<FeatureQuerySql> featureQuerySqlList) {
        FeatureQuerySql featureQuerySql = featureQuerySqlList.get(0);
        String catalog = featureQuerySql.getCatalog();
        String sql = featureQuerySql.getSql();
        try {
            return DbService.getSelectSqlWhereNotInExpressFieldValue(catalog, sql);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 记录特征元信息
     * @param featureInfoList
     * @param taskInfo
     */
    default void recordFeature(List<FeatureInfoV1> featureInfoList, TaskInfo taskInfo) {
        List<List<SqlParam>> sqlParamsList = new ArrayList<>();
        featureInfoList.forEach(featureInfo -> {
            String featureName = featureInfo.getFeatureName();
            String featureLogic = featureInfo.getFeatureLogic();
            String featureCaliber = featureInfo.getFeatureCaliber();
            String featureCatalog = featureInfo.getFeatureQueryCatalog();
            Sink sink = featureInfo.getFeatureSinkTable();
            String sinkCatalog = sink.getCatalog();
            String sinkTableName = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
            List<String> featureDomainList = featureInfo.getFeatureDomains().stream().map(FeatureDomain::getDbName).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String featureDomains = StrUtil.join(",", featureDomainList);
            String logic = String.format("%s as %s", featureLogic, featureName);
            ST st = new ST(featureCaliber);
            st.add("features", logic);
            String featureSql = st.render();
            String queryTableFields;
            Object queryDbServer;
            Object sinkDbServer;
            try {
                Map<String, Set<String>> tableFieldsMap = DbService.getSelectSqlFields(featureCatalog, featureSql);
                queryTableFields = JSON.toJSONString(tableFieldsMap);
                Map<String, Object> cons = DbService.getCons(featureCatalog);
                queryDbServer = cons.get("host");
                cons = DbService.getCons(sinkCatalog);
                sinkDbServer = cons.get("host");
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }

            List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureDomains, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(featureSql, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryTableFields, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(queryDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkDbServer, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(sinkTableName, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getTaskName(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(taskInfo.getMaintainer(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            sqlParamsList.add(sqlParams);
        });
        try {
            DbService.insertDbBatch(Constant.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, INSERT_FEATURE_INFO_SQL, sqlParamsList, null);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }


    /**
     * 生成insert sql
     * @param featureInfo
     * @param insertFields
     * @return
     */
    String generateInsertSql(FeatureInfoV1 featureInfo, List<String> insertFields);


    /**
     * 检查维度是否为空
     */
    default boolean checkDomainIsEmpty(List<String> domainKafkaNames, JSONObject data) {
        for (String domainKafkaName : domainKafkaNames) {
            Object domainValue = data.get(domainKafkaName);
            if (ObjectUtil.isEmpty(domainValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 新增和删除的过滤规则
     * @return
     */
    default boolean insertAndDeleteFilter(List<String> domainKafkaNames, Map<String, String> whereEqFieldValueMap, Map<String, String> whereNotEqFieldValueMap,
                                          Map<String, List<String>> whereInFieldValueMap, Map<String, List<String>> whereNotInFieldValueMap, JSONObject data){
        // 1.新增和删除,如果维度有空值,则过滤
        boolean result = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, data);
        if (result) {
            return true;
        }
        // 2.判断sql where等号表达式字段值和kafka字段值是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (!StrUtil.equals(msgFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        // 3.判断sql where不等号表达式字段值和kafka字段值是否一样,如果一样则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereNotEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (StrUtil.equals(msgFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        // 4.判断sql where in表达式字段值列表是否包含了kafka字段值,如果不包含则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (!sqlFieldValue.contains(msgFiledValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        // 5.判断sql where not in表达式字段值列表是否包含了kafka字段值,如果包含则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereNotInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(data.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (sqlFieldValue.contains(msgFiledValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 更新的过滤规则
     * @return
     */
    default boolean updateFilter(List<String> domainKafkaNames, Set<String> fields, Map<String, String> whereEqFieldValueMap, Map<String, String> whereNotEqFieldValueMap,
                                 Map<String, List<String>> whereInFieldValueMap, Map<String, List<String>> whereNotInFieldValueMap,

                                 JSONObject beforeData, JSONObject rowData) {
        // 1.更新,如果beforeData和rowData的维度都有空值,则过滤
        boolean resultBeforeData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, beforeData);
        boolean resultRowData = checkDomainIsEmpty(domainKafkaNames, rowData);
        if (resultBeforeData && resultRowData) {
            return true;
        }
        // 2.判断sql where等号表达式中对应的字段值和kafka更新前,更新后字段值是否一样,如果不一样则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
            String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (!StrUtil.equals(msgBeforeDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue) && !StrUtil.equals(msgRowDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        // 3.判断sql where不等号表达式中对应的字段值和kafka更新前,更新后字段值是否一样,如果一样则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : whereNotEqFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            String sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
            String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (StrUtil.equals(msgBeforeDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue) && StrUtil.equals(msgRowDataFiledValue, sqlFieldValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        // 4.判断sql where in表达式字段值列表是否包含kafka更新前,更新后字段值,如果不包含则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
            String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (!sqlFieldValue.contains(msgBeforeDataFiledValue) && !sqlFieldValue.contains(msgRowDataFiledValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        // 5.判断sql where not in表达式字段值列表是否包含kafka更新前,更新后字段值,如果包含则过滤掉
        for (Map.Entry<String, List<String>> entry : whereNotInFieldValueMap.entrySet()) {
            String sqlFieldName = entry.getKey();
            List<String> sqlFieldValue = entry.getValue();
            String msgBeforeDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(sqlFieldName));
            String msgRowDataFiledValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(sqlFieldName));
            if (sqlFieldValue.contains(msgBeforeDataFiledValue) && sqlFieldValue.contains(msgRowDataFiledValue)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        // 6.判断sql涉及到的所有字段值在kafka更新前后是否一样,如果都一样则过滤掉
        for (String field : fields) {
            String rowValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(rowData.get(field));
            String beforeValue = StrUtil.toStringOrNull(beforeData.get(field));
            if (!StrUtil.equals(beforeValue, rowValue)) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowCleanThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class WindowCleanThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();
    private final String processorName;

    public WindowCleanThreadFactory(String processorName) {
        this.processorName = processorName;
    }

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, String.format("%s-window-clean-thread-%d", processorName, index.get()));
    }
}


```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowCleanThreadFactory.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowLastNProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.WindowLastN;
import com.akulaku.core.util.AkuKmsUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheBuilder;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheLoader;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheStats;
import com.google.common.cache.LoadingCache;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.parquet.Strings;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
import org.springframework.expression.ExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.standard.SpelExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.support.StandardEvaluationContext;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;

@Slf4j
public class WindowLastNProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    public static final String CALC_NODE_NAME = "kafka_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "after_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";
    public final WindowLastN windowLastNConfig;
    protected final String insertSql;

    /**
     * 表字段
     */
    protected final List<String> tableFields;
    /**
     * 更新字段
     */
    private final List<String> duplicateUpdateFields;

    /**
     * 解密字段
     */
    protected List<String> decryptFields = null;

    protected AkuKmsUtil akuKmsUtil = null;

    private final List<String> orderByFields;

    private final String cacheQuerySql;

    public LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> minAndCountCache;

    private Map<Object, Object> locks;
    private Map<Object, AtomicInteger> waitingLocks;

    ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor();


    protected WindowLastNProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        windowLastNConfig = processorConfig.getWindowLastN();
        String orderByFieldsStr = windowLastNConfig.getOrderByFields();
        if (orderByFieldsStr == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件orderByFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        orderByFields = Arrays.stream(orderByFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        Set<String> set = orderByFields.stream().map(x -> String.format("min(%s) as min_%s", x, x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
        String minFields = String.join(",", set);
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        String domainField = windowLastNConfig.getDomainField();
        cacheQuerySql = String.format("select %s,count(*) as size from %s where %s=?", minFields, table, domainField);
        log.info("cacheQuerySql:{}", cacheQuerySql);
        Source source = windowLastNConfig.getSource();
        String kafka2MySqlFields = source.getKafka2MySqlFields();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafka2MySqlFields)) {
            tableFields = Arrays.stream(kafka2MySqlFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String duplicateFields = source.getKafka2MySqlDuplicateUpdateFields();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insertSql:{}", insertSql);
        minAndCountCache = getMinAndCountCache();
        locks = new HashMap<>();
        waitingLocks = new HashMap<>();

        String decryptFieldsStr = source.getDecryptFields();
        String kmsConnName = source.getKmsConnName();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(decryptFieldsStr)) {
            this.decryptFields = Arrays.stream(decryptFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.akuKmsUtil = new AkuKmsUtil(kmsConnName);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        super.start();
    }


    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        // 计算参数列表
        List<String> parameters = tableFields.stream().map(field -> CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME + "." + field).collect(Collectors.toList());
        String kafkaDataField = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataField();
        String[] fields = kafkaDataField == null ? new String[0] : kafkaDataField.split("\\.");

        this.addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject targetObject = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                        if (targetObject == null) {
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    return targetObject;
                }, CALC_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return beforeProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addFilterNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return this.isFilter(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, FILTER_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return afterProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addSql(windowLastNConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), "insert", parameters, insertSql)
                .addConsumerNode(this::processExitWindow, "processExitWindow");
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<String> insertTableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, table);
        List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getTableFields());
        List<String> duplicateUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getDuplicateUpdateFields());
        // 如果目标表存在window_create_time字段,则插入字段加上window_create_time
        if (insertTableFields.contains("window_create_time")) {
            tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        }
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        duplicateUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(table, tableColumns, duplicateUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(this.decryptFields)) {
            for (String field : this.decryptFields) {
                String value = jsonObject.getString(field);
                if (StrUtil.isNotBlank(value)) {
                    try {
                        String decrypt = this.akuKmsUtil.decrypt(value);
                        jsonObject.put(field, decrypt);
                    } catch (Throwable e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException("decrypt error", e);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子后调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject afterProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 默认过滤方法
     */
    public boolean isFilter(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete")) {
            // 过滤删除事件
            return true;
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "insert")) {
            // 业务过滤条件表达式计算,不符合则过滤
            Boolean expressionResult = expressionFilter(jsonObject);
            if (Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResult)) {
                return true;
            }
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "update")) {
            // 变更前和变更后业务过滤条件表达式计算
            JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
            Boolean expressionResultBefore = expressionFilter(beforeData);
            Boolean expressionResultAfter = expressionFilter(jsonObject);
            // 如果变更前和变更后都不符合条件,则过滤
            if (Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultBefore) && Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultAfter)) {
                return true;
            }
            // 如果变更前符合条件,变更后不符合条件,则要出窗,不过滤
            if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(expressionResultBefore) && Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultAfter)) {
                String primaryKeysStr = windowLastNConfig.getPrimaryKeys();
                Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
                String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
                List<String> primaryKeys = Arrays.asList(primaryKeysStr.split(","));
                Set<String> set = primaryKeys.stream().map(x -> String.format("%s = ?", x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
                String keyStr = Strings.join(set, " and ");
                String deleteSql = String.format("delete from %s where %s", table, keyStr);
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                for (String key : primaryKeys) {
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(beforeData.get(key), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                }
                try {
                    DbService.deleteDb(sink.getCatalog(), deleteSql, sqlParams, null);
                    // 更新缓存
                    String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
                    String domainField = windowLastNConfig.getDomainField();
                    Object domainValue = beforeData.get(domainField);
                    if (domainValue != null) {
                        List<SqlParam> keySqlParamList = Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(domainValue, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                        List<Map<String, Object>> dbResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, cacheQuerySql, keySqlParamList, null);
                        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(dbResult)) {
                            Map<String, Object> value = dbResult.get(0);
                            if (value != null) {
                                minAndCountCache.put(domainValue, value);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } catch (SQLException e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
                return true;
            }

        }
        // 缓存过滤
        return cacheFilter(jsonObject);
    }


    public Boolean expressionFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        String kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataFieldConditionExpression();
        if (kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression == null) {
            return true;
        }
        ExpressionParser expressionParser = new SpelExpressionParser();
        StandardEvaluationContext evaluationContext = new StandardEvaluationContext();
        evaluationContext.setVariable("msg", jsonObject);
        Boolean expressionResult = expressionParser.parseExpression(kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression).getValue(evaluationContext, Boolean.class);
        log.debug("kafka after data field condition expression:{},execute result:{}", kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression, expressionResult);
        return expressionResult;
    }

    public boolean cacheFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        String domainField = windowLastNConfig.getDomainField();
        Object domainValue = jsonObject.get(domainField);
        if (domainValue == null) {
            return true;
        }
        Map<String, Object> cacheMap = null;
        try {
            cacheMap = minAndCountCache.get(domainValue);
        } catch (CacheLoader.InvalidCacheLoadException e) {
            // CacheLoader不支持返回空值,会抛出异常,为此捕捉异常
        } catch (ExecutionException e) {
            log.error("get key:{} from cache error", domainValue, e);
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        if (cacheMap != null && cacheMap.get("size") != null) {
            long cacheSize = Long.parseLong(cacheMap.get("size").toString());
            // 当窗口表的用户数据量大于等于阀值,如果kafka的排序字段值小于窗口表最小
            if (cacheSize >= windowLastNConfig.getLimit()) {
                StringBuilder compare = new StringBuilder();
                for (String orderByField : orderByFields) {
                    Object cacheOrderByValue = cacheMap.get("min_" + orderByField);
                    Object kafkaOrderByValue = jsonObject.get(orderByField);
                    if (cacheOrderByValue != null && kafkaOrderByValue != null && kafkaOrderByValue.toString().compareTo(cacheOrderByValue.toString()) < 0) {
                        log.debug("缓存过滤了,key:{},value:{}", domainValue, cacheMap);
                        return true;
                    }
                    String format = String.format("orderByField:%s,cacheOrderByValue:%s,kafkaOrderByValue:%s", orderByField, cacheOrderByValue, kafkaOrderByValue);

                    compare.append(format).append(",");

                }
                log.debug("缓存没有过滤,key:{},cacheMap:{},compare:{}", domainValue, cacheMap, compare.toString());
            }
        }
        return false;
    }


    public List<String> getTableFields() {
        return tableFields;
    }

    public List<String> getDuplicateUpdateFields() {
        return duplicateUpdateFields;
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }

    /**
     * 查询数据库最小值和数目数,加进缓存
     */
    private LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> getMinAndCountCache() {
        assert windowLastNConfig != null;
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> loadingCache = CacheBuilder.newBuilder()
                //设置并发级别为8，并发级别是指可以同时写缓存的线程数
                .concurrencyLevel(Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors())
                //设置缓存容器的初始容量
                .initialCapacity(1000)
                //设置缓存最大容量，超过之后就会按照LRU最近虽少使用算法来移除缓存项
                .maximumSize(1000000)
                //设置要统计缓存的命中率
                .recordStats()
                //设置缓存的移除通知
                .removalListener(notification -> log.debug("remove cache key:{},reason：{}", notification.getKey(), notification.getCause()))
                //build方法中可以指定CacheLoader，在缓存不存在时通过CacheLoader的实现自动加载缓存
                .build(
                        new CacheLoader<Object, Map<String, Object>>() {
                            @Override
                            public Map<String, Object> load(@NotNull Object key) throws Exception {
                                log.debug("load cache key:{} from database", key);
                                Map<String, Object> result = null;
                                List<Map<String, Object>> list = DbService.queryDb(sink.getCatalog(), cacheQuerySql, Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(key, SqlParam.DataType.Object)), null);
                                if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(list)) {
                                    result = list.get(0);
                                }
                                return result;
                            }
                        }
                );

        Runnable task = () -> {
            CacheStats stats = loadingCache.stats();
            log.info("缓存的命中次数: " + stats.hitCount());
            log.info("缓存的命中率: " + stats.hitRate());
            log.info("缓存的加载次数: " + stats.loadCount());
            log.info("缓存的加载平均时间: " + stats.averageLoadPenalty());
        };
        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(task, 1, 5, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
        return loadingCache;
    }

    protected void processExitWindow(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        String domainField = windowLastNConfig.getDomainField();
        Object domainValue = jsonObject.get(domainField);
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();

        Object lock;
        synchronized (locks) {
            lock = locks.computeIfAbsent(domainValue, j -> new Object());
            waitingLocks.computeIfAbsent(domainValue, j -> new AtomicInteger()).incrementAndGet();
        }

        synchronized (lock) {
            String countSql = String.format("select count(*) as count from %s where %s = ?", table, domainField);
            try {
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(domainValue, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                Object countResultObj = DbService.queryOneValue(catalog, countSql, sqlParams, "count", null);
                long countResult = Long.parseLong(countResultObj.toString());
                if (countResult > windowLastNConfig.getLimit()) {
                    // 最晚的数据删除
                    long deleteCount = countResult - windowLastNConfig.getLimit();
                    Set<String> set = orderByFields.stream().map(x -> String.format("%s asc", x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
                    String orderByAsc = String.join(",", set);
                    String deleteSql = String.format("delete from %s where %s = ? order by %s limit %d", table, domainField, orderByAsc, deleteCount);
                    DbService.deleteDb(catalog, deleteSql, sqlParams, null);
                }
                List<Map<String, Object>> dbResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, cacheQuerySql, sqlParams, null);
                if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(dbResult)) {
                    minAndCountCache.put(domainValue, dbResult.get(0));
                }
                synchronized (locks) {
                    if (waitingLocks.get(domainValue).decrementAndGet() == 0) {
                        locks.remove(domainValue);
                        waitingLocks.remove(domainValue);
                    }
                }
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowLastNProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowLastNProcessorV2.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.WindowLastN;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheBuilder;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheLoader;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheStats;
import com.google.common.cache.LoadingCache;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.parquet.Strings;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
import org.springframework.expression.ExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.standard.SpelExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.support.StandardEvaluationContext;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;

@Slf4j
public class WindowLastNProcessorV2 extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    public final WindowLastN windowLastNConfig;
    protected final String insertSql;

    /**
     * 表字段
     */
    protected final List<String> tableFields;
    /**
     * 更新字段
     */
    private final List<String> duplicateUpdateFields;

    private final List<String> orderByFields;
    private final List<String> domainFields;

    private final String cacheQuerySql;

    private final String countSql;
    private final String deleteCountSql;


    public LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> minAndCountCache;

    private Map<Object, Object> locks;
    private Map<Object, AtomicInteger> waitingLocks;

    ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor();


    protected WindowLastNProcessorV2(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        windowLastNConfig = processorConfig.getWindowLastN();
        String orderByFieldsStr = windowLastNConfig.getOrderByFields();
        if (orderByFieldsStr == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件orderByFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        orderByFields = Arrays.stream(orderByFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
        domainFields = Arrays.stream(windowLastNConfig.getDomainField().split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());

        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();

        Set<String> minSet = orderByFields.stream().map(x -> String.format("min(%s) as min_%s", x, x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
        String minFields  = String.join(",", minSet);

        List<String> whereSqls = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String domainField : this.domainFields) {
            whereSqls.add(String.format("%s = ?", domainField));
        }
        String whereSqlStr = String.join(" and ", whereSqls);
        cacheQuerySql = String.format("select %s,count(*) as size from %s where %s", minFields, table, whereSqlStr);
        log.info("cacheQuerySql:{}", cacheQuerySql);
        countSql = String.format("select count(*) as count from %s where %s", table, whereSqlStr);
        log.info("countSql:{}", countSql);
        Set<String> orderBySet = orderByFields.stream().map(x -> String.format("%s asc", x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
        String orderByAsc = String.join(",", orderBySet);
        deleteCountSql = String.format("delete from %s where %s order by %s limit ?", table, whereSqlStr, orderByAsc);
        log.info("deleteSql:{}", deleteCountSql);

        String kafka2MySqlFields = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafka2MySqlFields();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafka2MySqlFields)) {
            tableFields = Arrays.stream(kafka2MySqlFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String duplicateFields = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafka2MySqlDuplicateUpdateFields();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
        }

        insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insertSql:{}", insertSql);
        minAndCountCache = getMinAndCountCache();
        locks = new HashMap<>();
        waitingLocks = new HashMap<>();
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        super.start();
    }


    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        // 计算参数列表
        List<String> parameters = tableFields.stream().map(field -> Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS + "." + field).collect(Collectors.toList());
        String kafkaDataField = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataField();
        String[] fields = kafkaDataField == null ? new String[0] : kafkaDataField.split("\\.");

        this.addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject targetObject = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                        if (targetObject == null) {
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    return targetObject;
                }, Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_CALC)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_CALC, JSONObject.class);
                    return beforeProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS)
                .addFilterNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS, JSONObject.class);
                    return this.isFilter(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_FILTER)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS, JSONObject.class);
                    return afterProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS)
                .addSql(windowLastNConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_FEATURE_SINK, parameters, insertSql)
                .addConsumerNode(this::processExitWindow, "processExitWindow");
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<String> insertTableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, table);
        List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getTableFields());
        List<String> duplicateUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getDuplicateUpdateFields());
        // 如果目标表存在window_create_time字段,则插入字段加上window_create_time
        if (insertTableFields.contains("window_create_time")) {
            tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        }
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        duplicateUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(table, tableColumns, duplicateUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子后调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject afterProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 默认过滤方法
     */
    public boolean isFilter(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete")) {
            // 过滤删除事件
            return true;
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "insert")) {
            // 业务过滤条件表达式计算,不符合则过滤
            Boolean expressionResult = expressionFilter(jsonObject);
            if (Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResult)) {
                return true;
            }
        } else if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "update")) {
            // 变更前和变更后业务过滤条件表达式计算
            JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
            Boolean expressionResultBefore = expressionFilter(beforeData);
            Boolean expressionResultAfter = expressionFilter(jsonObject);
            // 如果变更前和变更后都不符合条件,则过滤
            if (Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultBefore) && Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultAfter)) {
                return true;
            }
            // 如果变更前符合条件,变更后不符合条件,则要出窗,不过滤
            if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(expressionResultBefore) && Boolean.FALSE.equals(expressionResultAfter)) {
                String primaryKeysStr = windowLastNConfig.getPrimaryKeys();
                Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
                String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
                List<String> primaryKeys = Arrays.asList(primaryKeysStr.split(","));
                Set<String> set = primaryKeys.stream().map(x -> String.format("%s = ?", x)).collect(Collectors.toSet());
                String keyStr = Strings.join(set, " and ");
                String deleteSql = String.format("delete from %s where %s", table, keyStr);
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                for (String key : primaryKeys) {
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(beforeData.get(key), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                }
                try {
                    DbService.deleteDb(sink.getCatalog(), deleteSql, sqlParams, null);
                    // 更新缓存
                    List<SqlParam> keySqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
                    List<Object> domainFieldValue = new ArrayList<>();
                    String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
                    for (String domainField : this.domainFields) {
                        domainFieldValue.add(beforeData.get(domainField));
                        keySqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(beforeData.get(domainField), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    }
                    List<Map<String, Object>> dbResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, cacheQuerySql, keySqlParamList, null);
                    if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(dbResult)) {
                        Map<String, Object> value = dbResult.get(0);
                        if (value != null) {
                            minAndCountCache.put(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue), value);
                        }
                    }
                } catch (SQLException e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
                return true;
            }

        }
        // 缓存过滤
        return cacheFilter(jsonObject);
    }


    public Boolean expressionFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        String kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression = windowLastNConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataFieldConditionExpression();
        if (kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression == null) {
            return true;
        }
        ExpressionParser expressionParser = new SpelExpressionParser();
        StandardEvaluationContext evaluationContext = new StandardEvaluationContext();
        evaluationContext.setVariable("msg", jsonObject);
        Boolean expressionResult = expressionParser.parseExpression(kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression).getValue(evaluationContext, Boolean.class);
        log.debug("kafka after data field condition expression:{},execute result:{}", kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression, expressionResult);
        return expressionResult;
    }

    public boolean cacheFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        List<Object> domainFieldValue = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String domainField : this.domainFields) {
            domainFieldValue.add(jsonObject.get(domainField));
        }
        Map<String, Object> cacheMap = null;
        try {
            cacheMap = minAndCountCache.get(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue));
        } catch (CacheLoader.InvalidCacheLoadException e) {
            // CacheLoader不支持返回空值,会抛出异常,为此捕捉异常
        } catch (ExecutionException e) {
            log.error("get key:{} from cache error", JSONObject.toJSONString(domainFieldValue), e);
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        if (cacheMap != null && cacheMap.get("size") != null) {
            long cacheSize = Long.parseLong(cacheMap.get("size").toString());
            // 当窗口表的用户数据量大于等于阀值,如果kafka的排序字段值小于窗口表最小
            if (cacheSize >= windowLastNConfig.getLimit()) {
                StringBuilder compare = new StringBuilder();
                for (String orderByField : orderByFields) {
                    Object cacheOrderByValue = cacheMap.get("min_" + orderByField);
                    Object kafkaOrderByValue = jsonObject.get(orderByField);
                    if (cacheOrderByValue != null && kafkaOrderByValue != null && kafkaOrderByValue.toString().compareTo(cacheOrderByValue.toString()) < 0) {
                        log.debug("缓存过滤了,key:{},value:{}", JSONObject.toJSONString(domainFieldValue), cacheMap);
                        return true;
                    }
                    String format = String.format("orderByField:%s,cacheOrderByValue:%s,kafkaOrderByValue:%s", orderByField, cacheOrderByValue, kafkaOrderByValue);

                    compare.append(format).append(",");

                }
                log.debug("缓存没有过滤,key:{},cacheMap:{},compare:{}", JSONObject.toJSONString(domainFieldValue), cacheMap, compare.toString());
            }
        }
        return false;
    }


    public List<String> getTableFields() {
        return tableFields;
    }

    public List<String> getDuplicateUpdateFields() {
        return duplicateUpdateFields;
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }

    public String getCountSql() {
        return countSql;
    }

    public String getDeleteCountSql() {
        return deleteCountSql;
    }

    public List<String> getDomainFields() {
        return domainFields;
    }

    /**
     * 查询数据库最小值和数目数,加进缓存
     */
    private LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> getMinAndCountCache() {
        assert windowLastNConfig != null;
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        LoadingCache<Object, Map<String, Object>> loadingCache = CacheBuilder.newBuilder()
                //设置并发级别为8，并发级别是指可以同时写缓存的线程数
                .concurrencyLevel(Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors())
                //设置缓存容器的初始容量
                .initialCapacity(1000)
                //设置缓存最大容量，超过之后就会按照LRU最近虽少使用算法来移除缓存项
                .maximumSize(1000000)
                //设置要统计缓存的命中率
                .recordStats()
                //设置缓存的移除通知
                .removalListener(notification -> log.debug("remove cache key:{},reason：{}", notification.getKey(), notification.getCause()))
                //build方法中可以指定CacheLoader，在缓存不存在时通过CacheLoader的实现自动加载缓存
                .build(
                        new CacheLoader<Object, Map<String, Object>>() {
                            @Override
                            public Map<String, Object> load(@NotNull Object key) throws Exception {
                                log.debug("load cache key:{} from database", key);
                                Map<String, Object> result = null;
                                List<Map<String, Object>> list = DbService.queryDb(sink.getCatalog(), cacheQuerySql, Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(key, SqlParam.DataType.Object)), null);
                                if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(list)) {
                                    result = list.get(0);
                                }
                                return result;
                            }
                        }
                );

        Runnable task = () -> {
            CacheStats stats = loadingCache.stats();
            log.info("缓存的命中次数: " + stats.hitCount());
            log.info("缓存的命中率: " + stats.hitRate());
            log.info("缓存的加载次数: " + stats.loadCount());
            log.info("缓存的加载平均时间: " + stats.averageLoadPenalty());
        };
        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(task, 1, 5, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
        return loadingCache;
    }

    protected void processExitWindow(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(Processor.CALC_NODE_NAME_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS, JSONObject.class);
        List<Object> domainFieldValue = new ArrayList<>();
        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String domainField : this.domainFields) {
            domainFieldValue.add(jsonObject.get(domainField));
            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(jsonObject.get(domainField), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
        }
        Sink sink = windowLastNConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();

        Object lock;
        synchronized (locks) {
            lock = locks.computeIfAbsent(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue), j -> new Object());
            waitingLocks.computeIfAbsent(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue), j -> new AtomicInteger()).incrementAndGet();
        }

        synchronized (lock) {
            try {
                Object countResultObj = DbService.queryOneValue(catalog, countSql, sqlParams, "count", null);
                long countResult = Long.parseLong(countResultObj.toString());
                if (countResult > windowLastNConfig.getLimit()) {
                    // 最晚的数据删除
                    long deleteCount = countResult - windowLastNConfig.getLimit();
                    List<SqlParam> deleteParams = new ArrayList<>(sqlParams);
                    deleteParams.add(new SqlParam(deleteCount, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    DbService.deleteDb(catalog, deleteCountSql, deleteParams, null);
                }
                List<Map<String, Object>> dbResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, cacheQuerySql, sqlParams, null);
                if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(dbResult)) {
                    minAndCountCache.put(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue), dbResult.get(0));
                }
                synchronized (locks) {
                    if (waitingLocks.get(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue)).decrementAndGet() == 0) {
                        locks.remove(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue));
                        waitingLocks.remove(this.getCacheKey(domainFieldValue));
                    }
                }
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
    }

    private String getCacheKey(List<Object> domainFields){
        return String.join("|", JSONObject.toJSONString(domainFields));
    }

}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Window;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import com.akulaku.core.util.AkuKmsUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.base.Strings;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.RateLimiter;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.expression.ExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.standard.SpelExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.support.StandardEvaluationContext;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class WindowProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    public static final String CALC_NODE_NAME = "kafka_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "after_filter_process_json_data";
    public static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";
    public final Window windowConfig;
    protected final String insertSql;

    private RateLimiter rateLimiter;

    /**
     * 表字段
     */
    protected final List<String> tableFields;
    /**
     * 更新字段
     */
    private final List<String> duplicateUpdateFields;

    /**
     * 解密字段
     */
    protected List<String> decryptFields = null;

    protected AkuKmsUtil akuKmsUtil = null;

    public static final Counter windowCleanProcessCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("window_clean_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc window clean process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    protected WindowProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        windowConfig = processorConfig.getWindow();
        Source source = windowConfig.getSource();
        String kafka2MySqlFields = source.getKafka2MySqlFields();
        String kafkaDataClass = source.getKafkaDataClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafka2MySqlFields)) {
            tableFields = Arrays.stream(kafka2MySqlFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String duplicateFields = source.getKafka2MySqlDuplicateUpdateFields();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafkaDataClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(source.getKafkaDataClass());
            tableFields = fieldMap.get("fields");
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() <= 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insertSql:{}", insertSql);
        String decryptFieldsStr = source.getDecryptFields();
        String kmsConnName = source.getKmsConnName();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(decryptFieldsStr)) {
            this.decryptFields = Arrays.stream(decryptFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.akuKmsUtil = new AkuKmsUtil(kmsConnName);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        check();
        startCleanThread();
        super.start();
    }

    public void check() {
        String kafkaFilterTimeField = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();

        Sink sink = windowConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String schema = sink.getSchema();
        String table = sink.getTable();
        //检查时间字段索引是否存在
        try {
            Map<String, List<String>> resultMap = DbService.getTableIndexInfo(catalog, schema, table);
            boolean checkIndex = false;

            for (List<String> value : resultMap.values()) {
                if (StrUtil.equals(kafkaFilterTimeField, value.get(0))) {
                    checkIndex = true;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (!checkIndex) {
                log.error("table:{},filed:{} does not have index", table, kafkaFilterTimeField);
                System.exit(1);
            }

        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    public void startCleanThread() {
        String filterTimeField = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();

        ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(new WindowCleanThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));

        Time frequency = windowConfig.getFrequency();
        long time = frequency.getTime();
        TimeUnit timeUnit = frequency.getTimeUnit();

        Sink sink = windowConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        Long windowSize = windowConfig.getSize().toMilliseconds();
        Integer cleanRate = windowConfig.getCleanRatePerSecond();
        Integer cleanPageSize = windowConfig.getCleanPageSize();
        rateLimiter = RateLimiter.create(cleanRate);
        String deleteSql = String.format("delete from %s where %s >= ? and %s < ? limit %d", table, filterTimeField, filterTimeField, cleanPageSize);
        scheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
            try {
                Long windowEndTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - windowSize;
                Long dataMinTime = this.getDataMinTime();
                if(dataMinTime != null){
                    while (dataMinTime < windowEndTime) {
                        long nextTime = windowEndTime > dataMinTime + 300000L ? dataMinTime + 300000L : windowEndTime;
                        while (true) {
                            if (rateLimiter != null) {
                                rateLimiter.acquire();
                            }
                            log.info("start execute delete sql:{}", deleteSql);
                            List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(dataMinTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(nextTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                            int result = DbService.deleteDb(catalog, deleteSql, sqlParams, null);
                            log.info("end execute delete sql:{},number of records deleted:{}", deleteSql, result);
                            this.prometheusHandle();
                            if (result <= 0 || result < cleanPageSize) {
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                        dataMinTime = nextTime;
                    }
                }
                this.prometheusHandle();
            } catch (Throwable e) {
                log.error("execute delete error", e);
                System.exit(1);
            }
        }, 1, time, timeUnit);
    }

    private void prometheusHandle() {
        windowCleanProcessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(Thread.currentThread().getName())).inc();
    }

    private Long getDataMinTime() throws SQLException {
        String filterTimeField = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();
        Sink sink = windowConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        String cleanQueryMinTimeWhereCondition = windowConfig.getCleanQueryMinTimeWhereCondition();
        String queryStartSql;
        if (StringUtils.isEmpty(cleanQueryMinTimeWhereCondition)) {
            queryStartSql = String.format("select min(%s) as %s from %s", filterTimeField, filterTimeField, table);
        } else {
            queryStartSql = String.format("select min(%s) as %s from %s where %s", filterTimeField, filterTimeField, table, cleanQueryMinTimeWhereCondition);
        }
        log.info("queryStartSql:{}", queryStartSql);
        List<Map<String, Object>> queryDb = DbService.queryDb(catalog, queryStartSql, null, null);
        if(!CollUtil.isEmpty(queryDb)){
            Map<String, Object> objectMap = queryDb.get(0);
            if(objectMap != null){
                return (Long) objectMap.getOrDefault(filterTimeField, null);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        // 计算参数列表
        List<String> parameters = tableFields.stream().map(field -> CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME + "." + field).collect(Collectors.toList());
        String kafkaDataField = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataField();
        String[] fields = kafkaDataField == null ? new String[0] : kafkaDataField.split("\\.");

        this.addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject targetObject = calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                        if (targetObject == null) {
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    return targetObject;
                }, CALC_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return beforeProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addFilterNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return this.isFilter(jsonObject);
                }, FILTER_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return afterProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addSql(windowConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), "insert", parameters, insertSql);
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        Sink sink = windowConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<String> insertTableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, table);
        List<String> duplicateUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getDuplicateUpdateFields());
        List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>(this.getTableFields());
        // 如果目标表存在window_create_time字段,则插入字段加上window_create_time
        if (insertTableFields.contains("window_create_time")) {
            tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        }
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        duplicateUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(table, tableColumns, duplicateUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(this.decryptFields)) {
            for (String field : this.decryptFields) {
                String value = jsonObject.getString(field);
                if (StrUtil.isNotBlank(value)) {
                    try {
                        String decrypt = this.akuKmsUtil.decrypt(value);
                        jsonObject.put(field, decrypt);
                    } catch (Throwable e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException("decrypt error", e);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子后调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject afterProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 默认过滤方法
     *
     * @param jsonObject
     * @return
     */
    public boolean isFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        if (jsonObject == null) {
            return true;
        }
        Long windowSize = windowConfig.getSize().toMilliseconds();
        String filterTimeField = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();
        String kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression = windowConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataFieldConditionExpression();
        String filterTimeFieldValue = jsonObject.getString(filterTimeField);
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(filterTimeFieldValue) || !CheckUtils.isNumber(filterTimeFieldValue)) {
            return true;
        }
        long currentTimeMillis = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Long recordTime = jsonObject.getLong(filterTimeField);
        if (recordTime == null || (currentTimeMillis - recordTime) > windowSize) {
            return true;
        }
        if (kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression != null) {
            ExpressionParser expressionParser = new SpelExpressionParser();
            StandardEvaluationContext evaluationContext = new StandardEvaluationContext();
            evaluationContext.setVariable("msg", jsonObject);
            Boolean expressionResult = expressionParser.parseExpression(kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression).getValue(evaluationContext, Boolean.class);
            log.info("kafka data field condition expression:{},execute result:{}", kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression, expressionResult);
            if (expressionResult == null) {
                return false;
            } else {
                return !expressionResult;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public Window getWindowConfig() {
        return windowConfig;
    }

    public List<String> getTableFields() {
        return tableFields;
    }

    public List<String> getDuplicateUpdateFields() {
        return duplicateUpdateFields;
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }
}

```
