### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowSliceProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.TimeWindow;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.WindowTable;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.WindowSliceProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;

import java.sql.Timestamp;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;

/**
 * 滑动窗口处理器
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class WindowSliceProcessor extends DataProcessor {
    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;
    protected ScheduledExecutorService executorService;
    protected WindowTable windowTable;
    protected WindowSliceProcessorConfig windowSliceProcessorConfig;
    private static final String GET_CURRENT_TIME_SQL = "select max(%s) as max_time,min(%s) as min_time,max(%s) max_update_time, max(etl_time) max_etl_time from %s.%s";
    private static final WindowSliceThreadFactory WINDOW_SLICE_THREAD_FACTORY = new WindowSliceThreadFactory();
    private static final Counter windowSliceProcessCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("window_slice_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc window slice process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    public WindowSliceProcessor(WindowSliceProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(null);
        windowSliceProcessorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.windowTable = processorConfig.getWindowTable();
        TaskConfig taskConfig = processorConfig.getTaskConfig();
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(taskConfig.getTaskName(), null, taskConfig.getMaintain(), taskConfig.getDescription());
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        executorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(WINDOW_SLICE_THREAD_FACTORY);
        Time slice = this.windowTable.getSlice();
        Time size = this.windowTable.getSize();
        Runnable cal = () -> {
            String className = this.getClass().getSimpleName();
            try {
                this.beforeProcess();
                TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(taskInfo.getTaskName(), windowTable.getTableName(),  size == null ? "all" : size.toString());
                TimeWindow currentTimeWindow = getCurrentTimeWindow();
                boolean result = this.process(preTimeWindow, currentTimeWindow);
                if (result) {
                    TimeWindow.saveTimeWindow(currentTimeWindow);
                    this.afterProcess();
                }
                windowSliceProcessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(className)).inc();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("{} window process error", className, e);
            }
        };
        executorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(cal, 0, slice.getTime(), slice.getTimeUnit());
    }

    @Override
    public void stop() {

    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        return false;
    }



    /**
     * 按事件时间获取当前时间窗口
     */
    protected TimeWindow getCurrentTimeWindow() throws Exception {
        Time size = windowTable.getSize();
        String sql = String.format(GET_CURRENT_TIME_SQL, windowTable.getDivideTimeField(), windowTable.getDivideTimeField(), windowTable.getUpdateTimeField(),
                windowTable.getSchema(), windowTable.getTableName());
        List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(windowTable.getCatalog(), sql, null, null);
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
            Map<String, Object> data = results.get(0);
            Timestamp endTime = (Timestamp) data.get("max_time");
            Timestamp startTime = size == null ? (Timestamp) data.get("min_time") : new Timestamp(endTime.getTime() - size.toMilliseconds());
            Timestamp maxUpdateTime = (Timestamp) data.get("max_update_time");
            Timestamp maxEtlTime = (Timestamp) data.get("max_etl_time");
            return new TimeWindow(taskInfo.getTaskName(), windowTable.getTableName(), size == null ? "all" : size.toString(), startTime, endTime, maxUpdateTime, maxEtlTime);
        } else {
            throw new Exception("current time window is empty!");
        }

    }

    /**
     * 窗口计算
     * 规则:1基于事件时间,2首次全量计算->滑窗->增量计算,3支持手工配置全量计算
     */
    public boolean process(TimeWindow preTimeWindow, TimeWindow currentTimeWindow) throws Exception {
        boolean result;
        StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
        Boolean isFullProcessFromConfig = windowSliceProcessorConfig.getIsFullProcess();
        boolean isFullProcess = preTimeWindow == null || isFullProcessFromConfig;
        String type = isFullProcess ? "full" : "increment";
        String className = this.getClass().getSimpleName();
        log.info("{} process start,type:{},preTimeWindow:{},currentTimeWindow:{}", className, type, preTimeWindow, currentTimeWindow);
        if (isFullProcess) {
            result = fullProcess(currentTimeWindow);
            if (result) {
                // 如果是手工执行全量计算,保存当前窗口的开始时间应该为上个窗口的开始时间,否则转为增量计算时,会导致出窗的数据没作统计
                if (isFullProcessFromConfig && preTimeWindow != null) {
                    currentTimeWindow.setStartTime(preTimeWindow.getStartTime());
                }
                windowSliceProcessorConfig.setIsFullProcess(false);
            }
        } else {
            result = incrementProcess(preTimeWindow, currentTimeWindow);
        }
        watch.stop();
        log.info("{} process end,type:{},cost time:{}ms,preTimeWindow:{},currentTimeWindow:{}", className, type, watch.getTime(), preTimeWindow, currentTimeWindow);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 处理前操作
     */
    protected void beforeProcess() throws Exception {

    }

    /**
     * 处理后操作
     */
    protected void afterProcess() throws Exception {

    }

    /**
     * 全窗口计算
     */
    protected abstract boolean fullProcess(TimeWindow currentTimeWindow) throws Exception;

    /**
     * 窗口增量计算
     */
    protected abstract boolean incrementProcess(TimeWindow preTimeWindow, TimeWindow currentTimeWindow) throws Exception;

}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowSliceProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.WindowSliceProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.WindowSliceTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 滑动窗口任务处理器生产者
 */

@Slf4j
public class WindowSliceProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        WindowSliceTaskConfig windowSliceTaskConfig = YamlParser.parse(WindowSliceTaskConfig.class, yamlFile);
        Map<String, WindowSliceProcessorConfig> processors = windowSliceTaskConfig.getProcessors();
        for (Map.Entry<String, WindowSliceProcessorConfig> entry : processors.entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            WindowSliceProcessorConfig processorConfig = entry.getValue();
            if (processorConfig.getIsRun()) {
                processorConfig.setTaskConfig(taskConfig);
                processorConfig.setProcessorName(processorName);
                String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
                Class<?> processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
                Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(WindowSliceProcessorConfig.class);
                constructor.setAccessible(true);
                DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(processorConfig);
                dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
            }
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/WindowSliceThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class WindowSliceThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        Thread thread = new Thread(r, "window-thread-" + index);
        return thread;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/YamlProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.SystemPropsUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ProcessorConfigUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.TopicBeanUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;

/**
 * 从yaml配置文件生成Processors
 */

@Slf4j
public class YamlProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskGroupId = taskConfig.getGroupId();
        taskGroupId = DbService.isPreProductEnv ? taskGroupId + "_pre_product_test" : taskGroupId;
        Integer batchSize = taskConfig.getBatchSize();

        for (Map.Entry<String, ProcessorConfig> entry : taskConfig.getProcessors().entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            ProcessorConfig processorConfig = entry.getValue();
            log.info("current deal processor is {}", processorName);

            if (processorConfig.getIsRun()) {
                Class<?> processorClazz;
                String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
                String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
                if (clazz == null) {
                    log.error("task:{},processor:{},not found class", taskName, processorName);
                    System.exit(1);
                }
                log.info("clazz: {}", clazz);
                processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
                if (Objects.isNull(processorConfig.getBatchSize())) {
                    processorConfig.setBatchSize(batchSize);
                }
                String pGroupId = processorConfig.getGroupId();
                if (pGroupId != null) {
                    pGroupId = DbService.isPreProductEnv ? pGroupId + "_pre_product_test" : pGroupId;
                    processorConfig.setGroupId(pGroupId);
                } else {
                    processorConfig.setGroupId(taskGroupId);
                }
                processorConfig.setTaskName(taskName);
                processorConfig.setProcessorName(entry.getKey());
                processorConfig.setTopicClazz(TopicBeanUtils.getTopicBeanByName(processorConfig.getTopic()));
                processorConfig.setMaintain(taskConfig.getMaintain());
                processorConfig.setDescription(taskConfig.getDescription());

                processorConfig.setStartFromConfig(Files.exists(Constant.KAFKA_OFFSET_FROM_YAML_PATH));
                processorConfig.setOfflineInit(Files.exists(Constant.OFFLINE_INIT_FILE_PATH));

                String bootstrap = processorConfig.getBootstrap();
                if (bootstrap != null) {
                    ProcessorConfigUtils.dealConfig(processorConfig);
                }

                // 海豚调度系统回拨参数配置
                String runtimeEnv = SystemPropsUtil.get("RuntimeEnv");
                boolean IsDsEnv = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(runtimeEnv, "ds");
                Boolean startFromConfig = processorConfig.getStartFromConfig();
                if (IsDsEnv && startFromConfig) {
                    String taskOpts = SystemPropsUtil.get("TASK_OPTS");
                    if (taskOpts != null) {
                        JSONObject taskOptsJson = JSON.parseObject(taskOpts);
                        log.info("task opts json:{}", taskOptsJson);
                        JSONObject processorJson = taskOptsJson.getJSONObject(processorConfig.getProcessorName());
                        String startMode = processorJson.getString("startMode");
                        String seekOffsetBy = processorJson.getString("seekOffsetBy");
                        processorConfig.setStartMode(startMode);
                        processorConfig.setSeekOffsetBy(seekOffsetBy);
                    }
                }

                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
                Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(ProcessorConfig.class);
                constructor.setAccessible(true);
                DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(processorConfig);
                dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
                log.info(processorName + " processor config successful");
            }
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/YamlProduceProcessors.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/batch/Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.batch;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.KafkaMsg;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.KafkaOffset;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcNode;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.FilterCalNode;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.k2m.K2M;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Window;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.WindowCleanThreadFactory;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import com.akulaku.core.util.AkuKmsUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.base.Strings;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Expression;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Function;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.JdbcParameter;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.operators.relational.ExpressionList;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Column;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Table;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.insert.Insert;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;
import org.springframework.expression.ExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.standard.SpelExpressionParser;
import org.springframework.expression.spel.support.StandardEvaluationContext;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    private static final String CALC_NODE_NAME = "kafka_json_data";
    private static final String CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "before_filter_process_json_data";
    private static final String CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME = "after_filter_process_json_data";
    private static final String FILTER_NODE_NAME = "filter";
    public final K2M k2mConfig;
    private final String insertSql;

    private Counter windowCleanProcessCounter;


    public List<String> getTableFields() {
        return tableFields;
    }

    /**
     * 表字段
     */
    private final List<String> tableFields;
    /**
     * 更新字段
     */
    private final List<String> duplicateUpdateFields;

    /**
     * 解密字段
     */
    protected List<String> decryptFields = null;

    protected AkuKmsUtil akuKmsUtil = null;

    private final Kafka2MysqlBatchService kafka2MysqlBatchService;


    protected Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.processorConfig.setStartOffsetFromMysql(true);
        k2mConfig = processorConfig.getK2m();
        Source source = k2mConfig.getSource();
        String kafka2MySqlFields = source.getKafka2MySqlFields();
        String kafkaDataClass = source.getKafkaDataClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafka2MySqlFields)) {
            tableFields = Arrays.stream(kafka2MySqlFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String duplicateFields = source.getKafka2MySqlDuplicateUpdateFields();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(kafkaDataClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(source.getKafkaDataClass());
            tableFields = fieldMap.get("fields");
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                duplicateUpdateFields = tableFields;
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                duplicateUpdateFields = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件source.kafka2MySqlFields字段为空!!!");
        }
        insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info(insertSql);
        kafka2MysqlBatchService = new Kafka2MysqlBatchService(this);
        String decryptFieldsStr = source.getDecryptFields();
        String kmsConnName = source.getKmsConnName();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(decryptFieldsStr)) {
            this.decryptFields = Arrays.stream(decryptFieldsStr.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.akuKmsUtil = new AkuKmsUtil(kmsConnName);
        }
    }


    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        String kafkaDataField = k2mConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataField();
        String[] fields = kafkaDataField == null ? new String[0] : kafkaDataField.split("\\.");
        this.addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject targetObject = calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                        if (targetObject == null) {
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    return targetObject;
                }, CALC_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return beforeProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addFilterNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return this.isFilter(jsonObject);
                }, FILTER_NODE_NAME)
                .addCalcNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = calcContextData.getData(CALC_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    return afterProcess(jsonObject, calcContextData);
                }, CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME)
                .addConsumerNode(calcContextData -> {
                    JSONObject msg = calcContextData.getData(CALC_AFTER_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
                    ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = (ConsumerRecord<String, String>) calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD);
                    KafkaOffset kafkaOffset = new KafkaOffset(record.topic(), record.partition(), record.offset());
                    KafkaMsg kafkaMsg = new KafkaMsg(kafkaOffset, msg);
                    kafka2MysqlBatchService.addQueueKafkaMsg(kafkaMsg);
                }, "keyByAndPutQueue");
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        for (CalcNode calcNode : calcNodes) {
            if (calcNode instanceof FilterCalNode) {
                if (((FilterCalNode) calcNode).isPass(data)) {
                    ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = (ConsumerRecord<String, String>) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD);
                    int partition = record.partition();
                    long offset = record.offset();
                    kafka2MysqlBatchService.addPartitionOffset(partition, offset);
                    return false;
                }
            } else {
                calcNode.process(data);
            }
        }
        return true;
    }


    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        catalog = DbService.changeCatalog(catalog);
        List<String> insertTableFields = SqlUtils.queryTableFields(catalog, table);

        ArrayList<String> tableFieldsWithSelf = new ArrayList<>(tableFields);
        if (!insertTableFields.contains("feat_create_time") || !insertTableFields.contains("feat_update_time")) {
            log.error("The target table needs to define feat_create_time and feat_update_time fields");
            System.exit(1);
        }

        tableFieldsWithSelf.add("feat_create_time");
        tableFieldsWithSelf.add("feat_update_time");

        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(table));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFieldsWithSelf.stream().map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = tableFieldsWithSelf.stream().map(field ->
                field.equals("feat_update_time") || field.equals("feat_create_time") ?
                        SqlUtils.getUnixTimestampExpression() : new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        // 配置DuplicateUpdateColumns
        ArrayList<String> duplicateUpdateFieldsWithSelf = new ArrayList<>(this.getDuplicateUpdateFields());
        duplicateUpdateFieldsWithSelf.add("feat_update_time");
        insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(duplicateUpdateFieldsWithSelf.stream().map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList()));

        // 配置DuplicateUpdateExpressionList
        List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = duplicateUpdateFieldsWithSelf.stream().map(field -> {
            Function f = new Function();
            f.setName("values");
            ExpressionList list = new ExpressionList();
            List<Expression> expressions = new ArrayList<>();
            expressions.add(new Column(field));
            list.setExpressions(expressions);
            f.setParameters(list);
            return f;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
        insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        return insert.toString();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isConvertMsgToBean() {
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(this.decryptFields)) {
            for (String field : this.decryptFields) {
                String value = jsonObject.getString(field);
                if (StrUtil.isNotBlank(value)) {
                    try {
                        String decrypt = this.akuKmsUtil.decrypt(value);
                        jsonObject.put(field, decrypt);
                    } catch (Throwable e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException("decrypt error", e);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子后调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject afterProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        return jsonObject;
    }

    /**
     * 默认过滤方法
     */
    public boolean isFilter(JSONObject jsonObject) {
        if (jsonObject == null) {
            return true;
        }
        Window windowConfig = processorConfig.getWindow();
        Long windowSize = windowConfig.getSize().toMilliseconds();
        String filterTimeField = k2mConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();
        String filterTimeFieldValue = jsonObject.getString(filterTimeField);
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(filterTimeFieldValue) || !CheckUtils.isNumber(filterTimeFieldValue)) {
            return true;
        }
        long currentTimeMillis = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Long recordTime = jsonObject.getLong(filterTimeField);
        if (recordTime == null || (currentTimeMillis - recordTime) > windowSize) {
            return true;
        }
        String kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression = k2mConfig.getSource().getKafkaDataFieldConditionExpression();
        if (kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression != null) {
            ExpressionParser expressionParser = new SpelExpressionParser();
            StandardEvaluationContext evaluationContext = new StandardEvaluationContext();
            evaluationContext.setVariable("msg", jsonObject);
            Boolean expressionResult = expressionParser.parseExpression(kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression).getValue(evaluationContext, Boolean.class);
            log.info("kafka data field condition expression:{},execute result:{}", kafkaDataFieldConditionExpression, expressionResult);
            if (expressionResult == null) {
                return false;
            } else {
                return !expressionResult;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public List<String> getDuplicateUpdateFields() {
        return duplicateUpdateFields;
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }


    private void check() {
        Window windowConfig = processorConfig.getWindow();
        if (windowConfig != null) {
            Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
            Source source = k2mConfig.getSource();
            String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
            String schema = sink.getSchema();
            String table = sink.getTable();
            String kafkaFilterTimeField = source.getKafkaFilterTimeField();
            //检查时间字段索引是否存在
            try {
                Map<String, List<String>> resultMap = DbService.getTableIndexInfo(catalog, schema, table);
                boolean checkIndex = false;
                for (List<String> value : resultMap.values()) {
                    if (StrUtil.equals(kafkaFilterTimeField, value.get(0))) {
                        checkIndex = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!checkIndex) {
                    log.error("table:{},filed:{} does not have index", table, kafkaFilterTimeField);
                    System.exit(1);
                }

            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }

        }
    }


    @Override
    public void start() {
        check();
        kafka2MysqlBatchService.start();
        Window windowConfig = processorConfig.getWindow();
        if (windowConfig != null) {
            startWindowClean();
        }
        super.start();
    }

    @Override
    public void stop() {
        kafka2MysqlBatchService.stop();
        super.stop();
    }


    public void startWindowClean() {
        windowCleanProcessCounter = Counter.build()
                .name("window_clean_process_total")
                .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
                .help("async calc window clean process total")
                .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());
        ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(new WindowCleanThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        String filterTimeField = k2mConfig.getSource().getKafkaFilterTimeField();
        Window windowConfig = processorConfig.getWindow();
        Time frequency = windowConfig.getFrequency();
        long time = frequency.getTime();
        TimeUnit timeUnit = frequency.getTimeUnit();

        Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        String table = sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable();
        Long windowSize = windowConfig.getSize().toMilliseconds();
        Integer cleanPageSize = windowConfig.getCleanPageSize();
        scheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
            Long windowStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - windowSize;
            String sql = String.format("delete from %s where %s < %d limit %d", table, filterTimeField, windowStartTime, cleanPageSize);
            while (true) {
                try {
                    log.info("start execute delete sql:{}", sql);
                    int result = DbService.deleteDb(catalog, sql, null, null);
                    log.info("end execute delete sql:{},number of records deleted:{}", sql, result);
                    windowCleanProcessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(Thread.currentThread().getName())).inc();
                    if (result <= 0) {
                        break;
                    }
                } catch (Throwable e) {
                    log.error("execute delete error", e);
                    System.exit(1);
                }
            }
        }, 1, time, timeUnit);
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/batch/Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/batch/Kafka2MysqlBatchService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.batch;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.BatchRow;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.KafkaMsg;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.KafkaOffset;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.k2m.K2M;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaOffsetMgr;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.collect.Sets;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.MoreExecutors;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections.CollectionUtils;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.*;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class Kafka2MysqlBatchService {
    private final ProcessorConfig config;
    private final K2M k2mConfig;
    private final Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor processor;
    private final Set<String> uniqueFields;
    private final Map<Integer, BlockingQueue<KafkaMsg>> queueMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final Map<Integer, ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long>> partitionOffsetMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private final ExecutorService workExecutor;
    private final Map<Integer, ScheduledExecutorService> scheduledCommitExecutorMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final ScheduledExecutorService offsetExecutor;


    public Kafka2MysqlBatchService(Kafka2MysqlBatchProcessor processor) {
        this.processor = processor;
        this.config = processor.getProcessorConfig();
        k2mConfig = config.getK2m();
        Integer workerSize = k2mConfig.getWorkerSize();
        uniqueFields = getUniqueFields();
        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(uniqueFields)) {
            log.error("unique fields is empty");
            System.exit(1);
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < workerSize; i++) {
            BlockingQueue<KafkaMsg> queue = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>(4000);
            queueMap.put(i, queue);
        }

        AtomicInteger atomicInteger = new AtomicInteger(0);
        this.workExecutor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(workerSize, r -> new Thread(r, "worker-thread-" + atomicInteger.getAndIncrement()));
        this.offsetExecutor = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(r -> new Thread(r, "offset-thread"));
    }

    public void start() {
        startOffsetExecutor();
        startWorkExecutor();
    }

    public void stop() {
        List<ExecutorService> executorServices = new ArrayList<>();
        executorServices.add(this.workExecutor);
        executorServices.addAll(scheduledCommitExecutorMap.values());
        executorServices.add(this.offsetExecutor);
        executorServices.forEach(executorService -> {
            if (executorService != null && !executorService.isShutdown()) {
                MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(executorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
            }
        });
    }

    private void startOffsetExecutor() {
        offsetExecutor.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
            if (!partitionOffsetMap.isEmpty()) {
                for (Map.Entry<Integer, ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long>> entry : partitionOffsetMap.entrySet()) {
                    Integer partition = entry.getKey();
                    ConcurrentSkipListSet<Long> offsets = entry.getValue();
                    Long offset = CommonUtils.findMaxConsecutive(offsets);
                    if (offset != null) {
                        log.info("save offset,topic:{},partition:{},offset:{}", config.getTopic(), partition, offset);
                        KafkaOffsetMgr.saveOffset(config.getBootstrap(), config.getTopic(), config.getGroupId(), partition, offset);
                        CommonUtils.removeConsecutive(offsets, offset);
                    }
                }
            }
        }, 1, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }

    private void startWorkExecutor() {
        Integer batchSize = k2mConfig.getSink().getBatchSize();
        Time batchPeriod = k2mConfig.getSink().getBatchPeriod();
        for (int i = 0; i < k2mConfig.getWorkerSize(); i++) {
            Object lock = new Object();
            List<BatchRow> batchRows = new ArrayList<>();
            int finalI = i;
            FutureTask<Object> command = new FutureTask<>(
                    () -> {
                        while (true) {
                            try {
                                BlockingQueue<KafkaMsg> queue = queueMap.get(finalI);
                                KafkaMsg kafkaMsg = queue.take();
                                JSONObject rowJson = kafkaMsg.getMsg();
                                KafkaOffset kafkaOffset = kafkaMsg.getKafkaOffset();
                                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = getSqlParam(rowJson);
                                BatchRow batchRow = new BatchRow(sqlParams, kafkaOffset);
                                synchronized (lock) {
                                    batchRows.add(batchRow);
                                    if (batchRows.size() >= batchSize) {
                                        commit(batchRows);
                                    }
                                }
                            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                                log.warn("interrupted exception");
                                System.exit(1);
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                                System.exit(1);
                            }
                        }
                    });
            workExecutor.execute(command);
            ScheduledExecutorService scheduledCommitExecutor = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(
                    r -> new Thread(r, "schedule-commit-thread-" + finalI));
            scheduledCommitExecutorMap.put(finalI, scheduledCommitExecutor);
            scheduledCommitExecutor.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
                try {
                    synchronized (lock) {
                        commit(batchRows);
                    }
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                    System.exit(1);
                }
            }, 1, batchPeriod.getTime(), batchPeriod.getTimeUnit());
        }
    }

    private void commit(List<BatchRow> batchRows) throws SQLException {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(batchRows)) {
            String catalog = k2mConfig.getSink().getCatalog();
            long begin = System.currentTimeMillis();
            List<List<SqlParam>> sqlParamList = batchRows.stream().map(BatchRow::getSqlParams).collect(Collectors.toList());
            DbService.execUpdateBatch(catalog, processor.getInsertSql(), sqlParamList, processor.getTaskInfo());
            for (BatchRow batchRow : batchRows) {
                KafkaOffset kafkaOffset = batchRow.getKafkaOffset();
                int partition = kafkaOffset.getPartition();
                long offset = kafkaOffset.getOffset();
                addPartitionOffset(partition, offset);
            }
            long end = System.currentTimeMillis();
            log.info("batch size:{},sink time:" + (end - begin) + "ms", batchRows.size());
            batchRows.clear();
        }
    }

    @NotNull
    private List<SqlParam> getSqlParam(JSONObject rowJson) {
        List<SqlParam> row = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String field : processor.getTableFields()) {
            Object value = rowJson.get(field);
            SqlParam sqlParam = new SqlParam(value, SqlParam.DataType.Object);
            row.add(sqlParam);
        }
        return row;
    }


    public void addPartitionOffset(int partition, long offset) {
        partitionOffsetMap.computeIfAbsent(partition, p -> new ConcurrentSkipListSet<>()).add(offset);
    }

    public void addQueueKafkaMsg(KafkaMsg kafkaMsg) {
        JSONObject msg = kafkaMsg.getMsg();
        Integer workerSize = k2mConfig.getWorkerSize();
        StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();
        for (String keyField : uniqueFields) {
            String value = msg.getString(keyField);
            builder.append("_").append(value);
        }
        String allKeyValue = builder.toString();
        int hashCode = allKeyValue.hashCode();
        long index = Math.abs((long) hashCode) % workerSize;
        BlockingQueue<KafkaMsg> queue = queueMap.get((int) index);
        try {
            if (queue == null) {
                log.error("queue is null,allKeyValue:{},hashCode:{},index:{},queueMap size:{}", allKeyValue, hashCode, index, queueMap.size());
                log.error("kafka msg:{}", kafkaMsg);
                System.exit(1);
            }
            queue.put(kafkaMsg);
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            log.warn("interrupted exception");
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    private Set<String> getUniqueFields() {
        Sink sink = k2mConfig.getSink();
        String schema = sink.getSchema();
        String table = sink.getTable();
        String catalog = sink.getCatalog();
        if (CommonUtils.IS_PRE_ENV) {
            catalog = "feature-pre-product-db";
        }

        String primarySql = "" +
                "SELECT " +
                " COLUMN_NAME " +
                "FROM " +
                " INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS " +
                "WHERE " +
                " TABLE_SCHEMA = ? " +
                " AND TABLE_NAME = ? " +
                " AND COLUMN_KEY = 'PRI'";
        String uniqueSql = "" +
                "SELECT " +
                " COLUMN_NAME " +
                "FROM " +
                " INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS " +
                "WHERE " +
                " TABLE_SCHEMA = ? " +
                " AND TABLE_NAME = ? " +
                " AND NON_UNIQUE = 0";

        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = Arrays.asList(new SqlParam(schema, SqlParam.DataType.Object), new SqlParam(table, SqlParam.DataType.Object));

        try {
            List<Map<String, Object>> primaryResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, primarySql, sqlParams, null);
            List<Map<String, Object>> uniqueResult = DbService.queryDb(catalog, uniqueSql, sqlParams, null);
            Set<String> primaryFields = primaryResult.stream().map(x -> x.get("COLUMN_NAME").toString()).collect(Collectors.toSet());
            Set<String> uniqueFields = uniqueResult.stream().map(x -> x.get("COLUMN_NAME").toString()).collect(Collectors.toSet());
            log.info("primary fields:{}", primaryFields);
            log.info("unique fields:{}", uniqueFields);
            Set<String> result;
            if (uniqueFields.size() > primaryFields.size()) {
                result = Sets.difference(uniqueFields, primaryFields);
            } else {
                result = primaryFields;
            }
            log.info("final unique fields:{}", result);
            return result;
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/batch/Kafka2MysqlBatchService.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/BinlogMetricMysqlEventParser.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.DbConfig;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.common.CanalException;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.CanalEventParser;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.driver.mysql.packets.GTIDSet;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.exception.CanalParseException;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.exception.PositionNotFoundException;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.ErosaConnection;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.SinkFunction;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.mysql.MysqlConnection;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.mysql.MysqlEventParser;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.mysql.MysqlMultiStageCoprocessor;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.CanalEntry;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.position.EntryPosition;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.position.LogPosition;
import com.taobao.tddl.dbsync.binlog.exception.TableIdNotFoundException;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang.exception.ExceptionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang.math.RandomUtils;
import org.slf4j.MDC;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.*;

import static com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.driver.mysql.utils.GtidUtil.parseGtidSet;

@Slf4j
public class BinlogMetricMysqlEventParser<EVENT> extends MysqlEventParser {
    private final BlockingQueue<EVENT> queue = new ArrayBlockingQueue<>(10240);
    private final Map<String, LogPosition> logPositionMap;
    private final DbConfig dbConfig;
    private final MetricCal metricCal;


    public BinlogMetricMysqlEventParser(DbConfig dbConfig, Map<String, LogPosition> logPositionMap) {
        this.dbConfig = dbConfig;
        this.logPositionMap = logPositionMap;
        this.metricCal = new MetricCal(dbConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void start() throws CanalParseException {
        if (runningInfo == null) { // 第一次链接主库
            runningInfo = masterInfo;
        }
        if (enableTsdb) {
            if (tableMetaTSDB == null) {
                synchronized (CanalEventParser.class) {
                    buildTableMetaTSDB(tsdbSpringXml);
                }
            }
        }
        if (running) {
            throw new CanalException(this.getClass().getName() + " has startup , don't repeat start");
        }

        ExecutorService executorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(dbConfig.getParallelism(), new BinlogParserThreadFactory(dbConfig.getHost()));
        for (int i = 0; i < dbConfig.getParallelism(); i++) {
            executorService.submit((Runnable) () -> {
                while (true) {
                    try {
                        EVENT event = queue.take();
                        try {
                            CanalEntry.Entry entry = parseAndProfilingIfNecessary(event, false);
                            if (entry == null) {
                                continue;
                            }
                            this.metricCal.metric(entry);
                            if (entry.getEntryType() == CanalEntry.EntryType.TRANSACTIONEND) {
                                LogPosition logPosition = buildLastPosition(entry);
                                String journalName = logPosition.getPostion().getJournalName();
                                if (!StrUtil.isEmpty(journalName)) {
                                    logPositionMap.put(dbConfig.getHost(), logPosition);
                                }
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                            throw new RuntimeException(e);
                        }
                    } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException(e);
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        running = true;
        MDC.put("destination", destination);
        // 配置transaction buffer
        // 初始化缓冲队列
        transactionBuffer.setBufferSize(transactionSize);// 设置buffer大小
        transactionBuffer.start();
        // 构造bin log parser
        binlogParser = buildParser();// 初始化一下BinLogParser
        binlogParser.start();
        // 启动工作线程
        parseThread = new Thread(new Runnable() {

            public void run() {
                MDC.put("destination", String.valueOf(destination));
                ErosaConnection erosaConnection = null;
                boolean isMariaDB = false;
                while (running) {
                    try {
                        // 开始执行replication
                        // 1. 构造Erosa连接
                        erosaConnection = buildErosaConnection();

                        // 2. 启动一个心跳线程
                        startHeartBeat(erosaConnection);

                        // 3. 执行dump前的准备工作
                        preDump(erosaConnection);

                        erosaConnection.connect();// 链接

                        long queryServerId = erosaConnection.queryServerId();
                        if (queryServerId != 0) {
                            serverId = queryServerId;
                        }

                        if (erosaConnection instanceof MysqlConnection) {
                            isMariaDB = ((MysqlConnection) erosaConnection).isMariaDB();
                        }
                        // 4. 获取最后的位置信息
                        long start = System.currentTimeMillis();
                        logger.warn("---> begin to find start position, it will be long time for reset or first position");
                        EntryPosition position = findStartPosition(erosaConnection);
                        final EntryPosition startPosition = position;
                        if (startPosition == null) {
                            throw new PositionNotFoundException("can't find start position for " + destination);
                        }

                        if (!processTableMeta(startPosition)) {
                            throw new CanalParseException("can't find init table meta for " + destination
                                    + " with position : " + startPosition);
                        }
                        long end = System.currentTimeMillis();
                        logger.warn("---> find start position successfully, {}", startPosition.toString() + " cost : "
                                + (end - start)
                                + "ms , the next step is binlog dump");
                        // 重新链接，因为在找position过程中可能有状态，需要断开后重建
                        erosaConnection.reconnect();

                        final SinkFunction sinkHandler = new SinkFunction<EVENT>() {

                            private LogPosition lastPosition;

                            public boolean sink(EVENT event) {
                                try {
                                    queue.put(event);
                                    if (!running) {
                                        return false;
                                    }
                                    return running;
                                } catch (TableIdNotFoundException e) {
                                    throw e;
                                } catch (Throwable e) {
                                    if (e.getCause() instanceof TableIdNotFoundException) {
                                        throw (TableIdNotFoundException) e.getCause();
                                    }
                                    // 记录一下，出错的位点信息
                                    processSinkError(e,
                                            this.lastPosition,
                                            startPosition.getJournalName(),
                                            startPosition.getPosition());
                                    throw new CanalParseException(e); // 继续抛出异常，让上层统一感知
                                }
                            }

                        };

                        // 4. 开始dump数据
                        if (parallel) {
                            // build stage processor
                            multiStageCoprocessor = buildMultiStageCoprocessor();
                            if (isGTIDMode() && StringUtils.isNotEmpty(startPosition.getGtid())) {
                                // 判断所属instance是否启用GTID模式，是的话调用ErosaConnection中GTID对应方法dump数据
                                GTIDSet gtidSet = parseGtidSet(startPosition.getGtid(), isMariaDB);
                                ((MysqlMultiStageCoprocessor) multiStageCoprocessor).setGtidSet(gtidSet);
                                multiStageCoprocessor.start();
                                erosaConnection.dump(gtidSet, multiStageCoprocessor);
                            } else {
                                multiStageCoprocessor.start();
                                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(startPosition.getJournalName())
                                        && startPosition.getTimestamp() != null) {
                                    erosaConnection.dump(startPosition.getTimestamp(), multiStageCoprocessor);
                                } else {
                                    erosaConnection.dump(startPosition.getJournalName(),
                                            startPosition.getPosition(),
                                            multiStageCoprocessor);
                                }
                            }
                        } else {
                            if (isGTIDMode() && StringUtils.isNotEmpty(startPosition.getGtid())) {
                                // 判断所属instance是否启用GTID模式，是的话调用ErosaConnection中GTID对应方法dump数据
                                erosaConnection.dump(parseGtidSet(startPosition.getGtid(), isMariaDB), sinkHandler);
                            } else {
                                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(startPosition.getJournalName())
                                        && startPosition.getTimestamp() != null) {
                                    erosaConnection.dump(startPosition.getTimestamp(), sinkHandler);
                                } else {
                                    erosaConnection.dump(startPosition.getJournalName(),
                                            startPosition.getPosition(),
                                            sinkHandler);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (TableIdNotFoundException e) {
                        exception = e;
                        // 特殊处理TableIdNotFound异常,出现这样的异常，一种可能就是起始的position是一个事务当中，导致tablemap
                        // Event时间没解析过
                        needTransactionPosition.compareAndSet(false, true);
                        logger.error(String.format("dump address %s has an error, retrying. caused by ",
                                runningInfo.getAddress().toString()), e);
                    } catch (Throwable e) {
                        processDumpError(e);
                        exception = e;
                        if (!running) {
                            if (!(e instanceof java.nio.channels.ClosedByInterruptException || e.getCause() instanceof java.nio.channels.ClosedByInterruptException)) {
                                throw new CanalParseException(String.format("dump address %s has an error, retrying. ",
                                        runningInfo.getAddress().toString()), e);
                            }
                        } else {
                            logger.error(String.format("dump address %s has an error, retrying. caused by ",
                                    runningInfo.getAddress().toString()), e);
                            sendAlarm(destination, ExceptionUtils.getFullStackTrace(e));
                        }
                        if (parserExceptionHandler != null) {
                            parserExceptionHandler.handle(e);
                        }
                    } finally {
                        // 重新置为中断状态
                        Thread.interrupted();
                        // 关闭一下链接
                        afterDump(erosaConnection);
                        try {
                            if (erosaConnection != null) {
                                erosaConnection.disconnect();
                            }
                        } catch (IOException e1) {
                            if (!running) {
                                throw new CanalParseException(String.format("disconnect address %s has an error, retrying. ",
                                        runningInfo.getAddress().toString()),
                                        e1);
                            } else {
                                logger.error("disconnect address {} has an error, retrying., caused by ",
                                        runningInfo.getAddress().toString(),
                                        e1);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    // 出异常了，退出sink消费，释放一下状态
                    eventSink.interrupt();
                    transactionBuffer.reset();// 重置一下缓冲队列，重新记录数据
                    binlogParser.reset();// 重新置位
                    if (multiStageCoprocessor != null && multiStageCoprocessor.isStart()) {
                        // 处理 RejectedExecutionException
                        try {
                            multiStageCoprocessor.stop();
                        } catch (Throwable t) {
                            logger.debug("multi processor rejected:", t);
                        }
                    }

                    if (running) {
                        // sleep一段时间再进行重试
                        try {
                            Thread.sleep(10000 + RandomUtils.nextInt(10000));
                        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                        }
                    }
                }
                MDC.remove("destination");
            }
        });

        parseThread.setUncaughtExceptionHandler(handler);
        parseThread.setName(String.format("destination = %s , address = %s , EventParser",
                destination,
                runningInfo == null ? null : runningInfo.getAddress()));
        parseThread.start();
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/BinlogMetricMysqlEventParser.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/BinlogParserTaskProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.BinlogParserProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.DbConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.ProcessModeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.filter.aviater.AviaterRegexFilter;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.exception.CanalParseException;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.inbound.mysql.MysqlEventParser;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.index.AbstractLogPositionManager;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.parse.support.AuthenticationInfo;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.CanalEntry;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.position.EntryPosition;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.position.LogPosition;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.sink.AbstractCanalEventSink;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.sink.exception.CanalSinkException;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.MoreExecutors;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils;

import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

@Slf4j
public class BinlogParserTaskProcessor extends DataProcessor {
    protected final BinlogParserProcessorConfig processorConfig;
    private final Map<String, LogPosition> logPositionMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    private final ScheduledExecutorService positionCommitExecutorService;
    private static final String POSITION_INSERT_SQL = "" +
            "insert into taskinfodb.t_db_binlog_position(db_host,binlog_file,binlog_position,binlog_timestamp,create_time,update_time) " +
            "values (?,?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000) " +
            "on duplicate key update " +
            "db_host=values(db_host)," +
            "binlog_file=values(binlog_file), " +
            "binlog_position=values(binlog_position), " +
            "binlog_timestamp=values(binlog_timestamp), " +
            "update_time=values(update_time)";
    private static final String POSITION_QUERY_SQL = "select binlog_file,binlog_position from taskinfodb.t_db_binlog_position where db_host=?";

    protected BinlogParserTaskProcessor(BinlogParserProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(new ProcessorConfig());
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.positionCommitExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(r -> new Thread(r, "log-position-thread"));
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        List<DbConfig> dbConfigs = processorConfig.getDbConfigs();
        startPositionCommitExecutor();
        for (DbConfig dbConfig : dbConfigs) {
            Boolean isRun = dbConfig.getIsRun();
            String startMode = dbConfig.getStartMode();
            String host = dbConfig.getHost();
            if (isRun) {
                dbConfig.setStartFromConfig(Files.exists(Constant.KAFKA_OFFSET_FROM_YAML_PATH));
                Boolean startFromConfig = dbConfig.getStartFromConfig();
                MysqlEventParser parser = null;
                ProcessModeEnum processMode = dbConfig.getProcessMode();
                switch (processMode) {
                    case serial:
                    case parallel:
                        parser = new MysqlEventParser();
                        parser.setParallel(processMode != ProcessModeEnum.serial);
                        CanalEventMetricSink canalEventMetricSink = new CanalEventMetricSink(dbConfig);
                        parser.setEventSink(canalEventMetricSink);
                        parser.setLogPositionManager(new AbstractLogPositionManager() {
                            @Override
                            public LogPosition getLatestIndexBy(String destination) {
                                return null;
                            }

                            @Override
                            public void persistLogPosition(String destination, LogPosition logPosition) throws CanalParseException {
                                logPositionMap.put(host, logPosition);
                            }
                        });
                        break;

                    case queue:
                        parser = new BinlogMetricMysqlEventParser(dbConfig, logPositionMap);
                        parser.setParallel(false);
                        parser.setEventSink(new AbstractCanalEventSink<List<CanalEntry.Entry>>() {
                            @Override
                            public boolean sink(List<CanalEntry.Entry> event, InetSocketAddress remoteAddress, String destination) throws CanalSinkException, InterruptedException {
                                return true;
                            }
                        });

                        parser.setLogPositionManager(new AbstractLogPositionManager() {
                            @Override
                            public LogPosition getLatestIndexBy(String destination) {
                                return null;
                            }

                            @Override
                            public void persistLogPosition(String destination, LogPosition logPosition) throws CanalParseException {

                            }
                        });
                        break;
                }
                parser.setDestination(host);
                if (startFromConfig) {
                    if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("latest", startMode)) {

                    } else {
                        if (!StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase("none", startMode)) {
                            String startPositionStr = dbConfig.getStartPosition();
                            FileWithPosition startFileWithPosition = StringUtils.isNotBlank(startPositionStr) ? extract(startPositionStr) : new FileWithPosition();
                            String fileName = startFileWithPosition.getFileName();
                            Long position = startFileWithPosition.getPosition();
                            log.info("start from local config,binlog_file:{},binlog_position:{}", fileName, position);
                            parser.setMasterPosition(new EntryPosition(fileName, position));
                        }
                    }
                }  /*  List<SqlParam> lstSqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                    lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(host, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    try {
                        List<Map<String, Object>> result = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, POSITION_QUERY_SQL, lstSqlParams, null);
                        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(result)) {
                            Map<String, Object> map = result.get(0);
                            Object binlogFile = map.get("binlog_file");
                            Object binlogPosition = map.get("binlog_position");
                            log.info("start from db config,binlog_file:{},binlog_position:{}", binlogFile, binlogPosition);
                            parser.setMasterPosition(new EntryPosition(binlogFile.toString(), Long.parseLong(binlogPosition.toString())));
                        }
                    } catch (SQLException e) {
                        throw new RuntimeException(e);
                    }*/


                String password = dbConfig.getPassword();
                String decodePassword = CryptoUtil.decode(password);
                parser.setMasterInfo(new AuthenticationInfo(new InetSocketAddress(host, dbConfig.getPort()), dbConfig.getUsername(), decodePassword));
                // 这里直接指定startPosition性能更好
                if (!StrUtil.isEmpty(dbConfig.getFilter())) {
                    parser.setEventFilter(new AviaterRegexFilter(dbConfig.getFilter()));
                }
                if (!StrUtil.isEmpty(dbConfig.getBlackFilter())) {
                    parser.setEventBlackFilter(new AviaterRegexFilter(dbConfig.getBlackFilter()));
                }
                log.info("start {} binlog parser", host);
                parser.start();
            }
        }

    }

    private void startPositionCommitExecutor() {
        this.positionCommitExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
            if (!logPositionMap.isEmpty()) {
                for (Map.Entry<String, LogPosition> entry : logPositionMap.entrySet()) {
                    LogPosition logPosition = entry.getValue();
                    EntryPosition entryPosition = logPosition.getPostion();
                    List<SqlParam> lstSqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                    lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(entry.getKey(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(entryPosition.getJournalName(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(entryPosition.getPosition(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    lstSqlParams.add(new SqlParam(entryPosition.getTimestamp(), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                    try {
                        DbService.insertDb(Constants.METADATADB, POSITION_INSERT_SQL, lstSqlParams, null);
                    } catch (SQLException ex) {
                        log.error("save position error, error info: {}", ex.toString());
                        System.exit(1);
                    }
                }
            }
        }, 1, 10, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }


    @Override
    public void stop() {
        log.info("shut down ");
        if (positionCommitExecutorService != null && !positionCommitExecutorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(positionCommitExecutorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        return false;
    }

    private FileWithPosition extract(String fileWithPosition) {
        String[] split = fileWithPosition.split("\\|");
        if (split.length != 2) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("must fileName|position");
        } else {
            return new FileWithPosition(split[0], Long.parseLong(split[1]));
        }
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/BinlogParserTaskProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.BinLogParserTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.BinlogParserProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * binlog任务解释处理器生产者
 */

@Slf4j
public class BinlogParserTaskProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        BinLogParserTaskConfig quartzTaskConfig = YamlParser.parse(BinLogParserTaskConfig.class, yamlFile);
        Map<String, BinlogParserProcessorConfig> processors = quartzTaskConfig.getProcessors();
        for (Map.Entry<String, BinlogParserProcessorConfig> entry : processors.entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            BinlogParserProcessorConfig processorConfig = entry.getValue();
            String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
            Class<?> processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
            CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
            Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(BinlogParserProcessorConfig.class);
            constructor.setAccessible(true);
            DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(processorConfig);
            dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/BinlogParserThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;


public class BinlogParserThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    private final String dbHost;

    public BinlogParserThreadFactory(String dbHost) {
        this.dbHost = dbHost;
    }

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, String.format("binlog-parser-%s-%d", dbHost, index.get()));
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/CanalEventMetricSink.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.DbConfig;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.CanalEntry;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.sink.AbstractCanalEventSink;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.sink.exception.CanalSinkException;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.List;


@Slf4j
public class CanalEventMetricSink extends AbstractCanalEventSink<List<CanalEntry.Entry>> {

    private final MetricCal metricCal;

    public CanalEventMetricSink(DbConfig dbConfig) {
        super();
        this.metricCal = new MetricCal(dbConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public boolean sink(List<CanalEntry.Entry> entrys, InetSocketAddress remoteAddress, String destination) throws CanalSinkException, InterruptedException {
        for (CanalEntry.Entry entry : entrys) {
            this.metricCal.metric(entry);
        }
        return true;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/CanalEventMetricSink.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/DelayMetricCollector.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import io.prometheus.client.Collector;
import io.prometheus.client.SummaryMetricFamily;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

public class DelayMetricCollector extends Collector {

    private final Map<MetricInfo, Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats>> delayMetricMap;

    public DelayMetricCollector(Map<MetricInfo, Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats>> delayMetricMap) {
        this.delayMetricMap = delayMetricMap;
    }

    @Override
    public List<MetricFamilySamples> collect() {
        List<MetricFamilySamples> mfs = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Map.Entry<MetricInfo, Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats>> entry : delayMetricMap.entrySet()) {
            MetricInfo metricInfo = entry.getKey();
            SummaryMetricFamily summaryMetricFamily = new SummaryMetricFamily(metricInfo.getName(),
                    metricInfo.getHelp(),
                    metricInfo.getLabelNames());
            Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats> dataMap = entry.getValue();
            for (Map.Entry<MessageMetadata, MessageStats> statsEntry : dataMap.entrySet()) {
                MessageMetadata messageMetadata = statsEntry.getKey();
                MessageStats messageStats = statsEntry.getValue();
                summaryMetricFamily.addMetric(
                        Arrays.asList(messageMetadata.getHost(), messageMetadata.getDatabaseName(), messageMetadata.getTableName(), messageMetadata.getEventType()),
                        messageStats.getCount(),
                        messageStats.getSum()
                );
            }
            mfs.add(summaryMetricFamily);
        }
        return mfs;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/DelayMetricCollector.java**

```java
        this.position = position;
```
