### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/binlog/MetricCal.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.binlog;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.NumberUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.config.binlog.DbConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import com.alibaba.otter.canal.protocol.CanalEntry;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

public class MetricCal {

    private final DbConfig dbConfig;
    private final static Counter tableDmlCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("table_dml_counter")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("host", "database_name", "table_name", "event_type"))
            .help("table dml counter")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    private static final List<String> labelNames = Arrays.asList("host", "database_name", "table_name", "event_type");
    private static final MetricInfo metricDelayBusinessToDw = new MetricInfo("delay_business_to_dw", "delay business to dw", labelNames);
    private static final MetricInfo metricDelayDwToFeature = new MetricInfo("delay_dw_to_feature", "delay dw to feature", labelNames);
    private static final MetricInfo metricDelayBusinessToFeature = new MetricInfo("delay_business_to_feature", "delay business to feature", labelNames);
    private static final MetricInfo metricDelayFeatureToWindow = new MetricInfo("delay_feature_to_window", "delay feature to window", labelNames);
    private static final MetricInfo metricDelayBusinessToWindow = new MetricInfo("delay_business_to_window", "delay business to window", labelNames);
    private static final List<String> delayTimeFields = Arrays.asList("update_time", "etl_time", "feat_update_time", "window_update_time");
    public static Map<MetricInfo, Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats>> delayMetricMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private final static DelayMetricCollector DELAY_METRIC_COLLECTOR = new DelayMetricCollector(delayMetricMap);

    static {
        delayMetricMap.put(metricDelayBusinessToDw, new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
        delayMetricMap.put(metricDelayDwToFeature, new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
        delayMetricMap.put(metricDelayBusinessToFeature, new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
        delayMetricMap.put(metricDelayFeatureToWindow, new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
        delayMetricMap.put(metricDelayBusinessToWindow, new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
        MetricsCollector.getRegistry().register(DELAY_METRIC_COLLECTOR);
    }

    public MetricCal(DbConfig dbConfig) {
        this.dbConfig = dbConfig;
    }

    public void metric(CanalEntry.Entry entry) {
        if (entry.getEntryType() == CanalEntry.EntryType.ROWDATA) {
            CanalEntry.RowChange rowChange;
            try {
                rowChange = CanalEntry.RowChange.parseFrom(entry.getStoreValue());
                if (rowChange.getIsDdl()) {
                    return;
                }
                CanalEntry.EventType eventType = rowChange.getEventType();
                List<CanalEntry.RowData> rowDatasList = rowChange.getRowDatasList();
                CanalEntry.Header header = entry.getHeader();
                String schemaName = header.getSchemaName();
                String tableName = header.getTableName();
                String host = dbConfig.getHost();
                tableDmlCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(host, schemaName, tableName, eventType.name())).inc(rowDatasList.size());

                if (eventType == CanalEntry.EventType.INSERT || eventType == CanalEntry.EventType.UPDATE) {
                    for (CanalEntry.RowData rowData : rowDatasList) {
                        List<CanalEntry.Column> afterColumnsList = rowData.getAfterColumnsList();
                        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(afterColumnsList)) {
                            Map<String, Long> timeMap = afterColumnsList.
                                    stream().filter(column ->
                                            delayTimeFields.contains(column.getName()) &&
                                                    NumberUtil.isNumber(column.getValue()) &&
                                                    (eventType == CanalEntry.EventType.INSERT
                                                            || (eventType == CanalEntry.EventType.UPDATE && column.getUpdated())
                                                    )
                                    )
                                    .collect(Collectors.toMap(CanalEntry.Column::getName, column -> NumberUtil.parseLong(column.getValue())));

                            if (timeMap.size() <= 1) {
                                continue;
                            }
                            MessageMetadata metadata = new MessageMetadata(host, schemaName, tableName, eventType.name());
                            for (Map.Entry<MetricInfo, Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats>> metricDataInfoMapEntry : delayMetricMap.entrySet()) {
                                MetricInfo metricInfo = metricDataInfoMapEntry.getKey();
                                Map<MessageMetadata, MessageStats> statsMap = metricDataInfoMapEntry.getValue();
                                Long delayTime = null;

                                boolean hasUpdateTime = timeMap.containsKey("update_time");
                                boolean hasEtlTime = timeMap.containsKey("etl_time");
                                boolean hasFeatUpdateTime = timeMap.containsKey("feat_update_time");
                                boolean hasWindowUpdateTime = timeMap.containsKey("window_update_time");

                                Long updateTime = timeMap.get("update_time");
                                Long etlTime = timeMap.get("etl_time");
                                Long featUpdateTime = timeMap.get("feat_update_time");
                                Long windowUpdateTime = timeMap.get("window_update_time");

                                if (metricInfo == metricDelayBusinessToDw && hasUpdateTime && hasEtlTime && updateTime != null && etlTime != null) {
                                    delayTime = etlTime - updateTime;
                                } else if (metricInfo == metricDelayDwToFeature && hasEtlTime && hasFeatUpdateTime && etlTime != null && featUpdateTime != null) {
                                    delayTime = featUpdateTime - etlTime;
                                } else if (metricInfo == metricDelayBusinessToFeature && hasUpdateTime && hasFeatUpdateTime && updateTime != null && featUpdateTime != null) {
                                    delayTime = featUpdateTime - updateTime;
                                } else if (metricInfo == metricDelayFeatureToWindow && hasFeatUpdateTime && hasWindowUpdateTime && featUpdateTime != null && windowUpdateTime != null) {
                                    delayTime = windowUpdateTime - featUpdateTime;
                                } else if (metricInfo == metricDelayBusinessToWindow && hasUpdateTime && hasWindowUpdateTime && updateTime != null && windowUpdateTime != null) {
                                    delayTime = windowUpdateTime - updateTime;
                                }

                                if (delayTime != null) {
                                    MessageStats messageStats = statsMap.getOrDefault(metadata, new MessageStats(0, 0));
                                    messageStats.setCount(messageStats.getCount() + 1);
                                    messageStats.setSum(messageStats.getSum() + delayTime);
                                    statsMap.put(metadata, messageStats);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException("ERROR ## parser of eromanga-event has an error , data:" + entry, e);
            }
        }
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/ck/CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.ck;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ck.CkPartitionOptimizeConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ck.CkTable;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateZoneUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.sql.Timestamp;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference;

/**
 * 分区合并处理器
 */

@Slf4j
public class CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor extends DataProcessor {
    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;
    protected ScheduledExecutorService executorService;
    protected CkPartitionOptimizeConfig config;
    boolean isWindowOS;
    private final List<String> nodeCatalogs;
    private static final CkPartitionOptimizeThreadFactory FACTORY = new CkPartitionOptimizeThreadFactory();
    private static final Counter taskProcessCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("task_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys())
            .help("task process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());
    private static Double taskProcessCounterLastValue = null;
    private static final String OPTIMIZE_PARTITION_SQL = "optimize table %s.%s %s PARTITION ID '%s' final";
    private static final String OPTIMIZE_PARTITION_CONNECT_NODE_SQL = "" +
            "optimize table %s.%s PARTITION ID '%s' final settings enforce_on_cluster_default_for_ddl=0,optimize_throw_if_noop=1,optimize_skip_merged_partitions=1";
    private static final String GET_LAST2_PARTITION_SQL = "" +
            "SELECT " +
            "  distinct partition_id, " +
            "  toInt64(if(match(partition_id,'-')=1,if(LENGTH(partition_id)=8,replaceAll(partition_id,'-','0'),replaceAll(partition_id,'-','')),partition_id)) as p " +
            "FROM system.parts " +
            "WHERE database = ? and table = ? " +
            "order by p DESC limit 2";
    private static final String INSERT_SQL = "" +
            "insert into taskinfodb.r_ck_partition_optimize_info(table_name,max_create_time,max_update_time,max_etl_time,create_time,update_time) " +
            "values (?,?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)  " +
            "on duplicate key update " +
            "max_create_time=values(max_create_time)," +
            "max_update_time=values(max_update_time)," +
            "max_etl_time=values(max_etl_time)," +
            "update_time=values(update_time)";
    private static final String GET_PRE_MAX_TIME_SQL = "" +
            "select " +
            " max_create_time," +
            " max_update_time, " +
            " max_etl_time " +
            "from taskinfodb.r_ck_partition_optimize_info " +
            "where table_name = ?";
    private static final String GET_CURRENT_MAX_TIME_SQL = "" +
            "select " +
            " max(data_create_time) as max_data_create_time," +
            " max(data_update_time) as max_data_update_time, " +
            " max(etl_time) as max_etl_time " +
            "from %s.%s";
    private static final String GET_TIMEZONE_SQL = "SELECT timeZone() as timezone";


    private static final String QUERY_ACTIVE_PARTS_SQL = "" +
            "select " +
            "partition, " +
            "count() as cnt, " +
            "sum(rows), " +
            "formatReadableSize(sum(bytes_on_disk)) " +
            "from system.parts " +
            "where database=? " +
            "and table=? " +
            "and partition=? " +
            "and active=1 " +
            "group by partition having cnt > 1";

    public CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor(CkPartitionOptimizeConfig config) {
        super(null);
        this.config = config;
        TaskConfig taskConfig = this.config.getTaskConfig();
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(taskConfig.getTaskName(), null, taskConfig.getMaintain(), taskConfig.getDescription());
        String os = System.getProperties().getProperty("os.name");
        isWindowOS = os.toLowerCase().contains("window");
        nodeCatalogs = this.config.getNodeCatalogs();
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        executorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(FACTORY);
        System.setProperty("java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.common.parallelism", "4");
        Time interval = this.config.getInterval();
        CkTable ckTable = this.config.getCkTable();
        String ckCatalog = ckTable.getCatalog();
        String ckSchema = ckTable.getSchema();
        String ckLocalTable = ckTable.getLocalTable();
        String ckDistributedTable = ckTable.getDistributedTable();
        String ckServerTimeZone;

        try {
            Object value = DbService.queryOneValue(ckCatalog, GET_TIMEZONE_SQL, null, "timezone", null);
            ckServerTimeZone = value.toString();
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            log.error("query clickhouse server time zone error", e);
            return;
        }
        Runnable cal = () -> {
            try {
                StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
                // 获取最大创建时间和最大更新时间
                String maxTimeSql = String.format(GET_CURRENT_MAX_TIME_SQL, ckSchema, ckDistributedTable);
                List<Map<String, Object>> currentMaxTimes = DbService.queryDb(ckCatalog, maxTimeSql, null, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(currentMaxTimes)) {
                    Timestamp currentMaxDataCreateTime = (Timestamp) (currentMaxTimes.get(0).get("max_data_create_time"));
                    Timestamp currentMaxDataUpdateTime = (Timestamp) (currentMaxTimes.get(0).get("max_data_update_time"));
                    Timestamp currentMaxEtlTime = (Timestamp) (currentMaxTimes.get(0).get("max_etl_time"));
                    // 获取已保存的最大时间
                    List<SqlParam> params = new ArrayList<>();
                    params.add(new SqlParam(ckDistributedTable, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                    List<Map<String, Object>> preMaxTimes = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, GET_PRE_MAX_TIME_SQL, params, null);
                    Boolean optimizeResult;
                    if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(preMaxTimes)) {
                        // 首次,合并最近两个分区
                        params = new ArrayList<>();
                        params.add(new SqlParam(ckTable.getSchema(), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(isWindowOS ? ckDistributedTable : ckLocalTable, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        List<Map<String, Object>> partitions = DbService.queryDb(ckCatalog, GET_LAST2_PARTITION_SQL, params, null);
                        optimizeResult = this.optimizePartitions(partitions);
                    } else {
                        // 根据数据创建时间和更新时间查询分区合并
                        Map<String, Object> preMaxTime = preMaxTimes.get(0);
                        Timestamp preMaxCreateTime = (Timestamp) preMaxTime.get("max_create_time");
                        Timestamp preMaxUpdateTime = (Timestamp) preMaxTime.get("max_update_time");
                        Timestamp preMaxEtlTime = (Timestamp) preMaxTime.get("max_etl_time");
                        preMaxEtlTime = preMaxEtlTime == null ? new Timestamp(System.currentTimeMillis()) : preMaxEtlTime;
                        params = new ArrayList<>();

                        //转换与ck服务器相同时区
                        String preMaxCreateTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(preMaxCreateTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);
                        String currentMaxDataCreateTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(currentMaxDataCreateTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);
                        String preMaxUpdateTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(preMaxUpdateTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);
                        String currentMaxDataUpdateTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(currentMaxDataUpdateTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);
                        String preMaxEtlTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(preMaxEtlTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);
                        String currentMaxEtlTimeCk = DateZoneUtils.getDateByTimeZone(currentMaxEtlTime.getTime(), ckServerTimeZone);


                        params.add(new SqlParam(preMaxCreateTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxDataCreateTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(preMaxUpdateTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxDataUpdateTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(preMaxEtlTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        params.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxEtlTimeCk, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        log.info("optimize time info,preMaxCreateTime:{},preMaxUpdateTime:{},currentMaxDataCreateTime:{},currentMaxDataUpdateTime:{}", preMaxCreateTimeCk, preMaxUpdateTimeCk, currentMaxDataCreateTimeCk, currentMaxDataUpdateTimeCk);
                        String getPartitionIdByTimeSql = "select distinct formatDateTime(data_create_time,'%Y%m') as partition_id from " + String.format("%s.%s ", ckSchema, ckDistributedTable) +
                                "where (data_create_time >= ? and data_create_time <= ?) or (data_update_time >= ? and data_update_time <= ?) or (etl_time >= ? and etl_time <= ?)";
                        List<Map<String, Object>> partitions = DbService.queryDb(ckCatalog, getPartitionIdByTimeSql, params, null);
                        optimizeResult = this.optimizePartitions(partitions);
                    }
                    // 分区合并成功,保存最大创建时间和最大更新时间到数据库
                    if (optimizeResult) {
                        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                        sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(ckDistributedTable, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                        sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxDataCreateTime, SqlParam.DataType.TIMESTAMP));
                        sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxDataUpdateTime, SqlParam.DataType.TIMESTAMP));
                        sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(currentMaxEtlTime, SqlParam.DataType.TIMESTAMP));
                        DbService.insertDb(Constants.METADATADB, INSERT_SQL, sqlParams, null);
                        watch.stop();
                        log.info("process finished,cost time:{}ms,", watch.getTime());
                        taskProcessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).inc();
                    }
                }
            } catch (Throwable e) {
                log.error("optimize table partition error", e);
            }
        };
        Runnable monitor = () -> {
            double v = taskProcessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).get();
            if (taskProcessCounterLastValue == null || v > taskProcessCounterLastValue) {
                taskProcessCounterLastValue = v;
            } else {
                // 如果当前值和上一次的值是一样,则合并存在问题,重启任务
                log.error("the current value: {} is the same as the last value:{}, there is a problem with the merge,and restart the task!!!", taskProcessCounterLastValue, v);
                System.exit(1);
            }
        };
        executorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(cal, 0, interval.getTime(), interval.getTimeUnit());
        executorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(monitor, 10, 15, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
    }

    private Boolean optimizePartitions(List<Map<String, Object>> partitions) {
        log.info("partitions size:{}", partitions.size());
        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(partitions)) {
            return false;
        }
        AtomicReference<Boolean> result = new AtomicReference<>(true);
        partitions.stream().parallel().forEach(p -> {
            String partitionId = p.get("partition_id").toString();
            partitionId = partitionId.replace("-0", "-");
            boolean ok = false;
            for (int attemptCount = 0; attemptCount < 3; attemptCount++) {
                try {
                    this.optimizePartition(partitionId);
                    ok = true;
                    break;
                } catch (Throwable e) {
                    log.error("optimize partition_id:{},attemptCount:{},error", partitionId, attemptCount, e);
                    try {
                        Thread.sleep(10000);
                    } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                        log.error("sleep interrupted exception", interruptedException);
                    }
                }
            }
            if (!ok) {
                result.set(false);
            }
        });
        return result.get();
    }

    private void optimizePartition(String partitionId) throws SQLException {
        StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
        CkTable ckTable = this.config.getCkTable();
        String catalog = ckTable.getCatalog();
        String schema = ckTable.getSchema();
        String localTable = ckTable.getLocalTable();
        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(nodeCatalogs)) {
            String table = isWindowOS ? ckTable.getDistributedTable() : localTable;
            String cluster = isWindowOS ? "" : "on cluster default";
            String sql = String.format(OPTIMIZE_PARTITION_SQL, schema, table, cluster, partitionId);
            log.info("optimize sql:" + sql);
            DbService.updateDb(catalog, sql, null, null);
        } else {
            String sql = String.format(OPTIMIZE_PARTITION_CONNECT_NODE_SQL, schema, localTable, partitionId);
            for (String nodeCatalog : nodeCatalogs) {
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(schema, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(localTable, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(partitionId, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                List<Map<String, Object>> res = DbService.queryDb(nodeCatalog, QUERY_ACTIVE_PARTS_SQL, sqlParams, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(res)) {
                    log.info("nodeCatalog:{} has no active parts greater than 1 in partition:{}", nodeCatalog, partitionId);
                    return;
                }

                StopWatch watchNode = StopWatch.createStarted();
                log.info("start optimize,nodeCatalog:{},partitionId:{}", nodeCatalog, partitionId);
                DbService.updateDb(nodeCatalog, sql, null, null);
                watchNode.stop();
                log.info("end optimize,nodeCatalog:{},partitionId:{},cost time:{}", nodeCatalog, partitionId, watchNode.getTime());
            }
        }
        watch.stop();
        log.info("optimize table:{},partition id:{},cost time:{}ms,", localTable, partitionId, watch.getTime());
    }


    @Override
    public void stop() {

    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        return false;
    }


}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/ck/CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/ck/CkPartitionOptimizeProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.ck;

import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ck.CkPartitionOptimizeConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ck.CkPartitionOptimizeTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * 分区合并处理器生产者
 */

@Slf4j
public class CkPartitionOptimizeProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        CkPartitionOptimizeTaskConfig TaskConfig = YamlParser.parse(CkPartitionOptimizeTaskConfig.class, yamlFile);
        CkPartitionOptimizeConfig config = TaskConfig.getCkPartitionOptimizeConfig();
        if (config.getIsRun()) {
            config.setTaskConfig(taskConfig);
            CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor processor = new CkPartitionOptimizeProcessor(config);
            dataProcessors.add(processor);
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/ck/CkPartitionOptimizeThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.ck;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class CkPartitionOptimizeThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, "partition-optimize-thread-" + index);
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/ck/CkWindowSliceProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.ck;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.TimeWindow;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.WindowSliceProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.WindowSliceProcessor;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.sql.Timestamp;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * clickhouse滑动窗口处理器
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class CkWindowSliceProcessor extends WindowSliceProcessor {

    public static final String GET_PARTITION_OPTIMIZE_TIME_SQL = "select max_create_time,max_update_time,max_etl_time from taskinfodb.r_ck_partition_optimize_info where table_name = ? ";

    public CkWindowSliceProcessor(WindowSliceProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }


    /**
     * 上一个窗口的截止时间往前推两分钟,让其多计算数据,防止kafka数据由于时延没入库导致数据少计算
     */
    protected TimeWindow getPreTimeWindow() throws Exception {
        Time size = this.windowTable.getSize();
        TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(taskInfo.getTaskName(), windowTable.getTableName(),  size == null ? "all" : size.toString());
        if (preTimeWindow != null) {
            Timestamp oldEndTime = preTimeWindow.getEndTime();
            Timestamp newEndTime = new Timestamp(oldEndTime.getTime() - 2 * 60 * 1000);
            preTimeWindow.setEndTime(newEndTime);
        }
        return preTimeWindow;
    }


    /**
     * 1 当前窗口截止时间和分区合并前的最大业务创建时间比较,如果大于,则取后者
     * 2 当前窗口最大更新时间和分区合并前的最大业务更新时间比较,如果大于,则取后者
     */
    @Override
    protected TimeWindow getCurrentTimeWindow() throws Exception {
        TimeWindow currentTimeWindow = super.getCurrentTimeWindow();
        Timestamp startTime = currentTimeWindow.getStartTime();
        Timestamp endTime = currentTimeWindow.getEndTime();
        Timestamp maxUpdateTime = currentTimeWindow.getMaxUpdateTime();
        Timestamp maxEtlTime = currentTimeWindow.getMaxEtlTime();
        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(windowTable.getTableName(), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(Constant.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, GET_PARTITION_OPTIMIZE_TIME_SQL, sqlParams, null);
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
            TimeWindow resultTimeWindow = new TimeWindow(currentTimeWindow.getTaskName(), currentTimeWindow.getTableName(),  currentTimeWindow.getSize(), startTime, endTime, maxUpdateTime, maxEtlTime);
            Map<String, Object> map = results.get(0);
            Timestamp optimizeMaxCreateTime = (Timestamp) (map.get("max_create_time"));
            Timestamp optimizeMaxUpdateTime = (Timestamp) (map.get("max_update_time"));
            Timestamp optimizeMaxEtlTime = (Timestamp) (map.get("max_etl_time"));
            if (optimizeMaxCreateTime != null && optimizeMaxCreateTime.before(endTime)) {
                Time size = windowTable.getSize();
                if (size == null) {
                    resultTimeWindow.setStartTime(startTime);
                } else {
                    resultTimeWindow.setStartTime(new Timestamp(optimizeMaxCreateTime.getTime() - size.toMilliseconds()));
                }
                resultTimeWindow.setEndTime(optimizeMaxCreateTime);
            }
            if (optimizeMaxUpdateTime != null && optimizeMaxUpdateTime.before(maxUpdateTime)) {
                resultTimeWindow.setMaxUpdateTime(optimizeMaxUpdateTime);
            }

            if (optimizeMaxEtlTime != null && optimizeMaxEtlTime.before(maxEtlTime)) {
                resultTimeWindow.setMaxEtlTime(optimizeMaxEtlTime);
            }
            return resultTimeWindow;
        } else {
            return currentTimeWindow;
        }
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/QuartzJob.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;
import org.quartz.*;

import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

@Slf4j
@DisallowConcurrentExecution
public class QuartzJob implements Job {
    public static final Counter schedulerSucessCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("cron_scheduler_consumer_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc cron scheduler consumer process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    public static final Counter schedulerExecuteCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("cron_scheduler_execute_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc cron scheduler execute total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    @Override
    public void execute(JobExecutionContext context) throws JobExecutionException {
        int count = 1;
        Integer retries;
        Scheduler scheduler = context.getScheduler();
        SchedulerContext schedulerContext;
        try {
            schedulerContext = scheduler.getContext();
        } catch (SchedulerException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        CalcContextData calcContextData = (CalcContextData) schedulerContext.get("calcContextData");
        QuartzTaskProcessor processor = (QuartzTaskProcessor) schedulerContext.get("processor");
        retries = processor.processorConfig.getRetries();

        while (true) {
            try {
                log.info("start execute quartz job,number of executions:{}", count);
                StopWatch watch = StopWatch.createStarted();
                processor.process(calcContextData);
                schedulerSucessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(processor.getClass().getSimpleName())).inc();
                watch.stop();
                log.info("end execute quartz job,cost time:{} seconds", watch.getTime(TimeUnit.SECONDS));
                break;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("execute quartz job error", e);
                count++;
                if (count > retries) {
                    // 超过重试次数(默认10次,可以在配置文件重新定义retries参数),则退出
                    System.exit(1);
                }
                try {
                    TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(30);
                } catch (InterruptedException ex) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(ex);
                }
            } finally {
                schedulerExecuteCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(processor.getClass().getSimpleName())).inc();
            }
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/QuartzJob.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/QuartzTaskProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz;


import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.*;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ReflectionUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.quartz.*;
import org.quartz.impl.StdSchedulerFactory;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Properties;
import java.util.function.Consumer;
import java.util.function.Function;
import java.util.function.Predicate;

import static com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzJob.schedulerSucessCounter;
import static com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzJob.schedulerExecuteCounter;


@Slf4j
public abstract class QuartzTaskProcessor extends DataProcessor {

    protected final List<CalcNode> calcNodes;
    protected final QuartzProcessorConfig processorConfig;
    protected Scheduler scheduler;
    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;

    protected QuartzTaskProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(new ProcessorConfig());
        this.calcNodes = new ArrayList<>();
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        TaskConfig taskConfig = processorConfig.getTaskConfig();
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(taskConfig.getTaskName(), taskConfig.getGroupId(), taskConfig.getMaintain(), taskConfig.getDescription());
    }


    @Override
    public void start() {
        this.organizeCalcNodes();
        String simpleName = this.getClass().getSimpleName();
        String cron = processorConfig.getCron();
        log.info("processor:{},cron:{}", simpleName, cron);

        JobDetail jobDetail = JobBuilder
                .newJob(QuartzJob.class)
                .withIdentity(simpleName + "_job", "group")
                .build();

        CronTrigger trigger = TriggerBuilder
                .newTrigger()
                .withIdentity(simpleName + "_trigger", "group")
                .withSchedule(CronScheduleBuilder.cronSchedule(cron))
                .build();

        Properties props = new Properties();
        String schedulerName = simpleName + "_" + "Scheduler";
        props.put("org.quartz.scheduler.instanceName", schedulerName);
        props.put("org.quartz.threadPool.threadCount", "3");
        SchedulerFactory schedulerFactory;
        try {
            schedulerFactory = new StdSchedulerFactory(props);
        } catch (SchedulerException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        CalcContextData calcContextData = new CalcContextData();
        try {
            scheduler = schedulerFactory.getScheduler();
            scheduler.scheduleJob(jobDetail, trigger);
            ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG, processorConfig);
            scheduler.getContext().put("processor", this);
            scheduler.getContext().put("calcContextData", calcContextData);
            scheduler.start();
            schedulerSucessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(this.getClass().getSimpleName())).inc(0);
            schedulerExecuteCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(this.getClass().getSimpleName())).inc(0);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
//            System.exit(1);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public final void stop() {
        log.info("scheduler shut down ");
        try {
            scheduler.shutdown();
        } catch (SchedulerException e) {
            log.info(e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        for (CalcNode calcNode : calcNodes) {
            if (calcNode instanceof FilterCalNode) {
                if (((FilterCalNode) calcNode).isPass(data)) {
                    return false;
                }
            } else {
                calcNode.process(data);
            }
        }
        return true;
    }


    public abstract void organizeCalcNodes();

    /**
     * 添加SQL类算子
     *
     * @param catalog            执行的数据库实例名称
     * @param calcName           算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @param useAheadResultList 使用到之前算子结果的字段名称集合，支持嵌套字段，但字段名称必须与保持结果字段一致，如 "kafka_source_name.rowData.afiUid"
     * @param sql                该算子需要执行的函数，需符合 JDBC 规范
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public QuartzTaskProcessor addSql(String catalog, String calcName, List<String> useAheadResultList, String sql) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SqlCalcNode(catalog, calcName, useAheadResultList, null, sql));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加函数类算子
     *
     * @param func     转换函数，返回的结果会存入数据上下文，以便后续算子使用
     * @param calcName 算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public QuartzTaskProcessor addCalcNode(Function<CalcContextData, Object> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FuncProcessCalNode(func, calcName, null));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加过滤算子
     *
     * @param func     过滤函数，返回结果为true时过滤本条数据处理
     * @param calcName 该算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public QuartzTaskProcessor addFilterNode(Predicate<CalcContextData> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FilterCalNode(func, calcName, null));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j查询算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final QuartzTaskProcessor addQueryNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new QueryNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, null));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j插入操作算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final QuartzTaskProcessor addSinkNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, null));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加消费算子
     *
     * @param consumer 消费函数
     * @param calcName 该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final QuartzTaskProcessor addConsumerNode(Consumer<CalcContextData> consumer, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(consumer, calcName, null));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加发送kafka算子
     *
     * @param clusterName kafka集群名称
     * @param topicName   发送topic名称
     * @param dataName    数据在上下文中key的名称
     * @param calcName    该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final QuartzTaskProcessor addSinkKafkaNode(String clusterName, String topicName, String dataName, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkKafkaCalNode(clusterName, topicName, dataName, calcName, null));
        return this;
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/QuartzTaskProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz;

import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.*;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 定时任务处理器生产者
 */

@Slf4j
public class QuartzTaskProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        QuartzTaskConfig quartzTaskConfig = YamlParser.parse(QuartzTaskConfig.class, yamlFile);
        Map<String, QuartzProcessorConfig> processors = quartzTaskConfig.getProcessors();
        for (Map.Entry<String, QuartzProcessorConfig> entry : processors.entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            QuartzProcessorConfig processorConfig = entry.getValue();
            if (processorConfig.getIsRun()) {
                processorConfig.setTaskConfig(taskConfig);
                processorConfig.setProcessorName(processorName);
                processorConfig.setStartFromConfig(Files.exists(Constant.KAFKA_OFFSET_FROM_YAML_PATH));
                String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
                Class<?> processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
                Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(QuartzProcessorConfig.class);
                constructor.setAccessible(true);
                DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(processorConfig);
                dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
            }
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/DimFeatureTableCleanProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.tableClean;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.CleanTable;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.tableClean.TableCleanProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Calendar;
import java.util.Date;

@Slf4j
public class DimFeatureTableCleanProcessor extends TableCleanProcessor {

    private static final String GET_MAX_FEAT_UPDATE_TIME = "select max(feat_update_time) as max_feat_update_time from %s";

    protected DimFeatureTableCleanProcessor(TableCleanProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    public Long getWindowEndTime() {
        return getTodayStartTime();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean canDelete() {
        CleanTable cleanTable = this.tableCleanProcessorConfig.getCleanTable();
        String tableName = cleanTable.getSchema() + "." + cleanTable.getTableName();

        if (StrUtil.isEmpty(tableName)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("table is empty,please check yaml config file !!!");
        }
        String sql = String.format(GET_MAX_FEAT_UPDATE_TIME, tableName);
        try {
            Object maxFeatUpdateTimeObj = DbService.queryOneValue(Constant.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, sql, null, "max_feat_update_time", taskInfo);
            if (maxFeatUpdateTimeObj != null) {
                Long maxFeatUpdateTime = (Long) maxFeatUpdateTimeObj;
                Long todayStartTime = getTodayStartTime();
                // 如果T+1特征表的最大更新时间大于当天开始时间,则开启删除
                return maxFeatUpdateTime > todayStartTime;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        return false;
    }

    public Long getTodayStartTime() {
        Calendar calendar = Calendar.getInstance();
        calendar.setTime(new Date());
        calendar.set(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, 0);
        calendar.set(Calendar.MINUTE, 0);
        calendar.set(Calendar.SECOND, 0);
        return calendar.getTime().getTime();
    }


}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/DimFeatureTableCleanProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/TableCleanProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.tableClean;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.CleanTable;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.tableClean.TableCleanProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzJob;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzTaskProcessor;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.RateLimiter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

@Slf4j
public class TableCleanProcessor extends QuartzTaskProcessor {
    protected final TableCleanProcessorConfig tableCleanProcessorConfig;
    private RateLimiter rateLimiter = null;

    protected TableCleanProcessor(TableCleanProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.tableCleanProcessorConfig = processorConfig;
        Integer deleteRatePerSecond = processorConfig.getCleanTable().getDeleteRatePerSecond();
        if (deleteRatePerSecond != null) {
            rateLimiter = RateLimiter.create(deleteRatePerSecond);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addConsumerNode(contextData -> {
            boolean canDelete = canDelete();
            log.info("can delete:{}", canDelete);
            if (!canDelete) {
                return;
            }
            int result;
            CleanTable cleanTable = tableCleanProcessorConfig.getCleanTable();
            String catalog = cleanTable.getCatalog();
            String schema = cleanTable.getSchema();
            String tableName = cleanTable.getTableName();
            Integer pageSize = cleanTable.getPageSize();
            String table = schema + "." + tableName;
            String cleanByTimeField = cleanTable.getCleanByTimeField();
            Long windowSize = cleanTable.getSize().toMilliseconds();
            Long windowStartTime = getWindowEndTime() - windowSize;
            String sql = String.format("delete from %s where %s < %d limit %d", table, cleanByTimeField, windowStartTime, pageSize);
            while (true) {
                try {
                    if (rateLimiter != null) {
                        rateLimiter.acquire();
                    }

                    log.info("start execute delete sql:{}", sql);
                    result = DbService.deleteDb(catalog, sql, null, taskInfo);
                    log.info("end execute delete sql:{},number of records deleted:{}", sql, result);
                    QuartzJob.schedulerSucessCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(this.getClass().getSimpleName())).inc();
                    if (result <= 0) {
                        break;
                    }
                } catch (Throwable e) {
                    log.error("execute delete error", e);
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }
        }, "consumer");
    }

    // 截止时间,默认为当前时间,可被重写
    public Long getWindowEndTime() {
        return System.currentTimeMillis();
    }

    // 删除开关,是:删除,否:不删除
    public boolean canDelete() {
        return true;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/TableCleanProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/TableCleanQuartzTaskProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.tableClean;

import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.tableClean.TableCleanProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.tableClean.TableCleanQuartzTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 定时任务处理器生产者
 */

@Slf4j
public class TableCleanQuartzTaskProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {
    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        TableCleanQuartzTaskConfig quartzTaskConfig = YamlParser.parse(TableCleanQuartzTaskConfig.class, yamlFile);
        Map<String, TableCleanProcessorConfig> processors = quartzTaskConfig.getProcessors();
        for (Map.Entry<String, TableCleanProcessorConfig> entry : processors.entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            QuartzProcessorConfig processorConfig = entry.getValue();
            if (processorConfig.getIsRun()) {
                processorConfig.setTaskConfig(taskConfig);
                processorConfig.setProcessorName(processorName);
                String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
                Class<?> processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
                Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(TableCleanProcessorConfig.class);
                constructor.setAccessible(true);
                DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(processorConfig);
                dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
            }
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/tableClean/TableCleanQuartzTaskProduceProcessors.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowInQuartzSinkDbProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.window;

import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class WindowInQuartzSinkDbProcessor extends WindowQuartzTaskProcessor {

    private final String insertSql;

    private List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>();

    protected WindowInQuartzSinkDbProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig quartzTaskConfig) {
        super(quartzTaskConfig);
        this.insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insert sql:{}", this.insertSql);
    }

    /**
     * 保存出窗数据，保存数据库
     * @param windowInList
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public void sinkWindowData(List<Map<String, Object>> windowInList) throws Exception{
        Sink sink = this.processorConfig.getSink();
        if(windowInList.size() > 0){
            //封装db数据
            List<List<SqlParam>> batchParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowInList){
                List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
                for(String field : this.getTableColumns()){
                    sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(result.get(field), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                }
                batchParams.add(sqlParamList);
            }
            if(batchParams.size() > 0){
                DbService.insertDbBatch(sink.getCatalog(), insertSql, batchParams, 1000,null);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句(可重写)
     * @return
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        List<String> tableColumns;
        List<String> tableUpdateColumns;
        Sink sink = this.processorConfig.getSink();
        String columns = sink.getColumns();
        String columnClass = sink.getColumnClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columns)) {
            tableColumns = Arrays.stream(columns.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.setTableColumns(new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));

            String duplicateFields = sink.getDuplicateUpdateColumns();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columnClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(columnClass);
            tableColumns = fieldMap.get("fields");
            this.setTableColumns(new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() <= 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
        }
        //补充窗口更新时间
        tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        tableUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable(), tableColumns, tableUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }

    public void setTableColumns(List<String> tableColumns) {
        this.tableColumns = tableColumns;
    }

    public List<String> getTableColumns() {
        return tableColumns;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowInQuartzSinkDbProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowInQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.window;

import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaProducerService;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;

import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;


@Slf4j
public class WindowInQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor extends WindowQuartzTaskProcessor {

    protected WindowInQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig quartzTaskConfig) {
        super(quartzTaskConfig);
    }

    /**
     * 保存进窗数据，保存数据库
     * @param windowInList
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public void sinkWindowData(List<Map<String, Object>> windowInList) throws Exception{
        if(windowInList.size() > 0){
            // 封装kafka数据
            Map<String, List<JSONObject>> kafkaDataMap = new HashMap<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowInList){
                JSONObject kafkaData = new JSONObject();
                JSONObject rowData = new JSONObject();
                for(Map.Entry<String, Object> field : result.entrySet()){
                    rowData.put(field.getKey(), field.getValue());
                }
                kafkaData.put("beforeData", "{}");
                kafkaData.put("binlogTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("bizType", this.processorConfig.getSource().getBizType());
                kafkaData.put("dataDomain", "feature");
                kafkaData.put("databaseName", this.processorConfig.getSource().getSchema());
                kafkaData.put("eventType", EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName().toUpperCase());
                kafkaData.put("messageTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("rowData", rowData);
                kafkaData.put("tableName", this.processorConfig.getSource().getTable());
                //不需要设置topic message key，设置为null
                if(kafkaDataMap.containsKey(null)){
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = kafkaDataMap.get(null);
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                } else {
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = new ArrayList<>();
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                    kafkaDataMap.put(null, jsonObjects);
                }
            }
            // 发生出窗数据到kafka
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<JSONObject>> entry : kafkaDataMap.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                List<JSONObject> objectList = entry.getValue();
                if(objectList != null && objectList.size() > 0){
                    for (JSONObject jsonObject : objectList){
                        KafkaProducerService.sendData(this.processorConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), this.processorConfig.getSink().getTopic(), key, jsonObject.toJSONString());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowInQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowOutQuartzSinkDbProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.window;

import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class WindowOutQuartzSinkDbProcessor extends WindowQuartzTaskProcessor {

    private final String insertSql;

    private List<String> tableColumns = new ArrayList<>();

    protected WindowOutQuartzSinkDbProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig quartzTaskConfig) {
        super(quartzTaskConfig);
        this.insertSql = generateInsertSql();
        log.info("insert sql:{}", this.insertSql);
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowStartTime(Long startTime) {
        return  startTime - this.processorConfig.getWindowTimeMs();
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowEndTime(Long endTime) {
        return  endTime - this.processorConfig.getWindowTimeMs();
    }

    /**
     * 保存出窗数据，保存数据库
     * @param windowOutList
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public void sinkWindowData(List<Map<String, Object>> windowOutList) throws Exception{
        Sink sink = this.processorConfig.getSink();
        if(windowOutList.size() > 0){
            //封装db数据
            List<List<SqlParam>> batchParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowOutList){
                List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
                for(String field : this.getTableColumns()){
                    sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(result.get(field), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                }
                batchParams.add(sqlParamList);
            }
            if(batchParams.size() > 0){
                DbService.insertDbBatch(sink.getCatalog(), insertSql, batchParams, 1000,null);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句(可重写)
     * @return
     */
    public String generateInsertSql() {
        List<String> tableColumns;
        List<String> tableUpdateColumns;
        Sink sink = this.processorConfig.getSink();
        String columns = sink.getColumns();
        String columnClass = sink.getColumnClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columns)) {
            tableColumns = Arrays.stream(columns.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            this.setTableColumns(new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));

            String duplicateFields = sink.getDuplicateUpdateColumns();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columnClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(columnClass);
            tableColumns = fieldMap.get("fields");
            this.setTableColumns(new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() <= 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
        }
        //补充窗口更新时间
        tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        tableUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable(), tableColumns, tableUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    public String getInsertSql() {
        return insertSql;
    }

    public void setTableColumns(List<String> tableColumns) {
        this.tableColumns = tableColumns;
    }

    public List<String> getTableColumns() {
        return tableColumns;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowOutQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.window;

import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaProducerService;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 窗口进窗定时任务抽象类（适用于每天定时出窗类型）
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public class WindowOutQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor extends WindowQuartzTaskProcessor {

    protected WindowOutQuartzSinkKafkaProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig quartzTaskConfig) {
        super(quartzTaskConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowStartTime(Long startTime) {
        return  startTime - this.processorConfig.getWindowTimeMs();
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowEndTime(Long endTime) {
        return  endTime - this.processorConfig.getWindowTimeMs();
    }

    @Override
    public void sinkWindowData(List<Map<String, Object>> windowOutList) throws Exception {
        if(windowOutList.size() > 0){
            // 封装kafka数据
            Map<String, List<JSONObject>> kafkaDataMap = new HashMap<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowOutList){
                JSONObject kafkaData = new JSONObject();
                JSONObject beforeData = new JSONObject();
                for(Map.Entry<String, Object> field : result.entrySet()){
                    beforeData.put(field.getKey(), field.getValue());
                }
                kafkaData.put("beforeData", beforeData);
                kafkaData.put("binlogTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("bizType", this.processorConfig.getSource().getBizType());
                kafkaData.put("dataDomain", "feature");
                kafkaData.put("databaseName", this.processorConfig.getSource().getSchema());
                kafkaData.put("eventType", EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName().toUpperCase());
                kafkaData.put("messageTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("rowData", "{}");
                kafkaData.put("tableName", this.processorConfig.getSource().getTable());
                //不需要设置topic message key，设置为null
                if(kafkaDataMap.containsKey(null)){
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = kafkaDataMap.get(null);
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                } else {
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = new ArrayList<>();
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                    kafkaDataMap.put(null, jsonObjects);
                }
            }
            // 发生出窗数据到kafka
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<JSONObject>> entry : kafkaDataMap.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                List<JSONObject> objectList = entry.getValue();
                if(objectList != null && objectList.size() > 0){
                    for (JSONObject jsonObject : objectList){
                        KafkaProducerService.sendData(this.processorConfig.getSink().getCatalog(), this.processorConfig.getSink().getTopic(), key, jsonObject.toJSONString());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
