### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowQuartzTaskProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.window;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.TimeWindow;
import com.akulaku.core.common.CountryZoneEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaStartupModeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzTaskProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;

import java.sql.Timestamp;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * 定时窗口任务抽象类（适用于每天定时出窗/进窗数据）
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class WindowQuartzTaskProcessor extends QuartzTaskProcessor {

    public static final String QUERY_SQL_KEY = "query_sql";

    public static final String FIRST_PAGE_SQL_KEY = "first_page_sql";

    public static final String PAGE_SQL_KEY = "page_sql";

    private final Map<String, String> querySqlMap = new HashMap<>();

    private final List<String> primaryColumnNames = new ArrayList<>();

    protected WindowQuartzTaskProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig quartzTaskConfig) {
        super(quartzTaskConfig);
        Source source = this.processorConfig.getSource();
        initQuerySql(source);
        log.info("query sql:{}", JSONObject.toJSONString(querySqlMap));
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addConsumerNode(contextData -> {
            StopWatch stopWatch = new StopWatch();
            stopWatch.start();
            try{
                //1、获取结束时间
                Long endTime = this.getEndTime();
                //2、获取开始时间
                Long startTime = this.getStartTime(endTime);
                log.info("current scheduler startTime={} and endTime={}", startTime, endTime);
                if(endTime <= startTime){
                    log.info("current scheduler data not updated, quit current scheduler");
                    return;
                }
                //3、获取窗口时间，支持进窗和出窗
                Long windowStartTime = this.getWindowStartTime(startTime);
                Long windowEndTime = this.getWindowEndTime(endTime);
                //3、查询窗口数据并保存
                queryWindowData(windowStartTime, windowEndTime);
                //4、缓存开始时间
                this.saveCurrentWindow(windowStartTime, windowEndTime, endTime);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("current scheduler query data error, quit", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
            } finally {
                stopWatch.stop();
                log.info("current scheduler task 总耗时：{} Ms", stopWatch.getTime());
            }
        }, "precessData");
    }

    /**
     * 获取开始时间
     * @param endTime
     * @return
     */
    public Long getStartTime(Long endTime) throws Exception{
        long startTime;
        if(this.processorConfig.getStartFromConfig()){
            //回拨时间，从配置文件指定时间开始
            this.processorConfig.setStartFromConfig(false);
            String startMode = this.processorConfig.getStartMode();
            KafkaStartupModeEnum startModeEnum = KafkaStartupModeEnum.getKafkaStartupModeEnum(startMode);
            switch (startModeEnum){
                case LATEST:
                    startTime = endTime - 1;
                    break;
                case EARLIEST:
                    startTime = 0L;
                    break;
                case TIMESTAMP:
                    startTime = this.processorConfig.getStartTimeMs();
                    log.info("从配置文件中读取开始时间配置,startTime:{}", startTime);
                    break;
                default:
                    //1、查询上次结束时间
                    TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName(), this.processorConfig.getSource().getTable(), this.processorConfig.getCron());
                    if(preTimeWindow == null){
                        throw new RuntimeException("指定消费模式不存在");
                    } else {
                        //正常消费，从数据库缓存时间开始
                        startTime = preTimeWindow.getMaxUpdateTime().getTime();
                        log.info("从数据库缓存时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
                    }
                    break;
            }
        } else {
            //1、查询上次结束时间
            TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName(), this.processorConfig.getSource().getTable(), this.processorConfig.getCron());
            if(preTimeWindow == null){
                //首次消费，从当前最大时间开始，-1是因为如果startTime=endTime，程序不执行
                startTime = endTime - 1;
                log.info("从当前时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
            } else {
                //正常消费，从数据库缓存时间开始
                startTime = preTimeWindow.getMaxUpdateTime().getTime();
                log.info("从数据库缓存时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
            }
        }
        return startTime;
    }

    /**
     * 获取结束时间，默认为当天时间0点+1天的时间戳（可重写）
     */
    public Long getEndTime() throws Exception {
        //获取当天时间0点+1天，适用于repay_date<=当前时间
        return DateUtils.getPlusDay(DateUtils.getCurrentDate(CountryZoneEnum.Indonesia.getZoneId()), 1L, CountryZoneEnum.Indonesia.getZoneId()).getTime();
    }

    /**
     * 获取窗口开始时间（可重写）
     */
    public Long getWindowStartTime(Long startTime){
        return startTime;
    }

    /**
     * 获取窗口结束时间（可重写）
     */
    public Long getWindowEndTime(Long endTime){
        return endTime;
    }

    /**
     * 保存窗口数据
     * @param windowStartTime
     * @param windowEndTime
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public void queryWindowData(Long windowStartTime, Long windowEndTime) throws Exception{
        Source source = this.processorConfig.getSource();
        Long slidingStepMs = this.processorConfig.getSlidingStepMs();
        Boolean pageSwitch = source.getPageSwitch();
        Integer pageSize = source.getPageSize();
        while (windowStartTime < windowEndTime){
            long nextTime = slidingStepMs != null ? (windowStartTime > windowEndTime + slidingStepMs ? windowStartTime + slidingStepMs : windowEndTime) : windowEndTime;
            log.info("current scheduler windowStartTime={} and nextTime={}", windowStartTime, nextTime);
            JSONObject startId = null;
            String querySql;
            while (true){
                StopWatch stopWatch = StopWatch.createStarted();
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(windowStartTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(nextTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                if(pageSwitch){
                    // 分页
                    if(startId == null){
                        querySql = this.querySqlMap.get(FIRST_PAGE_SQL_KEY);
                    } else {
                        // 非首次分页，添加分页条件
                        for (String primaryKey: this.getPrimaryColumnNames()) {
                            sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(startId.get(primaryKey), SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                        }
                        querySql = this.querySqlMap.get(PAGE_SQL_KEY);
                    }
                    log.info("current scheduler current pageStart={}, pageSize={}", JSONObject.toJSONString(startId), pageSize);
                } else {
                    querySql = this.querySqlMap.get(QUERY_SQL_KEY);
                }
                List<Map<String, Object>> windowList = DbService.queryDb(source.getCatalog(), querySql, sqlParams, null);
                stopWatch.stop();
                log.info("current scheduler query window out data 耗时：{} Ms", stopWatch.getTime());
                if(windowList.size() <= 0){
                    break;
                }
                log.info("current scheduler query window out data size:{}", windowList.size());
                this.sinkWindowData(windowList);
                if(pageSwitch && pageSize.equals(windowList.size())){
                    if(startId == null){
                        startId = new JSONObject();
                    }
                    Map<String, Map<String, Object>> latestRecord = windowList.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(
                            map -> generateGroupKey(map, this.getPrimaryColumnNames().subList(0, this.getPrimaryColumnNames().size() - 1)),
                            Collectors.collectingAndThen(
                                    Collectors.maxBy(Comparator.comparing(map -> (Comparable) map.get(this.getPrimaryColumnNames().get(this.getPrimaryColumnNames().size() - 1)))),
                                    optional -> optional.orElse(null)
                            )
                    ));
                    //如果当前数据数量等于分页大小，证明还需要查下一页数据
                    Collection<Map<String, Object>> values = latestRecord.values();
                    Map<String, Object> firstElement = values.iterator().next();
                    for (String primaryKey: this.getPrimaryColumnNames()) {
                        startId.put(primaryKey, firstElement.get(primaryKey));
                    }
                } else {
                    //数据同步完成
                    break;
                }
            }
            windowStartTime = nextTime;
        }
    }

    /**
     * 根据keys生成分组键
     * @param map
     * @param keys
     * @return
     */
    private String generateGroupKey(Map<String, Object> map, List<String> keys) {
        return keys.stream()
                .map(key -> Objects.toString(map.get(key), ""))
                .collect(Collectors.joining("|"));
    }

    public abstract void sinkWindowData(List<Map<String, Object>> windowOutList) throws Exception;


    /**
     * 保存当前窗口结果
     * @param startTime
     * @param endTime
     * @param businessEndTime
     * @throws Exception
     */
    private void saveCurrentWindow(Long startTime, Long endTime, Long businessEndTime) throws Exception{
        TimeWindow currentTimeWindow = new TimeWindow(processorConfig.getProcessorName(), processorConfig.getSource().getTable(), processorConfig.getCron(),
                new Timestamp(startTime), new Timestamp(endTime), new Timestamp(businessEndTime), new Timestamp(DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis()));
        TimeWindow.saveTimeWindow(currentTimeWindow);
    }

    /**
     * 初始化查询sql(可重写)
     * @return
     * @param source
     */
    public void initQuerySql(Source source) {
        Boolean pageSwitch = source.getPageSwitch();
        Integer pageSize = source.getPageSize();
        StringBuilder querySql = new StringBuilder();

        List<String> whereSqls = new ArrayList<>();
        whereSqls.add(String.format("%s >= ?", source.getFilterTimeField()));
        whereSqls.add(String.format("%s < ?", source.getFilterTimeField()));
        try {
            if (!pageSwitch) {
                String dataField = source.getDataField() != null ? source.getDataField() : "*";
                String queryTable = String.format("select %s from %s.%s", dataField , source.getSchema(), source.getTable());
                String whereSql = String.join(" and ", whereSqls);
                querySql.append(queryTable).append(" where ").append(whereSql);
                this.querySqlMap.put(QUERY_SQL_KEY, querySql.toString());
            } else {
                // 分页，判断是否含有递增主键
                this.primaryColumnNames.addAll(SqlUtils.getAutoIncrPrimaryColumnNameList(source.getCatalog(), source.getSchema(), source.getTable()));
                String primaryKeys = String.join(",", this.getPrimaryColumnNames());
                String dataField = source.getDataField() != null ? String.format("%s,%s", primaryKeys, source.getDataField()) : "*";
                String queryTable = String.format("select %s from %s.%s", dataField , source.getSchema(), source.getTable());

                String whereSql = String.join(" and ", whereSqls);
                querySql.append(queryTable).append(" where ").append(whereSql);
                // 含有主键，根据主键排序
                String orderBy = String.format("order by %s", primaryKeys);
                querySql.append(" ").append(orderBy);
                querySql.append(" limit ").append(pageSize);
                this.querySqlMap.put(FIRST_PAGE_SQL_KEY, querySql.toString());

                StringBuilder pageSql = new StringBuilder();
                // 分页，推荐是用主键的方式，请检查主键是否是递增的
                for (String primaryKey : this.getPrimaryColumnNames()) {
                    whereSqls.add(String.format("%s > ?", primaryKey));
                }
                String pageWhereSql = String.join(" and ", whereSqls);
                pageSql.append(queryTable).append(" where ").append(pageWhereSql).append(" ").append(orderBy).append(" limit ").append(pageSize);
                this.querySqlMap.put(PAGE_SQL_KEY, pageSql.toString());
            }
        } catch (Exception exception) {
            throw new RuntimeException(exception.getMessage());
        }
    }

    public Map<String, String> getQuerySqlMap() {
        return querySqlMap;
    }

    public List<String> getPrimaryColumnNames() {
        return primaryColumnNames;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/quartz/window/WindowQuartzTaskProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/SchedulerTaskCallable.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.util.ReflectionUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.MetricsTagFactory;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2022/10/21
 */
@Slf4j
public class SchedulerTaskCallable implements Runnable {

    private SchedulerTask schedulerTask;

    private final SchedulerTaskProcessor dataProcessor;

    private static final Counter kafkaConsumerCounter = Counter.build()
            .name("scheduler_consumer_process_total")
            .labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id"))
            .help("async calc scheduler consumer process total")
            .register(MetricsCollector.getRegistry());

    public SchedulerTaskCallable(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, SchedulerTaskProcessor dataProcessor) {
        this.schedulerTask = schedulerTask;
        this.dataProcessor = dataProcessor;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            CalcContextData calcContextData = new CalcContextData();
            ReflectionUtils.invokePutData(calcContextData, Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG, schedulerTask);
            this.dataProcessor.process(calcContextData);
            kafkaConsumerCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(Thread.currentThread().getName())).inc();
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            log.error("process scheduler task error", e);
            System.exit(1);
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/SchedulerTaskCallable.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/SchedulerTaskProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task;


import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.*;
import com.akulaku.core.common.SchedulerTaskTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Time;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TaskInfo;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.*;
import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.function.Consumer;
import java.util.function.Function;
import java.util.function.Predicate;

/**
 * @author chenhx
 * @date 2022-069-27 16:33
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class SchedulerTaskProcessor extends DataProcessor {

    protected final List<CalcNode> calcNodes;
    protected final SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig;
    protected ScheduledExecutorService executorService;
    @Getter
    protected final TaskInfo taskInfo;

    protected SchedulerTaskProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(new ProcessorConfig());
        this.calcNodes = new ArrayList<>();
        this.schedulerTaskConfig = schedulerTaskConfig;
        TaskConfig taskConfig = schedulerTaskConfig.getTaskConfig();
        this.taskInfo = new TaskInfo(taskConfig.getTaskName(), taskConfig.getGroupId(), taskConfig.getMaintain(), taskConfig.getDescription());
    }

    @Override
    public void start() {
        this.organizeCalcNodes();

        String taskType = schedulerTaskConfig.getTaskType();
        SchedulerTaskTypeEnum taskTypeEnum = SchedulerTaskTypeEnum.getSchedulerTaskTypeEnum(taskType);
        switch (taskTypeEnum) {
            case SCHEDULER:
            case SCHEDULER_WINDOW:
                Map<String, SchedulerTask> tasks = schedulerTaskConfig.getTasks();
                executorService = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(tasks.size(), new SchedulerTaskThreadFactory());
                for (Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTask> taskEntry : tasks.entrySet()) {
                    SchedulerTask schedulerTask = taskEntry.getValue();
                    if (!schedulerTask.getIsRun()) {
                        //不启动的任务跳过
                        continue;
                    }
                    //设置任务是否从配置文件加载标识
                    schedulerTask.setStartFromConfig(schedulerTaskConfig.getStartFromConfig());
                    //设置二级任务名称
                    schedulerTask.setTaskName(schedulerTaskConfig.getTaskName());
                    schedulerTask.setTask(taskEntry.getKey());
                    if (schedulerTask.getSource() == null) {
                        //如果没有配置任务source，使用任务全局的source配置
                        schedulerTask.setSource(schedulerTaskConfig.getSource());
                    }
                    if (schedulerTask.getSink() == null) {
                        //如果没有配置任务sink，使用任务全局的sink配置
                        schedulerTask.setSink(schedulerTaskConfig.getSink());
                    }
                    Time frequency = schedulerTask.getFrequency();
                    long time = frequency.getTime();
                    TimeUnit timeUnit = frequency.getTimeUnit();
                    SchedulerTaskCallable schedulerTaskCallable = new SchedulerTaskCallable(schedulerTask, this);
                    executorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(schedulerTaskCallable, 1, time, timeUnit);
                }
                break;
            default:
                break;
        }
    }

    @Override
    public final void stop() {
        log.info("shut down ");
        if (executorService != null && !executorService.isShutdown()) {
            //优雅关闭线程池
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(executorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean process(CalcContextData data) throws Exception {
        for (CalcNode calcNode : calcNodes) {
            if (calcNode instanceof FilterCalNode) {
                if (((FilterCalNode) calcNode).isPass(data)) {
                    return false;
                }
            } else {
                calcNode.process(data);
            }
        }
        return true;
    }


    public abstract void organizeCalcNodes();

    /**
     * 添加SQL类算子
     *
     * @param catalog            执行的数据库实例名称
     * @param calcName           算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @param useAheadResultList 使用到之前算子结果的字段名称集合，支持嵌套字段，但字段名称必须与保持结果字段一致，如 "kafka_source_name.rowData.afiUid"
     * @param sql                该算子需要执行的函数，需符合 JDBC 规范
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public SchedulerTaskProcessor addSql(String catalog, String calcName, List<String> useAheadResultList, String sql) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SqlCalcNode(catalog, calcName, useAheadResultList, taskInfo, sql));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加函数类算子
     *
     * @param func     转换函数，返回的结果会存入数据上下文，以便后续算子使用
     * @param calcName 算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public SchedulerTaskProcessor addCalcNode(Function<CalcContextData, Object> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FuncProcessCalNode(func, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加过滤算子
     *
     * @param func     过滤函数，返回结果为true时过滤本条数据处理
     * @param calcName 该算子名称，用于后续算子取出当前算子的计算结果进行使用
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */
    public SchedulerTaskProcessor addFilterNode(Predicate<CalcContextData> func, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new FilterCalNode(func, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j查询算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final SchedulerTaskProcessor addQueryNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new QueryNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加Neo4j插入操作算子
     *
     * @param neo4jCatalog Neo4j实例名称
     * @param calcName     算子名称
     * @param resultName   前序算子返回了Cypher语句集合的算子名称
     */
    public final SchedulerTaskProcessor addSinkNeo4jNode(String neo4jCatalog, String calcName, String resultName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkNeo4jCalNode(neo4jCatalog, calcName, resultName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加消费算子
     *
     * @param consumer 消费函数
     * @param calcName 该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final SchedulerTaskProcessor addConsumerNode(Consumer<CalcContextData> consumer, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new ConsumerCalNode(consumer, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

    /**
     * 添加发送kafka算子
     *
     * @param clusterName kafka集群名称
     * @param topicName   发送topic名称
     * @param dataName    数据在上下文中key的名称
     * @param calcName    该算子名称
     * @return 当前processor对象
     */

    public final SchedulerTaskProcessor addSinkKafkaNode(String clusterName, String topicName, String dataName, String calcName) {
        this.calcNodes.add(new SinkKafkaCalNode(clusterName, topicName, dataName, calcName, taskInfo));
        return this;
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/SchedulerTaskProduceProcessors.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task;

import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.SchedulerTaskTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.common.WindowEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.*;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.task.TaskScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CheckUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.YamlParser;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 周期任务处理器生产者
 */
@Slf4j
public class SchedulerTaskProduceProcessors implements ProduceProcessors {

    @Override
    public List<DataProcessor> produce(TaskConfig taskConfig) throws Exception {
        List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors = new ArrayList<>();
        String taskName = taskConfig.getTaskName();
        String yamlFile = TaskScanner.getTaskConfigYamlFile(taskName);
        SchedulerTaskProcessConfig schedulerTaskProcessConfig = YamlParser.parse(SchedulerTaskProcessConfig.class, yamlFile);
        Map<String, SchedulerTaskConfig> processorConfigs = schedulerTaskProcessConfig.getProcessors();
        for (Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTaskConfig> entry : processorConfigs.entrySet()) {
            String processorName = entry.getKey();
            SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig = entry.getValue();
            String taskType = schedulerTaskConfig.getTaskType();
            CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(taskType == null || "".equals(taskType), "scheduler taskType config can not be null");
            if(SchedulerTaskTypeEnum.isWindow(taskType)){
                Map<String, SchedulerTask> windows = schedulerTaskConfig.getTasks();
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(windows == null || windows.size() <= 0, "window config can not be null");
                for(Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTask> windowEntry : windows.entrySet()){
                    String windowName = windowEntry.getKey();
                    CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(WindowEnum.getWindowEnum(windowName) == null, "window must be same com.akulaku.core.common.WindowEnum");
                }
            }

            if (schedulerTaskConfig.getIsRun()) {
                schedulerTaskConfig.setTaskName(taskName);
                schedulerTaskConfig.setTaskConfig(taskConfig);
                schedulerTaskConfig.setStartFromConfig(Files.exists(Constant.KAFKA_OFFSET_FROM_YAML_PATH));
                String clazz = TaskScanner.getProcessorClass(taskName, processorName);
                Class<?> processorClazz = Class.forName(clazz);
                CheckUtils.isTrueAndExit(!DataProcessor.class.isAssignableFrom(processorClazz), "Processor class must extends core.processor.DataProcessor");
                Constructor<?> constructor = processorClazz.getDeclaredConstructor(SchedulerTaskConfig.class);
                constructor.setAccessible(true);
                DataProcessor dataProcessor = (DataProcessor) constructor.newInstance(schedulerTaskConfig);
                dataProcessors.add(dataProcessor);
            }
        }
        return dataProcessors;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/SchedulerTaskThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class SchedulerTaskThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, "scheduler-task-thread-" + index);
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowInSchedulerSinkDbProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task.window;

import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * 窗口进窗任务-保存到数据库
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public class WindowInSchedulerSinkDbProcessor extends WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor {

    /**
     * 插入数据sql
     */
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> insertSqlMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    /**
     * 表字段缓存
     */
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, List<String>> tableColumnMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    protected WindowInSchedulerSinkDbProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(schedulerTaskConfig);
        //初始化查询出窗数据sql
        Map<String, SchedulerTask> tasks = schedulerTaskConfig.getTasks();
        for (Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTask> taskEntry : tasks.entrySet()) {
            SchedulerTask schedulerTask = taskEntry.getValue();
            if(!schedulerTask.getIsRun()){
                //不启动的任务跳过
                continue;
            }
            String insertSql = this.generateInsertSql(taskEntry.getKey(), schedulerTask.getSink());
            log.info("insert sql:{}", insertSql);
            this.insertSqlMap.put(taskEntry.getKey(), insertSql);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void sinkWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, List<Map<String, Object>> windowInList) throws Exception {
        if(windowInList.size() > 0){
            //封装db数据
            List<List<SqlParam>> batchParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowInList){
                List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
                for(String field : tableColumnMap.get(schedulerTask.getTask())){
                    sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(result.get(field), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                }
                sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis(), SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                batchParams.add(sqlParamList);
            }
            String task = schedulerTask.getTask();
            String insertSql = this.getInsertSqlMap().get(task);
            if(batchParams.size() > 0){
                DbService.insertDbBatch(schedulerTask.getSink().getCatalog(), insertSql, batchParams, 1000, null);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句(可从写)
     * @return
     */
    public String generateInsertSql(String task, Sink sink) {
        List<String> tableColumns;
        List<String> tableUpdateColumns;
        String columns = sink.getColumns();
        String columnClass = sink.getColumnClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columns)) {
            tableColumns = Arrays.stream(columns.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            tableColumnMap.put(task, new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            String duplicateFields = sink.getDuplicateUpdateColumns();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columnClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(columnClass);
            tableColumns = fieldMap.get("fields");
            tableColumnMap.put(task, new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() <= 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
        }
        //补充窗口更新时间
        tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        tableUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable(), tableColumns, tableUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    public ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> getInsertSqlMap() {
        return insertSqlMap;
    }

    public ConcurrentHashMap<String, List<String>> getTableColumnMap() {
        return tableColumnMap;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowInSchedulerSinkDbProcessor.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowInSchedulerSinkKafkaProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task.window;

import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaProducerService;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * 窗口进窗任务-保存到kafka
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public class WindowInSchedulerSinkKafkaProcessor extends WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor {

    protected WindowInSchedulerSinkKafkaProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(schedulerTaskConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void sinkWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, List<Map<String, Object>> windowInList) throws Exception {
        if(windowInList.size() > 0){
            // 封装kafka数据
            Map<String, List<JSONObject>> kafkaDataMap = new HashMap<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowInList){
                JSONObject kafkaData = new JSONObject();
                JSONObject rowData = new JSONObject();
                for(Map.Entry<String, Object> field : result.entrySet()){
                    rowData.put(field.getKey(), field.getValue());
                }
                kafkaData.put("beforeData", "{}");
                kafkaData.put("binlogTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("bizType", schedulerTask.getSource().getBizType());
                kafkaData.put("dataDomain", "feature");
                kafkaData.put("databaseName", schedulerTask.getSource().getSchema());
                kafkaData.put("eventType", EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName().toUpperCase());
                kafkaData.put("messageTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("rowData", rowData);
                kafkaData.put("tableName", schedulerTask.getSource().getTable());
                //不需要设置topic message key，设置为null
                if(kafkaDataMap.containsKey(null)){
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = kafkaDataMap.get(null);
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                } else {
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = new ArrayList<>();
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                    kafkaDataMap.put(null, jsonObjects);
                }
            }
            // 发生出窗数据到kafka
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<JSONObject>> entry : kafkaDataMap.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                List<JSONObject> objectList = entry.getValue();
                if(objectList != null && objectList.size() > 0){
                    for (JSONObject jsonObject : objectList){
                        KafkaProducerService.sendData(schedulerTask.getSink().getCatalog(), schedulerTask.getSink().getTopic(), key, jsonObject.toJSONString());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowInSchedulerSinkKafkaProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowOutSinkDbProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task.window;

import com.akulaku.core.common.WindowEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.util.CommonUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;

import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * 窗口出窗任务-保存到数据库
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
@Getter
public class WindowOutSinkDbProcessor extends WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor {

    /**
     * 插入数据sql
     */
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> insertSqlMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, List<String>> tableColumnMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    protected WindowOutSinkDbProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(schedulerTaskConfig);
        //初始化出窗数据插入sql语句
        Map<String, SchedulerTask> tasks = schedulerTaskConfig.getTasks();
        for (Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTask> taskEntry : tasks.entrySet()) {
            SchedulerTask schedulerTask = taskEntry.getValue();
            if(!schedulerTask.getIsRun()){
                //不启动的任务跳过
                continue;
            }
            String insertSql = this.generateInsertSql(taskEntry.getKey(), schedulerTask.getSink());
            log.info("insert sql:{}", insertSql);
            this.insertSqlMap.put(taskEntry.getKey(), insertSql);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowStartTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long startTime) {
        // 回拨窗口出窗时间
        Long windowTime = WindowEnum.getWindowTime(schedulerTask.getTask());
        return startTime - windowTime;
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowEndTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long endTime) {
        // 回拨窗口出窗时间
        Long windowTime = WindowEnum.getWindowTime(schedulerTask.getTask());
        return endTime - windowTime;
    }

    @Override
    public void sinkWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, List<Map<String, Object>> windowOutList) throws Exception {
        if(windowOutList.size() > 0){
            //封装db数据
            List<List<SqlParam>> batchParams = new ArrayList<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowOutList){
                List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
                for(String field : tableColumnMap.get(schedulerTask.getTask())){
                    sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(result.get(field), SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
                }
                batchParams.add(sqlParamList);
            }
            String task = schedulerTask.getTask();
            String insertSql = this.getInsertSqlMap().get(task);
            if(batchParams.size() > 0){
                DbService.insertDbBatch(schedulerTask.getSink().getCatalog(), insertSql, batchParams, null);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 生成插入sql语句(可从写)
     * @return
     */
    public String generateInsertSql(String task, Sink sink) {
        List<String> tableColumns;
        List<String> tableUpdateColumns;
        String columns = sink.getColumns();
        String columnClass = sink.getColumnClass();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columns)) {
            tableColumns = Arrays.stream(columns.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            tableColumnMap.put(task, new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            String duplicateFields = sink.getDuplicateUpdateColumns();
            if (StringUtils.isBlank(duplicateFields)) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = Arrays.stream(duplicateFields.split(",")).map(String::trim).collect(Collectors.toList());
            }
        } else if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(columnClass)) {
            Map<String, List<String>> fieldMap = CommonUtils.getTableFieldsFromKafkaDataBean(columnClass);
            tableColumns = fieldMap.get("fields");
            tableColumnMap.put(task, new ArrayList<>(tableColumns));
            List<String> list = fieldMap.get("duplicateFields");
            if (list == null || list.size() <= 0) {
                //不指定duplicate update field，全部字段duplicate update
                tableUpdateColumns = new ArrayList<>(tableColumns);
            } else {
                //指定duplicate update field
                tableUpdateColumns = list;
            }
        } else {
            log.error("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
            throw new RuntimeException("配置文件sink.columns或columnClass配置为空!!!");
        }
        //补充窗口更新时间
        tableColumns.add("window_create_time");
        tableColumns.add("window_update_time");
        tableUpdateColumns.add("window_update_time");
        return SqlUtils.generateWindowInsertSql(sink.getSchema() + "." + sink.getTable(), tableColumns, tableUpdateColumns, null);
    }

    public ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> getInsertSqlMap() {
        return insertSqlMap;
    }

    public ConcurrentHashMap<String, List<String>> getTableColumnMap() {
        return tableColumnMap;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowOutSinkDbProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowOutSinkKafkaProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task.window;

import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.common.WindowEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaProducerService;

import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.*;

/**
 * 窗口出窗任务-保存到kafka
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public class WindowOutSinkKafkaProcessor extends WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor {

    protected WindowOutSinkKafkaProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(schedulerTaskConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowStartTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long startTime) {
        // 回拨窗口出窗时间
        Long windowTime = WindowEnum.getWindowTime(schedulerTask.getTask());
        return startTime - windowTime;
    }

    @Override
    public Long getWindowEndTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long endTime) {
        // 回拨窗口出窗时间
        Long windowTime = WindowEnum.getWindowTime(schedulerTask.getTask());
        return endTime - windowTime;
    }

    @Override
    public void sinkWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, List<Map<String, Object>> windowOutList) throws Exception {
        if(windowOutList.size() > 0){
            // 封装kafka数据
            Map<String, List<JSONObject>> kafkaDataMap = new HashMap<>();
            for(Map<String, Object> result : windowOutList){
                JSONObject kafkaData = new JSONObject();
                JSONObject beforeData = new JSONObject();
                for(Map.Entry<String, Object> field : result.entrySet()){
                    beforeData.put(field.getKey(), field.getValue());
                }
                kafkaData.put("beforeData", beforeData);
                kafkaData.put("binlogTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("bizType", schedulerTask.getSource().getBizType());
                kafkaData.put("dataDomain", "feature");
                kafkaData.put("databaseName", schedulerTask.getSource().getSchema());
                kafkaData.put("eventType", EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName().toUpperCase());
                kafkaData.put("messageTime", DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis());
                kafkaData.put("rowData", "{}");
                kafkaData.put("tableName", schedulerTask.getSource().getTable());
                //不需要设置topic message key，设置为null
                if(kafkaDataMap.containsKey(null)){
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = kafkaDataMap.get(null);
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                } else {
                    List<JSONObject> jsonObjects = new ArrayList<>();
                    jsonObjects.add(kafkaData);
                    kafkaDataMap.put(null, jsonObjects);
                }
            }
            // 发生出窗数据到kafka
            for (Map.Entry<String, List<JSONObject>> entry : kafkaDataMap.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                List<JSONObject> objectList = entry.getValue();
                if(objectList != null && objectList.size() > 0){
                    for (JSONObject jsonObject : objectList){
                        KafkaProducerService.sendData(schedulerTask.getSink().getCatalog(), schedulerTask.getSink().getTopic(), key, jsonObject.toJSONString());
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.processor.task.window;

import cn.hutool.core.util.PageUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.TimeWindow;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.SchedulerTaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.scheduler.SchedulerTask;
import com.akulaku.core.config.window.Source;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaStartupModeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.task.SchedulerTaskProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;

import java.sql.Timestamp;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;

/**
 * 窗口周期任务抽象类
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/7/20
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor extends SchedulerTaskProcessor {

    /**
     * 查询出窗数据sql
     */
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> querySqlMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    protected WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor(SchedulerTaskConfig schedulerTaskConfig) {
        super(schedulerTaskConfig);
        //初始化查询出窗数据sql
        Map<String, SchedulerTask> tasks = schedulerTaskConfig.getTasks();
        for (Map.Entry<String, SchedulerTask> taskEntry : tasks.entrySet()) {
            SchedulerTask schedulerTask = taskEntry.getValue();
            if(!schedulerTask.getIsRun()){
                //不启动的任务跳过
                continue;
            }
            schedulerTask.setTask(taskEntry.getKey());
            if(schedulerTask.getSource() == null){
                //如果没有配置任务source，使用任务全局的source配置
                schedulerTask.setSource(schedulerTaskConfig.getSource());
            }
            if(schedulerTask.getSink() == null){
                //如果没有配置任务sink，使用任务全局的sink配置
                schedulerTask.setSink(schedulerTaskConfig.getSink());
            }
            String querySql = this.initQuerySql(schedulerTask);
            log.info("query sql:{}", querySql);
            this.querySqlMap.put(taskEntry.getKey(), querySql);
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addConsumerNode(contextData -> {
            StopWatch stopWatch = new StopWatch();
            stopWatch.start();
            SchedulerTask schedulerTask = (SchedulerTask)contextData.getData(Constant.PROCESSOR_CONFIG);
            Source source = schedulerTask.getSource();
            try{
                //1、获取结束时间
                Long endTime = this.getEndTime(schedulerTask);
                if(endTime == null || endTime <= 0L){
                    log.info("current scheduler data not updated, quit current scheduler");
                    return;
                }
                //2、获取开始时间，判断数据是否更新逻辑
                Long startTime = this.getStartTime(schedulerTask, source.getTable(), endTime);
                if(endTime <= startTime){
                    log.info("current scheduler data not updated, quit current scheduler");
                    return;
                }
                log.info("current scheduler window:{} startTime={} and endTime={}", schedulerTask.getTask(), startTime, endTime);
                //3、获取窗口时间，支持进窗和出窗
                Long windowStartTime = this.getWindowStartTime(schedulerTask, startTime);
                Long windowEndTime = this.getWindowEndTime(schedulerTask,endTime);

                //4、查询出窗数据并保存
                queryWindowData(schedulerTask, windowStartTime, windowEndTime);

                //5、更新出窗窗口
                this.saveCurrentWindow(schedulerTask, source.getTable(), windowStartTime, windowEndTime, endTime);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("current scheduler window:{} query data error, quit", schedulerTask.getTask(), e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
            } finally {
                stopWatch.stop();
                log.info("current scheduler window:{} out task 总耗时：{} Ms", schedulerTask.getTask(), stopWatch.getTime());
            }
        }, "precessData");
    }

    /**
     * 获取开始时间
     * @param schedulerTask
     * @param tableName
     * @param endTime
     * @return
     */
    public Long getStartTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, String tableName, Long endTime) throws Exception{
        long startTime;
        if(schedulerTask.getStartFromConfig()){
            //回拨时间，从配置文件指定时间开始
            schedulerTask.setStartFromConfig(false);
            String startMode = schedulerTask.getStartMode();
            KafkaStartupModeEnum startModeEnum = KafkaStartupModeEnum.getKafkaStartupModeEnum(startMode);
            switch (startModeEnum){
                case LATEST:
                    startTime = endTime - 1;
                    break;
                case EARLIEST:
                    startTime = 0L;
                    break;
                case TIMESTAMP:
                    startTime = schedulerTask.getStartTimeMs();
                    log.info("从配置文件中读取开始时间配置,startTime:{}", startTime);
                    break;
                default:
                    //1、查询上次结束时间
                    TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(schedulerTask.getTaskName(), tableName, schedulerTask.getTask());
                    if(preTimeWindow == null){
                        throw new RuntimeException("指定消费模式不存在");
                    } else {
                        //正常消费，从数据库缓存时间开始
                        startTime = preTimeWindow.getMaxUpdateTime().getTime();
                        log.info("从数据库缓存时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
                    }
                    break;
            }
        } else {
            //1、查询上次结束时间
            TimeWindow preTimeWindow = TimeWindow.getPreTimeWindow(schedulerTask.getTaskName(), tableName, schedulerTask.getTask());
            if(preTimeWindow == null){
                //首次消费，从当前最大时间开始，-1是因为如果startTime=endTime，程序不执行
                startTime = endTime - 1;
                log.info("从当前时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
            } else {
                //正常消费，从数据库缓存时间开始
                startTime = preTimeWindow.getMaxUpdateTime().getTime();
                log.info("从数据库缓存时间开始,startTime:{}", startTime);
            }
        }
        return startTime;
    }

    /**
     * 获取窗口结束时间，默认为当前时间戳（可重写）
     */
    public Long getEndTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask) throws Exception{
        return DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis();
    }

    /**
     * 获取窗口开始时间（可重写）
     */
    public Long getWindowStartTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long startTime){
        return startTime;
    }

    /**
     * 获取窗口结束时间（可重写）
     */
    public Long getWindowEndTime(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long endTime){
        return endTime;
    }

    /**
     * 保存窗口数据
     * @param schedulerTask
     * @param windowStartTime
     * @param windowEndTime
     */
    public void queryWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, Long windowStartTime, Long windowEndTime) throws Exception{
        String task = schedulerTask.getTask();
        Source source = schedulerTask.getSource();
        Boolean pageSwitch = source.getPageSwitch();
        Integer pageSize = source.getPageSize();
        String querySql = this.querySqlMap.get(task);
        while (windowStartTime < windowEndTime){
            long nextTime = windowEndTime > windowStartTime + schedulerTask.getSlidingStepMs() ? windowStartTime + schedulerTask.getSlidingStepMs() : windowEndTime;
            log.info("current scheduler window:{} windowStartTime={} and nextTime={}", task, windowStartTime, nextTime);
            int page = 0;
            while (true){
                StopWatch stopWatch = StopWatch.createStarted();
                List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(windowStartTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(nextTime, SqlParam.DataType.LONG));
                if(pageSwitch){
                    // 分页
                    int[] toStartEnd = PageUtil.transToStartEnd(page, pageSize);
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(toStartEnd[0], SqlParam.DataType.INT));
                    sqlParams.add(new SqlParam(pageSize, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
                    log.info("current scheduler window:{} current pageStart={} and current pageEnd={}", task, toStartEnd[0], toStartEnd[1]);
                }
                List<Map<String, Object>> windowList = DbService.queryDb(source.getCatalog(), querySql, sqlParams, null);
                stopWatch.stop();
                log.info("current scheduler window:{} query window out data 耗时：{} Ms", task, stopWatch.getTime());
                if(windowList.size() <= 0){
                    break;
                }

                log.info("current scheduler window:{} query window out data size:{}", task, windowList.size());
                this.sinkWindowData(schedulerTask, windowList);
                if(pageSwitch && pageSize.equals(windowList.size())){
                    //如果当前数据数量等于分页大小，证明还需要查下一页数据
                    page ++;
                } else {
                    //数据同步完成
                    break;
                }
            }
            windowStartTime = nextTime;
        }
    }

    /**
     * 保存窗口数据
     * @param schedulerTask
     * @param windowList
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public abstract void sinkWindowData(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, List<Map<String, Object>> windowList) throws Exception;

    /**
     * 保存当前窗口结果
     * @param schedulerTask
     * @param tableName
     * @param startTime
     * @param endTime
     * @param businessEndTime
     * @throws Exception
     */
    private void saveCurrentWindow(SchedulerTask schedulerTask, String tableName, Long startTime, Long endTime, Long businessEndTime) throws Exception{
        TimeWindow currentTimeWindow = new TimeWindow(schedulerTask.getTaskName(), tableName, schedulerTask.getTask(),
                new Timestamp(startTime), new Timestamp(endTime), new Timestamp(businessEndTime), new Timestamp(DateUtils.getSystemTimeMillis()));
        TimeWindow.saveTimeWindow(currentTimeWindow);
    }

    /**
     * 初始化查询sql(可重写)
     * @param schedulerTask
     * @return
     */
    public String initQuerySql(SchedulerTask schedulerTask){
        try {
            Source source = schedulerTask.getSource();
            Boolean pageSwitch = source.getPageSwitch();
            String querySql = String.format("select %s from %s.%s where %s >= ? and %s < ?",
                    source.getDataField() != null ? source.getDataField() : "*", source.getSchema(),  source.getTable(),
                    source.getFilterTimeField(), source.getFilterTimeField());
            if(pageSwitch){
                // 分页
                List<String> primaryColumnNameList = SqlUtils.getAutoIncrPrimaryColumnNameList(source.getCatalog(), source.getSchema(), source.getTable());
                String orderBy = String.join(",", primaryColumnNameList);
                querySql = querySql + " order by " + orderBy + " limit ?,?";
            }
            return querySql;
        } catch (Exception exception) {
            throw new RuntimeException(exception.getMessage());
        }
    }

    public ConcurrentHashMap<String, String> getQuerySqlMap() {
        return querySqlMap;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/processor/task/window/WindowSchedulerTaskProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/MetricsCollector.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.domain.LogType;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.PushGatewayLoadBalancer;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics.*;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.util.IPUtils;
import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

public class MetricsCollector {
    private static final String COMMON_TAG_JOB = "job";
    private static final String COMMON_TAG_INSTANCE = "instance";
    private static final String COMMON_TAG_PORT = "port";
    private static final String COMMON_ENV_TYPE = "env_type";
    private static CollectorRegistry registry = new CollectorRegistry();
    private static String envType;
    private static int port;

    private static final int DEFAULT_PUSH_RATE = 30;


    /**
     * 启动监控
     *
     * @param applicationName        应用名
     * @param port                   应用占用的端口
     * @param envType                环境类型，如dev、test、pre、pro等, @see com.aku.prometheus.client.domain.EnvType
     * @param pushGatewayAddressList pushgateway地址列表，多个地址以英文逗号分隔，比如:192.168.3.2,192.168.3.3
     * @param logType                日志类型
     */
    public static void start(String applicationName, int port, String envType, String pushGatewayAddressList, String logType) {
        start(applicationName, port, envType, pushGatewayAddressList, logType, DEFAULT_PUSH_RATE);
    }


    /**
     * 启动监控
     *
     * @param applicationName        应用名
     * @param port                   应用占用的端口
     * @param envType                环境类型，如dev、test、pre、pro等, @see com.aku.prometheus.client.domain.EnvType
     * @param pushGatewayAddressList pushgateway地址列表，多个地址以英文逗号分隔。
     * @param logType                日志类型 @see com.aku.prometheus.client.domain.LogType
     * @param pushRate               向pushgateway推送监控数据的时间间隔
     */
    public static void start(String applicationName, int port, String envType, String pushGatewayAddressList, String logType, int pushRate) {
        MetricsCollector.envType = envType;
        MetricsCollector.port = port;

        setPushGatewayLoadBalancer(applicationName, pushGatewayAddressList, pushRate);

        //start to monitor jvm and log
        if (logType.equals(LogType.LOG4J)) {
            createBaseMetricsCollector(true, false);
        } else if (logType.equals(LogType.LOGBACK)) {
            createBaseMetricsCollector(false, true);
        }

    }

    private static void createBaseMetricsCollector(boolean enableLog4j, boolean enableLogback) {
        JvmGcMetrics jvmGcMetrics = new JvmGcMetrics();
        jvmGcMetrics.bindTo(registry);

        JvmThreadMetrics jvmThreadMetrics = new JvmThreadMetrics();
        jvmThreadMetrics.bindTo(registry);

        JvmMemoryMetrics jvmMemoryMetrics = new JvmMemoryMetrics();
        jvmMemoryMetrics.bindTo(registry);

        ProcessorMetrics processorMetrics = new ProcessorMetrics();
        processorMetrics.bindTo(registry);

        if (enableLogback) {
            LogbackMetrics logbackMetrics = new LogbackMetrics();
            logbackMetrics.bindTo(registry);
        }
    }


    /**
     * 设置pushgateway负载均衡器。
     *
     * @param applicationName      应用名
     * @param pushGatewayAddresses pushgateway地址列表，多个地址以英文逗号分隔。
     * @param pushRate             向pushgateway推送监控数据的时间间隔
     */
    private static void setPushGatewayLoadBalancer(String applicationName, String pushGatewayAddresses, int pushRate) {
        Map<String, String> groupingKey = new HashMap<>();

        groupingKey.put(COMMON_TAG_JOB, IPUtils.getLocalIpAddr());
        groupingKey.put(COMMON_TAG_INSTANCE, IPUtils.getLocalIpAddr());
        groupingKey.put(COMMON_TAG_PORT, port + "");
        groupingKey.put(COMMON_ENV_TYPE, envType);


        new PushGatewayLoadBalancer(registry, pushRate, applicationName, groupingKey, pushGatewayAddresses);
    }

    public static String getEnvType() {
        return envType;
    }

    public static int getPort() {
        return port;
    }

    public static CollectorRegistry getRegistry() {
        return registry;
    }


}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/lang/NonNull.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.lang;

import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
import javax.annotation.meta.TypeQualifierNickname;
import java.lang.annotation.*;

/**
 * A common annotation to declare that annotated elements cannot be {@code null}.
 * Leverages JSR 305 meta-annotations to indicate nullability in Java to common tools with
 * JSR 305 support and used by Kotlin to infer nullability of the API.
 * <p>Should be used at parameter, return value, and field level. Method overrides should
 * repeat parent {@code @NonNull} annotations unless they behave differently.
 * <p>Use {@code @NonNullApi} (scope = parameters + return values) and/or {@code @NonNullFields}
 * (scope = fields) to set the default behavior to non-nullable in order to avoid annotating
 * your whole codebase with {@code @NonNull}.
 *
 * @see NonNullApi
 * @see NonNullFields
 * @see Nullable
 */
@Target({ElementType.METHOD, ElementType.PARAMETER, ElementType.FIELD})
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Documented
@Nonnull
@TypeQualifierNickname
public @interface NonNull {
}

```

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.lang;

import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
import javax.annotation.meta.TypeQualifierDefault;
import java.lang.annotation.*;

/**
 * A common annotation to declare that parameters and return values
 * are to be considered as non-nullable by default for a given package.
 * <p>Leverages JSR-305 meta-annotations to indicate nullability in Java to common
 * tools with JSR-305 support and used by Kotlin to infer nullability of the API.
 * <p>Should be used at package level in association with {@link Nullable}
 * annotations at parameter and return value level.
 *
 * @see NonNullFields
 * @see Nullable
 * @see NonNull
 */
@Target({ElementType.PACKAGE, ElementType.TYPE})
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Documented
@Nonnull
@TypeQualifierDefault({ElementType.METHOD, ElementType.PARAMETER})
public @interface NonNullApi {
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/lang/Nullable.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.lang;

import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
import javax.annotation.meta.TypeQualifierNickname;
import javax.annotation.meta.When;
import java.lang.annotation.*;

/**
 * A common annotation to declare that annotated elements can be {@code null} under
 * some circumstance. Leverages JSR 305 meta-annotations to indicate nullability in Java
 * to common tools with JSR 305 support and used by Kotlin to infer nullability of the API.
 * <p>Should be used at parameter, return value, and field level. Methods override should
 * repeat parent {@code @Nullable} annotations unless they behave differently.
 * <p>Can be used in association with {@code NonNullApi} or {@code @NonNullFields} to
 * override the default non-nullable semantic to nullable.
 *
 * @see NonNullApi
 * @see NonNullFields
 * @see NonNull
 */
@Target({ElementType.METHOD, ElementType.PARAMETER, ElementType.FIELD})
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Documented
@Nonnull(when = When.MAYBE)
@TypeQualifierNickname
public @interface Nullable {
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/PushGatewayLoadBalancer.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.config.PrometheusPushGatewayManager;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.util.SocketUtil;
import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.exporter.PushGateway;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;


/**
 * pushgateway的负载均衡器实现
 * <p>
 * 解决的问题：同一个应用实例同时向多个pushgateway推送数据，Prometheus同时从多个pushgateway拉取数据时，聚合后的数据出现数据混乱。
 * 举例：
 * 应用统计计数指标，依次向pushgateway01发送count=10，向pushgateway02发送count=100,向pushgateway03发送count=1000。此时，Prometheus启动三个线程同时向pushgateway拉取count指标，最终获取到的数据顺序是乱序的，比如可能是1000，100，10，那么展示到grafana上的数据就是一条向下的曲线，而本应该是一条向上的曲线。
 * 方案描述：
 * 应用启动后先尝试从本地磁盘获取pushgateway地址，如果获取不到则先从Apollo配置中心获取pushgateway集群的IP地址列表，然后采用随机算法选择一个pushgateway地址，确定选择前应使用telnet测试pushgateway进程是否存在，最后确认已选择的pushgateway健康状态正常后对pushgateway进行连接发送数据，并将已选择的pushgateway的地址持久化到本地磁盘；
 * 应用的触发重新选择pushgateway的条件：应用向已选择的pushgateway发送数据失败3次以上；
 * 应用切换pushgateway的条件：应用已选择的pushgateway进程挂死；
 * 为了保证pushgateway进程挂掉后滞留的数据影响数据的正确性，则需要将集群中所有pushgateway设置为重启清空本地数据（假设Prometheus 5s拉取一次pushagateway的数据，应用推送监控数据频率为10s，最多尝试3次，重新选择pushgateway定时任务频率为30s，则理论上pushagateway重启会丢失最大65s(=5s + 3*10s + 30s)的监控数据）；
 * <p>
 * 本方案特点：保证pushgateway高可用，可扩展；在可容忍的范围内丢失监控数据。
 * 可进一步改进点：pushgateway注册到Nacos注册中心，应用从Nacos中获取pushgateway地址列表，实现服务自动发现。
 */
public class PushGatewayLoadBalancer implements Runnable {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PushGatewayLoadBalancer.class);

    private CollectorRegistry registry;
    private int pushRate;
    private String job;
    private Map<String, String> groupingKeys;

    private static final long TIMER_DELAY = 10;
    private static final long TIMER_RATE = 30;


    private String selectedPushGateway = null;

    private PrometheusPushGatewayManager currentPrometheusPushGatewayManager;

    private PushGatewaySelector pushGatewaySelector = new PushGatewaySelector();

    private String staticPushGatewayAddresses;

    public static volatile boolean reSelect = true;

    private ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(1);


    public PushGatewayLoadBalancer(CollectorRegistry registry, int pushRate, String job, Map<String, String> groupingKeys, String staticPushGatewayAddresses) {
        this.registry = registry;
        this.pushRate = pushRate;
        this.job = job;
        this.groupingKeys = groupingKeys;
        this.staticPushGatewayAddresses = staticPushGatewayAddresses;
        logger.info("Push gateway address list is {}", staticPushGatewayAddresses);
        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(this, TIMER_DELAY, TIMER_RATE, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }


    @Override
    public void run() {
        if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(selectedPushGateway)) {
            logger.debug("The current selected push gateway is {}, Re select the push gateway is {}", selectedPushGateway, reSelect);
        }

        try {
            int tryCounter = 0;
            if (reSelect) {
                while (tryCounter++ < 3) {
                    //从Apollo配置中心读取
                    String pushGatewayAddress = pushGatewaySelector.select(staticPushGatewayAddresses);
                    if (StringUtils.isEmpty(pushGatewayAddress)) {
                        return;
                    }

                    boolean isHealthy = isHealthy(pushGatewayAddress);
                    if (!isHealthy) {
                        logger.warn("The push gateway {} is not healthy.", pushGatewayAddress);
                    } else {
                        //logger.info("The push gateway {} is healthy.Then choose it to push metrics.", pushGatewayAddress);
                        selectedPushGateway = pushGatewayAddress;
                        PushGateway pushGateway = new PushGateway(pushGatewayAddress);
                        this.currentPrometheusPushGatewayManager = new PrometheusPushGatewayManager(pushGateway, registry,
                                pushRate, job, groupingKeys, pushGatewayAddress);
                        reSelect = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (Throwable ex) {
            logger.error("push gateway error", ex);
        }
    }


    /**
     * 检查pushgateway是否健康
     *
     * @param pushGatewayAddress pushgateway地址，格式为:$ip:$port
     * @return true 健康；false 不健康
     */
    private boolean isHealthy(String pushGatewayAddress) {
        try {
            String[] addressArr = pushGatewayAddress.split(Separators.COLON);

            //检查pushGateway的进程是否存活
            boolean isProcessSurvivor = SocketUtil.testConnection(addressArr[0].trim(), Integer.parseInt(addressArr[1].trim()));

            return isProcessSurvivor;
        } catch (Exception ex) {
            logger.warn("Checking the pushgateway status occurs exception.", ex);
            return false;
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/PushGatewayLoadBalancer.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/PushGatewaySelector.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.util.IPUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.util.Random;

public class PushGatewaySelector {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PushGatewaySelector.class);

    private String lastChoosePushGateway = null;

    /**
     * 选择一个pushgateway
     *
     * @param pushGatewayAddressList pushgateway 地址列表
     * @return 被选中的pushgateway地址
     */
    public String select(String pushGatewayAddressList) {
        if (StringUtils.isEmpty(pushGatewayAddressList)) {
            logger.warn("No push gateway addresses available!");

            return null;
        }
        String[] pushGatewayAddresses = pushGatewayAddressList.split(Separators.COMMA);

        //最少使用算法选择
        String pushGatewayAddress = randomSelect(pushGatewayAddresses);

        String appServer = IPUtils.getLocalIpAddr() + ":" + MetricsCollector.getPort();
        logger.debug("The node [{}] has been routed to the push gateway[{}]", appServer, pushGatewayAddress);

        return pushGatewayAddress.trim();
    }


    /**
     * 随机选择一个pushgateway地址，排除上一次已测试不通的地址。
     *
     * @param pushGatewayAddresses pushgateway地址列表
     * @return 随机选择的pushgateway地址
     */
    private String randomSelect(String[] pushGatewayAddresses) {
        if (pushGatewayAddresses.length == 1) {
            return pushGatewayAddresses[0];
        }

        String pushGatewayAddress = null;
        while (pushGatewayAddress == null) {
            int randomIndex = new Random().nextInt(pushGatewayAddresses.length);
            logger.debug("Random index is {}", randomIndex);
            pushGatewayAddress = pushGatewayAddresses[randomIndex];
            if (pushGatewayAddress.equals(lastChoosePushGateway)) {
                pushGatewayAddress = null;
            } else {
                lastChoosePushGateway = pushGatewayAddress;
                break;
            }
        }
        return pushGatewayAddress;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/PushGatewaySelector.java**

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer;

public interface Separators {
    //冒号分隔符
    String COLON = ":";

    String SLASH = "/";

    String COMMA = ",";
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/config/PrometheusPushGatewayManager.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.config;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.PushGatewayLoadBalancer;
import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.exporter.PushGateway;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

public class PrometheusPushGatewayManager implements Runnable {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PrometheusPushGatewayManager.class);
    private final PushGateway pushGateway;
    private final CollectorRegistry registry;
    private final String job;
    private final Map<String, String> groupingKey;
    private final String pushGatewayAddress;

    private int failCount = 1;
    private static final int MAX_FAIL_COUNT = 3;

    private static final long TIMER_DELAY = 5;

    private boolean isAvailable = true;

    private long pushRateX;


    public PrometheusPushGatewayManager(PushGateway pushGateway, CollectorRegistry registry, int pushRate, String job, Map<String, String> groupingKey, String pushGatewayAddress) {
        pushRateX = pushRate;

        this.pushGateway = pushGateway;
        this.registry = registry;
        this.job = job;
        this.groupingKey = groupingKey;
        this.pushGatewayAddress = pushGatewayAddress;

        Thread thread = new Thread(this);
        thread.setDaemon(true);
        thread.start();
    }

    /**
     * 向pushgateway推送数据
     */
    private void push() {

        try {
            logger.debug("push data to push gateway:{}!thread-id = {}", pushGatewayAddress, Thread.currentThread().getId());
            this.pushGateway.pushAdd(this.registry, this.job, this.groupingKey);
            failCount = 1;
        } catch (Throwable ex) {
            logger.error("Unable to push metrics to Prometheus push gateway({}): {}.The #{} try.", pushGatewayAddress, ex.getMessage(), failCount);

            if (failCount >= MAX_FAIL_COUNT) {
                logger.info("The count of failure is larger than {}, Re select the push gateway", MAX_FAIL_COUNT);
                this.isAvailable = false;
                PushGatewayLoadBalancer.reSelect = true;
            }
            failCount++;
        }

    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(TIMER_DELAY);

            while (isAvailable) {
                push();
                TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(pushRateX);
            }
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
}
```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/config/PrometheusPushGatewayManager.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/loadbalancer/config/PushgatewayProperties.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.config;

import java.time.Duration;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

public class PushgatewayProperties {

    /**
     * Enable publishing via a Prometheus Pushgateway.
     */
    private Boolean enabled = false;

    /**
     * Base URL for the Pushgateway.
     */
    private String baseUrl = "localhost:9091";

    /**
     * 配置静态的Pushgateway静态地址列表，格式：ip1:port1,ip2:port2...，适用于无法从配置中心读取配置
     */
    private String staticPushGatewayAddrs;

    /**
     * Frequency with which to push metrics.
     */
    private Duration pushRate = Duration.ofMinutes(1);


    /**
     * 促发自定义的数据推送频率
     */
    private Boolean enableSelfPushRate = false;

    /**
     * Job identifier for this application instance.
     */
    private String job;

    /**
     * Grouping key for the pushed metrics.
     */
    private Map<String, String> groupingKey = new HashMap<>();


    public Boolean getEnabled() {
        return this.enabled;
    }

    public void setEnabled(Boolean enabled) {
        this.enabled = enabled;
    }

    public String getBaseUrl() {
        return this.baseUrl;
    }

    public void setBaseUrl(String baseUrl) {
        this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
    }

    public String getStaticPushGatewayAddrs() {
        return staticPushGatewayAddrs;
    }

    public void setStaticPushGatewayAddrs(String staticPushGatewayAddrs) {
        this.staticPushGatewayAddrs = staticPushGatewayAddrs;
    }

    public Duration getPushRate() {
        return this.pushRate;
    }

    public void setPushRate(Duration pushRate) {
        this.pushRate = pushRate;
    }

    public String getJob() {
        return this.job;
    }

    public void setJob(String job) {
        this.job = job;
    }

    public Map<String, String> getGroupingKey() {
        return this.groupingKey;
    }

    public void setGroupingKey(Map<String, String> groupingKey) {
        this.groupingKey = groupingKey;
    }

    public Boolean getEnableSelfPushRate() {
        return enableSelfPushRate;
    }

    public void setEnableSelfPushRate(Boolean enableSelfPushRate) {
        this.enableSelfPushRate = enableSelfPushRate;
    }
}
```
