### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/JvmGcMetrics.java 

```java
/**
 * Copyright 2017 Pivotal Software, Inc.
 * <p>
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
 * <p>
 * http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
 * <p>
 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
 * limitations under the License.
 */
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import com.sun.management.GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo;
import com.sun.management.GcInfo;
import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import io.prometheus.client.Gauge;
import io.prometheus.client.Summary;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import javax.management.NotificationEmitter;
import javax.management.openmbean.CompositeData;
import java.lang.management.GarbageCollectorMXBean;
import java.lang.management.ManagementFactory;
import java.lang.management.MemoryPoolMXBean;
import java.lang.management.MemoryUsage;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;

/**
 * Generalization of which parts of the heap are considered "young" or "old" for multiple GC implementations
 */
enum GcGenerationAge {
    OLD,
    YOUNG,
    UNKNOWN;
    private static Map<String, GcGenerationAge> knownCollectors = new HashMap<String, GcGenerationAge>() {{
        put("ConcurrentMarkSweep", OLD);
        put("Copy", YOUNG);
        put("G1 Old Generation", OLD);
        put("G1 Young Generation", YOUNG);
        put("MarkSweepCompact", OLD);
        put("PS MarkSweep", OLD);
        put("PS Scavenge", YOUNG);
        put("ParNew", YOUNG);
    }};

    static GcGenerationAge fromName(String name) {
        GcGenerationAge t = knownCollectors.get(name);
        return (t == null) ? UNKNOWN : t;
    }
}

/**
 * Record metrics that report a number of statistics related to garbage
 * collection emanating from the MXBean and also adds information about GC causes.
 *
 * @see GarbageCollectorMXBean
 */
public class JvmGcMetrics implements MeterBinder {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(JvmGcMetrics.class);

    private boolean managementExtensionsPresent = isManagementExtensionsPresent();

    private String youngGenPoolName;

    private String oldGenPoolName;

    public JvmGcMetrics() {
        for (MemoryPoolMXBean mbean : ManagementFactory.getMemoryPoolMXBeans()) {
            if (isYoungGenPool(mbean.getName()))
                youngGenPoolName = mbean.getName();
            if (isOldGenPool(mbean.getName()))
                oldGenPoolName = mbean.getName();
        }
    }

    private static boolean isManagementExtensionsPresent() {
        try {
            Class.forName("com.sun.management.GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo", false,
                    JvmGcMetrics.class.getClassLoader());
            return true;
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            // We are operating in a JVM without access to this level of detail
            logger.warn("GC notifications will not be available because " +
                    "com.sun.management.GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo is not present");
            return false;
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        Gauge maxDataSize = Gauge.build().name("jvm_gc_max_data_size_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("Max size of old generation memory pool").register(registry);
        Gauge liveDataSize = Gauge.build().name("jvm_gc_live_data_size_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("Size of old generation memory pool after a full GC").register(registry);
        Counter promotedBytes = Counter.build()
                .name("jvm_gc_memory_promoted_bytes_total").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("Count of positive increases in the size of the old generation memory pool before GC to after GC").register(registry);
        Counter allocatedBytes = Counter.build()
                .name("jvm_gc_memory_allocated_bytes_total").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("Incremented for an increase in the size of the young generation memory pool after one GC to before the next").register(registry);


        Summary concurrent_phase_time = Summary.build()
                .name("jvm_gc_concurrent_phase_time").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("action", "cause")).help("Time spent in concurrent phase.").register(registry);

        Summary gc_pause = Summary.build()
                .name("jvm_gc_pause_seconds").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("action", "cause")).help("Time spent in GC pause").register(registry);


        if (this.managementExtensionsPresent) {
            // start watching for GC notifications
            final AtomicLong youngGenSizeAfter = new AtomicLong(0L);

            for (GarbageCollectorMXBean mbean : ManagementFactory.getGarbageCollectorMXBeans()) {
                if (mbean instanceof NotificationEmitter) {
                    ((NotificationEmitter) mbean).addNotificationListener((notification, ref) -> {
                        final String type = notification.getType();
                        if (type.equals(GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo.GARBAGE_COLLECTION_NOTIFICATION)) {
                            CompositeData cd = (CompositeData) notification.getUserData();
                            GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo notificationInfo = GarbageCollectionNotificationInfo.from(cd);

                            if (isConcurrentPhase(notificationInfo.getGcCause())) {
                                concurrent_phase_time.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(notificationInfo.getGcAction(), notificationInfo.getGcCause())).observe(notificationInfo.getGcInfo().getDuration());
                            } else {
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(notificationInfo.getGcAction()) && StringUtils.isNotEmpty(notificationInfo.getGcCause())) {
                                    gc_pause.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(notificationInfo.getGcAction(), notificationInfo.getGcCause())).observe(notificationInfo.getGcInfo().getDuration());
                                }
                            }

                            GcInfo gcInfo = notificationInfo.getGcInfo();

                            // Update promotion and allocation counters
                            final Map<String, MemoryUsage> before = gcInfo.getMemoryUsageBeforeGc();
                            final Map<String, MemoryUsage> after = gcInfo.getMemoryUsageAfterGc();

                            if (oldGenPoolName != null) {
                                final long oldBefore = before.get(oldGenPoolName).getUsed();
                                final long oldAfter = after.get(oldGenPoolName).getUsed();

                                final long delta = oldAfter - oldBefore;
                                if (delta > 0L) {
                                    promotedBytes.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).inc(delta);
                                }

                                // Some GC implementations such as G1 can reduce the old gen size as part of a minor GC. To track the
                                // live data size we record the value if we see a reduction in the old gen heap size or
                                // after a major GC.
                                if (oldAfter < oldBefore || GcGenerationAge.fromName(notificationInfo.getGcName()) == GcGenerationAge.OLD) {
                                    liveDataSize.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(oldAfter);

                                    final long oldMaxAfter = after.get(oldGenPoolName).getMax();
                                    maxDataSize.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(oldMaxAfter);
                                }
                            }

                            if (youngGenPoolName != null) {
                                final long youngBefore = before.get(youngGenPoolName).getUsed();
                                final long youngAfter = after.get(youngGenPoolName).getUsed();
                                final long delta = youngBefore - youngGenSizeAfter.get();
                                youngGenSizeAfter.set(youngAfter);
                                if (delta > 0L) {
                                    allocatedBytes.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).inc(delta);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }, null, null);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private boolean isConcurrentPhase(String cause) {
        return "No GC".equals(cause);
    }

    private boolean isOldGenPool(String name) {
        return name.endsWith("Old Gen") || name.endsWith("Tenured Gen");
    }

    private boolean isYoungGenPool(String name) {
        return name.endsWith("Eden Space");
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/JvmGcMetrics.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/JvmMemoryMetrics.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.Gauge;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.lang.management.BufferPoolMXBean;
import java.lang.management.ManagementFactory;
import java.lang.management.MemoryPoolMXBean;
import java.lang.management.MemoryType;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

public class JvmMemoryMetrics implements Runnable, MeterBinder {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(JvmMemoryMetrics.class);

    private static final long TIMER_DELAY = 10;
    private static final long TIMER_RATE = 20;
    private static Gauge jvmBufferCount;
    private static Gauge jvmBufferMemoryUsed;
    private static Gauge jvmBufferTotalCapacity;
    private static Gauge jvmMemoryUsed;
    private static Gauge jvmMemoryCommitted;
    private static Gauge jvmMemoryMax;

    private ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(1);

    @Override
    public void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        jvmBufferCount = Gauge.build().name("jvm_buffer_count_buffers").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("An estimate of the number of buffers in the pool").register(registry);
        jvmBufferMemoryUsed = Gauge.build().name("jvm_buffer_memory_used_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("An estimate of the memory that the Java virtual machine is using for this buffer pool").register(registry);
        jvmBufferTotalCapacity = Gauge.build().name("jvm_buffer_total_capacity_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("An estimate of the total capacity of the buffers in this pool").register(registry);
        jvmMemoryUsed = Gauge.build().name("jvm_memory_used_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id", "area")).help("The amount of used memory").register(registry);
        jvmMemoryCommitted = Gauge.build().name("jvm_memory_committed_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id", "area")).help("The amount of memory in bytes that is committed for the Java virtual machine to use").register(registry);
        jvmMemoryMax = Gauge.build().name("jvm_memory_max_bytes").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("id", "area")).help("The maximum amount of memory in bytes that can be used for memory management").register(registry);
        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(this, TIMER_DELAY, TIMER_RATE, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }


    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            reportMetrics();
        } catch (Throwable ex) {
            logger.error("Report memory metrics failure.Exception msg = {}", ex.getMessage());
        }
    }

    private void reportMetrics() {
        for (BufferPoolMXBean bufferPoolBean : ManagementFactory.getPlatformMXBeans(BufferPoolMXBean.class)) {
            jvmBufferCount.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(bufferPoolBean.getCount());
            jvmBufferMemoryUsed.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(bufferPoolBean.getMemoryUsed());
            jvmBufferTotalCapacity.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(bufferPoolBean.getTotalCapacity());
        }

        for (MemoryPoolMXBean memoryPoolBean : ManagementFactory.getPlatformMXBeans(MemoryPoolMXBean.class)) {
            String area = MemoryType.HEAP.equals(memoryPoolBean.getType()) ? "heap" : "nonheap";
            String id = memoryPoolBean.getName();
            jvmMemoryUsed.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(id, area)).set(memoryPoolBean.getUsage().getUsed());
            jvmMemoryCommitted.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(id, area)).set(memoryPoolBean.getUsage().getCommitted());
            jvmMemoryMax.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(id, area)).set(memoryPoolBean.getUsage().getMax());
        }
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/JvmThreadMetrics.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.Gauge;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.lang.management.ManagementFactory;
import java.lang.management.ThreadInfo;
import java.lang.management.ThreadMXBean;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;

public class JvmThreadMetrics implements Runnable, MeterBinder {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(JvmThreadMetrics.class);

    private static final long TIMER_DELAY = 10;
    private static final long TIMER_RATE = 20;
    private static final Map<String, AtomicLong> memUsages = new HashMap<>();
    private static Gauge jvmThreadsPeak;
    private static Gauge jvmThreadsDaemon;
    private static Gauge jvmThreadsLive;
    private static Gauge jvmThreadsState;

    private ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(1);

    @Override
    public void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        jvmThreadsPeak = Gauge.build().name("jvm_threads_peak").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The peak live thread count since the Java virtual machine started or peak was reset").register(registry);
        jvmThreadsDaemon = Gauge.build().name("jvm_threads_daemon").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The current number of live daemon threads").register(registry);
        jvmThreadsLive = Gauge.build().name("jvm_threads_live").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The current number of live threads including both daemon and non-daemon threads").register(registry);
        jvmThreadsState = Gauge.build().name("jvm_threads_states_threads").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("state")).help("jvm thread state metrics").register(registry);


        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(this, TIMER_DELAY, TIMER_RATE, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }


    public void reportJvmThreadStateMetrics() {
        jvmThreadsPeak.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean().getPeakThreadCount());
        jvmThreadsDaemon.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean().getDaemonThreadCount());
        jvmThreadsLive.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean().getThreadCount());

        Map<Thread.State, Integer> threadStateCounterMap = statisticalThreadStates();
        threadStateCounterMap.entrySet().stream().forEach(entry -> {
            Thread.State state = entry.getKey();
            Integer counter = entry.getValue();

            jvmThreadsState.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues(state.toString())).set(counter);
        });
    }


    /**
     * 按状态进行线程数统计
     *
     * @return
     */
    private Map<Thread.State, Integer> statisticalThreadStates() {
        long[] threadIdList = getAllThreadIds();

        if (threadIdList == null || threadIdList.length == 0) {
            logger.debug("No thread is running.");
            return null;
        }

        Map<Thread.State, Integer> threadStateCounterMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (long threadId : threadIdList) {
            Thread.State state = getThreadState(threadId);
            if (state == null) {
                continue;
            }

            if (threadStateCounterMap.containsKey(state)) {
                Integer counter = threadStateCounterMap.get(state);
                ++counter;
                threadStateCounterMap.put(state, counter);
            } else {
                Integer counter = 1;
                threadStateCounterMap.put(state, counter);
            }
        }

        return threadStateCounterMap;
    }

    /**
     * 获取所有的线程Id
     *
     * @return
     */
    private long[] getAllThreadIds() {
        ThreadMXBean threadBean = ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean();
        return threadBean.getAllThreadIds();
    }

    /**
     * 根据线程Id获取其状态
     *
     * @param id 线程Id
     * @return 线程状态
     */
    private Thread.State getThreadState(long id) {
        ThreadMXBean threadBean = ManagementFactory.getThreadMXBean();

        ThreadInfo threadInfo = threadBean.getThreadInfo(id);

        if (threadInfo != null) {
            if (threadInfo.getThreadState() == Thread.State.BLOCKED) {
                logger.debug("The blocked thread is {}", threadInfo.toString());
            }

            return threadInfo.getThreadState();
        }

        return null;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            reportJvmThreadStateMetrics();
        } catch (Throwable ex) {
            logger.error("Report jvm thread state metrics failure.Exception msg = {}", ex.getMessage());
        }
    }


}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/LogbackMetrics.java 

```java
/**
 * Copyright 2017 Pivotal Software, Inc.
 * <p>
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
 * <p>
 * http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
 * <p>
 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
 * limitations under the License.
 */
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import ch.qos.logback.classic.Level;
import ch.qos.logback.classic.Logger;
import ch.qos.logback.classic.LoggerContext;
import ch.qos.logback.classic.turbo.TurboFilter;
import ch.qos.logback.core.spi.FilterReply;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.lang.NonNullApi;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.lang.NonNullFields;
import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.Counter;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.slf4j.Marker;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;


@NonNullApi
@NonNullFields
public class LogbackMetrics implements MeterBinder, AutoCloseable {

    static List<String> ignoreMetricsThreads = new ArrayList<>();

    private final LoggerContext loggerContext;

    private MetricsTurboFilter metricsTurboFilter;

    public LogbackMetrics() {
        this((LoggerContext) LoggerFactory.getILoggerFactory());
    }

    public LogbackMetrics(LoggerContext context) {
        this.loggerContext = context;
    }

    public static void setIgnoreMetricsThreads(List<String> ignoreMetricsThreads) {
        LogbackMetrics.ignoreMetricsThreads = ignoreMetricsThreads;
    }

    @Override
    public void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        MetricsTurboFilter filter = new MetricsTurboFilter(registry);
        this.metricsTurboFilter = filter;
        loggerContext.addTurboFilter(filter);
    }

    @Override
    public void close() {
        loggerContext.getTurboFilterList().remove(metricsTurboFilter);
    }
}

@NonNullApi
@NonNullFields
class MetricsTurboFilter extends TurboFilter {
    private static final String METER_NAME = "logback_events_total";

    private final Counter logEventCounter;

    MetricsTurboFilter(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        logEventCounter = Counter.build().name(METER_NAME).labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys("level"))
                .help("Number of error level events that made it to the logs")
                .register(registry);
    }

    @Override
    public FilterReply decide(Marker marker, Logger logger, Level level, String format, Object[] params, Throwable t) {
        String currentThreadName = Thread.currentThread().getName();
        for (String ignoreMetricsThread : LogbackMetrics.ignoreMetricsThreads) {
            if (StringUtils.containsIgnoreCase(currentThreadName, ignoreMetricsThread)) {
                return FilterReply.NEUTRAL;
            }
        }

        // cannot use logger.isEnabledFor(level), as it would cause a StackOverflowError by calling this filter again!
        if (level.isGreaterOrEqual(logger.getEffectiveLevel()) && format != null) {
            switch (level.toInt()) {
                case Level.ERROR_INT:
                    logEventCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues("error")).inc();
                    break;
                case Level.WARN_INT:
                    logEventCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues("warn")).inc();
                    break;
                case Level.INFO_INT:
                    logEventCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues("info")).inc();
                    break;
                case Level.DEBUG_INT:
                    logEventCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues("debug")).inc();
                    break;
                case Level.TRACE_INT:
                    logEventCounter.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues("trace")).inc();
                    break;
            }
        }

        return FilterReply.NEUTRAL;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/MeterBinder.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;

/**
 * Binders register one or more metrics to provide information about the state
 * of some aspect of the application or its container.
 * <p>
 * Binders are enabled by default if they source data for an alert
 * that is recommended for a production ready app.
 */
public interface MeterBinder {
    void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry);
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/MetricsTagFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.MetricsCollector;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;

public class MetricsTagFactory {
    private static final String[] COMMON_KEYS = new String[]{"env_type", "port"};

    /**
     * 获取tag的key列表
     * @param additionalKeys 除了公共的tag key之外的自定义的tag key列表
     * @return tag的key列表
     */
    public static String[] getTagKeys(String... additionalKeys) {
        List<String> tagKeys = new ArrayList<>(Arrays.asList(COMMON_KEYS));

        if (additionalKeys != null) {
            tagKeys.addAll(Arrays.asList(additionalKeys));
        }

        String[] tagKeyArr = new String[tagKeys.size()];
        return tagKeys.toArray(tagKeyArr);
    }

    /**
     * 获取tag的value列表
     * @param additionalValues 除了公共的tag value之外的自定义的tag value列表
     * @return tag的value列表
     */
    public static String[] getTagValues(String... additionalValues) {
        List<String> tagValues = new ArrayList<>(Arrays.asList(getCommonTagValues()));

        if (additionalValues != null) {
            tagValues.addAll(Arrays.asList(additionalValues));
        }

        String[] tagValuesArr = new String[tagValues.size()];
        return tagValues.toArray(tagValuesArr);
    }

    private static String[] getCommonTagValues() {
        return new String[]{StringUtils.isNotEmpty(MetricsCollector.getEnvType()) ? MetricsCollector.getEnvType() : "dev", MetricsCollector.getPort()+""};
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/ProcessorMetrics.java 

```java
/**
 * Copyright 2017 Pivotal Software, Inc.
 * <p>
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
 * <p>
 * http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
 * <p>
 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
 * limitations under the License.
 */
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import io.prometheus.client.CollectorRegistry;
import io.prometheus.client.Gauge;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.lang.management.ManagementFactory;
import java.lang.management.OperatingSystemMXBean;
import java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException;
import java.lang.reflect.Method;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

import static java.util.Objects.requireNonNull;

/**
 * Record metrics related to the CPU, gathered by the JVM.
 * <p>
 * Supported JVM implementations:
 * <ul>
 *     <li>HotSpot</li>
 *     <li>J9</li>
 * </ul>
 */
public class ProcessorMetrics implements Runnable, MeterBinder {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ProcessorMetrics.class);

    private static final long TIMER_DELAY = 10;
    private static final long TIMER_RATE = 20;
    /**
     * List of public, exported interface class names from supported JVM implementations.
     */
    private static final List<String> OPERATING_SYSTEM_BEAN_CLASS_NAMES = Arrays.asList(
            "com.sun.management.OperatingSystemMXBean", // HotSpot
            "com.ibm.lang.management.OperatingSystemMXBean" // J9
    );
    private static Gauge systemCpuCountGauge;
    private static Gauge systemLoadAverage1mGauge;
    private static Gauge systemCpuUsageGauge;
    private static Gauge processCpuUsageGauge;
    private final OperatingSystemMXBean operatingSystemBean;
    
    private final Class<?> operatingSystemBeanClass;
    
    private final Method systemCpuUsage;
    
    private final Method processCpuUsage;
    private ScheduledExecutorService executor = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(1);


    public ProcessorMetrics() {
        this.operatingSystemBean = ManagementFactory.getOperatingSystemMXBean();
        this.operatingSystemBeanClass = getFirstClassFound(OPERATING_SYSTEM_BEAN_CLASS_NAMES);
        this.systemCpuUsage = detectMethod("getSystemCpuLoad");
        this.processCpuUsage = detectMethod("getProcessCpuLoad");
    }

    @Override
    public void bindTo(CollectorRegistry registry) {
        systemCpuCountGauge = Gauge.build().name("system_cpu_count").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The number of processors available to the Java virtual machine").register(registry);
        if (operatingSystemBean.getSystemLoadAverage() >= 0) {
            systemLoadAverage1mGauge = Gauge.build().name("system_load_average_1m").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The sum of the number of runnable entities queued to available processors and the number of runnable entities running on the available processors averaged over a period of time").register(registry);

        }

        if (systemCpuUsage != null) {
            systemCpuUsageGauge = Gauge.build().name("system_cpu_usage").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The \"recent cpu usage\" for the whole system").register(registry);

        }

        if (processCpuUsage != null) {
            processCpuUsageGauge = Gauge.build().name("process_cpu_usage").labelNames(MetricsTagFactory.getTagKeys()).help("The \"recent cpu usage\" for the Java Virtual Machine process").register(registry);
        }

        executor.scheduleAtFixedRate(this, TIMER_DELAY, TIMER_RATE, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }

    private double invoke( Method method) {
        try {
            return method != null ? (double) method.invoke(operatingSystemBean) : Double.NaN;
        } catch (IllegalAccessException | IllegalArgumentException | InvocationTargetException e) {
            return Double.NaN;
        }
    }

    
    private Method detectMethod(String name) {
        requireNonNull(name);
        if (operatingSystemBeanClass == null) {
            return null;
        }
        try {
            // ensure the Bean we have is actually an instance of the interface
            operatingSystemBeanClass.cast(operatingSystemBean);
            return operatingSystemBeanClass.getDeclaredMethod(name);
        } catch (ClassCastException | NoSuchMethodException | SecurityException e) {
            return null;
        }
    }

    
    private Class<?> getFirstClassFound(List<String> classNames) {
        for (String className : classNames) {
            try {
                return Class.forName(className);
            } catch (ClassNotFoundException ignore) {
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        try {
            reportMetrics();
        } catch (Throwable ex) {
            logger.error("Report cpu metrics failure.Exception msg = {}", ex.getMessage());
        }
    }

    private void reportMetrics() {
        Runtime runtime = Runtime.getRuntime();
        systemCpuCountGauge.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(runtime.availableProcessors());

        if (operatingSystemBean.getSystemLoadAverage() >= 0) {
            systemLoadAverage1mGauge.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(operatingSystemBean.getSystemLoadAverage());
        }

        if (systemCpuUsage != null) {
            systemCpuUsageGauge.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(invoke(systemCpuUsage));
        }

        if (processCpuUsage != null) {
            processCpuUsageGauge.labels(MetricsTagFactory.getTagValues()).set(invoke(processCpuUsage));
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/ProcessorMetrics.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/metrics/WebAPIMetrics.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.metrics;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.domain.InteractiveType;
import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.domain.ProtocolType;
import io.micrometer.core.instrument.DistributionSummary;

import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;

public class WebAPIMetrics {
    //请求数统计
    private static final  String AL_METER_REQUEST_COUNTER = "al_meter_request_counter";

    //方法请求统计包括：总的请求数统计、总耗时统计
    private static final  String AL_METER_METHOD_SUMMARY = "al_meter_method_summary";

    //方法调用次数统计
    private static final  String AL_METER_METHOD_COUNTER = "al_meter_method_counter";

    //远端调用summary指标
    private static final  String AL_METER_REMOTE_CALL_SUMMARY = "al_meter_remote_request_summary";

    //远端调用summary指标
    private static final String AL_METER_REMOTE_CALL_COUNTER = "al_meter_remote_request_counter";


    //分位数定义
    private static final  double QUANTILE_50 = 0.50;
    private static final double QUANTILE_90 = 0.90;
    private static final double QUANTILE_95 = 0.95;
    private static final double QUANTILE_99 = 0.99;


    private static final String NA_DEFAULT_METHOD = "N/A";
    private static Map<String, DistributionSummary> summaryRequestMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    /**
     * 监控RPC接口（对外提供接口服务）：不同错误码的请求数，最大响应时间，平均响应时间以及分位值（99，95，50）
     * @param path 请求路径
     * @param standCode 请求错误码: 0 请求成功；1 请求失败
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    public static void doRpcApiMonitor(String path, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
        monitor(path, NA_DEFAULT_METHOD, ProtocolType.RPC_PROTOCOL_TYPE, InteractiveType.PROVIDER, standCode, businessCode, costTime);
    }


    /**
     * 监控RPC接口调用（调用外部RPC接口）：不同错误码的请求数，最大响应时间，平均响应时间以及分位值（99，95，50）
     * @param path 请求路径，比如com.ak.example.Person.play()
     * @param standCode 请求错误码: 0 请求成功；1 请求失败(比如调用外部RPC接口出现超时，发生异常等)
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    public static void doRpcApiCalledMonitor(String path, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
        monitor(path, NA_DEFAULT_METHOD, ProtocolType.RPC_PROTOCOL_TYPE, InteractiveType.CONSUMER, standCode, businessCode, costTime);
    }


    /**
     * 监控本地java接口调用：不同错误码的请求数，最大响应时间，平均响应时间以及分位值（99，95，50）
     * @param path 请求路径，即方法的路径，比如com.ak.example.Person.play()
     * @param standCode 请求错误码: 0 请求成功；1 请求失败(调用JAVA接口发生异常)
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    public static void doJavaMethodMonitor(String path, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
        monitor(path, NA_DEFAULT_METHOD, ProtocolType.RPC_PROTOCOL_TYPE, InteractiveType.PROVIDER, standCode, businessCode, costTime);
    }



    /**
     * 监控HTTP接口（对外提供接口服务）：不同错误码的请求数，最大响应时间，平均响应时间以及分位值（99，95，50）
     * @param path 请求路径
     * @param method http请求方法，如get、post、delete等
     * @param standCode http错误码，如200，404，500等
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    public static void doHttpApiMonitor(String path, String method, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
        monitor(path, method, ProtocolType.HTTP_PROTOCOL_TYPE, InteractiveType.PROVIDER, standCode, businessCode, costTime);
    }


    /**
     * 监控HTTP接口调用（调用外部HTTP接口）：不同错误码的请求数，最大响应时间，平均响应时间以及分位值（99，95，50）
     * @param path 请求路径
     * @param method http请求方法，如get、post、delete等
     * @param standCode http错误码，如200，404，500等
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    public static void doHttpApiCalledMonitor(String path, String method, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
        monitor(path, method, ProtocolType.HTTP_PROTOCOL_TYPE, InteractiveType.CONSUMER, standCode, businessCode, costTime);
    }


    /**
     * 监控
     * @param path 请求路径
     * @param method 请求方法
     * @param protocolType 协议类型
     * @param interactiveType 交互模式：provider，consumer
     * @param standCode  标准错误码，表示代码层面的错误
     * @param businessCode 业务错误码，由业务自定义
     * @param costTime 请求耗时，单位为毫秒
     */
    private static void monitor(String path, String method, String protocolType, String interactiveType, int standCode, String businessCode, long costTime){
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/util/IPUtils.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.util;

import com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.loadbalancer.Separators;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.net.InetAddress;
import java.net.NetworkInterface;
import java.net.SocketException;
import java.util.Enumeration;

public class IPUtils {
    private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(IPUtils.class);

    /**
     * 获取本地IP地址
     */
    public static String getLocalIpAddr() {
        String clientIP = null;
        Enumeration<NetworkInterface> networks = null;
        try {
            //获取所有网卡设备
            networks = NetworkInterface.getNetworkInterfaces();
            if (networks == null) {
                //没有网卡设备 打印日志  返回null结束
                LOGGER.error("networks  is null");
                return null;
            }
        } catch (SocketException e) {
            LOGGER.info(e.getMessage());
        }
        InetAddress ip;
        Enumeration<InetAddress> addrs;
        // 遍历网卡设备
        assert networks != null;
        while (networks.hasMoreElements()) {
            NetworkInterface ni = networks.nextElement();
            try {
                //过滤掉 loopback设备、虚拟网卡
                if (!ni.isUp() || ni.isLoopback() || ni.isVirtual()) {
                    continue;
                }
            } catch (SocketException e) {
                LOGGER.info(e.getMessage());
            }
            addrs = ni.getInetAddresses();
            // 遍历InetAddress信息
            while (addrs.hasMoreElements()) {
                ip = addrs.nextElement();
                if (!ip.isLoopbackAddress() && ip.isSiteLocalAddress() && !ip.getHostAddress().contains(Separators.COLON)) {
                    try {
                        clientIP = ip.toString().split(Separators.SLASH)[1];
                    } catch (ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException e) {
                        clientIP = null;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return clientIP;
    }

}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/prometheus/client/util/SocketUtil.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.prometheus.client.util;

import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.net.Socket;

public class SocketUtil {
    private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SocketUtil.class);

    private static final int DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 2000;
    private static final int MAX_TRY = 3;


    /**
     * 测试IP及端口的连通性
     *
     * @param ip   IP地址
     * @param port 端口
     * @return true 可连通；false 不可连通。
     */
    public static boolean testConnection(String ip, int port) {
        return testConnection(ip, port, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT);
    }


    /**
     * 测试IP及端口的连通性
     *
     * @param ip      IP地址
     * @param port    端口
     * @param timeOut 连接超时设置
     * @return true 可连通；false 不可连通。
     */
    public static boolean testConnection(String ip, int port, int timeOut) {
        Socket connect = new Socket();

        int failCount = 0;

        while (failCount++ < MAX_TRY) {
            try {
                connect.connect(new InetSocketAddress(ip, port), timeOut);//建立连接
                boolean isConnected = connect.isConnected();//通过现有方法查看连通状态
                LOGGER.debug("Check the connection of {}:{}, the result is {}", ip, port, isConnected ? "available" : "unavailable");//true为连通
                return isConnected;
            } catch (IOException e) {
                LOGGER.warn("Check the connection of {}:{}, the result is unavailable.The #{} try.", ip, port, failCount);//当连不通时，直接抛异常，异常捕获即可
            } finally {
                try {
                    connect.close();
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    LOGGER.warn("Check the connection of {}:{}, the result is unavailable.The #{} try.", ip, port, failCount);//当连不通时，直接抛异常，异常捕获即可
                }
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        testConnection("localhost", 7777);
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedisClient.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.redis;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import redis.clients.jedis.Jedis;
import redis.clients.jedis.JedisPool;
import redis.clients.jedis.JedisPoolConfig;
import redis.clients.jedis.params.SetParams;

import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.Map;

@Slf4j
public class RedisClient {

    private static final String LOCK_SUCCESS = "OK";
    private static final Long RELEASE_SUCCESS = 1L;
    private static final Integer CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MILLIS = 5000;
    public final static long DEFAULT_EXPIRE_PX = 60000;

    private final JedisPool jedisPool;

    public RedisClient(String host, Integer port, String password, RedisPoolCfg redisPoolCfg) {
        JedisPoolConfig jedisPoolConfig = new JedisPoolConfig();
        jedisPoolConfig.setMinIdle(redisPoolCfg.getMinIdle());
        jedisPoolConfig.setMaxIdle(redisPoolCfg.getMaxIdle());
        jedisPoolConfig.setMaxTotal(redisPoolCfg.getMaxTotal());
        jedisPoolConfig.setMaxWaitMillis(redisPoolCfg.getMaxWaitMillis());
        jedisPool = StringUtils.isEmpty(password) ?
                new JedisPool(jedisPoolConfig, host, port) :
                new JedisPool(jedisPoolConfig, host, port, CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MILLIS, password);
    }

    public String get(Integer dbIndex, String key) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            return jedis.get(key);
        }
    }

    public void set(Integer dbIndex, String key, String value) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            jedis.set(key, value);
        }
    }

    public Long del(Integer dbIndex, String... keys) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            return jedis.del(keys);
        }
    }

    public void setex(Integer dbIndex, String key, String value, Long expireSeconds) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            jedis.setex(key, expireSeconds, value);
        }
    }

    public Boolean exists(Integer dbIndex, String key) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            return jedis.exists(key);
        }
    }

    public void hset(Integer dbIndex, String key, Map<String, String> map) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            jedis.hset(key, map);
        }
    }

    public void hset(Integer dbIndex, String key, String field, String value) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            jedis.hset(key, field, value);
        }
    }

    public String hget(Integer dbIndex, String key, String field) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            return jedis.hget(key, field);
        }
    }

    public Boolean lock(Integer dbIndex, String key, String value, Long expireTime) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            SetParams setParams = new SetParams().nx().px(expireTime == null ? DEFAULT_EXPIRE_PX : expireTime);
            String result = jedis.set(key, value, setParams);
            if (LOCK_SUCCESS.equals(result)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public Boolean releaseLock(Integer dbIndex, String lockKey, String value) {
        try (Jedis jedis = this.jedisPool.getResource()) {
            jedis.select(dbIndex);
            String script = "if redis.call('get', KEYS[1]) == ARGV[1] then return redis.call('del', KEYS[1]) else return 0 end";
            Object result = jedis.eval(script, Collections.singletonList(lockKey), Collections.singletonList(value));
            if (RELEASE_SUCCESS.equals(result)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public JedisPool getJedisPool() {
        return jedisPool;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedisService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.redis;

import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import redis.clients.jedis.JedisPool;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;

@Slf4j
public class RedisService {

    public final static int DEFAULT_REDIS_INDEX = 0;

    private RedisPoolCfg redisPoolCfg;

    private static final Map<String, RedisClient> redisClientMap = new HashMap<>();

    private static final ReentrantLock lock = new ReentrantLock();

    private static volatile RedisService redisService = null;

    public static RedisService getInstance() {
        if (redisService == null) {
            synchronized (RedisService.class) {
                if (redisService == null) {
                    redisService = new RedisService();
                }
            }
        }
        return redisService;
    }

    private RedisService() {
    }

    public void initRedisPoolCfg(RedisPoolCfg redisPoolCfg) {
        this.redisPoolCfg = redisPoolCfg;
    }

    public static String get(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key) {
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).get(dbIndex, key);
    }

    public static void set(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, String value) {
        RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).set(dbIndex, key, value);
    }

    public static Long del(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String... keys) {
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).del(dbIndex, keys);
    }

    public static void setex(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, String value, Long expireSeconds) {
        RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).setex(dbIndex, key, value, expireSeconds);
    }

    public static Boolean exists(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key) {
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).exists(dbIndex, key);
    }

    public static void hset(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, Map<String, String> map) {
        RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).hset(dbIndex == null ? DEFAULT_REDIS_INDEX : dbIndex, key, map);
    }

    public static void hset(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, String field, String value) {
        RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).hset(dbIndex, key, field, value);
    }

    public static String hget(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, String field) {
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).hget(dbIndex, key, field);
    }

    @Deprecated
    public static Boolean lock(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String key, String requestId, Long expireTime){
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).lock(dbIndex, key, requestId, expireTime);
    }

    @Deprecated
    public static Boolean releaseLock(String cluster, Integer dbIndex, String lockKey, String requestId) {
        return RedisService.getInstance().getRedisClient(cluster).releaseLock(dbIndex, lockKey, requestId);
    }

    private RedisClient getRedisClient(String cluster) {
        RedisClient redisClient = redisClientMap.get(cluster);
        if (redisClient == null) {
            lock.lock();
            try {
                redisClient = redisClientMap.get(cluster);
                if (redisClient != null) {
                    return redisClient;
                }
                // 查询redis集群
                String sql = String.format("select host,port,password from taskinfodb.t_redis_info where cluster_name = '%s'", cluster);
                List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, null, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                    Map<String, Object> result = results.get(0);
                    String host = result.get("host").toString();
                    Integer port = Integer.parseInt(result.get("port").toString());
                    Object passwordObj = result.get("password");
                    String password = null;
                    if (passwordObj != null) {
                        password = CryptoUtil.decode(passwordObj.toString());
                    }
                    redisClient = new RedisClient(host, port, password, redisPoolCfg);
                    redisClientMap.put(cluster, redisClient);
                } else {
                    throw new Exception("no redis configuration with cluster name " + cluster + " was found in taskinfodb.t_redis_info table");
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("get redis client error", e);
                System.exit(1);
            } finally {
                lock.unlock();
            }
        }
        return redisClient;
    }

    public static void closeRedisClient() {
        log.info("close redis connect");
        if (!redisClientMap.isEmpty()) {
            for (RedisClient redisClient : redisClientMap.values()) {
                if (redisClient != null) {
                    JedisPool jedisPool = redisClient.getJedisPool();
                    if (jedisPool != null) {
                        jedisPool.close();
                    }
                }
            }
            redisClientMap.clear();
        }
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedisService.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedissonClient.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.redis;

import com.akulaku.core.common.RedisClusterModeEnum;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.StopWatch;
import org.redisson.Redisson;
import org.redisson.api.*;
import org.redisson.client.codec.StringCodec;
import org.redisson.config.*;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/2/27
 */
@Slf4j
public class RedissonClient {

    public final static long DEFAULT_EXPIRE_PX = 60000;

    public final static long DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_PX = 5000;

    private final Redisson redissonClient;

    /**
     * 创建redisson实例，使用默认连接池配置
     * @param clusterMode
     * @param nodeList
     * @param userName
     * @param password
     */
    public RedissonClient(String clusterMode, List<String> nodeList, Integer dbIndex, String userName, String password){
        Config config = new Config();
        String[] nodes = nodeList.stream().map(node -> String.format("redis://%s", node)).toArray(String[]::new);
        RedisClusterModeEnum redisClusterMode = RedisClusterModeEnum.getClusterMode(clusterMode);
        if(redisClusterMode == null){
            log.error("redis集群模式：{}不存在", clusterMode);
            System.exit(1);
        }
        config.setCodec(new StringCodec());
        switch (redisClusterMode){
            case SINGLE:
                SingleServerConfig singleServerConfig = config.useSingleServer()
                        .setAddress(nodes[0]);
                if(dbIndex != null){
                    singleServerConfig.setDatabase(dbIndex);
                }
                if(userName != null && !"".equals(userName)){
                    singleServerConfig.setUsername(userName);
                }
                if(password != null && !"".equals(password)){
                    singleServerConfig.setPassword(password);
                }
                break;
            case CLUSTER:
                ClusterServersConfig clusterServersConfig = config.useClusterServers()
                    .addNodeAddress(nodes).setScanInterval(3000);
                if(userName != null && !"".equals(userName)){
                    clusterServersConfig.setUsername(userName);
                }
                if(password != null && !"".equals(password)){
                    clusterServersConfig.setPassword(password);
                }
                break;
            case SENTINEL:
                SentinelServersConfig sentinelServersConfig = config.useSentinelServers()
                        .setMasterName("feature_async_cal")
                        .addSentinelAddress(nodeList.toArray(new String[0]));
                if(dbIndex != null){
                    sentinelServersConfig.setDatabase(dbIndex);
                }
                if(userName != null && !"".equals(userName)){
                    sentinelServersConfig.setUsername(userName);
                }
                if(password != null && !"".equals(password)){
                    sentinelServersConfig.setPassword(password);
                }
                break;
            case MasterSlave:
                MasterSlaveServersConfig masterSlaveServersConfig = config.useMasterSlaveServers()
                        .setMasterAddress(nodes[0]);
                for(int i=1; i< nodes.length; i++){
                    masterSlaveServersConfig.addSlaveAddress(nodes[i]);
                }
                if(dbIndex != null){
                    masterSlaveServersConfig.setDatabase(dbIndex);
                }
                if(userName != null && !"".equals(userName)){
                    masterSlaveServersConfig.setUsername(userName);
                }
                if(password != null && !"".equals(password)){
                    masterSlaveServersConfig.setPassword(password);
                }
                break;
            case Replicated:
                ReplicatedServersConfig replicatedServersConfig = config.useReplicatedServers()
                        .setScanInterval(3000)
                        .addNodeAddress(nodes);
                if(dbIndex != null){
                    replicatedServersConfig.setDatabase(dbIndex);
                }
                if(userName != null && !"".equals(userName)){
                    replicatedServersConfig.setUsername(userName);
                }
                if(password != null && !"".equals(password)){
                    replicatedServersConfig.setPassword(password);
                }
            default:
        }
        redissonClient  = (Redisson) Redisson.create(config);
    }

    public Object get(String key) {
        RBucket<Object> bucket = redissonClient.getBucket(key);
        return bucket.get();
    }

    public void set(String key, Object value) {
        RBucket<Object> bucket = redissonClient.getBucket(key);
        bucket.set(value);
    }

    public Boolean del(String key) {
        RBucket<Object> bucket = redissonClient.getBucket(key);
        return bucket.delete();
    }

    public void setex(String key, String value, Long expireMs) {
        RBucket<Object> bucket = redissonClient.getBucket(key);
        bucket.set(value, expireMs, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
    }

    public Boolean exists(String key) {
        RBucket<Object> bucket = redissonClient.getBucket(key);
        return bucket.isExists();
    }

    public void sadd(String key, Object value){
        RSet<Object> set = redissonClient.getSet(key);
        set.add(value);
    }

    public Boolean sIsMember(String key, Object value){
        RSet<Object> set = redissonClient.getSet(key);
        return set.stream().anyMatch(value::equals);
    }

    public List<Object> smembers(String key){
        RSet<Object> set = redissonClient.getSet(key);
        return new ArrayList<>(set);
    }

    public void hset(String key, Map<String, String> map) {
        RMap<Object, Object> rMap = redissonClient.getMap(key);
        map.forEach(rMap::put);
    }

    public void hset(String key, String field, String value) {
        RMap<Object, Object> rMap = redissonClient.getMap(key);
        rMap.put(field, value);
    }

    public Map<String, Object> hgetAll(String key) {
        return redissonClient.getMap(key);
    }

    public Object hget(String key, String field) {
        return redissonClient.getMap(key).get(field);
    }

    public RLock lock(String key){
        return this.lock(key, DEFAULT_EXPIRE_PX, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_PX);
    }

    public RLock lock(String key, Long expireMs){
        return this.lock(key, expireMs == null ? DEFAULT_EXPIRE_PX : expireMs, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_PX);
    }

    public RLock lock(String key, Long expireMs, Long timeoutMs) {
        StopWatch stopWatch = StopWatch.createStarted();
        RLock lock = redissonClient.getLock(key);
        boolean isLocked  = false;
        try {
            while (!isLocked) {
                isLocked = lock.tryLock(timeoutMs, expireMs, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
                if(!isLocked){
                    log.info("unable to get redis lock:{} within 5 sec, will try again", key);
                }
            }
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            log.error("程序中断，退出获取redis分布式锁");
        } finally {
            stopWatch.stop();
            if(stopWatch.getTime() > 10000){
                log.info("get redis lock:{} success, 耗时:{}", key, stopWatch.getTime());
            }
        }
        return lock;
    }

    public RLock multiLock(List<String> keys, Long expireMs, Long timeoutMs) {
        RLock[]locks = new RLock[keys.size()];
        for (int i=0; i<keys.size(); i++){
            RLock lock = redissonClient.getLock(keys.get(i));
            locks[i] = lock;
        }
        RLock multiLock = redissonClient.getMultiLock(locks);
        boolean isLocked = false;
        try {
            while (!isLocked) {
                isLocked = multiLock.tryLock(timeoutMs, expireMs, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
            }
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            log.error("程序中断，退出获取redis分布式多个锁");
        }
        return multiLock;
    }


    public Redisson getRedissonClient() {
        return redissonClient;
    }

    public void stopRedissonClient(){
        this.getRedissonClient().shutdown();
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedissonClient.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/redis/RedissonService.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.redis;

import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;
import org.redisson.api.RLock;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;

/**
 * @author chenhx1
 * @date 2023/2/28
 */
@Slf4j
public class RedissonService {

    private static final Map<String, RedissonClient> redissonClientMap = new HashMap<>();

    private static final ReentrantLock lock = new ReentrantLock();

    private static volatile RedissonService redisService = null;

    public static RedissonService getInstance(){
        if(redisService == null) {
            synchronized (RedissonService.class){
                if(redisService == null){
                    redisService = new RedissonService();
                }
            }
        }
        return redisService;
    }

    private RedissonService() {

    }

    public static Object get(String cluster, String key) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).get(key);
    }

    public static void set(String cluster, String key, String value) {
        RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).set(key, value);
    }

    public static Boolean del(String cluster, String key) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).del(key);
    }

    public static void setex(String cluster, String key, String value, Long expireSeconds) {
        RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).setex(key, value, expireSeconds);
    }

    public static Boolean exists(String cluster, String key) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).exists(key);
    }

    public static void hset(String cluster, String key, Map<String, String> map) {
        RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).hset(key, map);
    }

    public static void hset(String cluster, String key, String field, String value) {
        RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).hset(key, field, value);
    }

    public static Object hget(String cluster, String key, String field) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).hget(key, field);
    }

    public static RLock lock(String cluster, String key){
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).lock(key);
    }

    public static RLock lock(String cluster, String key, Long expireTime){
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).lock(key, expireTime);
    }

    public static RLock lock(String cluster, String key, Long expireTime, Long timeOut) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).lock(key, expireTime, timeOut);
    }

    public static RLock multiLock(String cluster, List<String> keys, Long expireTime, Long timeOut) {
        return RedissonService.getInstance().getRedissonClient(cluster).multiLock(keys, expireTime, timeOut);
    }

    private RedissonClient getRedissonClient(String cluster) {
        RedissonClient redissonClient = redissonClientMap.get(cluster);
        if (redissonClient == null) {
            lock.lock();
            try {
                redissonClient = redissonClientMap.get(cluster);
                if (redissonClient != null) {
                    return redissonClient;
                }
                // 查询redis集群
                String sql = String.format("select cluster_mode, host, port, default_db, password from taskinfodb.t_redis_info where cluster_name = '%s'", cluster);
                List<Map<String, Object>> results = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, null, null);
                if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                    Map<String, Object> result = results.get(0);
                    String clusterMode = result.get("cluster_mode").toString();
                    String host = result.get("host").toString();
                    Object port = result.get("port");
                    List<String> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
                    if(port == null){
                        //多地址配置在host,例如：127.0.0.1:6379,127.0.0.1:6380,127.0.0.1:6381
                        nodes = Arrays.asList(host.split(","));
                    } else {
                        nodes.add(String.format("%s:%s", host, port.toString()));
                    }
                    Object defaultDb = result.get("default_db");
                    int dbIndex = 0;
                    if(defaultDb != null){
                        dbIndex = Integer.parseInt(defaultDb.toString());
                    }
                    Object passwordObj = result.get("password");
                    String password = null;
                    if (passwordObj != null) {
                        password = CryptoUtil.decode(passwordObj.toString());
                    }
                    redissonClient = new RedissonClient(clusterMode, nodes, dbIndex, null, password);
                    redissonClientMap.put(cluster, redissonClient);
                } else {
                    throw new Exception("no redis configuration with cluster name "+cluster+" was found in taskinfodb.t_redis_info table");
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("get redis redisson client error", e);
                System.exit(1);
            } finally {
                lock.unlock();
            }
        }
        return redissonClient;
    }

    public static void closeRedisClient(){
        log.info("close redis redisson connect");
        if(!redissonClientMap.isEmpty()){
            for (RedissonClient redissonClient : redissonClientMap.values()) {
                if (redissonClient != null) {
                    redissonClient.stopRedissonClient();
                }
            }
            redissonClientMap.clear();
        }
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/task/MonitorKafkaThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.task;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;

public class MonitorKafkaThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, "monitor-kafka-thread-" + index);
    }
}


```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/task/Task.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.task;

import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TaskConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaProducerService;
import com.akulaku.core.nebula.NebulaService;
import com.akulaku.core.neo4j.Neo4jServiceV1;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.DataProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceBatchProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.ProduceProcessors;
import com.akulaku.core.redis.RedisService;
import com.akulaku.core.redis.RedissonService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.google.common.base.Strings;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;

/**
 * @author zhangmoon
 * @date 2021-06-30 17:58
 * @description
 */

@Slf4j
public class Task {

    private List<DataProcessor> dataProcessors;
    private final TaskConfig taskConfig;

    public Task(TaskConfig taskConfig) {
        this.taskConfig = taskConfig;
    }

    public final void start() throws Exception {
        String processorsProducerClass = taskConfig.getProcessorsProducerClass();
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(processorsProducerClass)) {
            processorsProducerClass = "com.akulaku.core.processor.YamlProduceProcessors";
        }
        Class<?> clazz = Class.forName(processorsProducerClass);
        ProduceProcessors produceProcessors = (ProduceProcessors) clazz.newInstance();
        this.dataProcessors = produceProcessors.produce(taskConfig);
        // 先执行Processor的离线数据初始化,再启动增量kafka消费
        for (DataProcessor dataProcessor : this.dataProcessors) {
            dataProcessor.beforeStart();
            dataProcessor.start();
        }
        Files.deleteIfExists(Constant.KAFKA_OFFSET_FROM_YAML_PATH);
        Files.deleteIfExists(Constant.OFFLINE_INIT_FILE_PATH);
    }

    /**
     * 适用kafka消费subscribe模式,assign模式不适用
     * kafka心跳线程(kafka-coordinator-heartbeat-thread)监控,如果心跳线程数量和预期不一样,则退出jvm,
     */
    private void monitorKafkaHearBeatThread() {
        boolean isKafkaProcessor = false;
        long allParallel = 0;
        for (DataProcessor dataProcessor : this.dataProcessors) {
            if (dataProcessor instanceof KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor || dataProcessor instanceof KafkaSourceBatchProcessor) {
                isKafkaProcessor = true;
                ProcessorConfig processorConfig = dataProcessor.getProcessorConfig();
                Integer parallel = processorConfig.getParallel();
                allParallel = allParallel + parallel;
            }
        }
        if (isKafkaProcessor && allParallel > 0) {
            ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor(new MonitorKafkaThreadFactory());
            long finalAllParallel = allParallel;
            scheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(() -> {
                ThreadGroup currentGroup = Thread.currentThread().getThreadGroup();
                int noThreads = currentGroup.activeCount();
                Thread[] lstThreads = new Thread[noThreads];
                currentGroup.enumerate(lstThreads);
                long size = Arrays.stream(lstThreads).filter(x -> x.getName().startsWith("kafka-coordinator-heartbeat-thread")).count();
                log.info("kafka-coordinator-heartbeat-thread actual number:" + size);
                if (finalAllParallel != size) {
                    log.error("kafka-coordinator-heartbeat-thread actual number:{}, expected number:{}", size, finalAllParallel);
                    System.exit(1);
                }
            }, 10, 10, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
        }
    }


    public final void stop() {
        log.info("program exit,shut down thread pool");
        for (DataProcessor dataProcessor : this.dataProcessors) {
            dataProcessor.stop();
        }
        // 关闭相关服务
        RedisService.closeRedisClient();
        RedissonService.closeRedisClient();
        Neo4jServiceV1.closeService();
        NebulaService.closeService();
        KafkaProducerService.closeService();
        DbService.closeDbPool();
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/task/TaskScanner.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.task;

import cn.hutool.core.io.FileUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.lang.ClassScanner;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ReUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.io.File;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;


@Slf4j
public class TaskScanner {

    private static final Map<String, String> processorClassMap = new HashMap<>();
    private static final Map<String, String> taskConfigFileMap = new HashMap<>();


    public static void scanTaskFile() {
        String pattern = "com\\.akulaku\\.define\\.[^.]+\\.processor\\..+";
        Set<Class<?>> defineClassSet = ClassScanner.scanPackage(Constant.DEFINE_PACKAGE_NAME);
        defineClassSet.forEach(clazz -> {
            String value = clazz.getName();
            boolean isMatch = ReUtil.isMatch(pattern, value);
            if (isMatch) {
                String[] temps = value.split("\\.");
                String key = String.join(".", temps[temps.length - 2], temps[temps.length - 1]);
                processorClassMap.put(key, value);
            }
        });

        Set<Class<?>> coreProcessorClassSet = ClassScanner.scanPackage(Constant.CORE_PROCESSOR_PACKAGE_NAME);
        coreProcessorClassSet.forEach(clazz -> {
            String value = clazz.getName();
            String key = clazz.getSimpleName();
            processorClassMap.put(key, value);
        });

        List<File> files = FileUtil.loopFiles(Constant.CONFIG_TASK_PATH);
        files.forEach(file -> {
            String fileName = file.getName();
            String parentName = file.getParentFile().getName();
            String filePath = file.getAbsolutePath();
            String key = parentName + "." + fileName;
            if (taskConfigFileMap.containsKey(key)) {
                log.error("There are duplicate files present,key:{}", key);
                System.exit(1);
            }
            taskConfigFileMap.put(key, filePath);
        });
    }


    public static String getProcessorClass(String taskName, String processorName) {
        String processor = processorClassMap.get(taskName + "." + processorName);
        return processor == null ? processorClassMap.get(processorName) : processor;
    }

    public static String getTaskYamlFile(String fileName) {
        return taskConfigFileMap.get(fileName);
    }

    public static String getTaskConfigYamlFile(String taskName) {
        return taskConfigFileMap.get(taskName + "." + taskName + "Config.yaml");
    }

    public static String getTaskDefaultYamlFile(String taskName) {
        return taskConfigFileMap.get(taskName + "." + taskName + ".yaml");
    }

    public static String getSqlFilePath(String taskName, String sqlFile) {
        return taskConfigFileMap.get(taskName + "." + sqlFile);
    }

    public static String getFilePath(String taskName, String file) {
        return taskConfigFileMap.get(taskName + "." + file);
    }
}



```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/AkuKmsUtil.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import com.dahuilang.midend.edison.util.KmsUtil;
import lombok.Synchronized;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.configuration2.Configuration;
import org.apache.commons.configuration2.ConfigurationConverter;
import org.apache.commons.configuration2.builder.fluent.Configurations;
import org.apache.commons.configuration2.ex.ConfigurationException;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;

@Slf4j
public class AkuKmsUtil {
    private static final String SQL = "select url,appId,token from taskinfodb.t_kms_conn_info where conn_name=?";
    private final String appId;
    private final String token;

    public AkuKmsUtil(String conn_name) {
        try {
            List<Map<String, Object>> result;
            result = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, SQL, Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(conn_name, SqlParam.DataType.Object)), null);
            if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(result)) {
                throw new RuntimeException("query kms conn info is empty");
            }
            Map<String, Object> row = result.get(0);
            String url = (String) row.get("url");
            this.appId = (String) row.get("appId");
            this.token = (String) row.get("token");
            KmsUtil.initConfig(url, this.appId, this.token);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }


    public String encrypt(String value) {
        return KmsUtil.encrypt(this.appId, this.token, value).getData().replaceAll("\n", "").replaceAll("\r", "");
    }

    public String decrypt(String value) {
        return KmsUtil.decrypt(this.appId, this.token, value).getData();
    }


}
```
