### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/SqlUtils.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.DbInfo;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Constants;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.DataBaseType;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.Field;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.model.TableMetaData;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.task.impl.db.DbMetaDataTaskHandler;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.utils.CryptoUtil;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.JSQLParserException;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Expression;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Function;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.JdbcParameter;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.LongValue;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.operators.arithmetic.Multiplication;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.operators.relational.ExpressionList;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.parser.CCJSqlParserUtil;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Column;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Table;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.Statement;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.ColumnDefinition;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.CreateTable;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.Index;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.insert.Insert;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
public class SqlUtils {

    /**
     * 特征表生成sql feat_create_time不变，feat_update_time变
     * @param tableFields
     * @param tableName
     * @param isUpsertMode
     * @return
     */
    public static String generateInsertSql(List<String> tableFields, String tableName, Boolean isUpsertMode) {
        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(tableName));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFields.stream().map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = columns.stream().map(field ->
                StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_create_time`") || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_update_time`") ?
                        getUnixTimestampExpression() : new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        if (isUpsertMode) {
            // 配置DuplicateUpdateColumns
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(columns.stream().filter(column -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(column.getColumnName(), "`feat_create_time`")).collect(Collectors.toList()));
            // 配置DuplicateUpdateExpressionList,如果是feat_create_time字段,则不更新
            List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = columns.stream()
                    .filter(field -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_create_time`"))
                    .map(field -> {
                        Function f = new Function();
                        f.setName("values");
                        ExpressionList list = new ExpressionList();
                        List<Expression> expressions = new ArrayList<>();
                        expressions.add(field);
                        list.setExpressions(expressions);
                        f.setParameters(list);
                        return f;
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
            insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        }
        return insert.toString();
    }

    /**
     * 特征表生成sql feat_create_time不变，feat_update_time变
     * @param tableName 表名
     * @param tableFields 字段列表
     * @param duplicateUpdateFields 更新字段列表
     * @param updateCondition 更新条件 eg:IF(create_time is null or create_time <= VALUES(create_time), VALUES(%s), %s)
     * @return
     */
    public static String generateInsertSql(String tableName, List<String> tableFields, List<String> duplicateUpdateFields, String updateCondition) {
        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(tableName));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFields.stream().map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = columns.stream().map(field ->
                StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_create_time`") || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_update_time`") ?
                        getUnixTimestampExpression() : new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        if (!CollUtil.isEmpty(duplicateUpdateFields)) {
            List<Column> duplicateUpdateColumns = duplicateUpdateFields.stream().filter(item -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(item, "feat_create_time"))
                    .map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(duplicateUpdateColumns);
            List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = duplicateUpdateColumns.stream()
                    .filter(field -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_create_time`"))
                    .map(field -> {
                        if(StrUtil.isEmpty(updateCondition)){
                            Function f = new Function();
                            f.setName("values");
                            f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                            return f;
                        } else {
                            if(StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`feat_update_time`")){
                                //feat_update_time使用values(feat_update_time)更新
                                Function f = new Function();
                                f.setName("values");
                                f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                                return f;
                            } else {
                                Expression expression = null;
                                // 创建 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 子句的更新逻辑表达式
                                try {
                                    expression = CCJSqlParserUtil.parseExpression(String.format(updateCondition, field, field));
                                } catch (JSQLParserException e) {
                                    throw new RuntimeException("ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 表达式出错");
                                }
                                return expression;
                            }
                        }
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
            insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        }
        return insert.toString();
    }

    /**
     * 窗口表生成sql window_create_time不变，window_update_time变
     * @param tableName
     * @param tableFields
     * @param duplicateUpdateFields
     * @param updateCondition
     * @return
     */
    public static String generateWindowInsertSql(String tableName, List<String> tableFields, List<String> duplicateUpdateFields, String updateCondition) {
        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(tableName));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFields.stream().map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = columns.stream().map(field ->
                StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`window_update_time`") || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`window_create_time`") ?
                        SqlUtils.getUnixTimestampExpression() : new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        if (!CollUtil.isEmpty(duplicateUpdateFields)) {
            List<Column> duplicateUpdateColumns = duplicateUpdateFields.stream().filter(item -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(item, "window_create_time"))
                    .map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(duplicateUpdateColumns);
            List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = duplicateUpdateColumns.stream()
                    .filter(field -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`window_create_time`"))
                    .map(field -> {
                        if(StrUtil.isEmpty(updateCondition)){
                            Function f = new Function();
                            f.setName("values");
                            f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                            return f;
                        } else {
                            if(StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`window_update_time`")){
                                //window_update_time使用values(window_update_time)更新
                                Function f = new Function();
                                f.setName("values");
                                f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                                return f;
                            } else {
                                Expression expression = null;
                                // 创建 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 子句的更新逻辑表达式
                                try {
                                    expression = CCJSqlParserUtil.parseExpression(String.format(updateCondition, field, field));
                                } catch (JSQLParserException e) {
                                    throw new RuntimeException("ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 表达式出错");
                                }
                                return expression;
                            }
                        }
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
            insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        }
        return insert.toString();
    }

    /**
     * 特征表生成sql create_time不变，update_time变
     * @param tableName
     * @param tableFields
     * @param duplicateUpdateFields
     * @param updateCondition 更新条件 eg:IF(create_time is null or create_time <= VALUES(create_time), VALUES(%s), %s)
     * @return
     */
    public static String generateOldFeatureInsertSql(String tableName, List<String> tableFields, List<String> duplicateUpdateFields, String updateCondition) {
        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(tableName));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFields.stream().map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = columns.stream().map(field ->
                StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`create_time`") || StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`update_time`") ?
                        getUnixTimestampExpression() : new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        if (!CollUtil.isEmpty(duplicateUpdateFields)) {
            List<Column> duplicateUpdateColumns = duplicateUpdateFields.stream().filter(item -> !StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(item, "create_time"))
                    .map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(duplicateUpdateColumns);
            List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = duplicateUpdateColumns.stream()
                    .map(field -> {
                        if(StrUtil.isEmpty(updateCondition)){
                            Function f = new Function();
                            f.setName("values");
                            f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                            return f;
                        } else {
                            if (StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(field.getColumnName(), "`update_time`")) {
                                //update_time使用values(update_time)更新
                                Function f = new Function();
                                f.setName("values");
                                f.setParameters(new ExpressionList(field));
                                return f;
                            } else {
                                Expression expression = null;
                                // 创建 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 子句的更新逻辑表达式
                                try {
                                    expression = CCJSqlParserUtil.parseExpression(String.format(updateCondition, field, field));
                                } catch (JSQLParserException e) {
                                    throw new RuntimeException("ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 表达式出错");
                                }
                                return expression;
                            }
                        }
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
            insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        }
        return insert.toString();
    }

    /**
     * 生成离线初始化sql
     * @param tableFields
     * @param tableName
     * @param isUpsertMode
     * @return
     */
    public static String generateInsertSqlForOffline(List<String> tableFields, String tableName, Boolean isUpsertMode) {
        // 构建插入语句
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        // 配置表
        insert.setTable(new Table(tableName));
        // 配置列
        List<Column> columns = tableFields.stream().map(item -> String.format("`%s`", item)).map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);
        // 配置ItemsList
        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> valueExpressions = columns.stream().map(field -> new JdbcParameter()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        expressionList.setExpressions(valueExpressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);

        if (isUpsertMode) {
            // 配置DuplicateUpdateColumns
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(columns);
            // 配置DuplicateUpdateExpressionList,如果是window_create_time字段,则不更新
            List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = columns.stream()
                    .map(field -> {
                        Function f = new Function();
                        f.setName("values");
                        ExpressionList list = new ExpressionList();
                        List<Expression> expressions = new ArrayList<>();
                        expressions.add(field);
                        list.setExpressions(expressions);
                        f.setParameters(list);
                        return f;
                    }).collect(Collectors.toList());
            insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
            insert.setUseDuplicate(true);
        }
        return insert.toString();
    }

    public static DbInfo queryDbInfo(String connName, DataBaseType dataBaseType) {
        String sql = "SELECT " +
                " m.HOST, " +
                " m.PORT, " +
                " c.USER, " +
                " c.PASSWORD " +
                "FROM " +
                " taskinfodb.%s c " +
                " JOIN %s m ON m.catalog_id = c.catalog_id  " +
                "WHERE " +
                " m.is_deleted = 0  " +
                " AND c.is_deleted = 0 " +
                " and conn_name= ?";
        String dbConnTable = null;
        String dbTable = null;
        if (dataBaseType == DataBaseType.MYSQL) {
            dbConnTable = "t_mysql_conn_info";
            dbTable = "t_mysql_info";
        } else if (dataBaseType == DataBaseType.PRESTO) {
            dbConnTable = "t_presto_conn_info";
            dbTable = "t_presto_info";
        } else if (dataBaseType == DataBaseType.HIVE) {
            dbConnTable = "t_hive_conn_info";
            dbTable = "t_hive_info";
        }

        sql = String.format(sql, dbConnTable, dbTable);

        try {
            List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(connName, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
            List<Map<String, Object>> result = DbService.queryDb(Constants.METADATADB, sql, lstSqlParam, null);
            if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(result)) {
                String host = result.get(0).get("HOST").toString();
                String port = result.get(0).get("PORT").toString();
                String user = result.get(0).get("USER").toString();
                String encodePassword = result.get(0).get("PASSWORD").toString();
                String password = CryptoUtil.decode(encodePassword);
                return new DbInfo(host, port, user, password);
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
        }
        return null;
    }

    public static List<String> getSqlParams(String sql) {
        List<String> result = new ArrayList<>();
        String pattern = "\\$\\{[^}]+}";
        Pattern r = Pattern.compile(pattern);
        while (true) {
            Matcher m = r.matcher(sql);
            if (m.find()) {
                String g = m.group();
                String param = g.substring(2, g.length() - 1);
                result.add(param);
                sql = m.replaceFirst("");
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    public static String replaceParams(String sql, String value) {
        String pattern = "\\$\\{[^}]+}";
        Pattern r = Pattern.compile(pattern);
        while (true) {
            Matcher m = r.matcher(sql);
            if (m.find()) {
                sql = m.replaceAll(value);
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        return sql;
    }

    public static List<String> queryTableFields(String catalog, String tableName) {
        DbMetaDataTaskHandler handler = new DbMetaDataTaskHandler();
        TableMetaData tableMetaData = handler.getTableMetaData(catalog, tableName);
        if (tableMetaData == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException(String.format("catalog:%s,table:%s is not exist", catalog, tableName));
        }
        return tableMetaData.getFields().stream().map(Field::getName).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    /**
     * 生成UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3)) * 1000表达式
     */
    public static Expression getUnixTimestampExpression() {
        Function now = new Function();
        now.setName("now");
        ExpressionList nowExpressionList = new ExpressionList();
        ArrayList<Expression> expressions1 = new ArrayList<>();
        expressions1.add(new LongValue(3));
        nowExpressionList.setExpressions(expressions1);
        now.setParameters(nowExpressionList);

        Function leftExpression = new Function();
        leftExpression.setName("UNIX_TIMESTAMP");
        ExpressionList unixExpressionList = new ExpressionList();
        ArrayList<Expression> expressions2 = new ArrayList<>();
        expressions2.add(now);
        unixExpressionList.setExpressions(expressions2);
        leftExpression.setParameters(unixExpressionList);

        LongValue rightExpression = new LongValue(1000);
        return new Multiplication().withLeftExpression(leftExpression).withRightExpression(rightExpression);
    }

    /**
     * 获取主键字段
     * @param catalog
     * @param schema
     * @param table
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static List<String> getPrimaryColumnNameList(String catalog, String schema, String table) throws Exception {
        String fullTable = schema + "." + table;
        List<String> primaryColumnNameList = new ArrayList<>();
        try {

            String sql = "SHOW CREATE TABLE " + fullTable;
            List<Map<String, Object>> res  = DbService.queryDb(catalog,sql,new ArrayList<>(),null);
            String ddl  = (String) res.get(0).get("Create Table");

            Statement statement = CCJSqlParserUtil.parse(ddl);

            if (statement instanceof CreateTable) {
                CreateTable createTable = (CreateTable) statement;
                Table tableObj = createTable.getTable();

                List<ColumnDefinition> columnDefinitions = createTable.getColumnDefinitions();
                List<Index> indexes = createTable.getIndexes();

                log.info("Table: " + tableObj.getName() + "  indexes :" + indexes.toString());

                List<String> primaryKeys = Arrays.asList("PRIMARY", "KEY");
                for (ColumnDefinition columnDefinition : columnDefinitions) {
                    List<String> columnSpecs = columnDefinition.getColumnSpecs();
                    if (columnSpecs != null) {
                        if (primaryKeys.equals(columnSpecs)) {
                            log.info("Primary key column from columnDefinitions : " + columnDefinition.getColumnName());
                            primaryColumnNameList.add(columnDefinition.getColumnName());
                        }
                    }
                }

                for (Index index : indexes) {
                    if (index.getType().equalsIgnoreCase("PRIMARY KEY")) {
                        log.info("Primary key columns from getIndexes : " + index.getColumnsNames());
                        primaryColumnNameList.addAll(index.getColumnsNames());

                    }
                }

            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
            throw new Exception(e);
        }
        if (primaryColumnNameList.isEmpty()) {
            throw new Exception(fullTable  + " can  not find primary columns ");
        }
        List<String> primaryColumnNameListNew = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String col : primaryColumnNameList){
            primaryColumnNameListNew.add(col.replace("`",""));
        }
        return primaryColumnNameListNew;
    }

    /**
     * 获取递增主键字段
     * @param catalog
     * @param schema
     * @param table
     * @return
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public static List<String> getAutoIncrPrimaryColumnNameList(String catalog, String schema, String table) throws Exception {
        String fullTable = schema + "." + table;
        List<String> primaryColumns = new ArrayList<>();
        List<String> autoIncrColumns = new ArrayList<>();
        try {
            String sql = "SHOW CREATE TABLE " + fullTable;
            List<Map<String, Object>> res  = DbService.queryDb(catalog,sql,new ArrayList<>(),null);
            String ddl  = (String) res.get(0).get("Create Table");

            Statement statement = CCJSqlParserUtil.parse(ddl);

            if (statement instanceof CreateTable) {
                CreateTable createTable = (CreateTable) statement;
                Table tableObj = createTable.getTable();

                List<ColumnDefinition> columnDefinitions = createTable.getColumnDefinitions();
                List<Index> indexes = createTable.getIndexes();

                log.info("Table: " + tableObj.getName() + "  indexes :" + indexes.toString());

                for (ColumnDefinition columnDefinition : columnDefinitions) {
                    List<String> columnSpecs = columnDefinition.getColumnSpecs();
                    if (columnSpecs != null) {
                        if (columnSpecs.contains("AUTO_INCREMENT")) {
                            autoIncrColumns.add(columnDefinition.getColumnName());
                        }
                        if (columnSpecs.contains("PRIMARY") && columnSpecs.contains("KEY")) {
                            primaryColumns.add(columnDefinition.getColumnName());
                        }
                    }
                }
                for (Index index : indexes) {
                    if (index.getType().equalsIgnoreCase("PRIMARY KEY")) {
                        log.info("Primary key columns from getIndexes : " + index.getColumnsNames());
                        primaryColumns.addAll(index.getColumnsNames());
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
            throw new Exception(e);
        }
        if (primaryColumns.isEmpty()) {
            throw new Exception(fullTable + " cannot find primary columns.");
        }
        List<String> autoIncrementPrimaryKeys = primaryColumns.stream()
                .filter(autoIncrColumns::contains)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (autoIncrementPrimaryKeys.isEmpty()) {
            throw new Exception(fullTable + " does not have any auto-increment primary key columns.");
        }
        return autoIncrementPrimaryKeys.stream()
                .map(col -> col.replaceAll("`", ""))
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/StringUtils.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

import cn.hutool.core.util.ReUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2021-07-05.
 */
@Slf4j
public class StringUtils {

    private static final String numberReg = "[0-9]*";
    /**
     * 传入参数 驼峰的名字 如 StringUtil  -> string_util
     * @param camelCase
     * @return
     */
    public static String camelToUnderscore(String camelCase){

        Matcher matcher = CheckUtils.UPPER_CHAR_PATTERN.matcher(camelCase);
        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
        while(matcher.find()){
            matcher.appendReplacement(sb, "_" + matcher.group(0).toLowerCase());
        }
        matcher.appendTail(sb);
        return sb.substring(1, sb.length());
    }

    public static String getValueOrNull(Object o) {
        return Objects.isNull(o) ? "null": o.toString();
    }

    public static boolean isEmpty(String chars) {
        return chars == null || chars.trim().isEmpty();
    }

    /**
     * 正则提前字符串中的IP地址
     */
    public static String getIp(String ipString) {
        Matcher m = CheckUtils.IP_CONTENT_PATTERN.matcher(ipString);
        if (m.find()) {
            return m.group();
        }
        return null;
    }

    public static String getCleanPhoneNumber(String phoneNumber) {
        if (phoneNumber == null) {
            return null;
        }

        // 20200723: 新增去空格筛选
        phoneNumber = phoneNumber.replaceAll("\\s","");

        // 20200709: 由于时常有带其他编码格式数字的号码进到图库，导致下游特征报错，
        //           现在在流入做限制，把带有非 0-9 的字符号码全部过滤
        String numbers = "0123456789+-";
        for (String c : phoneNumber.split("")) {
            if (!numbers.contains(c)) {
                return null;
            }
        }

        // 20200709 以前旧的处理逻辑
        if (phoneNumber.startsWith("+")) {
            //替换所有非数字符号
            phoneNumber = "00" + phoneNumber.replaceAll("\\D", "");
        }
        if (phoneNumber.startsWith("0060") || phoneNumber.startsWith("0062") || phoneNumber.startsWith("0063") || phoneNumber.startsWith("0084")) {
            phoneNumber = phoneNumber.substring(4);
        }
        if (phoneNumber.startsWith("00")) {
            return phoneNumber;
        }
        if (!phoneNumber.startsWith("0")) {
            phoneNumber = "0" + phoneNumber;
        }

        // 20201209 新增按长度限制
        if (phoneNumber.length() < 10) {
            return null;
        }

        // 20210601 新增印尼电话号码格式校验
//        if (!Pattern.matches("^08[0-9]{8,11}$", phoneNumber)) {
//            return null;
//        }

        return phoneNumber;
    }

    public static String getFbidByFacebookResponse(String facebook) {
        String fbid = null;
        try {
            int start = facebook.indexOf("graphObject:");
            int end = facebook.indexOf(", error");
            if (start != -1 && end != -1) {
                String graphObj = facebook.substring(start + 12, end);
                if (!org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils.trimToNull(graphObj).equals("null")) {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = JSON.parseObject(graphObj);
                    fbid = jsonObject.getString("id");
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            log.error("获取Facebook id失败：{}", facebook);
        }
        return fbid;
    }

    public static String getCleanDeviceId(String deviceId) {
        if (com.akulaku.core.util.StringUtils.isEmpty(deviceId) || deviceId.equals("unknown")) {
            return null;
        }
        return deviceId;
    }

    public static String getCleanImei(String imei) {
        return imei != null ? org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils.trimToNull(imei):null;
    }

    public static Long convertLong(String str) {
        Long ret;
        try {
            ret = Long.parseLong(str);
            if (ret <= 0) {
                return null;
            }
        } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
            ret = null;
        }
        return ret;
    }

    /**
     * 新版本电话号码清理
     * @param phoneNumber
     * @return
     */
    public static String cleanPhoneNumber(String phoneNumber) {
        if (phoneNumber == null) {
            return null;
        }

        //1、提取数字
        List<String> numbers = ReUtil.findAll(CheckUtils.NUMBER_PATTERN, phoneNumber, 0);
        String phone = String.join("", numbers);
        if ("".equals(phone)) {
            return null;
        }

        //2、替换区号
        if (phone.startsWith("60") || phone.startsWith("62") || phone.startsWith("63") || phone.startsWith("84")) {
            phone = phone.substring(2);
        }
        if (phone.startsWith("0060") || phone.startsWith("0062") || phone.startsWith("0063") || phone.startsWith("0084")) {
            phone = phone.substring(4);
        }
        // 20201209 新增按长度限制
        if (phone.length() < 8 || phone.length() > 15) {
            return null;
        }
        if (!phone.startsWith("0")) {
            phone = String.format("0%s", phone);
        }
        return phone;
    }

    /**
     * 获取简单清洗的字符串
     * @param str 需清洗的字符串
     * @param length 保留的字符串长度
     * @return
     */
    public static String getSimpleCleanString(String str, Integer length) {
        if (str == null) {
            return null;
        }
        String result = str.trim();
        if(length != null && length > 0 && result.length() > length){
            result = result.substring(0, length);
        }
        return result;
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/TimeUtils.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2021-07-21.
 */
public class TimeUtils {
    public static long nowMillisTime() {
        return System.currentTimeMillis();
    }

    public static long costMillis(long startTime) {
        return System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime;
    }

    public static int longToIntWithBitMixing(long in) {
        in = (in ^ (in >>> 30)) * 0xbf58476d1ce4e5b9L;
        in = (in ^ (in >>> 27)) * 0x94d049bb133111ebL;
        in = in ^ (in >>> 31);
        return (int) in;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/TopicBeanUtils.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

import cn.hutool.core.lang.ClassScanner;
import com.akulaku.core.annotation.Topic;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.JarURLConnection;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.URLDecoder;
import java.util.Enumeration;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.jar.JarEntry;
import java.util.jar.JarFile;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2021-07-06.
 */
@Slf4j
public class TopicBeanUtils {
    public static Class<?> getTopicBeanByName(String topicName) {
        Set<Class<?>> classList = ClassScanner.scanPackage("com.akulaku.define");
        for (Class<?> clazz : classList) {
            Topic topic = clazz.getAnnotation(Topic.class);
            if (topic != null && StringUtils.equalsIgnoreCase(topic.value().trim(), topicName.trim())) {
                return clazz;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * 从包package中获取所有的Class
     *
     * @param pack
     * @return
     */
    public static Set<Class<?>> getClasses(String pack) {
        // 第一个class类的集合
        Set<Class<?>> classes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
        // 是否循环迭代
        boolean recursive = true;
        // 获取包的名字 并进行替换
        String packageName = pack;
        String packageDirName = packageName.replace('.', '/');
        // 定义一个枚举的集合 并进行循环来处理这个目录下的things
        Enumeration<URL> dirs;
        try {
            dirs = Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader().getResources(packageDirName);
            // 循环迭代下去
            while (dirs.hasMoreElements()) {
                // 获取下一个元素
                URL url = dirs.nextElement();
                // 得到协议的名称
                String protocol = url.getProtocol();
                // 如果是以文件的形式保存在服务器上
                if ("file".equals(protocol)) {
                    // 获取包的物理路径
                    String filePath = URLDecoder.decode(url.getFile(), "UTF-8");
                    // 以文件的方式扫描整个包下的文件 并添加到集合中
                    findAndAddClassesInPackageByFile(packageName, filePath, recursive, classes);
                } else if ("jar".equals(protocol)) {
                    try {
                        // 如果是jar包文件
                        // 定义一个JarFile
                        // 获取jar
                        JarFile jar = ((JarURLConnection) url.openConnection()).getJarFile();
                        // 从此jar包 得到一个枚举类
                        Enumeration<JarEntry> entries = jar.entries();
                        // 同样的进行循环迭代
                        while (entries.hasMoreElements()) {
                            // 获取jar里的一个实体 可以是目录 和一些jar包里的其他文件 如META-INF等文件
                            JarEntry entry = entries.nextElement();
                            String name = entry.getName();
                            // 如果是以/开头的
                            if (name.charAt(0) == '/') {
                                // 获取后面的字符串
                                name = name.substring(1);
                            }
                            // 如果前半部分和定义的包名相同
                            if (name.startsWith(packageDirName)) {
                                int idx = name.lastIndexOf('/');
                                // 如果以"/"结尾 是一个包
                                if (idx != -1) {
                                    // 获取包名 把"/"替换成"."
                                    packageName = name.substring(0, idx).replace('/', '.');
                                }
                                // 如果可以迭代下去 并且是一个包
                                if ((idx != -1) || recursive) {
                                    // 如果是一个.class文件 而且不是目录
                                    if (name.endsWith(".class") && !entry.isDirectory()) {
                                        // 去掉后面的".class" 获取真正的类名
                                        String className = name.substring(packageName.length() + 1, name.length() - 6);
                                        try {
                                            // 添加到classes
                                            classes.add(Class.forName(packageName + '.' + className));
                                        } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
                                            log.error(e.toString());
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        log.error(e.toString());
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            log.error(e.toString());
        }

        return classes;
    }

    /**
     * 以文件的形式来获取包下的所有Class
     *
     * @param packageName
     * @param packagePath
     * @param recursive
     * @param classes
     */
    public static void findAndAddClassesInPackageByFile(String packageName,
                                                        String packagePath,
                                                        final boolean recursive,
                                                        Set<Class<?>> classes) {
        // 获取此包的目录 建立一个File
        File dir = new File(packagePath);
        // 如果不存在或者 也不是目录就直接返回
        if (!dir.exists() || !dir.isDirectory()) {
            return;
        }
        // 如果存在 就获取包下的所有文件 包括目录
        // 自定义过滤规则 如果可以循环(包含子目录) 或则是以.class结尾的文件(编译好的java类文件)
        File[] dirFiles = dir.listFiles(file -> (recursive && file.isDirectory()) || (file.getName().endsWith(".class")));
        // 循环所有文件
        for (File file : dirFiles) {
            // 如果是目录 则继续扫描
            if (file.isDirectory()) {
                findAndAddClassesInPackageByFile(packageName + "." + file.getName(), file.getAbsolutePath(), recursive,
                        classes);
            } else {
                // 如果是java类文件 去掉后面的.class 只留下类名
                String className = file.getName().substring(0, file.getName().length() - 6);
                try {
                    // 添加到集合中去
                    classes.add(Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader().loadClass(packageName + '.' + className));
                } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
                    log.error(e.toString());
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        Class<?> afiLoanBill = getTopicBeanByName("afi_feature_dwdrt_afi_loan_bill");
        assert afiLoanBill != null;
        System.out.println(afiLoanBill.getName());
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/util/YamlParser.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.util;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.yaml.snakeyaml.Yaml;
import org.yaml.snakeyaml.constructor.Constructor;
import org.yaml.snakeyaml.representer.Representer;

import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2021-07-01.
 */
@Slf4j
public class YamlParser {
    public static <T> T parse(Class<T> c, String yamlFile) {
        T t = null;
        try (FileInputStream fileInputStream = new FileInputStream(yamlFile)) {
            Representer representer = new Representer();
            representer.getPropertyUtils().setSkipMissingProperties(true);
            Yaml yaml = new Yaml(new Constructor(c), representer);
            t = yaml.load(fileInputStream);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            log.error("parse {} error, please check", yamlFile, e);
            System.exit(1);
        }
        return t;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueConsumer.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.work_queue;

import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

import java.util.concurrent.BlockingQueue;


@Slf4j
public class WorkQueueConsumer implements Runnable {

    private final BlockingQueue<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> queue;
    private final KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler;
    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;

    private boolean isShutdown;

    public WorkQueueConsumer(ProcessorConfig processorConfig, BlockingQueue<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> queue, KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.queue = queue;
        this.kafkaMessageHandler = kafkaMessageHandler;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        while (!isShutdown) {
            try {
                ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = queue.take();
                kafkaMessageHandler.handlerMessage(record);
            } catch (InterruptedException interruptedException) {
                log.info("interrupted exception");
            } catch (Throwable e) {
                log.error("queue handle error,system exit");
                System.exit(1);
            }

        }
    }

    public void stop() {
        isShutdown = true;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueConsumer.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueHelper.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.work_queue;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.TopicDbInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.config.WorkQueueInfo;
import com.akulaku.core.kafka.KafkaMessageHandler;
import com.akulaku.core.util.SqlUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.util.concurrent.MoreExecutors;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.*;


@Slf4j
public class WorkQueueHelper {
    private final Map<Integer, BlockingQueue<ConsumerRecord<String, String>>> queueMap = new HashMap<>();
    private final List<WorkQueueConsumer> workQueueConsumers = new ArrayList<>();
    private final ExecutorService workQueueExecutorService;
    private final ProcessorConfig processorConfig;
    private final WorkQueueInfo workQueueInfo;
    private final KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler;
    private final List<String> primaryKeys;


    public WorkQueueHelper(ProcessorConfig processorConfig, KafkaMessageHandler kafkaMessageHandler) {
        this.processorConfig = processorConfig;
        this.workQueueInfo = processorConfig.getWorkQueueInfo();
        WorkQueueInfo workQueueInfo = processorConfig.getWorkQueueInfo();
        this.workQueueExecutorService = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(workQueueInfo.getQueueConsumerNum(), new WorkQueueThreadFactory(this.processorConfig.getProcessorName()));
        this.kafkaMessageHandler = kafkaMessageHandler;
        TopicDbInfo topicDbInfo = workQueueInfo.getTopicDbInfo();
        if (topicDbInfo != null) {
            String catalog = topicDbInfo.getCatalog();
            String schema = topicDbInfo.getSchema();
            String table = topicDbInfo.getTable();
            try {
                primaryKeys = SqlUtils.getPrimaryColumnNameList(catalog, schema, table);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        } else {
            primaryKeys = Arrays.asList(workQueueInfo.getPrimaryKeys().split(","));
        }
    }

    public void start() {
        for (int i = 0; i < workQueueInfo.getQueueConsumerNum(); i++) {
            BlockingQueue<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> queue = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>(workQueueInfo.getQueueSize());
            queueMap.put(i, queue);
            WorkQueueConsumer workQueueConsumer = new WorkQueueConsumer(processorConfig, queue, kafkaMessageHandler);
            workQueueConsumers.add(workQueueConsumer);
            this.workQueueExecutorService.execute(workQueueConsumer);
        }
    }

    public void stop() {
        log.info("shutdown queue consumer");
        for (WorkQueueConsumer consumer : workQueueConsumers) {
            consumer.stop();
        }
        if (workQueueExecutorService != null && !workQueueExecutorService.isShutdown()) {
            MoreExecutors.shutdownAndAwaitTermination(workQueueExecutorService, 30, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
        }
        kafkaMessageHandler.stopOffsetExecutor();
        log.info("shutdown queue success");
    }

    public void putQueue(ConsumerRecord<String, String> record) {
        String recordMsg = record.value();
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = JSON.parseObject(recordMsg);
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();
        TopicDbInfo topicDbInfo = workQueueInfo.getTopicDbInfo();
        if (topicDbInfo != null) {
            JSONObject json = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData") : kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
            for (String pk : primaryKeys) {
                String value = json.getString(pk);
                builder.append(value);
            }
        } else {
            for (String pk : primaryKeys) {
                String[] fields = pk.split("\\.");
                String keyName = fields[fields.length - 1];
                if (fields.length > 1) {
                    JSONObject targetObject = kafkaMsgJson;
                    fields = Arrays.copyOfRange(fields, 0, fields.length - 1);
                    for (String field : fields) {
                        targetObject = targetObject.getJSONObject(field);
                    }
                    String value = targetObject.getString(keyName);
                    builder.append(value);
                } else {
                    String value = kafkaMsgJson.getString(keyName);
                    builder.append(value);
                }
            }
        }

        String allKeyValue = builder.toString();
        int hashCode = allKeyValue.hashCode();
        int index = Math.abs(hashCode) % workQueueInfo.getQueueConsumerNum();
        BlockingQueue<ConsumerRecord<String, String>> queue = queueMap.get(index);
        try {
            queue.put(record);
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueHelper.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueThreadFactory.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.work_queue;

import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;


public class WorkQueueThreadFactory implements ThreadFactory {

    private final AtomicInteger index = new AtomicInteger();

    private final String processorName;

    public WorkQueueThreadFactory(String processorName) {
        this.processorName = processorName;
    }

    @Override
    public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
        index.incrementAndGet();
        return new Thread(r, String.format("%s-work-queue-thread-%d", processorName, index.get()));
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/core/work_queue/WorkQueueThreadFactory.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnAccountApplyUidName/OwnAccountApplyUidNameProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnAccountApplyUidName;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTable;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTableData;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * @author lindr
 * created on 2022/7/22
 */

@Slf4j
public class OwnAccountApplyUidNameProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor{

    protected OwnAccountApplyUidNameProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {

        this.addFilterNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            String eventType = kafkaData.getEventType();
            if ("INSERT".equals(eventType)) {
                return false;
            }else if("UPDATE".equals(eventType)){
                return false;
            }else {
                return true;
            }

        }, "kafka_data_filter");

        this.addCalcNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyTableData rowData = kafkaData.getRowData();
            Map<String, Object> fields = new HashMap<>();
            fields.put("apply_id", rowData.getApplyId());
            fields.put("uid", rowData.getUid());
            String fName = nameHandle(rowData.getFirstName());
            String mName = nameHandle(rowData.getMiddleName());
            String lName = nameHandle(rowData.getLastName());
            String name = getName(fName, mName, lName);
            fields.put("name", name);
            fields.put("first_name", fName);
            fields.put("middle_name", mName);
            fields.put("last_name", lName);
            return fields;
        }, "cv_fields");

        String sql = "insert into odsrt.r_account_apply_etl" +
                " (apply_id, uid, name, first_name, middle_name, last_name, update_time, create_time,feat_update_time)" +
                " values(?,?,?,?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)" +
                " ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE " +
                " uid=values(uid)," +
                " name=values(name)," +
                " first_name=values(first_name)," +
                " middle_name=values(middle_name)," +
                " last_name=values(last_name)," +
                " update_time=values(update_time)," +
                " feat_update_time=values(feat_update_time)";

        this.addSql(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, "insert_into_mysql",
                Arrays.asList("cv_fields.apply_id", "cv_fields.uid", "cv_fields.name",
                        "cv_fields.first_name", "cv_fields.middle_name", "cv_fields.last_name")
                , sql);
    }

    public String nameHandle(String name) {
        if (name == null){
            return "";
        }
        name = name.toLowerCase();
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }

    public String getName(String fstName, String midName, String lstName) {
        if (fstName == null) {
            fstName = "";
        }
        if (midName == null) {
            midName = "";
        }
        if (lstName == null) {
            lstName = "";
        }
        String name = fstName + midName + lstName;
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnAccountApplyUidName/OwnAccountApplyUidNameProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnKycUidNameBirthDate/OwnKycUidNameBirthDateProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnKycUidNameBirthDate;


import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTable;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTableData;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * @author lindr
 * created on 2022/5/31
 */
@Slf4j
public class OwnKycUidNameBirthDateProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor{

    protected OwnKycUidNameBirthDateProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }
    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {

        this.addFilterNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            String eventType = kafkaData.getEventType();
            if ("DELETE".equals(eventType)){
                return true;
            }else {
                return false;
            }

        }, "kafka_data_filter");

        this.addCalcNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            OwnBankFeatureOdsRtTAccountApplyKycRequestTableData rowData = kafkaData.getRowData();
            Map<String, Object> fields = new HashMap<>();
            fields.put("kyc_id", rowData.getKycId());
            fields.put("own_uid", rowData.getUid());
            String name = getName(rowData.getFirstName(), rowData.getMiddleName(), rowData.getLastName());
            fields.put("name", name);
            fields.put("birth_date", rowData.getBirthDate());
//            log.info("add log kyc_id:"+ rowData.getKycId() + " own_uid:"+rowData.getUid() + "name: "+ name + " birth_date" + rowData.getBirthDate());
            return fields;
        }, "cv_fields");

        String sql = "insert into dimrtfeaturedb.r_kyc_ownuid_name_birthdate" +
                " (kyc_id, uid, name, birth_date, update_time, create_time)" +
                " values(?,?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)" +
                " ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE " +
                " uid=values(uid)," +
                " name=values(name)," +
                " birth_date=values(birth_date)," +
                " update_time=values(update_time)";

        this.addSql(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, "insert_into_mysql",
                Arrays.asList("cv_fields.kyc_id", "cv_fields.own_uid", "cv_fields.name", "cv_fields.birth_date")
                , sql);
    }

    public String getName(String fstName, String midName, String lstName){
        if (fstName == null){fstName = "";}
        if (midName == null){midName = "";}
        if (lstName == null){lstName = "";}
        String name = fstName + midName + lstName;
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "").toLowerCase();
        return name;
    }
}
```

```java
            new FeatureDomain("appid", "app_id")

            OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
            "dimrtfeaturedb",
            "appid_relate_features");
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.StringUtils;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentArrivalTime1d;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.function.Consumer;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

@Slf4j
public class OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D = "own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D = "own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE = "own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d_change";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE = "own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change";

    public static Long LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME = 0L;

    public static Map<String, Map<String, Integer>> APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP = new HashMap<>();

    // 注意，这里是2个斜杠，已经验证过了
    public static final Pattern REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("^[1-9][0]+(\\.[0]+)$");

    public OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    // 注意，这里得用4个斜杠，其中两个斜杠是java字符串转义
    private static final String FULL_CALC_FEATURES =
            "select app_id, count(id) as own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d, " +
                    "count(case when payment_amt REGEXP '^[1-9][0]+(\\\\.[0]+)$' then id end) as own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_payment_arrival_time_1d " +
                    "where arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-86400000 " +
                    "and order_status='S' " +
                    "and app_id is not null " +
                    "and app_id != '' " +
                    "group by 1 ";

    private static final String UPSERT_APPID_FEATURES = "insert into dimrtfeaturedb.appid_relate_features " +
            "(appid," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d," +
            "feat_create_time," +
            "feat_update_time) " +
            "values " +
            "(?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000) " +
            "on duplicate key update " +
            "own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d=values(own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d)," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d=values(own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d)," +
            "feat_update_time=values(feat_update_time)";

    @Override
    public void start() {
        ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor();
        scheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(this::fullCalcFeature, 0, 2, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
        super.start();
    }

    public void fullCalcFeature(){
        // 全量计算
        List<Map<String, Object>> fullCalcResults = null;
        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        try {
            fullCalcResults = DbService.queryDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, FULL_CALC_FEATURES, sqlParams, this.taskInfo);
            LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME = System.currentTimeMillis();
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        // 全量计算的值写入到变量里，并更新数据库
        Set<String> hasCalcAppIdSet = new HashSet<>();
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(fullCalcResults)) {
            for (Map<String, Object> calcMap: fullCalcResults) {
                String appId = (String) calcMap.get("app_id");
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d = Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(calcMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D)));
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d = Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(calcMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D)));

                hasCalcAppIdSet.add(appId);
                Map<String, Integer> featureCntMap = APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.get(appId);
                if (featureCntMap == null){
                    featureCntMap = new HashMap<>();
                }
                featureCntMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d);
                featureCntMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d);
                upsert(appId, own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d, own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d);
                APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.put(appId, featureCntMap);
            }
        }

        // 如果全量计算没有统计到某个appId，即该appId的两个特征值都是0
        for (Map.Entry<String, Map<String, Integer>> entry: APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.entrySet()) {
            if (!hasCalcAppIdSet.contains(entry.getKey())) {
                Map<String, Integer> map = entry.getValue();
                map.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                map.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                upsert(entry.getKey(), 0, 0);
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        Consumer<CalcContextData> consumer1 = data -> {
            Object msg = data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            if (msg == null) {
                return;
            }
            Map<String, Integer> changeMap = null;
            String appId = null;
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentArrivalTime1d obj = (OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentArrivalTime1d) msg;
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData beforeData = obj.getBeforeData();
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData rowData = obj.getRowData();
            // 确定变化情况
            if ((EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType())) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME) {
                appId = rowData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkInsert(rowData);
            } else if (EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType()) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME) {
                appId = beforeData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkDelete(beforeData);
            } else if (EventTypeEnum.UPDATE.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType()) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME){
                appId = rowData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkUpdate(beforeData, rowData);
            }

            if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(appId)){
                Map<String, Integer> featureCnt = APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.get(appId);
                if (featureCnt == null){
                    featureCnt = new HashMap<>();
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                }

                boolean hasChange = false;
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d_change = changeMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE);
                if (own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d_change != null) {
                    hasChange = true;
                    int value = featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D) + own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d_change;
                    if (value < 0){
                        value = 0;
                    }
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, value);
                }
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change = changeMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE);
                if (own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change != null) {
                    hasChange = true;
                    int value = featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D) + own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change;
                    if (value < 0){
                        value = 0;
                    }
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, value);
                }
                APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.put(appId, featureCnt);
                if (hasChange) {
                    upsert(appId, featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D), featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D));
                }
            }
        };
        this.addConsumerNode(consumer1, "consumer1");
    }

    private void upsert(String appId, Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d, Integer own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d){
        List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(appId, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_1d, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_1d, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
        try {
            DbService.insertDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, UPSERT_APPID_FEATURES, sqlParamList, taskInfo);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkInsert(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData data) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();
        String orderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(data.getOrderStatus());
        Long arrivalTime = data.getArrivalTime();
        String paymentAmt = data.getPaymentAmt().toString();
        Matcher regularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(paymentAmt);
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")  && arrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")  && arrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && regularAmtMatcher.matches()) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkDelete(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData data) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();
        String orderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(data.getOrderStatus());
        Long arrivalTime = data.getArrivalTime();
        String paymentAmt = data.getPaymentAmt().toString();
        Matcher regularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(paymentAmt);
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        if (orderStatus.equals("S") && regularAmtMatcher.matches()) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkUpdate(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData beforeData,
                                             OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTPaymentTableData rowData) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();

        String beforeOrderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(beforeData.getOrderStatus());
        Long beforeArrivalTime = beforeData.getArrivalTime();
        String beforePaymentAmt = beforeData.getPaymentAmt().toString();
        Matcher beforeRegularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(beforePaymentAmt);

        String rowOrderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(rowData.getOrderStatus());
        Long rowArrivalTime = rowData.getArrivalTime();
        String rowPaymentAmt = rowData.getPaymentAmt().toString();
        Matcher rowRegularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(rowPaymentAmt);

        // 如果以前满足，现在不满足的话
        if ((beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)
                && !(rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        // 如果以前满足，现在不满足的话
        if ((beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && beforeRegularAmtMatcher.matches())
                && !(rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && rowRegularAmtMatcher.matches())) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        // 如果以前不满足，现在满足的话
        if (!(beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)
                && (rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        // 如果以前不满足，现在满足的话
        if (!(beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && beforeRegularAmtMatcher.matches())
                && (rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && rowRegularAmtMatcher.matches())) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYIN_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }
}
```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;

import static com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures.Common.APPID_DOMAIN;
import static com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures.Common.APPID_SINK;

public class OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {

    protected OwnPaymentRelateFeaturesProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_1_7 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_payment_arrival_time_10i " +
                    "where app_id = ${app_id} and arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 and order_status='S' ";

    private static final String FEATURE_4 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_payment_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T2 " +
                    "on T1.app_id = T2.app_id " +
                    "where T1.app_id = ${app_id} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.payment_amt>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T2.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.payment_amt=T2.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T2.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T2.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_payin_success_order_10i",
                        "count(id)",
                        FEATURE_1_7,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_shortterm_fastin_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_4,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_payin_regular_amt_success_order_10i",
                        "count(case when payment_amt REGEXP '^[1-9][0]+(\\\\.[0]+)$' then 1 end)",
                        FEATURE_1_7,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                )
        );
    }
}


```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnQrcodeOrderRelateFeaturesProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;
import static com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures.Common.*;

public class OwnQrcodeOrderRelateFeaturesProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {

    private static final String GET_CODE_SQL =
            "select code from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode where id = ? limit 1";

    protected OwnQrcodeOrderRelateFeaturesProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_3_8 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode as T2 " +
                    "on T1.qrcode_id = T2.id " +
                    "where T2.code = ${code} and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 and T1.status='S' ";

    private static final String FEATURE_5 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T2 " +
                    "on T1.app_id = T2.app_id " +
                    "where T2.app_id = ${app_id} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.amount>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.status='S' " +
                    "and T2.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.amount=T2.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T2.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T2.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    private static final String FEATURE_6 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode as T2 on T1.qrcode_id = T2.id " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T3 on T1.app_id = T3.app_id " +
                    "where T2.code = ${code} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.amount>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.status='S' " +
                    "and T3.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.amount=T3.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T3.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T3.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    @Override
    public JSONObject beforeFilterProcess(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName()) ? beforeData : rowData;
        Long qrcodeId = data.getLong("qrcode_id");
        data.put("code", null);
        if (qrcodeId != null) {
            List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
            sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(qrcodeId, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
            List<Map<String, Object>> results = null;
            try {
                results = DbService.queryDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, GET_CODE_SQL, sqlParamList, taskInfo);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                Map<String, Object> info = results.get(0);
                data.put("code", info.get("code"));
            }
        }
        return kafkaMsgJson;
    }

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_qrcode_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_3_8,
                        0,
                        QRCODE_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        QRCODE_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_shortterm_fastout_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_5,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_qrcode_shortterm_fastinout_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_6,
                        0,
                        QRCODE_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        QRCODE_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_qrcode_regular_amt_success_order_10i",
                        "count(case when T1.amount REGEXP '^[1-9][0]+(\\\\.[0]+)$' then 1 end)",
                        FEATURE_3_8,
                        0,
                        QRCODE_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        QRCODE_SINK
                )
        );
    }
}


```
