### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnTransferRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.StringUtils;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferArrivalTime1d;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.function.Consumer;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

@Slf4j
public class OwnTransferRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D = "own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D = "own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE = "own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d_change";

    public static final String OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE = "own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change";

    public static Long LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME = 0L;

    public static Map<String, Map<String, Integer>> APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP = new HashMap<>();

    // 注意，这里是2个斜杠，已经验证过了
    public static final Pattern REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("^[1-9][0]+(\\.[0]+)$");

    public OwnTransferRelateFeaturesLocalCalcProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    // 注意，这里得用4个斜杠，其中两个斜杠是java字符串转义
    private static final String FULL_CALC_FEATURES =
            "select app_id, count(id) as own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d, " +
                    "count(case when transfer_amt REGEXP '^[1-9][0]+(\\\\.[0]+)$' then id end) as own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_1d " +
                    "where arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-86400000 " +
                    "and order_status='S' " +
                    "and app_id is not null " +
                    "and app_id != '' " +
                    "group by 1 ";

    private static final String UPSERT_APPID_FEATURES = "insert into dimrtfeaturedb.appid_relate_features " +
            "(appid," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d," +
            "feat_create_time," +
            "feat_update_time) " +
            "values " +
            "(?,?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000) " +
            "on duplicate key update " +
            "own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d=values(own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d)," +
            "own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d=values(own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d)," +
            "feat_update_time=values(feat_update_time)";

    @Override
    public void start() {
        ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService = Executors.newSingleThreadScheduledExecutor();
        scheduledExecutorService.scheduleWithFixedDelay(this::fullCalcFeature, 0, 2, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
        super.start();
    }

    public void fullCalcFeature(){
        // 全量计算
        List<Map<String, Object>> fullCalcResults = null;
        List<SqlParam> sqlParams = new ArrayList<>();
        try {
            fullCalcResults = DbService.queryDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, FULL_CALC_FEATURES, sqlParams, this.taskInfo);
            LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME = System.currentTimeMillis();
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }

        // 全量计算的值写入到变量里，并更新数据库
        Set<String> hasCalcAppIdSet = new HashSet<>();
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(fullCalcResults)) {
            for (Map<String, Object> calcMap: fullCalcResults) {
                String appId = (String) calcMap.get("app_id");
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d = Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(calcMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D)));
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d = Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(calcMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D)));

                hasCalcAppIdSet.add(appId);
                Map<String, Integer> featureCntMap = APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.get(appId);
                if (featureCntMap == null){
                    featureCntMap = new HashMap<>();
                }
                featureCntMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d);
                featureCntMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d);
                upsert(appId, own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d, own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d);
                APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.put(appId, featureCntMap);
            }
        }

        // 如果全量计算没有统计到某个appId，即该appId的两个特征值都是0
        for (Map.Entry<String, Map<String, Integer>> entry: APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.entrySet()) {
            if (!hasCalcAppIdSet.contains(entry.getKey())) {
                Map<String, Integer> map = entry.getValue();
                map.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                map.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                upsert(entry.getKey(), 0, 0);
            }
        }
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        Consumer<CalcContextData> consumer1 = data -> {
            Object msg = data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            if (msg == null) {
                return;
            }
            Map<String, Integer> changeMap = null;
            String appId = null;
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferArrivalTime1d obj = (OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferArrivalTime1d) msg;
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData beforeData = obj.getBeforeData();
            OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData rowData = obj.getRowData();
            // 确定变化情况
            if ((EventTypeEnum.INSERT.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType())) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME) {
                appId = rowData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkInsert(rowData);
            } else if (EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType()) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME) {
                appId = beforeData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkDelete(beforeData);
            } else if (EventTypeEnum.UPDATE.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(obj.getEventType()) && obj.getBinlogTime() > LAST_FULL_CALC_TIME){
                appId = rowData.getAppId();
                changeMap = checkUpdate(beforeData, rowData);
            }

            if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(appId)){
                Map<String, Integer> featureCnt = APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.get(appId);
                if (featureCnt == null){
                    featureCnt = new HashMap<>();
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, 0);
                }

                boolean hasChange = false;
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d_change = changeMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE);
                if (own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d_change != null) {
                    hasChange = true;
                    int value = featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D) + own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d_change;
                    if (value < 0){
                        value = 0;
                    }
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, value);
                }
                Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change = changeMap.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE);
                if (own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change != null) {
                    hasChange = true;
                    int value = featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D) + own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d_change;
                    if (value < 0){
                        value = 0;
                    }
                    featureCnt.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D, value);
                }
                APPID_FEATURENAME_CNT_MAP.put(appId, featureCnt);
                if (hasChange) {
                    upsert(appId, featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D), featureCnt.get(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D));
                }
            }
        };
        this.addConsumerNode(consumer1, "consumer1");
    }

    private void upsert(String appId, Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d, Integer own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d){
        List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(appId, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_1d, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
        sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_1d, SqlParam.DataType.INT));
        try {
            DbService.insertDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, UPSERT_APPID_FEATURES, sqlParamList, taskInfo);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkInsert(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData data) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();
        String orderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(data.getOrderStatus());
        Long arrivalTime = data.getArrivalTime();
        String transferAmt = data.getTransferAmt().toString();
        Matcher regularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(transferAmt);
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")  && arrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")  && arrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && regularAmtMatcher.matches()) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkDelete(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData data) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();
        String orderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(data.getOrderStatus());
        Long arrivalTime = data.getArrivalTime();
        String transferAmt = data.getTransferAmt().toString();
        Matcher regularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(transferAmt);
        if (orderStatus.equals("S")) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        if (orderStatus.equals("S") && regularAmtMatcher.matches()) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }

    private Map<String, Integer> checkUpdate(OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData beforeData,
                                             OwnBankFeatureOdsrtOwnOpenapiTTransferTableData rowData) {
        Map<String, Integer> changeMap = new HashMap<>();

        String beforeOrderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(beforeData.getOrderStatus());
        Long beforeArrivalTime = beforeData.getArrivalTime();
        String beforeTransferAmt = beforeData.getTransferAmt().toString();
        Matcher beforeRegularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(beforeTransferAmt);

        String rowOrderStatus = StringUtils.getValueOrNull(rowData.getOrderStatus());
        Long rowArrivalTime = rowData.getArrivalTime();
        String rowTransferAmt = rowData.getTransferAmt().toString();
        Matcher rowRegularAmtMatcher = REGULAR_AMT_PATTERN.matcher(rowTransferAmt);

        // 如果以前满足，现在不满足的话
        if ((beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)
                && !(rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        // 如果以前满足，现在不满足的话
        if ((beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && beforeRegularAmtMatcher.matches())
                && !(rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && rowRegularAmtMatcher.matches())) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, -1);
        }
        // 如果以前不满足，现在满足的话
        if (!(beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)
                && (rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L)) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        // 如果以前不满足，现在满足的话
        if (!(beforeOrderStatus.equals("S")  && beforeArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && beforeRegularAmtMatcher.matches())
                && (rowOrderStatus.equals("S")  && rowArrivalTime > System.currentTimeMillis() - 86400000L && rowRegularAmtMatcher.matches())) {
            changeMap.put(OWN_SD_CNT_PAYOUT_REGULAR_AMT_SUCCESS_ORDER_1D_CHANGE, 1);
        }
        return changeMap;
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnMerchantRelateFeatures/OwnTransferRelateFeaturesProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.EventTypeEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

import static com.akulaku.core.common.Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME;
import static com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures.Common.*;
import static com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnMerchantRelateFeatures.Common.QRCODE_SINK;

public class OwnTransferRelateFeaturesProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {

    private static final String GET_CODE_SQL =
            "select T2.code from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_1d T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode T2 " +
                    "on T1.qrcode_id = T2.id " +
                    "where T1.app_id = ? " +
                    "and T2.code is not null " +
                    "and T2.code != '' " +
                    "limit 1 ";

    protected OwnTransferRelateFeaturesProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_2_9 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i " +
                    "where app_id = ${app_id} and arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 and order_status='S' ";

    private static final String FEATURE_4 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_payment_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T2 " +
                    "on T1.app_id = T2.app_id " +
                    "where T1.app_id = ${app_id} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.payment_amt>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T2.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.payment_amt=T2.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T2.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T2.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    private static final String FEATURE_5 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T2 " +
                    "on T1.app_id = T2.app_id " +
                    "where T2.app_id = ${app_id} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.amount>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.status='S' " +
                    "and T2.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.amount=T2.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T2.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T2.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    private static final String FEATURE_6 =
            "select <features> " +
                    "from odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode_order_arrival_time_10i as T1 " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_qrcode as T2 on T1.qrcode_id = T2.id " +
                    "join odsrt.own_openapi_t_transfer_arrival_time_10i as T3 on T1.app_id = T3.app_id " +
                    "where T2.code = ${code} " +
                    "and T1.arrival_time >= unix_timestamp(now())*1000-600000 " +
                    "and T1.amount>=50000 " +
                    "and T1.status='S' " +
                    "and T3.order_status='S' " +
                    "and T1.amount=T3.transfer_amt " +
                    "and T3.arrival_time>T1.arrival_time " +
                    "and (T3.arrival_time-T1.arrival_time) \\<60000 ";

    @Override
    public JSONObject beforeFilterProcess(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, EventTypeEnum.DELETE.getName()) ? beforeData : rowData;
        String appId = data.getString("app_id");
        data.put("code", null);
        if (appId != null) {
            List<SqlParam> sqlParamList = new ArrayList<>();
            sqlParamList.add(new SqlParam(appId, SqlParam.DataType.STRING));
            List<Map<String, Object>> results = null;
            try {
                results = DbService.queryDb(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, GET_CODE_SQL, sqlParamList, taskInfo);
            } catch (SQLException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(results)) {
                Map<String, Object> info = results.get(0);
                data.put("code", info.get("code"));
            }
        }
        return kafkaMsgJson;
    }

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_payout_success_order_10i",
                        "count(id)",
                        FEATURE_2_9,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_shortterm_fastin_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_4,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_shortterm_fastout_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_5,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_qrcode_shortterm_fastinout_success_order_10i",
                        "count(T1.id)",
                        FEATURE_6,
                        0,
                        QRCODE_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        QRCODE_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_cnt_payout_regular_amt_success_order_10i",
                        "count(case when transfer_amt REGEXP '^[1-9][0]+(\\\\.[0]+)$' then 1 end)",
                        FEATURE_2_9,
                        0,
                        APPID_DOMAIN,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        APPID_SINK
                )
        );
    }
}


```

```java
    }
```

```java
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {

            jsonObject.put("create_time_13bit", DateUtils.getDateTime(createTime, CountryZoneEnum.UTC_ZONE).getTime());
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder10Processor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;

public class OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder10Processor extends OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderBaseProcessor {

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER = "" +
            "SELECT <features> " +
            "FROM odsrt.t_loan_order  " +
            "WHERE ownbank_uid=${ownbank_uid} " +
            "AND order_source = 10 " +
            "AND status!=-1 " +
            "AND loan_no is not null";


    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS = Collections.singletonList(
            new FeatureDomain("ownuid", "ownbank_uid")
    );

    protected static final Sink FEATURE_SINK = new Sink(
            OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
            "dimrtfeaturedb",
            "ownid_t_loan_order_first_order_features");


    protected OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder10Processor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public String getCacheCreateTimeFieldName() {
        return "own_sd_order_source_10_first_order_create_time";
    }

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_order_source_10_is_first_order",
                        "if(count(id)>0,0,1)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER,
                        1,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_order_source_10_first_order_create_time",
                        "min(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK
                )
        );
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder10Processor.java**

---


### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder20Processor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.google.common.cache.LoadingCache;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;

@Slf4j
public class OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder20Processor extends OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderBaseProcessor {

    private LoadingCache<Long, Long> cache;

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER = "" +
            "SELECT <features> " +
            "FROM odsrt.t_loan_order  " +
            "WHERE ownbank_uid=${ownbank_uid} " +
            "AND order_source = 20 " +
            "AND status!=-1 " +
            "AND loan_no is not null";


    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS = Collections.singletonList(
            new FeatureDomain("ownuid", "ownbank_uid")
    );

    protected static final Sink FEATURE_SINK = new Sink(
            OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
            "dimrtfeaturedb",
            "ownid_t_loan_order_first_order_features");


    protected OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrder20Processor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public String getCacheCreateTimeFieldName() {
        return "own_sd_order_source_20_first_order_create_time";
    }

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_order_source_20_is_first_order",
                        "if(count(id)>0,0,1)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER,
                        1,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "own_sd_order_source_20_first_order_create_time",
                        "min(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_CALIBER,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS,
                        OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK
                )
        );
    }

}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats/OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderBaseProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderFeatureStats;

import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.db.dbopera.SqlParam;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheBuilder;
import com.google.common.cache.CacheLoader;
import com.google.common.cache.LoadingCache;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;

import java.sql.SQLException;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;

@Slf4j
public abstract class OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderBaseProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {

    private static final String cacheSql = "select %s from dimrtfeaturedb.ownid_t_loan_order_first_order_features where ownuid=?";

    private final LoadingCache<Long, Long> cache;

    protected OwnTLoanOrderFirstOrderBaseProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
        this.cache = this.getCache();
    }


    public abstract String getCacheCreateTimeFieldName();


    public void featureCalc(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        super.featureCalc(calcContextData);
        this.updateCache(calcContextData);
    }

    /**
     * 更新缓存
     */
    private void updateCache(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        JSONObject beforeData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("beforeData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        JSONObject data = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete") ? beforeData : rowData;
        Long ownBankUid = data.getLong("ownbank_uid");

        String cacheCreateTimeFieldName = this.getCacheCreateTimeFieldName();
        String cacheQuerySql = String.format(cacheSql, cacheCreateTimeFieldName);
        List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(ownBankUid, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
        Object resultObj;
        try {
            resultObj = DbService.queryOneValue(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, cacheQuerySql,
                    lstSqlParam, cacheCreateTimeFieldName, taskInfo);
        } catch (SQLException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
        if (resultObj != null) {
            Long dbCreateTime = (Long) resultObj;
            this.cache.put(ownBankUid, dbCreateTime);
        } else {
            this.cache.invalidate(ownBankUid);
        }
    }


    @Override
    public Boolean filter(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        Boolean result = super.filter(calcContextData);
        if (result) {
            return true;
        }
        return cacheFilter(calcContextData);
    }


    /**
     * 缓存过滤
     */
    private @NotNull Boolean cacheFilter(CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        JSONObject kafkaMsgJson = calcContextData.getData(CALC_BEFORE_FILTER_PROCESS_NODE_NAME, JSONObject.class);
        JSONObject rowData = kafkaMsgJson.getJSONObject("rowData");
        String eventType = kafkaMsgJson.getString("eventType");
        boolean delete = StrUtil.equalsIgnoreCase(eventType, "delete");
        if (delete) {
            return false;
        }
        Long ownBankUid = rowData.getLong("ownbank_uid");
        Long createTimeKafka = rowData.getLong("create_time");
        Long createTimeCache = null;
        try {
            createTimeCache = this.cache.get(ownBankUid);
        } catch (Exception ignored) {

        }
        if (createTimeCache == null) {
            return false;
        }
        return createTimeKafka > createTimeCache;
    }


    private LoadingCache<Long, Long> getCache() {
        String cacheCreateTimeFieldName = this.getCacheCreateTimeFieldName();
        String cacheQuerySql = String.format(cacheSql, cacheCreateTimeFieldName);
        return CacheBuilder.newBuilder()
                //设置并发级别为8，并发级别是指可以同时写缓存的线程数
                .concurrencyLevel(Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors())
                //设置缓存容器的初始容量
                .initialCapacity(1000)
                //设置缓存最大容量，超过之后就会按照LRU最近虽少使用算法来移除缓存项
                .maximumSize(1000000)
                //设置要统计缓存的命中率
                .recordStats()
                //设置缓存的移除通知
                .removalListener(notification -> log.debug("remove cache key:{},reason：{}", notification.getKey(), notification.getCause()))
                //build方法中可以指定CacheLoader，在缓存不存在时通过CacheLoader的实现自动加载缓存
                .build(
                        new CacheLoader<Long, Long>() {
                            @Override
                            public Long load(@NotNull Long key) throws Exception {
                                log.debug("load cache key:{} from database", key);
                                Long result = null;
                                List<SqlParam> lstSqlParam = Collections.singletonList(new SqlParam(key, SqlParam.DataType.Object));
                                Object resultObj = DbService.queryOneValue(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, cacheQuerySql,
                                        lstSqlParam, cacheCreateTimeFieldName, taskInfo);
                                if (resultObj != null) {
                                    result = (Long) resultObj;
                                }
                                return result;
                            }
                        }
                );
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnTPinCheckRecordWindow/OwnTPinCheckRecordProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnTPinCheckRecordWindow;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.CountryZoneEnum;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.WindowProcessor;
import com.akulaku.core.util.DateUtils;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;

/**
 * @author lindr
 * created on 2024/3/28
 */
public class OwnTPinCheckRecordProcessor extends WindowProcessor {

    protected OwnTPinCheckRecordProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        String createTime = jsonObject.getString("create_time");
        if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(createTime)) {
            jsonObject.put("create_timestamp", DateUtils.getDateTime(createTime, CountryZoneEnum.UTC_ZONE).getTime());
        }
        return jsonObject;
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtl/OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtlProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Own.processor.OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtl;
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTable;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.bean.OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTableData;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * @author lindr
 * created on 2023/5/31
 */
@Slf4j
public class OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtlProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    protected OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtlProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addFilterNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            String eventType = kafkaData.getEventType();
            if ("INSERT".equals(eventType)) {
                return false;
            }else if("UPDATE".equals(eventType)){
                return false;
            }else {
                return true;
            }

        }, "kafka_data_filter");

        this.addCalcNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyDetailsTableData rowData = kafkaData.getRowData();
            Map<String, Object> fields = new HashMap<>();
            fields.put("record_id", rowData.getRecordId());
            String fName = nameHandle(rowData.getFirstName());
            String mName = nameHandle(rowData.getMiddleName());
            String lName = nameHandle(rowData.getLastName());
            String name = getName(fName, mName, lName);
            fields.put("name", name);;
            return fields;
        }, "cv_fields");

        String sql = "insert into dwdrt.own_user_account_apply_details_etl" +
                " (record_id, name, create_time, feat_update_time)" +
                " values(?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)" +
                " ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE " +
                " name=values(name)," +
                " feat_update_time=values(feat_update_time)";

        this.addSql(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, "insert_into_mysql",
                Arrays.asList("cv_fields.record_id", "cv_fields.name"), sql);
    }

    public String nameHandle(String name) {
        if (name == null){
            return "";
        }
        name = name.toLowerCase();
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }

    public String getName(String fstName, String midName, String lstName) {
        if (fstName == null) {
            fstName = "";
        }
        if (midName == null) {
            midName = "";
        }
        if (lstName == null) {
            lstName = "";
        }
        String name = fstName + midName + lstName;
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Own/processor/OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtl/OwnUserAccountApplyDetailsEtlProcessor.java**

```java
import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.define.Own.common.OwnDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * @author lindr
 * created on 2023/5/31
 */
@Slf4j
public class OwnUserAccountApplyRecordEtlProcessor extends KafkaSourceListCalcNodeProcessor {
    protected OwnUserAccountApplyRecordEtlProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addFilterNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyRecordTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyRecordTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            String eventType = kafkaData.getEventType();
            if ("INSERT".equals(eventType)) {
                return false;
            }else if("UPDATE".equals(eventType)){
                return false;
            }else {
                return true;
            }

        }, "kafka_data_filter");

        this.addCalcNode((CalcContextData data) -> {
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyRecordTable kafkaData = (OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyRecordTable) data.getData(Constant.KAFKA_SOURCE_NAME);
            OwnBankFeatureDwdrtOwnUserAccountApplyRecordTableData rowData = kafkaData.getRowData();
            Map<String, Object> fields = new HashMap<>();
            fields.put("record_id", rowData.getRecordId());
            String fName = nameHandle(rowData.getFirstName());
            String mName = nameHandle(rowData.getMiddleName());
            String lName = nameHandle(rowData.getLastName());
            String name = getName(fName, mName, lName);
            fields.put("name", name);;
            return fields;
        }, "cv_fields");

        String sql = "insert into dwdrt.own_user_account_apply_record_etl" +
                " (record_id, name, create_time, feat_update_time)" +
                " values(?,?,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000,UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000)" +
                " ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE " +
                " name=values(name)," +
                " feat_update_time=values(feat_update_time)";

        this.addSql(OwnDbCatalogs.OWN_FEATURE_POLAR_DB, "insert_into_mysql",
                Arrays.asList("cv_fields.record_id", "cv_fields.name"), sql);
    }

    public String nameHandle(String name) {
        if (name == null){
            return "";
        }
        name = name.toLowerCase();
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }

    public String getName(String fstName, String midName, String lstName) {
        if (fstName == null) {
            fstName = "";
        }
        if (midName == null) {
            midName = "";
        }
        if (lstName == null) {
            lstName = "";
        }
        String name = fstName + midName + lstName;
        name = name.replaceAll(" ", "").replaceAll("\\p{Punct}", "");
        return name;
    }

}
```

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.TChannelLoanApplicationFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
public class TChannelLoanApplicationProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {


    protected TChannelLoanApplicationProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID = "" +
            "select <features> " +
            "from th_odsrt.t_channel_loan_application " +
            "where uid = ${uid} ";
    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID = Arrays.asList(
            new FeatureDomain("piduid", "uid")
    );

    private static final Sink FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID = new Sink(
            ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
            "th_dimrtfeaturedb",
            "piduid_t_channel_loan_application_features");

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_min_loan_create_time",
                        "min(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_max_loan_create_time",
                        "max(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_min_loan_pass_create_time",
                        "min(if(status= 10,create_time,null))",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_max_loan_pass_create_time",
                        "max(if(status= 10,create_time,null))",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                )
        );
    }


}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThEquipmentAndExpressDataFeatures/ThEquipmentAndExpressDataProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThEquipmentAndExpressDataFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.calcnode.CalcContextData;
import com.akulaku.core.common.Constant;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.Kafka2MysqlProcessor;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord;

public class ThEquipmentAndExpressDataProcessor extends Kafka2MysqlProcessor {
    protected ThEquipmentAndExpressDataProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public String duplicateUpdateCondition() {
        return "IF(create_time is null or create_time <= VALUES(create_time), VALUES(%s), %s)";
    }

    /**
     * 数据处理方法,在过滤算子前调用,可被重写
     */
    public JSONObject beforeProcess(JSONObject jsonObject, CalcContextData calcContextData) {
        ConsumerRecord<String, String> record = (ConsumerRecord<String, String>) calcContextData.getData(Constant.KAFKA_ORIGIN_RECORD);
        jsonObject.put("create_time", record.timestamp());
        jsonObject.put("channel_uid", jsonObject.getString("channelUid"));
        jsonObject.put("application_id", jsonObject.getString("applicationId"));
        JSONObject expressData = jsonObject.getJSONObject("expressData");
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_express_src_phone_cnt_3d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_express_src_phone_cnt_3d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_express_cnt_std_60_90d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_express_cnt_std_60_90d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_express_cnt_std_30_60d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_express_cnt_std_30_60d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_bk_express_dst_detail_address_cnt_3d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_bk_express_dst_detail_address_cnt_3d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_bk_express_src_phone_cnt_7d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_bk_express_src_phone_cnt_7d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_express_parcel_amount_avg_60_90d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_express_parcel_amount_avg_60_90d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_express_dst_name_cnt_30d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_express_dst_name_cnt_30d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_bk_express_store_total_amount_sum_180d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_bk_express_store_total_amount_sum_180d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_express_dst_postal_code_cnt_60d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_express_dst_postal_code_cnt_60d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_express_store_total_amount_sum_3d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_express_store_total_amount_sum_3d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_express_days_90d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_express_days_90d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_express_dst_postal_code_cnt_7d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_express_dst_postal_code_cnt_7d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_cod_bk_express_src_phone_cnt_180d", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_cod_bk_express_src_phone_cnt_180d"));
        jsonObject.put("userid_express_acc_parcel_amount", expressData.getDouble("mf_userid_express_acc_parcel_amount"));
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidApvApplicationFeatures/ThPidApvApplication2Processor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThPidApvApplicationFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
public class ThPidApvApplication2Processor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {


    protected ThPidApvApplication2Processor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID = "" +
            "select <features> " +
            "from th_dwdrt.th_pid_apv_application " +
            "where channel_id = ${channel_id} " +
            "and create_time >= (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) - 3600 * 7) *1000 ";
    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID = Arrays.asList(
            new FeatureDomain("channelid", "channel_id")
    );

    private static final Sink FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID = new Sink(
            ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
            "th_dimrtfeaturedb",
            "channelid_th_pid_apv_application_features");

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_cnt_apv_td",
                        "count(1)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        0,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_cnt_apv_succ_td",
                        "count(if(credit_status = 8,1,null))",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        0,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID
                )
        );
    }


}
```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidApvApplicationFeatures/ThPidApvApplication2Processor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidApvApplicationFeatures/ThPidApvApplicationProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThPidApvApplicationFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
public class ThPidApvApplicationProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {


    protected ThPidApvApplicationProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID = "" +
            "select <features> " +
            "from th_dwdrt.th_pid_apv_application " +
            "where pid_uid = ${pid_uid} ";
    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID = Arrays.asList(
            new FeatureDomain("piduid", "pid_uid")
    );

    private static final Sink FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID = new Sink(
            ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
            "th_dimrtfeaturedb",
            "piduid_th_pid_apv_application_features");

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_min_apv_create_time",
                        "min(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_max_apv_create_time",
                        "max(create_time)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_min_apv_pass_create_time",
                        "min(if(credit_status = 8,create_time,null))",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                )
        );
    }


}

```

**code file end: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidApvApplicationFeatures/ThPidApvApplicationProcessor.java**

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidCron/ThPidApvApplication2DeleteProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThPidCron;

import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.quartz.QuartzProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.quartz.QuartzTaskProcessor;
import com.akulaku.feature.metadata.DbService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
@Slf4j
public class ThPidApvApplication2DeleteProcessor extends QuartzTaskProcessor {


    private static final String DELETED_SQL = "delete from th_dimrtfeaturedb.channelid_th_pid_apv_application_features where feat_update_time < (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) - 3600 * 7) *1000 ";

    protected ThPidApvApplication2DeleteProcessor(QuartzProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    @Override
    public void organizeCalcNodes() {
        this.addConsumerNode(contextData -> {
            try {
                // 删除prepare_delete_tmp表
                log.info("execute sql:{}", DELETED_SQL);
                DbService.updateDb(ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB, DELETED_SQL, null, null);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage(), e);
            }
        }, "consumer");
    }

}
```

### code file start: src/main/java/com/akulaku/define/Th/processor/ThPidLoanBillFeatures/ThPidLoanBillProcessor.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThPidLoanBillFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
public class ThPidLoanBillProcessor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {


    protected ThPidLoanBillProcessor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID = "" +
            "select <features> " +
            "FROM th_dwdrt.th_pid_loan_bill AS t " +
            "inner JOIN " +
            "( " +
            "	SELECT " +
            "		pid_uid, " +
            "		iou_id " +
            "	FROM th_dwdrt.th_pid_loan_iou " +
            "	WHERE pid_uid=${uid} AND disburse_date = ( " +
            "		SELECT disburse_date FROM th_dwdrt.th_pid_loan_iou " +
            "		WHERE pid_uid=${uid} " +
            "		ORDER BY disburse_date DESC limit 1 " +
            "	) " +
            ") t1 " +
            "ON t.iou_id=t1.iou_id AND t.uid = t1.pid_uid";
    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID = Arrays.asList(
            new FeatureDomain("piduid", "uid")
    );

    private static final Sink FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID = new Sink(
            ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
            "th_dimrtfeaturedb",
            "piduid_th_pid_loan_iou_features");

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_max_bill_late_days",
                        "max(t.late_days)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        null,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_PIDUID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_PIDUID
                )
        );
    }


}

```

```java
package com.akulaku.define.Th.processor.ThPidLoanIouFeatures;

import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureDomain;
import com.akulaku.core.bean.feature.FeatureInfoV1;
import com.akulaku.define.Th.common.ThDbCatalogs;
import com.akulaku.core.config.ProcessorConfig;
import com.akulaku.core.config.feature.Sink;
import com.akulaku.core.processor.FeaturesProcessorV1;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;


/**
 * @author liuql1
 * @date 2023/6/13
 */
public class ThPidLoanIou2Processor extends FeaturesProcessorV1 {


    protected ThPidLoanIou2Processor(ProcessorConfig processorConfig) {
        super(processorConfig);
    }

    private static final String FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID = "" +
            "select <features> " +
            "from th_dwdrt.th_pid_loan_iou " +
            "where channel_id = ${channel_id} " +
            "and create_time >= (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) - 3600 * 7) *1000 ";
    private static final List<FeatureDomain> FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID = Arrays.asList(
            new FeatureDomain("channelid", "channel_id")
    );

    private static final Sink FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID = new Sink(
            ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
            "th_dimrtfeaturedb",
            "channelid_th_pid_loan_iou_features");

    @Override
    protected List<FeatureInfoV1> defineFeature() {
        return Arrays.asList(
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_cnt_iou_td",
                        "count(iou_id)",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        0,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID
                ),
                new FeatureInfoV1(
                        "th_sd_cnt_iou_succ_td",
                        "count(if(disburse_status = 10,iou_id,null))",
                        FEATURE_SQL_PIDUID,
                        0,
                        FEATURE_DOMAINS_CHANNELID,
                        ThDbCatalogs.FEATURE_PROD_PRODUCT_DB,
                        FEATURE_SINK_TABLE_CHANNELID
                )
        );
    }


}
```

### code file start: src/test/java/DdlParseTest.java 

```java
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.parser.CCJSqlParserUtil;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Table;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.Statement;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.CreateTable;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.ColumnDefinition;

import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.create.table.Index;


import java.util.ArrayList;

import java.util.List;

@Slf4j
public class DdlParseTest {
    public static List<String> getPrimaryColumnNameList(String ddl) throws Exception {

        List<String> primaryColumnNameList = new ArrayList<>();
        try {
            Statement statement = CCJSqlParserUtil.parse(ddl);

            if (statement instanceof CreateTable) {
                CreateTable createTable = (CreateTable) statement;
                Table table = createTable.getTable();

                List<ColumnDefinition> columnDefinitions = createTable.getColumnDefinitions();
                List<Index> indexes = createTable.getIndexes();

                log.info("Table: " + table.getName() + "  indexes :" + indexes.toString());


                for (ColumnDefinition column : columnDefinitions) {
                    List<String> columnSpecs = column.getColumnSpecs();
                    if (columnSpecs != null) {
                        List<String> primaryKeys = new ArrayList<String>() {{
                            add("PRIMARY");
                            add("KEY");

                        }};
                        if (primaryKeys.equals(columnSpecs)) {
                            log.info("Primary key column from columnDefinitions : " + column.getColumnName());
                            primaryColumnNameList.add(column.getColumnName());
                        }
                    }
                }

                for (Index index : indexes) {
                    if (index.getType().equalsIgnoreCase("PRIMARY KEY")) {
                        log.info("Primary key columns from getIndexes : " + index.getColumnsNames());
                        primaryColumnNameList.addAll(index.getColumnsNames());

                    }
                }

            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(e.getMessage(), e);
            throw new Exception(e);
        }
        if (primaryColumnNameList.isEmpty()) {
            throw new Exception(" can  not find primary columns ,  ddl is : " + ddl);
        }
        return primaryColumnNameList;
    }


    public static void main(String[] args) {
        // 主键在 字段类型后面声明的地方的情况

        //主键在索引单独声明的情况
//        String ddlStatement = "CREATE TABLE my_table (id INT , name VARCHAR(255), age INT, key idx_age(age), primary key (id))";

                "CREATE TABLE `mob_t_pre_account_status_90` (\n" +
```

### code file start: src/test/java/JavaExec.java 

```java
import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;

public class JavaExec {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        String command = "ping -t 10.0.126.144";
        try {
//            Process p = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(command);
            Process p= new ProcessBuilder(command).redirectErrorStream(true).start();
            BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(p.getInputStream(),"GB2312"));
            String line = "";
            while ((line = br.readLine()) != null)
                System.out.println(line);
            System.out.println();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
}

```

### code file start: src/test/java/JsonNodePaser.java 

```java
import java.util.*;

public class JsonNodePaser {

    /**
     * {
     * "a": {
     * "b": {
     * "c": 1,
     * "d": null,
     * "e": [
     * {
     * "f": 1
     * },
     * {
     * "f": null
     * }
     * ],
     * "g": [
     * {
     * "h": null
     * },
     * {
     * "h": null
     * }
     * ],
     * "i": [],
     * "k": [
     * {
     * "k2": {
     * "k23": null,
     * "k232": null
     * },
     * "k2b": {
     * "k2b3": null
     * }
     * },
     * {
     * "k2": {
     * "k23": null,
     * "k232": 1
     * },
     * "k2b": {
     * "k2b3": 1
     * }
     * }
     * ]
     * }
     * }
     * }
     * <p>
     * 对于这个json
     * 驶入和输出应该如下：
     * a                                                  1
     * a.b                                                1
     * a.b.c                                              1
     * a.b.d                                              0
     * a.b.e                                              1
     * a.b.e.f                                            1
     * a.b.g                                              1
     * a.b.g.h                                            0
     * a.b.i                                              0
     * a.b.k                                              1
     * a.b.k.k2                                           1
     * a.b.k.k2.k23                                       0
     * a.b.k.k2.k232                                      1
     * a.b.k.k2b                                          1
     * a.b.k.k2b.k2b3                                     1
     */
    public static int checkJsonPathHasValue(Map<String, Object> jsonMap, String jsonPath) {
        try {
            // 解析 JSON 字符串

            // 分割 JSON 路径
            String[] pathParts = jsonPath.split("\\.");

            // 检查路径是否有值
            return hasValue(jsonMap, pathParts, 0) ? 1 : 0;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            return 0;
        }
    }

    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    private static boolean hasValue(Object node, String[] pathParts, int index) {
        if (node == null) {
            return false;
        }

        if (index >= pathParts.length) {
            // 修改：如果是最后一个节点，需要判断是否为空数组
            if (node instanceof List) {
                List<Object> listNode = (List<Object>) node;
                if (listNode.isEmpty()) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            return true;
        }

        String currentPart = pathParts[index];

        if (node instanceof Map) {
            Map<String, Object> mapNode = (Map<String, Object>) node;
            if (!mapNode.containsKey(currentPart)) {
                return false;
            }
            Object childNode = mapNode.get(currentPart);
            return hasValue(childNode, pathParts, index + 1);
        } else if (node instanceof List) {
            List<Object> listNode = (List<Object>) node;
            if (listNode.isEmpty()) {
                return false;
            }

            // 对于数组，检查是否至少有一个元素满足条件
            for (Object item : listNode) {
                if (hasValue(item, pathParts, index)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        return index == pathParts.length;
    }

    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
    public static Map<String, Object> parseJson(String jsonStr) throws Exception {
        // 使用 Java 内置的 javax.script 包解析 JSON
        javax.script.ScriptEngineManager sem = new javax.script.ScriptEngineManager();
        javax.script.ScriptEngine engine = sem.getEngineByName("javascript");

        // 将 JSON 字符串转换为 JavaScript 对象
        String script = "Java.asJSONCompatible(" + jsonStr + ")";
        Object result = engine.eval(script);

        return (Map<String, Object>) result;
    }
    public static void test1() throws Exception {
        String jsonStr = "{\n" +
                "    \"a\": {\n" +
                "        \"b\": {\n" +
                "            \"c\": 1,\n" +
                "            \"d\": null,\n" +
                "            \"e\": [\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"f\": 1\n" +
                "                },\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"f\": null\n" +
                "                }\n" +
                "            ],\n" +
                "            \"g\": [\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"h\": null\n" +
                "                },\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"h\": null\n" +
                "                }\n" +
                "            ],\n" +
                "            \"i\": [],\n" +
                "            \"k\": [\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"k2\": {\n" +
                "                        \"k23\": null,\n" +
                "                        \"k232\": null\n" +
                "                    },\n" +
                "                    \"k2b\": {\n" +
                "                        \"k2b3\": null\n" +
                "                    }\n" +
                "                },\n" +
                "                {\n" +
                "                    \"k2\": {\n" +
                "                        \"k23\": null,\n" +
                "                        \"k232\": 1\n" +
                "                    },\n" +
                "                    \"k2b\": {\n" +
                "                        \"k2b3\": 1\n" +
                "                    }\n" +
                "                }\n" +
                "            ]\n" +
                "        }\n" +
                "    }\n" +
                "}";
        System.out.println(jsonStr);
        List<String> jsonPaths = new ArrayList<>();
        // 添加默认的 JSON 路径
        jsonPaths.add("a");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.c");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.d");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.e");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.e.f");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.g");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.g.h");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.i");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k.k2");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k.k2.k23");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k.k2.k232");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k.k2b");
        jsonPaths.add("a.b.k.k2b.k2b3");

        Map<String, Object> jsonMap = parseJson(jsonStr);

        // 使用 for 循环调用 checkJsonPathHasValue 函数
        for (String jsonPath : jsonPaths) {
            System.out.println(jsonPath + " " + checkJsonPathHasValue(jsonMap, jsonPath));
        }
    }
```

### code file start: src/test/java/PmmlTest.java 

```java
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import jodd.io.StreamUtil;
import org.jpmml.evaluator.*;

import java.io.File;
import java.util.*;

public class PmmlTest {


    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {

        // 模型路径
        String path = "C:\\Users\\zhouyq\\Desktop\\pipeline_lgbmodel_20240414.pmml";
        PmmlTest obj = new PmmlTest();
        Evaluator model = new LoadingModelEvaluatorBuilder().load(new File(path)).build();
        Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("sms_body", "You have been successfully loaded GOEXTRA99 P99.00.Trace No.  508525807 10/31/2023 12:09:33.792. More Globe/TM txt promos? INFO to 8080 4 free");
        Map<String, Object> output = obj.predict(model, map);
        System.out.println(output);


    }


    /**
     * 运行模型得到结果。
     */
    private Map<String, Object> predict(Evaluator evaluator, Map<String, String> inputMap) {
        Map<String, FieldValue> argumentMap = getArgumentMap(evaluator, inputMap);
        return evaluate(evaluator, argumentMap);
    }

    /**
     * 把原始输入转换成PMML格式的输入。
     */
    private Map<String, FieldValue> getArgumentMap(Evaluator evaluator, Map<String, String> inputMap) {
        Map<String, FieldValue> result = new LinkedHashMap<>();
        List<InputField> inputFields = evaluator.getInputFields();
        for (InputField field : inputFields) {
            Object rawValue = inputMap.get(field.getName());
            FieldValue value = field.prepare(rawValue);
            result.put(field.getName(), value);
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 运行模型得到结果。
     */
    private Map<String, Object> evaluate(Evaluator evaluator, Map<String, FieldValue> argumentMap) {
        Map<String, ?> results = evaluator.evaluate(argumentMap);
        List<OutputField> outputFields = evaluator.getOutputFields();
        List<TargetField> targetFields = evaluator.getTargetFields();
        Map<String, Object> output = new LinkedHashMap<>();
        List<String> fields = new ArrayList<>();

        for (TargetField field : targetFields) {
            String fieldName = field.getName();
            fields.add(fieldName);
        }

        for (OutputField field : outputFields) {
            String fieldName = field.getName();
            fields.add(fieldName);
        }
        for (String fieldName : fields) {
            Object value = results.get(fieldName);
            if (value instanceof Computable) {
                Computable computable = (Computable) value;
                value = computable.getResult();
            }
            output.put(fieldName, value);
        }
        return output;
    }

}

```

**code file end: src/test/java/PmmlTest.java**

### code file start: src/test/java/SqlTest.java 

```java
import net.sf.jsqlparser.JSQLParserException;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Expression;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.Function;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.JdbcParameter;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.LongValue;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.operators.arithmetic.Multiplication;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.expression.operators.relational.ExpressionList;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.parser.CCJSqlParserUtil;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Column;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.schema.Table;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.Statement;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.insert.Insert;
import net.sf.jsqlparser.statement.select.*;
import org.junit.Test;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

public class SqlTest {
    @Test
    public void generateInsertSql() throws JSQLParserException {
        Insert insert = new Insert();
        insert.setTable(new Table("user"));
        List<String> fields = Arrays.asList("name", "age", "update_time");
        List<Column> columns = fields.stream().map(Column::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
        insert.setColumns(columns);

        ExpressionList expressionList = new ExpressionList();
        List<Expression> expressions = new ArrayList<>();
        expressions.add(new JdbcParameter());
        expressions.add(new JdbcParameter());

        Function now = new Function();
        now.setName("now");
        ExpressionList nowExpressionList = new ExpressionList();
        ArrayList<Expression> expressions1 = new ArrayList<>();
        expressions1.add(new LongValue(3));
        nowExpressionList.setExpressions(expressions1);
        now.setParameters(nowExpressionList);


        Function leftExpression = new Function();
        leftExpression.setName("UNIX_TIMESTAMP");
        ExpressionList unixExpressionList = new ExpressionList();
        ArrayList<Expression> expressions2 = new ArrayList<>();
        expressions2.add(now);
        unixExpressionList.setExpressions(expressions2);
        leftExpression.setParameters(unixExpressionList);
        LongValue rightExpression = new LongValue(1000);
        Multiplication multiplication = new Multiplication().withLeftExpression(leftExpression).withRightExpression(rightExpression);


        expressions.add(multiplication);

        expressionList.setExpressions(expressions);
        insert.setItemsList(expressionList);


        insert.setDuplicateUpdateColumns(columns);

        List<Expression> duplicateUpdateExpressionList = fields.stream().map(field -> {
            Function f = new Function();
            f.setName("values");
            ExpressionList list = new ExpressionList();
            List<Expression> expressions3 = new ArrayList<>();
            expressions3.add(new Column(field));
            list.setExpressions(expressions3);
            f.setParameters(list);
            return f;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());


        insert.setDuplicateUpdateExpressionList(duplicateUpdateExpressionList);
        insert.setUseDuplicate(true);

        System.out.println(insert.toString());

        String sql = "INSERT INTO user (age) VALUES (?) on duplicate key update age=values(age)";
        Insert insert1 = (Insert) CCJSqlParserUtil.parse(sql);
        System.out.println(insert1.toString());

        sql = "select UNIX_TIMESTAMP(now(3))*1000";
        Select select = (Select) CCJSqlParserUtil.parse(sql);
        SelectBody selectBody = select.getSelectBody();
        PlainSelect plainSelect= (PlainSelect) selectBody;

        List<SelectItem> selectItems = plainSelect.getSelectItems();
        SelectItem selectItem = selectItems.get(0);
        Expression expression = ((SelectExpressionItem) selectItem).getExpression();
        System.out.println(select.toString());



    }
}

```

### code file start: src/test/java/StTest.java 

```java
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Data;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.ST;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.STGroup;
import org.stringtemplate.v4.STGroupFile;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.LinkedList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

public class StTest {
    @Data
    @AllArgsConstructor
    class Persion {
        String name;
        Integer age;
    }

    @Test
    public void stSimple() {
        String template = "select * from name = <name> and age = <age> and age \\<18";
        ST hello = new ST(template);
        hello.add("name", "akulaku");
        hello.add("age", 5);
        System.out.println(hello.render());

    }

    @Test
    public void stEntity() {
        String template = "select * from name = <param.name> and age = <param.age>";
        ST hello = new ST(template);
        hello.add("param", new Persion("akulaku", 5));
        System.out.println(hello.render());
    }

    @Test
    public void stMap() {
        String template = "select * from name = <param.name> and age = <param.year>";
        Map<String, Object> param = new HashMap<>();
        param.put("name", "akulaku");
        param.put("year", 5);
        ST hello = new ST(template);
        hello.add("param", param);
        System.out.println(hello.render());
    }

    @Test
    public void stStg() {
        STGroup stg = new STGroupFile("tasksql.stg");
        ST sqlST = stg.getInstanceOf("queryColumn");
        Map<String, Object> param = new HashMap<>();
        param.put("name", "akulaku");
        param.put("year", 5);
        List<String> columnList = new LinkedList<>();
        columnList.add("order_id");
        columnList.add("price");
        columnList.add("phone");
        sqlST.add("columns", columnList);
        sqlST.add("condition", "dt='2017-04-04'");
        sqlST.add("param", param);
        System.out.print(sqlST.render());
    }
}
```
