### code file start: src/test/java/com/akulaku/core/neo4j/ConcurrentTest.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.core.neo4j;

import org.junit.Test;
import org.neo4j.driver.*;

/**
 * Created by zhuhan on 2021-09-16.
 */
public class ConcurrentTest {

   // @Test
    public void run1() {
        Driver driver = GraphDatabase.driver("bolt://localhost:7687", AuthTokens.basic("neo4j", "risk123!"));
        Session session = driver.session();
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:123})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:124})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:125})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:126})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:127})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:128})");
//        session.run("merge (n:uid {name:129})");

        Transaction tx = session.beginTransaction();
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:123})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:124})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:125})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:126})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:127})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:128})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:129})");
        System.out.println(tx.isOpen());
        tx.rollback();
        System.out.println(tx.isOpen());
        tx.close();
        System.out.println(tx.isOpen());
        tx = session.beginTransaction();
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:123})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:124})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:125})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:126})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:127})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:128})");
        tx.run("merge (n:uid {name:129})");
        System.out.println(tx.isOpen());
        tx.commit();
        System.out.println(tx.isOpen());
        tx.close();
        session.close();
        driver.close();
    }

  //  @Test
    public void run2() {
        Driver driver = GraphDatabase.driver("bolt://localhost:7687", AuthTokens.basic("neo4j", "risk123!"));
        Session session = driver.session();
        Transaction tx = session.beginTransaction();
        tx.run("match (n:uid {name:123}) set n.level = 14");
        tx.run("match (n:uid {name:124}) set n.level = 14");
        tx.run("match (n:uid {name:125}) set n.level = 14");
        tx.commit();
        tx.close();
        session.close();
        driver.close();
    }
}
```

### code file start: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/RocksDBDictionaryOrderExample.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.rocksdb;

import org.rocksdb.Options;
import org.rocksdb.RocksDB;
import org.rocksdb.RocksIterator;

public class RocksDBDictionaryOrderExample {
    static {
        RocksDB.loadLibrary();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        final String rocksDbPath = "D:\\code\\feature_async_cal\\feature_async_cal-pre-product\\rocksdb";

        try (final Options options = new Options().setCreateIfMissing(true);
             final RocksDB db = RocksDB.open(options, rocksDbPath)) {

            // Put some data into the database
            db.put("key1".getBytes(), "value1".getBytes());
            db.put("key3".getBytes(), "value3".getBytes());
            db.put("key2".getBytes(), "value2".getBytes());
            db.put("key10".getBytes(), "value10".getBytes());

            // Create an iterator
            try (RocksIterator iterator = db.newIterator()) {
                // Seek to the first entry
                iterator.seekToFirst();

                // Iterate in dictionary order
                while (iterator.isValid()) {
                    System.out.println(new String(iterator.key()) + ": " + new String(iterator.value()));
                    iterator.next();
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
}

```

**code file end: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/RocksDBDictionaryOrderExample.java**

### code file start: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/RocksDBExample.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.rocksdb;

import org.rocksdb.Options;
import org.rocksdb.RocksDB;

import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.util.Arrays;

public class RocksDBExample {
    static {
        // 必须先加载 RocksDB 库
        RocksDB.loadLibrary();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        // RocksDB 数据库的路径
        String dbPath = "D:\\code\\feature_async_cal\\feature_async_cal-pre-product\\rocksdb";

        // 创建数据库选项
        try (final Options options = new Options().setCreateIfMissing(true);
             final RocksDB db = RocksDB.open(options, dbPath)
        ) {

            // 写数据
            String key = "exampleKey";
            String value = "exampleValue1";
            int ttlInSeconds = 10;
            long expireTime = System.currentTimeMillis() + ttlInSeconds * 1000;
            byte[] valueWithTTL = ByteBuffer.allocate(Long.BYTES + value.getBytes().length)
                    .putLong(expireTime)
                    .put(value.getBytes())
                    .array();
            db.put(key.getBytes(), valueWithTTL);
            System.out.println("Data written to RocksDB: " + key + " -> " + value);


            // 读取数据
            byte[] retrievedValueWithTTL = db.get(key.getBytes());
            if (retrievedValueWithTTL != null) {
                ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(retrievedValueWithTTL);
                long storedExpireTime = buffer.getLong();
                byte[] storedValue = Arrays.copyOfRange(retrievedValueWithTTL, Long.BYTES, retrievedValueWithTTL.length);

                if (System.currentTimeMillis() < storedExpireTime) {
                    System.out.println("Data read from RocksDB: " + key + " -> " + new String(storedValue));
                } else {
                    System.out.println("Data expired for key: " + key);
                    db.delete(key.getBytes());  // 删除过期数据
                }
            } else {
                System.out.println("Data not found for key: " + key);
            }

            // 等待超过 TTL 时间
            Thread.sleep((ttlInSeconds + 1) * 1000);

            // 再次读取数据
            retrievedValueWithTTL = db.get(key.getBytes());
            if (retrievedValueWithTTL != null) {
                ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(retrievedValueWithTTL);
                long storedExpireTime = buffer.getLong();
                byte[] storedValue = Arrays.copyOfRange(retrievedValueWithTTL, Long.BYTES, retrievedValueWithTTL.length);

                if (System.currentTimeMillis() < storedExpireTime) {
                    System.out.println("Data read from RocksDB after TTL: " + key + " -> " + new String(storedValue));
                } else {
                    System.out.println("Data expired for key: " + key);
                    db.delete(key.getBytes());  // 删除过期数据
                }
            } else {
                System.out.println("Data not found for key: " + key);
            }


            // 读数据

         /*   byte[] retrievedValue = db.get(key.getBytes());
            if (retrievedValue != null) {
                System.out.println("Data read from RocksDB: " + key + " -> " + new String(retrievedValue));
            } else {
                System.out.println("Data not found for key: " + key);
            }*/


            // 获取所有的键
         /*   try (RocksIterator iterator = db.newIterator()) {
                for (iterator.seekToFirst(); iterator.isValid(); iterator.next()) {
                    key = new String(iterator.key());
                    value = new String(iterator.value());
                    System.out.printf("key:%s,value:%s", key, value);
                }
            }*/

            // 删除数据
               /* db.delete(key.getBytes());
                System.out.println("Data deleted for key: " + key);
                */
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.err.println("Error operating RocksDB: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

}
```

**code file end: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/RocksDBExample.java**

### code file start: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/SharedDBExample.java 

```java
package com.akulaku.rocksdb;

import org.rocksdb.Options;
import org.rocksdb.RocksDB;
import org.rocksdb.RocksDBException;

public class SharedDBExample {
    static {
        // 必须先加载 RocksDB 库
        RocksDB.loadLibrary();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        // RocksDB 数据库的路径
        String dbPath = "D:\\code\\feature_async_cal\\feature_async_cal-pre-product\\rocksdb";

        try (Options options = new Options().setCreateIfMissing(true); RocksDB db = RocksDB.open(options, dbPath)) {

            // 创建并发写入的线程，所有线程共享一个 RocksDB 实例
            Thread thread1 = new Thread(() -> {
                try {
                    for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                        db.put(("key" + i).getBytes(), ("value" + i).getBytes());
                    }
                } catch (RocksDBException e) {
                    System.err.println("Error writing to RocksDB in thread1: " + e.getMessage());
                }
            });

            Thread thread2 = new Thread(() -> {
                try {
                    for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                        db.put(("key" + i).getBytes(), ("new_value" + i).getBytes());
                    }
                } catch (RocksDBException e) {
                    System.err.println("Error writing to RocksDB in thread2: " + e.getMessage());
                }
            });

            // 启动线程
            thread1.start();
            thread2.start();

            // 等待线程完成
            thread1.join();
            thread2.join();

            // 验证写入结果
            for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                byte[] value = db.get(("key" + i).getBytes());
                System.out.println("key" + i + " = " + new String(value));
            }

        } catch (RocksDBException | InterruptedException e) {
            System.err.println("Error accessing RocksDB: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}
```

**code file end: src/test/java/com/akulaku/rocksdb/SharedDBExample.java**

---
